en.tldr: Studies the characteristic problem for the ultrahyperbolic equation on a characteristic hyperplane, analyzing smoothness and asymptotics along characteristic lines.
en.motivation: To understand the properties of solutions to the ultrahyperbolic equation on characteristic hyperplanes, especially their asymptotic behavior along characteristic lines.
en.method: In Euclidean space, data are prescribed on a characteristic hyperplane, and the smoothness and asymptotic expansion of the solution along transversal characteristic lines are investigated.
en.result: Conditions for smoothness and asymptotic expansions of the solution along characteristic lines are obtained.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical tools for analyzing characteristic problems of ultrahyperbolic equations, useful in PDE research.

idea_spark.idea: Combining data on characteristic hyperplanes with asymptotic behavior along characteristic lines may lead to new numerical methods.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical results may depend on specific geometric structures; generalization requires caution.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires applying characteristic line methods to high-dimensional wave equations or propagator analysis in quantum field theory.

papers.title: On the inhomogeneous discounted Hamilton-Jacobi equations
papers.summary: In this paper, we study the family of inhomogeneous discounted Hamilton-Jacobi equations   \begin{equation}\label{hjs1}   λ(x)u+h(x,d_x u)=c \quad \tag{$\ast$}   \end{equation}   on a closed manifold $M$ with a non-identically vanishing discount factor $λ(x)$. There is a critical value $c_0\in[-\infty,\infty)$ such that \eqref{hjs1} admits a viscosity solution if $c>c_0$ and no solution if $c<c_0$. Inspired by the recent development [34] on the stability theory of viscosity solution, we show that the equation admits an asymptotically stable solution if and only if $c>c_0$. In this case, we determine the basin of the stable solution and investigate the long time behavior of the solution semigroup associated to \eqref{hjs1}. In particular, we relate the lowest convergence rate to the integral of $λ$ over Mather measures, which leads to an asymptotic behavior of Mather measures when $c$ goes to infinity. Assume $c\geqslant c_0$ and the equation admits a solution, we classify ergodic Mather measures and locate their distribution in the phase space.

ai.tldr: 本文研究闭流形上非均匀折扣Hamilton-Jacobi方程，发现存在临界值c0，当c>c0时方程有渐近稳定解，并刻画了稳定解的吸引域、解半群的长时间行为以及Mather测度的渐近性质。
ai.motivation: 受粘性解稳定性理论最新进展启发，旨在理解非均匀折扣因子下Hamilton-Jacobi方程解的存在性、稳定性及长时间行为。
ai.method: 通过分析临界值c0，利用粘性解理论建立解的存在性与稳定性条件，并借助Mather测度研究收敛速率和相空间分布。
ai.result: 证明了方程在c>c0时有渐近稳定解，确定了稳定解的吸引域，将最低收敛速率与Mather测度上的λ积分联系起来，并分类了遍历Mather测度。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解非均匀折扣Hamilton-Jacobi方程的解结构、稳定性判据及Mather测度的渐近行为。

idea_spark.idea: 利用Mather测度上的积分刻画收敛速率，为分析非均匀系统长时间行为提供新视角。

zh.tldr: 本文研究闭流形上非均匀折扣Hamilton-Jacobi方程，发现存在临界值c0，当c>c0时方程有渐近稳定解，并刻画了稳定解的吸引域、解半群的长时间行为以及Mather测度的渐近性质。
zh.motivation: 受粘性解稳定性理论最新进展启发，旨在理解非均匀折扣因子下Hamilton-Jacobi方程解的存在性、稳定性及长时间行为。
zh.method: 通过分析临界值c0，利用粘性解理论建立解的存在性与稳定性条件，并借助Mather测度研究收敛速率和相空间分布。
zh.result: 证明了方程在c>c0时有渐近稳定解，确定了稳定解的吸引域，将最低收敛速率与Mather测度上的λ积分联系起来，并分类了遍历Mather测度。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助理解非均匀折扣Hamilton-Jacobi方程的解结构、稳定性判据及Mather测度的渐近行为。

en.tldr: This paper studies inhomogeneous discounted Hamilton-Jacobi equations on closed manifolds, establishing a critical value c0 such that an asymptotically stable solution exists iff c>c0, and characterizing the basin of attraction, long-time behavior of the solution semigroup, and asymptotic properties of Mather measures.
en.motivation: Inspired by recent developments in stability theory of viscosity solutions, the aim is to understand existence, stability, and long-time behavior of solutions to Hamilton-Jacobi equations with non-constant discount factors.
en.method: By analyzing the critical value c0, using viscosity solution theory to establish conditions for existence and stability, and employing Mather measures to study convergence rates and phase space distribution.
en.result: It is shown that an asymptotically stable solution exists iff c>c0; the basin of attraction is determined; the lowest convergence rate is related to the integral of λ over Mather measures; and ergodic Mather measures are classified.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand solution structure, stability criteria, and asymptotic behavior of Mather measures for inhomogeneous discounted Hamilton-Jacobi equations.

idea_spark.idea: Using integrals of λ over Mather measures to characterize convergence rates offers a new perspective for analyzing long-time behavior of inhomogeneous systems.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical results rely on closed manifolds and specific discount factor forms; generalization to more general spaces or nonlinear discounts may fail.
idea_spark.inspiration: Treating the discount factor as a spatial function rather than a constant inspires studies of optimal control or ergodic theory in heterogeneous environments.

papers.title: Consistency analysis for combined homogenization and shallow water limit of water waves
papers.summary: We consider a shallow water model in a homogenization framework. For periodic topographies, Craig, Lannes and Sulem have established a consistency result under some non-resonance conditions. In the present contribution, we significantly relax the periodicity condition and treat general topographies under minimal assumptions.

ai.tldr: 本文在均质化框架下研究浅水模型，将周期性地形条件推广到一般地形，并放松了非共振条件。
ai.motivation: 现有结果仅适用于周期性地形，需要更一般的理论来处理实际中更复杂的地形。
ai.method: 通过放松周期性假设，在最小假设下对一般地形进行一致性分析。
ai.result: 建立了在一般地形下组合均质化与浅水极限的一致性结果。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解水波理论中均质化与浅水近似的适用范围。

idea_spark.inspiration: 结合数值模拟验证理论结果在实际地形中的有效性。

en.tldr: This paper studies a shallow water model in a homogenization framework, extending the consistency result from periodic topographies to general topographies under minimal assumptions.
en.motivation: Existing results only apply to periodic topographies; a more general theory is needed for realistic complex terrains.
en.method: By relaxing the periodicity condition, consistency analysis is performed for general topographies under minimal assumptions.
en.result: A consistency result for combined homogenization and shallow water limit is established for general topographies.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the applicability of homogenization and shallow water approximations in water wave theory.

idea_spark.idea: Treat topography as a random field and apply stochastic homogenization theory for further generalization.
idea_spark.risk: Verification of non-resonance conditions for general topographies may be challenging.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine numerical simulations to validate theoretical results on realistic terrains.

papers.title: Diverse Sampling in Diffusion Models with Marginal Preserving Particle Guidance
papers.summary: We present EDDY (Exact-marginal Diversification via Divergence-free dYnamics), a guidance mechanism for diffusion and flow matching models that promotes diversity among samples generated while maintaining quality. EDDY exploits symmetries of the Fokker-Planck equation, using drift perturbations that change particle trajectories while preserving the evolving marginal distribution. We instantiate this principle through kernel-based anti-symmetric pairwise matrix fields, constructed from the repulsive directions. The resulting divergence-free dynamics promote diversity at the joint particle level while preserving each particle's marginal distribution without any additional training. As computing the guidance can be computationally expensive in cases such as text-to-image generation with perceptual embeddings, we propose practical approximations as an effective and efficient solution. Experiments on synthetic distributions and text-to-image generation show that EDDY improves diversity while maintaining strong distributional fidelity compared to common baselines.

ai.tldr: 提出EDDY，一种通过无散动力学保持边缘分布的同时增加扩散模型采样多样性的引导机制。
ai.motivation: 扩散模型生成的样本多样性不足，现有方法常牺牲质量换取多样性。
ai.method: 利用Fokker-Planck方程的对称性，引入核函数构造的反对称成对矩阵场，产生无散漂移扰动，在不改变边缘分布的前提下促进粒子间多样性。
ai.result: 在合成分布和文本到图像生成任务上，EDDY在保持分布保真度的同时显著提升多样性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在不额外训练的情况下提升扩散模型的样本多样性。

idea_spark.idea: 利用物理对称性（如Fokker-Planck方程）设计引导机制，实现多样性与保真度的平衡。
idea_spark.risk: 计算开销较大，尤其在感知嵌入场景下，近似方法可能影响效果。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从统计物理中的守恒律出发，为生成模型提供新的多样性控制手段。

en.tldr: EDDY is a guidance mechanism that promotes diversity in diffusion model samples while preserving marginal distributions via divergence-free dynamics.
en.motivation: Diffusion models often lack sample diversity; existing methods trade off quality for diversity.
en.method: Exploits symmetries of the Fokker-Planck equation by adding divergence-free drift perturbations using kernel-based anti-symmetric pairwise matrix fields, preserving each particle's marginal distribution without extra training.
en.result: On synthetic distributions and text-to-image generation, EDDY improves diversity while maintaining strong distributional fidelity.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to enhance sample diversity in diffusion models without additional training.

idea_spark.risk: Computational cost can be high, especially with perceptual embeddings; approximations may degrade performance.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draws from conservation laws in statistical physics to provide new diversity control in generative models.

papers.title: Optimal Counterfactual Search in Tree Ensembles: A Study Across Modeling and Solution Paradigms
papers.summary: Trust in counterfactual explanations depends critically on whether their recommended changes are truly minimal: suboptimal explanations may vastly overshoot the actual changes needed to alter a decision, and heuristic errors can affect individuals unevenly, giving some users relevant recourse while assigning others unnecessarily costly recommendations. Consequently, we study the problem of computing optimal counterfactual explanations for tree ensembles under plausibility and actionability constraints. This is a combinatorial problem: for a fixed model, counterfactual search boils down to selecting consistent branching decisions and threshold-defined regions under a distance objective. We exploit this structure through CPCF, a constraint programming (CP) formulation in which numerical features are encoded as interval domains induced by split thresholds, while discrete features retain native finite-domain representations. This yields a compact finite-domain formulation that supports multiple distance objectives without continuous split-boundary search. We then place CPCF in a broader comparison across mathematical programming paradigms: we extend a maximum Boolean satisfiability (MaxSAT) formulation, originally designed for hard-voting random forests, to soft-voting ensembles, and compare against the current state-of-the-art mixed-integer linear programming (MILP) optimal approach. Across ten datasets and three types of tree ensembles, we analyze scalability, anytime performance, and sensitivity to distance metrics. We observe that CP achieves the best overall performance. More importantly, our results identify regimes in which the specific strengths of each paradigm make it best suited: CP is most versatile overall, MaxSAT handles hard-voting ensembles particularly well, and MILP remains competitive in amortized inference settings with a moderate number of split levels.

ai.tldr: 研究树集成模型中最优反事实解释的计算问题，比较约束规划、MaxSAT和混合整数线性规划三种范式。
ai.motivation: 反事实解释的信任依赖于推荐变更的最小性，次优解释可能导致不必要的成本且影响不均。
ai.method: 提出CPCF约束规划公式，利用分裂阈值编码数值特征为区间域，支持多种距离目标；扩展MaxSAT到软投票集成；与MILP基线对比。
ai.result: 约束规划整体最优；MaxSAT擅长硬投票集成；MILP在中等分裂层数的摊销推理中仍有竞争力。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解不同优化范式在计算反事实解释时的适用场景和性能差异。

idea_spark.idea: 利用树结构中的分裂阈值直接构造紧凑的有限域表示，避免连续边界搜索。
idea_spark.risk: 在大规模集成或高维特征下，约束规划可能面临可扩展性挑战。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将模型结构信息融入优化公式，可提升特定问题的求解效率。

en.tldr: Studies optimal counterfactual search in tree ensembles, comparing constraint programming, MaxSAT, and MILP paradigms.
en.motivation: Trust in counterfactual explanations depends on minimality; suboptimal ones can be costly and unfair.
en.method: Proposes CPCF constraint programming formulation using split thresholds for interval domains; extends MaxSAT to soft-voting ensembles; compares with MILP baseline.
en.result: CP performs best overall; MaxSAT excels on hard-voting ensembles; MILP remains competitive for amortized inference with moderate split levels.

idea_spark.risk: Scalability may be limited for very large ensembles or high-dimensional features.
idea_spark.inspiration: Incorporating model structure into optimization formulations can improve efficiency for specific problems.

papers.title: Invariant-Based Diagnostics for Graph Benchmarks
papers.summary: Progress on graph foundation models is hindered by benchmark practices that conflate the contributions of node features and graph structure, making it hard to tell whether a model actually learns from connectivity, or whether it even needs to. We propose addressing this using graph invariants, i.e., permutation-invariant, task-agnostic structural descriptors that serve as a diagnostic framework for graph benchmarks. We show that (i) invariants are more expressive than standard GNNs, (ii) invariants characterize structural heterogeneity within and across benchmark datasets, (iii) invariants predict multi-task performance, and (iv) simple invariant-based models are competitive with, and sometimes exceed, transformer and message-passing baselines across 26 datasets. Our results suggest that expressivity is not the main driver of predictive performance, and that on tasks where structure matters, a non-trainable structural proxy often matches trained message-passing models. We thus posit that invariant baselines should become a standard for evaluating whether structure is required for a task and whether a model picks up on it, serving as a stepping stone towards graph foundation models.

ai.tldr: 提出使用图不变量作为诊断工具，揭示图基准测试中节点特征与图结构贡献的混淆问题。
ai.motivation: 图基础模型的进展受限于基准测试无法区分节点特征与图结构的作用，难以判断模型是否真正从连接性中学习。
ai.method: 采用置换不变、任务无关的图不变量作为诊断框架，分析其表达能力、结构异质性、多任务预测能力，并构建简单不变量基线模型。
ai.result: 不变量比标准GNN更具表达力，能刻画数据集内外的结构异质性，预测多任务性能，且简单不变量模型在26个数据集上可与Transformer和消息传递基线竞争甚至超越。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究者评估任务是否需要图结构信息，以及模型是否真正利用了结构。

idea_spark.idea: 将非可训练的结构代理作为标准基线，用于判断结构对任务的重要性。
idea_spark.risk: 不变量可能无法捕捉所有任务相关的结构特征，存在信息损失风险。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受图论中不变量概念启发，将其用于模型诊断而非仅作为特征。

en.tldr: Proposes using graph invariants as a diagnostic tool to disentangle the contributions of node features and graph structure in graph benchmarks.
en.motivation: Progress on graph foundation models is hindered by benchmarks that conflate node features and graph structure, making it unclear whether models learn from connectivity.
en.method: Employs permutation-invariant, task-agnostic graph invariants as a diagnostic framework, analyzing their expressivity, structural heterogeneity, multi-task prediction, and building simple invariant-based baselines.

idea_spark.risk: Invariants may miss task-relevant structural features, risking information loss.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the concept of invariants in graph theory, applied here for model diagnosis rather than as features.

papers.title: Adversarial Graph Neural Network Benchmarks: Towards Practical and Fair Evaluation
papers.summary: Adversarial learning and the robustness of Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are topics of widespread interest in the machine learning community, as documented by the number of adversarial attacks and defenses designed for these purposes. While a rigorous evaluation of these adversarial methods is necessary to understand the robustness of GNNs in real-world applications, we posit that many works in the literature do not share the same experimental settings, leading to ambiguous and potentially contradictory scientific conclusions. In this benchmark, we demonstrate the importance of adopting fair, robust, and standardized evaluation protocols in adversarial GNN research. We perform a comprehensive re-evaluation of seven widely used attacks and eight recent defenses under both poisoning and evasion scenarios, across six popular graph datasets. Our study spans over 453,000 experiments conducted within a unified framework. We observe substantial differences in adversarial attack performance when evaluated under a fair and robust procedure. Our findings reveal that previously overlooked factors, such as target node selection and the training process of the attacked model, have a profound impact on attack effectiveness, to the extent of completely distorting performance insights. These results underscore the urgent need for standardized evaluations in adversarial graph machine learning.

ai.tldr: 本基准测试通过统一框架对七种攻击和八种防御进行超过45万次实验，发现目标节点选择和训练过程等被忽视的因素会显著影响攻击效果，强调对抗图机器学习中标准化评估的紧迫性。
ai.motivation: 现有对抗图神经网络研究缺乏统一的实验设置，导致结论模糊甚至矛盾，亟需公平、稳健的评估协议。
ai.method: 在六个图数据集上，对七种攻击和八种防御进行投毒和逃避场景下的全面重评估，统一框架内执行超过45万次实验。
ai.result: 目标节点选择和被攻击模型的训练过程对攻击效果有深远影响，甚至完全扭曲性能洞察；公平评估下攻击性能差异显著。

en.tldr: This benchmark conducts over 453,000 experiments on seven attacks and eight defenses under a unified framework, revealing that overlooked factors like target node selection and training process profoundly impact attack effectiveness, underscoring the urgent need for standardized evaluation in adversarial graph machine learning.
en.motivation: Existing adversarial GNN research lacks unified experimental settings, leading to ambiguous and contradictory conclusions, necessitating fair and robust evaluation protocols.
en.method: Comprehensive re-evaluation of seven attacks and eight defenses under poisoning and evasion scenarios across six graph datasets, with over 453,000 experiments in a unified framework.
en.result: Target node selection and the training process of the attacked model have a profound impact on attack effectiveness, potentially distorting performance insights; substantial differences in attack performance under fair evaluation.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers understand key bias factors in adversarial GNN evaluation and guides the design of more reliable experimental protocols.

idea_spark.idea: Develop dynamic target node selection strategies that adapt attack targets based on model training state to enhance attack effectiveness.
idea_spark.risk: Over-reliance on standardized protocols may overlook unique requirements of specific application scenarios, leading to insufficient generalization of evaluation results.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the impact of target node selection, explore key node identification methods in graph structures to design more efficient defense mechanisms.

papers.title: Continuous-state branching processes with Lévy-Khintchine drift-interaction: Laplace duality and Fellerian extensions
papers.summary: We investigate the class of continuous-state branching processes with interaction driven by a Lévy-Khintchine type drift (CBDI). These $[0,\infty]$-valued processes capture both dynamics of branching and density-dependence, allowing for cooperation at low population sizes and competition at high densities. Although the interaction breaks the branching property, the Lévy--Khintchine form of the drift induces a Laplace duality. This duality expresses the Laplace transform of a CBDI process in terms of that of another CBDI process, in which the branching and drift-interaction mechanisms are exchanged. The process, stopped upon hitting either boundary $0$ or $\infty$, is uniquely characterized in law by these mechanisms. A Fellerian extension is constructed when the drift is non-Lipschitz and sufficiently strong at a boundary, allowing the process to leave this boundary continuously and possibly re-enter it. We identify parameters, defined in terms of the mechanisms and their associated scale function and potential measure, that determine the boundary behavior at $0$ and $\infty$ (entrance, exit or regular). Settings exhibiting all regimes, including regular-for-itself and non-sticky boundaries, arise when the mechanisms are assumed to be regularly varying. Our approach combines Laplace duality, which facilitates the analysis of semigroups and the construction of sharp Lyapunov functions for the associated generators, with comparison principles for a class of stochastic equations that ensure monotonicity and convergence properties of first-passage times.

ai.tldr: 研究了一类由Lévy-Khintchine型漂移相互作用驱动的连续状态分支过程，建立了Laplace对偶性并构造了Feller扩张。
ai.motivation: 理解具有密度依赖相互作用的分支过程的边界行为，特别是当漂移非Lipschitz且足够强时，过程如何连续离开边界并可能重新进入。
ai.method: 利用Laplace对偶性分析半群和构造Lyapunov函数，结合比较原理研究首达时的单调性和收敛性。
ai.result: 确定了边界0和∞的进入、退出或正则行为参数，并展示了当机制正则变化时所有可能的状态。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了分析具有相互作用的分支过程边界行为的系统框架和工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将边界行为分类与正则变化机制结合，可能用于建模种群动态中的临界转变。
idea_spark.risk: 非Lipschitz漂移可能导致解的唯一性或稳定性问题。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从Lévy-Khintchine公式和Feller扩张理论中汲取灵感，处理非标准边界条件。

en.motivation: To understand boundary behavior of branching processes with density-dependent interaction, especially when the drift is non-Lipschitz and strong enough to allow continuous exit and re-entry.
en.method: Uses Laplace duality to analyze semigroups and construct Lyapunov functions, combined with comparison principles for monotonicity and convergence of first-passage times.
en.result: Identifies parameters determining entrance, exit, or regular behavior at boundaries 0 and ∞, and shows all regimes arise under regularly varying mechanisms.
en.help_to_user: Provides a systematic framework and tools for analyzing boundary behavior of interacting branching processes.

idea_spark.risk: Non-Lipschitz drift may cause issues with uniqueness or stability of solutions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draws from Lévy-Khintchine formula and Feller extension theory to handle non-standard boundary conditions.

papers.title: Stochastic Non-Smooth Non-Convex Optimization with Decision-Dependent Distributions
papers.summary: We study stochastic zeroth-order optimization with decision-dependent distributions, where the sampling law depends on the current decision and only noisy function values are available. For the non-smooth non-convex setting, we establish an explicit convergence guarantee for finding a $(δ,ε)$-Goldstein stationary point with stochastic zeroth-order oracle (SZO) complexity of $\mathcal{O}(d^2δ^{-3}ε^{-3})$. In addition, we show that the above complexity can be achieved with single SZO feedback per iteration. We further extend the analysis to smooth and Hessian-Lipschitz objectives, obtaining complexities $\mathcal{O}(d^2ε^{-6})$ and $\mathcal{O}(d^2ε^{-9/2})$, respectively. In the Hessian-Lipschitz case, this improves the best-known dependence on $ε$ for decision-dependent zeroth-order methods by a factor of $ε^{-1/2}$.

ai.tldr: 研究决策依赖分布下的随机零阶非光滑非凸优化，给出了达到Goldstein稳定点的复杂度界。
ai.motivation: 实际优化问题中采样分布常依赖当前决策，但现有理论缺乏非光滑非凸情形下的收敛保证。
ai.method: 利用随机零阶梯度估计和Goldstein稳定点概念，设计单次反馈迭代算法并分析复杂度。
ai.result: 非光滑非凸情形下SZO复杂度为O(d²δ⁻³ε⁻³)，光滑和Hessian-Lipschitz情形下分别达到O(d²ε⁻⁶)和O(d²ε⁻⁹/²)，后者改进了已知最优ε依赖。
ai.help_to_user: 为决策依赖分布下的零阶优化提供了理论收敛保证和复杂度分析，指导算法设计。

idea_spark.idea: 利用单次反馈实现高效零阶优化，可尝试扩展到分布式或在线设置。
idea_spark.risk: 复杂度分析依赖于光滑性假设，实际非光滑问题可能需额外正则化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 决策依赖分布与零阶优化的结合启发自适应采样策略设计。

en.tldr: Studies stochastic zeroth-order optimization with decision-dependent distributions, providing complexity bounds for reaching Goldstein stationary points in non-smooth non-convex settings.
en.motivation: Real-world optimization often involves sampling distributions that depend on the current decision, yet theoretical guarantees for non-smooth non-convex cases are lacking.
en.method: Uses stochastic zeroth-order gradient estimates and the Goldstein stationary point concept, designing a single-feedback-per-iteration algorithm with complexity analysis.
en.result: Achieves SZO complexity O(d²δ⁻³ε⁻³) for non-smooth non-convex, O(d²ε⁻⁶) for smooth, and O(d²ε⁻⁹/²) for Hessian-Lipschitz objectives, improving the best-known ε-dependence by ε⁻¹/² in the latter case.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical convergence guarantees and complexity analysis for zeroth-order optimization under decision-dependent distributions, guiding algorithm design.

idea_spark.idea: Efficient zeroth-order optimization with single feedback could be extended to distributed or online settings.
idea_spark.risk: Complexity analysis relies on smoothness assumptions; practical non-smooth problems may require additional regularization.
idea_spark.inspiration: The combination of decision-dependent distributions and zeroth-order optimization inspires adaptive sampling strategies.

papers.title: Convexity in Disguise: A Theoretical Framework for Nonconvex Low-Rank Matrix Estimation
papers.summary: Nonconvex methods have emerged as a dominant approach for low-rank matrix estimation, a problem that arises widely in machine learning and AI for learning and representing high-dimensional data. Existing analyses for these methods often require additional regularization to mitigate nonconvexity, even though such regularization is often unnecessary in practice. Moreover, most analyses rely on problem-specific arguments that are difficult to generalize to more complex settings. In this paper, we develop a theoretical framework for studying nonconvex procedures across a broad class of low-rank matrix estimation problems. Rather than focusing on a specific model, we reveal a fundamental mechanism that explains why nonconvex procedures can behave well in low-rank estimation. Our key device is a {\it benign regularizer} that does not alter the original update rule, but yields an equivalent locally strongly convex formulation of the algorithm. This perspective uncovers a disguised convexity inherent in the nonconvex procedure and provides a new route to theoretical guarantees for nonconvex low-rank matrix estimation.

ai.tldr: 本文提出一个理论框架，揭示非凸低秩矩阵估计中隐藏的凸性，通过良性正则化器在不改变更新规则的情况下实现局部强凸性，从而简化理论分析。
ai.motivation: 现有非凸方法分析常依赖问题特定论证且需额外正则化，难以推广到复杂场景。
ai.method: 引入良性正则化器，使非凸过程等价于局部强凸优化，从而揭示伪装凸性。
ai.result: 建立了非凸低秩矩阵估计的理论保证新路径，无需实际添加正则化项。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解非凸方法为何在实践中有效，并提供统一分析工具。

idea_spark.idea: 利用良性正则化器将非凸问题转化为局部凸问题，简化理论证明。
idea_spark.risk: 良性正则化器的构造可能依赖问题结构，通用性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从非凸方法中寻找隐藏凸性，启发设计更高效优化算法。

en.tldr: This paper develops a theoretical framework revealing disguised convexity in nonconvex low-rank matrix estimation via a benign regularizer that yields an equivalent locally strongly convex formulation without altering the update rule.
en.motivation: Existing analyses for nonconvex methods often require problem-specific arguments and extra regularization, limiting generalization to complex settings.
en.method: Introduces a benign regularizer that does not change the original update but makes the algorithm locally strongly convex, exposing hidden convexity.
en.result: Provides a new route to theoretical guarantees for nonconvex low-rank matrix estimation without actual regularization.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand why nonconvex methods work well in practice and offers a unified analysis tool.

idea_spark.idea: Use benign regularizers to convert nonconvex problems into locally convex ones, simplifying theoretical proofs.
idea_spark.risk: Construction of benign regularizers may depend on problem structure; generality needs further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Finding hidden convexity in nonconvex methods inspires design of more efficient optimization algorithms.

papers.title: Teaching LLMs Program Semantics via Symbolic Execution Traces
papers.summary: We introduce an evaluation framework of 500 C verification tasks across five property types (memory safety, overflow, termination, reachability, data races) built on SV-COMP 2025, and evaluate 14 models across six families. We find that high overall accuracy masks a critical weakness: while most models reliably confirm properties hold, violation detection varies widely and degrades sharply with program length. To close this gap, we train on formal verification artifacts: running the Soteria symbolic execution engine on generic open-source C code and using the resulting traces for continued pretraining of Qwen3-8B. Just ${\sim}$3,000 bug traces combined with chain-of-thought reasoning at inference time improve violation detection by over 17 percentage points, producing one of the most balanced accuracy profiles among evaluated models. On violation detection, the trained 8B model outperforms the 4$\times$ larger Qwen3-32B without thinking and approaches it in overall accuracy. The interaction between trace training and chain-of-thought is superadditive: neither alone provides meaningful gains, but their combination does. Improvements transfer across all five property types, including ones the training traces do not target. Our 28 configurations confirm the gains stem from trace semantics, not code volume, and that trace curation and format matter.

ai.tldr: 提出基于符号执行轨迹训练LLM理解程序语义的方法，在C程序验证任务上显著提升违规检测能力。
ai.motivation: 现有LLM在程序验证中高整体准确率掩盖了违规检测的严重缺陷，且随程序长度增加性能急剧下降。
ai.method: 使用Soteria符号执行引擎在开源C代码上生成执行轨迹，对Qwen3-8B进行持续预训练，并结合推理时的思维链。
ai.result: 仅约3000条bug轨迹与思维链结合使违规检测提升17个百分点以上，8B模型在违规检测上超越4倍大的Qwen3-32B。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过符号执行轨迹训练提升LLM在程序验证中的违规检测能力。

idea_spark.idea: 利用符号执行轨迹作为训练数据，结合思维链推理，可显著增强LLM对程序语义的理解。
idea_spark.risk: 轨迹质量和格式对效果影响大，且需要大量计算资源进行持续预训练。
idea_spark.inspiration: 符号执行轨迹与思维链的协同效应提示，结构化中间表示与推理步骤结合可能是提升LLM推理能力的关键。

en.tldr: Proposes training LLMs on symbolic execution traces to teach program semantics, significantly improving violation detection in C verification tasks.
en.motivation: High overall accuracy in LLM-based program verification masks a critical weakness in violation detection, which degrades sharply with program length.
en.method: Continued pretraining of Qwen3-8B on symbolic execution traces generated by the Soteria engine on open-source C code, combined with chain-of-thought reasoning at inference.
en.result: Just ~3,000 bug traces with chain-of-thought improve violation detection by over 17 percentage points; the 8B model outperforms the 4x larger Qwen3-32B on violation detection.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how symbolic execution traces can enhance LLM violation detection in program verification.

idea_spark.idea: Using symbolic execution traces as training data with chain-of-thought reasoning can significantly enhance LLM understanding of program semantics.
idea_spark.risk: Trace quality and format are critical, and continued pretraining requires substantial computational resources.
idea_spark.inspiration: The superadditive effect of trace training and chain-of-thought suggests that structured intermediate representations combined with reasoning steps may be key to improving LLM reasoning.

papers.title: Flow Matching with Arbitrary Auxiliary Paths
papers.summary: We introduce a new generative modeling framework, \textbf{Flow Matching with Arbitrary Auxiliary Paths (AuxPath-FM)}, which generalizes conditional flow matching by incorporating an auxiliary variable drawn from an arbitrary distribution into the probability path. Unlike prior methods that restrict auxiliary components to Gaussian noise, AuxPath-FM allows the variable $η$ to follow any distribution, producing trajectories of the form $X_t = a(t)X_1 + b(t)X_0 + c(t)η$. We theoretically demonstrate that this construction preserves the continuity equation and maintains a training objective consistent with the marginal formulation. This flexibility enables the design of diverse probability paths using various priors, including Gaussian, Uniform, Laplace, and discrete Rademacher distributions, each offering unique geometric properties for generative flows. Furthermore, our framework allows for specialized tasks such as label-guided generation by encoding structured semantic information into the auxiliary distribution. Overall, AuxPath-FM provides a principled and general foundation for probability path design, offering both theoretical generality and practical flexibility for diverse generative modeling tasks.

ai.tldr: 提出一种通用生成建模框架AuxPath-FM，允许辅助变量服从任意分布，从而设计多样化的概率路径。
ai.motivation: 现有条件流匹配方法限制辅助变量为高斯噪声，缺乏灵活性。
ai.method: 引入任意分布的辅助变量η，构造轨迹X_t = a(t)X_1 + b(t)X_0 + c(t)η，并证明其满足连续性方程和边际训练目标。
ai.result: 支持高斯、均匀、拉普拉斯、离散Rademacher等多种先验分布，并可用于标签引导生成等任务。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种灵活设计概率路径的通用框架，适用于多种生成任务。

idea_spark.idea: 利用非高斯辅助变量编码结构化语义信息，实现可控生成。

zh.tldr: 提出一种通用生成建模框架AuxPath-FM，允许辅助变量服从任意分布，从而设计多样化的概率路径。
zh.motivation: 现有条件流匹配方法限制辅助变量为高斯噪声，缺乏灵活性。
zh.method: 引入任意分布的辅助变量η，构造轨迹X_t = a(t)X_1 + b(t)X_0 + c(t)η，并证明其满足连续性方程和边际训练目标。
zh.result: 支持高斯、均匀、拉普拉斯、离散Rademacher等多种先验分布，并可用于标签引导生成等任务。
zh.help_to_user: 提供了一种灵活设计概率路径的通用框架，适用于多种生成任务。

idea_spark.idea: 利用非高斯辅助变量编码结构化语义信息，实现可控生成。
idea_spark.risk: 任意分布的选择可能影响训练稳定性和生成质量。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从概率路径设计的角度，启发探索更多先验分布与生成任务的结合。

en.tldr: Introduces AuxPath-FM, a generative framework allowing arbitrary auxiliary distributions for flexible probability path design.
en.motivation: Existing conditional flow matching restricts auxiliary components to Gaussian noise, limiting flexibility.
en.method: Incorporates an auxiliary variable η from any distribution into the trajectory X_t = a(t)X_1 + b(t)X_0 + c(t)η, preserving the continuity equation and marginal training objective.
en.result: Supports Gaussian, Uniform, Laplace, and discrete Rademacher priors, enabling label-guided generation and diverse geometric properties.
en.help_to_user: Provides a principled foundation for designing probability paths with arbitrary priors, applicable to various generative tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage non-Gaussian auxiliary distributions to encode structured semantic information for controllable generation.
idea_spark.risk: Choice of arbitrary distribution may affect training stability and generation quality.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires exploration of diverse prior distributions combined with generative tasks from a probability path design perspective.

papers.title: Label Correcting Algorithms for the Multiobjective Temporal Shortest Path Problem
papers.summary: Given a directed, discrete-time temporal graph $G=(V,R)$, a start node $s\in V$, and $p\geq1$ objectives, the single-source multiobjective temporal shortest path problem asks, for each $v\in V$, for the set of nondominated images of temporal $s$-$v$-paths together with a corresponding efficient path for each image. A recent general label setting algorithm for this problem relies on two properties of the objectives - monotonicity and isotonicity. Monotonicity generalizes the nonnegativity assumption required by label setting methods for the classical additive single-objective shortest path problem on static graphs, while isotonicity ensures that the order of the objective values of two paths is preserved when both are extended by the same arc.   In this paper, we study the problem without assuming monotonicity and/or isotonicity. A key difficulty in this setting is that zero-duration temporal cycles may need to be traversed an arbitrary finite number of times to generate all nondominated images. This motivates the study of a restricted problem variant in which a maximum admissible path length $K$ is imposed, and only paths containing at most $K$ arcs are considered. We develop general label correcting algorithms for this setting and establish several sufficient conditions under which such a bound is not required, implying that the algorithms compute all nondominated images.

ai.tldr: 针对多目标时间最短路径问题，在不假设单调性和等调性的情况下，提出了标签修正算法，并研究了最大路径长度约束的必要性。
ai.motivation: 现有标签设定算法依赖单调性和等调性，但实际应用中这些性质可能不成立，需要更通用的算法。
ai.method: 引入最大允许路径长度K，限制路径弧数不超过K，在此约束下设计标签修正算法，并给出无需该约束的充分条件。
ai.result: 算法能计算所有非支配图像，且在某些条件下无需路径长度限制。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解多目标时间最短路径问题在非理想条件下的求解方法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用路径长度上界简化问题，再通过充分条件逐步放松约束。
idea_spark.risk: 充分条件可能过于严格，实际应用中仍需长度约束。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从时间图中零时长循环的遍历次数限制出发，启发对循环结构的处理策略。

zh.tldr: 针对多目标时间最短路径问题，在不假设单调性和等调性的情况下，提出了标签修正算法，并研究了最大路径长度约束的必要性。

en.tldr: Proposes label correcting algorithms for the multiobjective temporal shortest path problem without assuming monotonicity or isotonicity, and investigates when a maximum path length bound is necessary.
en.motivation: Existing label setting algorithms rely on monotonicity and isotonicity, which may not hold in practice, necessitating more general algorithms.
en.method: Introduces a maximum admissible path length K, restricts paths to at most K arcs, designs label correcting algorithms under this constraint, and provides sufficient conditions for when the bound is unnecessary.
en.result: The algorithms compute all nondominated images, and under certain conditions, no path length bound is required.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to solve multiobjective temporal shortest path problems when ideal properties are absent.

idea_spark.idea: Use a path length upper bound to simplify the problem, then relax the bound via sufficient conditions.
idea_spark.risk: Sufficient conditions may be too restrictive, requiring the bound in practice.
idea_spark.inspiration: The handling of zero-duration temporal cycles inspires strategies for dealing with cycles in other temporal problems.

papers.title: Semi-global solutions to the Goursat problem for second-order hyper-quasilinear hyperbolic systems with lineary dependent principal coefficients and applications to the vacuum Einstein equations
papers.summary: In this work, we significantly extend the results of D. Houpa, 2006 on the Goursat problem for second-order semi-linear hyperbolic systems to the broader framwork of second-order hyper-quasilinear hyperbolic systems of Goursat type, in which the coefficients of the second-order derivatives depend linearly on the unknown. By adapting techniques inspired by Y. Foures (Choquet)- Bruhat, Acta Mathematica, 1952. we show that in the Sobolev type spaces for the Goursat problem quasilinear hyperbolic of the second order considered, the solution exists and is defined in the vicinity of the meeting characteristic hypersurfaces which carry the initial data. As an application, in harmonic gauge, we derive a semi-global existence and uniqueness result for the vacuum Einstein equations.

ai.tldr: 将Goursat问题从半线性推广到超拟线性双曲系统，证明解在特征超曲面附近存在，并应用于真空爱因斯坦方程。
ai.motivation: 扩展半线性双曲系统Goursat问题的经典结果到更一般的超拟线性情形。
ai.method: 采用Bruhat的Sobolev空间技术，处理二阶导数系数线性依赖于未知函数的情况。
ai.result: 在调和规范下，得到真空爱因斯坦方程的半整体存在唯一性。
ai.help_to_user: 为拟线性双曲系统Goursat问题提供存在性理论，可用于广义相对论初值问题。

idea_spark.idea: 利用线性依赖系数简化拟线性系统的结构分析。
idea_spark.risk: 线性依赖假设可能限制实际应用范围。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从半线性到拟线性的推广思路可启发其他PDE问题的类似扩展。

en.tldr: Extends Goursat problem results from semi-linear to hyper-quasilinear hyperbolic systems, proving local existence near characteristic hypersurfaces, with application to vacuum Einstein equations.
en.motivation: Generalize classical Goursat problem results for semi-linear hyperbolic systems to the more general hyper-quasilinear case.
en.method: Adapts Bruhat's Sobolev space techniques to handle second-order coefficients linearly dependent on the unknown.
en.result: Obtains semi-global existence and uniqueness for vacuum Einstein equations in harmonic gauge.
en.help_to_user: Provides existence theory for quasilinear hyperbolic Goursat problems, applicable to initial value problems in general relativity.

idea_spark.idea: Exploit linear dependence of coefficients to simplify structural analysis of quasilinear systems.
idea_spark.risk: Linear dependence assumption may limit practical applicability.
idea_spark.inspiration: The semi-linear to quasilinear extension approach can inspire similar generalizations for other PDE problems.

papers.title: Master equations with an individual noise on finite state graphs
papers.summary: We develop a classical well-posedness and regularity theory on a finite connected weighted graph for an extended mean field game system, its associated master equation, and a Hamilton-Jacobi- Bellman equation on the probability simplex, all in the presence of an individual noise operator. The geometric structure is inherited from the logarithmic-mean activation functional of discrete optimal transport, under which the entropic Fokker-Planck equation appears as a gradient flow on the graph and the individual noise operator is a bilinear form in the probability vector and the Wasserstein gradient. A central technical step is a quantitative preservation-of-positivity estimate for the discrete continuity equation, which rules out finite-time boundary degeneracy and yields a classical solution theory for the master equation on the open simplex without imposing any boundary condition. As an application, we recover a Nash equilibrium interpretation of the discrete system in terms of Markov chains on the graph. Our setup is inspired by the computational algorithms for optimal mass transport of [10, 11] and provides a rigorous well-posedness theory for several of the equations derived in [25].

ai.tldr: 在有限连通加权图上，针对带有个体噪声算子的扩展平均场博弈系统、主方程和概率单纯形上的Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman方程，建立了经典的适定性和正则性理论。
ai.motivation: 为离散最优传输计算算法提供严格的数学基础，并解决相关方程在开单纯形上的适定性问题。
ai.method: 利用离散最优传输的对数均值激活泛函的几何结构，通过离散连续性方程的定量保正性估计，避免边界退化，从而无需边界条件即可得到经典解。
ai.result: 建立了主方程在开单纯形上的经典解理论，并恢复了离散系统在马尔可夫链意义下的纳什均衡解释。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究离散图上的平均场博弈和最优传输问题提供了严格的数学框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将个体噪声算子视为概率向量与Wasserstein梯度的双线性形式，可能启发新的数值算法设计。
idea_spark.risk: 理论依赖于有限图结构，扩展到无限图或连续空间时可能面临挑战。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从离散最优传输算法出发构建理论，提示计算与理论可相互促进。

en.tldr: Develops a classical well-posedness and regularity theory on finite connected weighted graphs for an extended mean field game system, its master equation, and a Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman equation on the probability simplex, all with an individual noise operator.
en.motivation: To provide a rigorous mathematical foundation for computational algorithms in discrete optimal transport and to resolve well-posedness of related equations on the open simplex.
en.method: Leverages the geometric structure from the logarithmic-mean activation functional of discrete optimal transport, using a quantitative preservation-of-positivity estimate for the discrete continuity equation to avoid boundary degeneracy and obtain classical solutions without boundary conditions.
en.result: Establishes a classical solution theory for the master equation on the open simplex and recovers a Nash equilibrium interpretation of the discrete system in terms of Markov chains.
en.help_to_user: Offers a rigorous mathematical framework for studying mean field games and optimal transport on discrete graphs.

idea_spark.idea: Viewing the individual noise operator as a bilinear form in the probability vector and Wasserstein gradient could inspire new numerical algorithms.
idea_spark.risk: The theory relies on finite graph structure; extension to infinite graphs or continuous spaces may face challenges.
idea_spark.inspiration: Building theory from discrete optimal transport algorithms suggests a fruitful interplay between computation and theory.

papers.title: Integrable perturbations of polynomial Hamiltonian systems
papers.summary: We consider a Hamiltonian system on the symplectic space $({\mathbb{R}}^{2n}, dy\wedge dx)$ with a real-analytic Hamiltonian $H : {\mathbb{R}}^{2n}\to {\mathbb{R}}$. We assume that the system has a non-degenerate equilibrium position at the origin. Under some nonresonance assumptions we prove the following.   For any positive integer $M$ there exists a real-analytic function $F:{\mathbb{R}}^{2n}\to{\mathbb{R}}$ such that   (1) $F = O\big( (|x|+|y|)^{M+1} \big)$ at the origin,   (2) the system with Hamiltonian $H+F$ is completely integrable in ${\mathbb{R}}^{2n}$.

ai.tldr: 本文证明，在非共振条件下，任何实解析多项式哈密顿系统都可以通过添加高阶小扰动变为完全可积系统。
ai.motivation: 研究哈密顿系统在扰动下保持可积性的条件，探索非共振假设下可积扰动的存在性。
ai.method: 利用实解析函数构造，在原点附近添加高阶小扰动，并验证系统在新哈密顿量下完全可积。
ai.result: 对任意正整数M，存在一个在原点处为O(|x|+|y|^(M+1))的实解析函数F，使得H+F对应的系统在R^{2n}上完全可积。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解哈密顿系统的可积性扰动提供了理论保证，可用于分析近可积系统的动力学行为。

idea_spark.idea: 利用非共振条件构造高阶小扰动，使系统完全可积，可启发设计数值可积近似或控制策略。
idea_spark.risk: 非共振条件在实际系统中可能难以满足，且构造的F可能不唯一或解析性要求过强。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可尝试将类似扰动方法应用于量子系统或随机哈密顿系统，探索可积性在噪声下的鲁棒性。

zh.help_to_user: 为理解哈密顿系统的可积性扰动提供了理论保证，可用于分析近可积系统的动力学行为。

en.tldr: This paper proves that under nonresonance conditions, any real-analytic polynomial Hamiltonian system can be made completely integrable by adding a small higher-order perturbation.
en.motivation: To investigate conditions under which Hamiltonian systems remain integrable under perturbations, and to prove existence of integrable perturbations under nonresonance assumptions.
en.method: Construct a real-analytic function F that is O(|x|+|y|^(M+1)) near the origin, and verify that the system with Hamiltonian H+F is completely integrable on R^{2n}.
en.result: For any positive integer M, there exists a real-analytic function F such that the perturbed Hamiltonian system is completely integrable.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical guarantee for integrable perturbations of Hamiltonian systems, useful for analyzing dynamics of nearly integrable systems.

idea_spark.idea: Using nonresonance conditions to construct small perturbations that yield integrability could inspire design of numerically integrable approximations or control strategies.
idea_spark.risk: Nonresonance conditions may be hard to satisfy in practice, and the constructed F may not be unique or may require strong analyticity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider applying similar perturbation methods to quantum systems or stochastic Hamiltonian systems to explore robustness of integrability under noise.

papers.title: Band Unfolding via the Quadratic Pseudospectrum
papers.summary: Band theory provides the foundation for understanding electronic structure in crystalline materials, but its reliance on exact translational symmetry limits its applicability to systems with defects, disorder, incommensurate modulations, or large unit cells. Here, we introduce a band unfolding framework that directly generalizes traditional band theory to systems where exact periodicity is absent, and which remains well-defined for both aperiodic and finite systems. To do so, we employ a pseudospectral approach to identify approximate joint eigenvectors of a system's Hamiltonian and translation operators, thereby yielding an unfolded band structure whose features are directly connected to the manifestation of approximate extended states simultaneously localized in energy and crystalline momentum. To reveal bulk-only spectral phenomena in finite systems, we further show that this pseudospectral framework naturally accommodates additional operators that suppress contributions from boundary-localized states, enabling the systematic isolation of intrinsic bulk behavior. We benchmark the scheme on several representative systems in one and two dimensions, including a Fibonacci chain, where our approach is able to both reveal a dispersive envelope while preserving the underlying hierarchy of spectral gaps. Looking forward, this pseudospectral approach may yield a broad framework for predicting momentum-resolved material responses in aperiodic, disordered, and finite systems where conventional band-theoretic methods are not applicable.

ai.tldr: 提出基于二次伪谱的能带展开框架，将传统能带理论推广到无严格周期性的系统（如缺陷、无序、非公度调制或大原胞体系），并能在有限系统中分离体态与边界态。
ai.motivation: 传统能带理论依赖精确平移对称性，无法处理缺陷、无序、非公度调制或大原胞等体系，需要一种不依赖严格周期性的能带分析方法。
ai.method: 利用伪谱方法寻找哈密顿量与平移算子的近似联合本征向量，得到展开能带结构；并引入额外算子抑制边界态贡献，以揭示有限系统中的纯体态谱特征。
ai.result: 在一维和二维模型（包括斐波那契链）上验证，该方法既能揭示色散包络，又能保留谱间隙的层级结构。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究非周期、无序或有限体系的动量分辨电子结构提供了一种新的理论工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将二次伪谱方法应用于准晶或非晶材料的输运性质预测，或结合机器学习加速近似本征向量的求解。
idea_spark.risk: 计算复杂度可能随系统尺寸增加而显著上升，且伪谱方法对噪声敏感，需谨慎选择阈值参数。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴了数值线性代数中伪谱的概念，将其与能带展开结合，为处理无严格周期性的系统提供了新视角。

zh.help_to_user: 为研究非周期、无序或有限体系的动量分辨电子结构提供了一种新的理论工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将二次伪谱方法应用于准晶或非晶材料的输运性质预测，或结合机器学习加速近似本征向量的求解。
idea_spark.risk: 计算复杂度可能随系统尺寸增加而显著上升，且伪谱方法对噪声敏感，需谨慎选择阈值参数。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴了数值线性代数中伪谱的概念，将其与能带展开结合，为处理无严格周期性的系统提供了新视角。

en.tldr: Introduces a band unfolding framework based on the quadratic pseudospectrum, generalizing traditional band theory to systems without exact periodicity (e.g., defects, disorder, incommensurate modulations, large unit cells) and isolating bulk from boundary states in finite systems.
en.motivation: Traditional band theory relies on exact translational symmetry, limiting its applicability to systems with defects, disorder, incommensurate modulations, or large unit cells; a band analysis method not requiring strict periodicity is needed.
en.method: Uses a pseudospectral approach to find approximate joint eigenvectors of the Hamiltonian and translation operators, yielding an unfolded band structure; additional operators suppress boundary-state contributions to reveal intrinsic bulk spectral features in finite systems.
en.result: Validated on 1D and 2D models including a Fibonacci chain, the method reveals a dispersive envelope while preserving the hierarchical spectral gaps.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new theoretical tool for studying momentum-resolved electronic structure in aperiodic, disordered, or finite systems.

idea_spark.idea: Apply the quadratic pseudospectral method to predict transport properties in quasicrystals or amorphous materials, or combine with machine learning to accelerate approximate eigenvector computation.
idea_spark.risk: Computational complexity may increase significantly with system size, and the pseudospectral method is sensitive to noise, requiring careful threshold parameter selection.
idea_spark.inspiration: Borrows the concept of pseudospectra from numerical linear algebra and combines it with band unfolding, offering a new perspective for systems without strict periodicity.

papers.title: Maximal Controlled Invariant-MPC: Enhancing Feasibility and Reducing Conservatism through Terminal CBF Constraint in Safety-Critical Control
papers.summary: Optimal control for safety-critical systems is often dependent on the conservativeness of constraints. Control Barrier Functions (CBFs) serve as a medium to represent such constraints, but constructing a minimally conservative CBF is a computationally intractable problem. Therefore, approaches that can guarantee safety while reducing conservatism will help improve the optimality of the system under consideration. Here, we present a Model Predictive Control (MPC) formulation using CBF as a terminal constraint, which is proven to improve feasibility and reachable sets with increasing prediction horizon. The constructive nature of the proofs allows for warm-starting the nonlinear optimization problem, thereby reducing the computational time substantially. Simulations are set up for a simple nonholonomic system to numerically validate the results, and it is observed that the number of infeasible points decreased by a factor of 1.7 to 2.7. The increase in reachable state space was demonstrated by the ability of the system to track trajectories that are entirely inside the unsafe region of the control barrier function.

ai.tldr: 提出一种以控制障碍函数作为终端约束的模型预测控制方法，在保证安全性的同时降低保守性，提升可行性和可达集。
ai.motivation: 安全关键系统中，控制障碍函数常导致约束过于保守，影响最优性；而构造最小保守CBF计算困难。
ai.method: 在MPC框架中将CBF作为终端约束，利用构造性证明实现热启动，减少非线性优化计算时间。
ai.result: 非完整系统仿真显示不可行点减少1.7至2.7倍，可达状态空间扩大，能跟踪完全位于CBF不安全区域内的轨迹。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种在安全关键控制中平衡安全性与最优性的实用MPC方案，降低计算负担。

idea_spark.idea: 结合最大控制不变集与MPC，利用预测时域扩展可达集。
idea_spark.risk: 终端CBF的构造仍依赖系统模型，模型误差可能影响安全性保证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将CBF从硬约束转为终端软约束，或可进一步降低保守性。

en.tldr: Proposes an MPC formulation with Control Barrier Function as a terminal constraint, improving feasibility and reachable sets while reducing conservatism in safety-critical control.
en.motivation: CBF constraints are often overly conservative, hindering optimality; constructing a minimally conservative CBF is computationally intractable.
en.method: Incorporates CBF as a terminal constraint in MPC, leveraging constructive proofs for warm-starting to reduce nonlinear optimization time.
en.result: Simulations on a nonholonomic system show infeasible points reduced by a factor of 1.7 to 2.7, and reachable state space expanded to track trajectories inside the unsafe region of the CBF.
en.help_to_user: Provides a practical MPC approach that balances safety and optimality in safety-critical control with reduced computational burden.

idea_spark.idea: Combines maximal controlled invariant sets with MPC to expand reachable sets via prediction horizon.
idea_spark.risk: Construction of terminal CBF still depends on system model; model errors may compromise safety guarantees.
idea_spark.inspiration: Softening the terminal CBF constraint could further reduce conservatism.

papers.title: A Unified Zeroth-Order Proximal Newton-Type Framework for Composite Optimization
papers.summary: We propose a unified derivative-free proximal Newton-type algorithm framework for solving composite optimization problems formulated as the sum of a black-box function and a known regularization term. We establish the iteration and oracle complexity bounds for the algorithm to attain an $ε$-optimal solution under both nonconvex and strongly convex settings. We also establish its local R-superlinear convergence based on the Dennis--Moré condition, and theoretically address an open problem by showing that the BFGS scheme is more compatible with finite-difference gradient estimators than with smoothing-based ones. Numerical experiments are further presented to demonstrate the efficiency of the proposed method.

ai.tldr: 提出一种统一的零阶近端牛顿型算法框架，用于求解黑箱函数加已知正则项的复合优化问题。
ai.motivation: 现有零阶方法在处理复合优化时缺乏统一框架，且BFGS与不同梯度估计器的兼容性理论不明确。
ai.method: 构建无导数近端牛顿型算法，结合有限差分或平滑梯度估计，并引入BFGS更新。
ai.result: 在非凸和强凸条件下建立了迭代与oracle复杂度界，证明了局部R-超线性收敛，并理论表明BFGS更适合有限差分估计。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种无需梯度即可高效求解复合优化问题的算法，并给出了收敛保证。

idea_spark.idea: 将零阶近端牛顿法与自适应梯度估计器结合，可能进一步提升实际收敛速度。
idea_spark.risk: 有限差分估计在高维问题中计算成本高，且平滑估计可能引入偏差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴BFGS与有限差分的兼容性分析，可启发设计更高效的零阶拟牛顿方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将零阶近端牛顿法与自适应梯度估计器结合，可能进一步提升实际收敛速度。
idea_spark.risk: 有限差分估计在高维问题中计算成本高，且平滑估计可能引入偏差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴BFGS与有限差分的兼容性分析，可启发设计更高效的零阶拟牛顿方法。

en.tldr: Proposes a unified zeroth-order proximal Newton-type framework for composite optimization with a black-box function and a known regularizer.
en.motivation: Existing zeroth-order methods lack a unified framework for composite optimization, and the compatibility of BFGS with different gradient estimators is theoretically unclear.
en.method: Constructs a derivative-free proximal Newton-type algorithm using finite-difference or smoothing gradient estimators, incorporating BFGS updates.
en.result: Establishes iteration and oracle complexity bounds under nonconvex and strongly convex settings, proves local R-superlinear convergence, and shows theoretically that BFGS is more compatible with finite-difference estimators.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient gradient-free algorithm for composite optimization with convergence guarantees.

idea_spark.idea: Combining zeroth-order proximal Newton with adaptive gradient estimators may further improve practical convergence speed.
idea_spark.risk: Finite-difference estimators incur high computational cost in high dimensions, and smoothing estimators may introduce bias.
idea_spark.inspiration: The compatibility analysis of BFGS with finite-difference estimators can inspire more efficient zeroth-order quasi-Newton methods.

papers.title: Convergence rate of the occupation measure of classes of ergodic processes toward their invariant distribution in mean Wasserstein distance
papers.summary: N. Fournier and A. Guillin obtained in their 2015 PTRF paper some bounds of the L^p-mean rate of convergence in Wasserstein distance of empirical distributions for a class of stationary mixing processes. In this paper, we propose to extend their strategy of proof and provide general criterions which allow to keep similar rates for a larger class of processes. These results (which do not require regularization techniques) lead to various applications to occupation measures of ergodic processes which may be not stationary or not Markovian under an assumption of {\em conditional} convergence to equilibrium in Total Variation or Wasserstein distance. We then provide explicit conditions which lead to these rates for Brownian diffusions and additive SDEs driven by fractional Brownian Motions {or by Gaussian processes with stationary increments}.

ai.tldr: 本文扩展了Fournier和Guillin关于经验分布Wasserstein距离收敛速度的证明策略，为更广泛的遍历过程（包括非平稳或非马尔可夫过程）提供了收敛速率准则，并应用于布朗扩散和分数布朗运动驱动的SDE。
ai.motivation: 现有收敛速率结果仅适用于平稳混合过程，需要推广到更一般的遍历过程，特别是非平稳或非马尔可夫情形。
ai.method: 通过建立基于条件收敛到平衡的通用判据，避免正则化技术，直接推导Wasserstein距离下的L^p平均收敛速率。
ai.result: 获得了占位测度在平均Wasserstein距离下收敛到不变分布的显式速率，并给出了布朗扩散和分数布朗运动驱动SDE的具体条件。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解非平稳遍历过程经验测度的收敛行为，为相关随机模拟和统计推断提供理论保证。

idea_spark.idea: 利用条件收敛到平衡替代传统混合条件，可能简化复杂过程收敛性分析。
idea_spark.risk: 条件收敛假设在实际应用中可能难以验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将类似方法用于粒子滤波或MCMC算法的收敛性分析。

idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将类似方法用于粒子滤波或MCMC算法的收敛性分析。

en.tldr: This paper extends the proof strategy of Fournier and Guillin on Wasserstein convergence rates of empirical distributions to a larger class of ergodic processes, including non-stationary or non-Markovian ones, with applications to Brownian diffusions and SDEs driven by fractional Brownian motions.
en.motivation: Existing convergence rate results only cover stationary mixing processes; a generalization to broader ergodic processes, especially non-stationary or non-Markovian cases, is needed.
en.method: General criteria based on conditional convergence to equilibrium are established, avoiding regularization techniques, to derive L^p mean convergence rates in Wasserstein distance.
en.result: Explicit rates for occupation measures converging to the invariant distribution in mean Wasserstein distance are obtained, with concrete conditions for Brownian diffusions and SDEs driven by fractional Brownian motions.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the convergence behavior of empirical measures for non-stationary ergodic processes, providing theoretical guarantees for stochastic simulation and statistical inference.

idea_spark.idea: Using conditional convergence to equilibrium instead of traditional mixing conditions may simplify convergence analysis of complex processes.
idea_spark.risk: The conditional convergence assumption may be difficult to verify in practical applications.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires applying similar methods to convergence analysis of particle filters or MCMC algorithms.

papers.title: Policies for the Operation of an Ambulance Fleet under Uncertainty based on a New Preparedness Metric
papers.summary: Two important decisions in the management of an ambulance fleet are ambulance selection decisions and ambulance reassignment decisions. Ambulance selection decisions determine what to do when an emergency call arrives (such as choosing what ambulance to dispatch to the emergency or putting the emergency in a queue of emergencies waiting for an ambulance to be dispatched). Ambulance reassignment decisions determine where to send an ambulance next when it has finished service for an emergency. Making good ambulance selection decisions and ambulance reassignment decisions is challenging because a decision made at a point in time affects the ability of the emergency medical service to respond to future emergencies (that are typically not known when the decision is made). We propose a new preparedness metric that quantifies the ability of the emergency medical service to respond to future emergencies. The preparedness metric can be used to make ambulance selection decisions and ambulance reassignment decisions by solving a tractable optimization problem each time that a decision has to be made. We compare the performance of the resulting method with 9 methods that have been proposed in the literature, based on data from a real emergency medical service for a large city.

ai.tldr: 提出一种新的准备度指标，用于在不确定性下优化救护车车队的调度和重新分配决策。
ai.motivation: 救护车管理中的选择与重新分配决策影响未来应急响应能力，现有方法难以处理不确定性。
ai.method: 定义准备度指标，每次决策时求解一个可处理的优化问题。
ai.result: 基于真实城市急救数据，与9种文献方法对比，新方法表现更优。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助急救服务管理者在不确定环境下做出更优的救护车调度决策，提升应急响应能力。

idea_spark.idea: 将准备度指标与强化学习结合，实现自适应调度策略。
idea_spark.risk: 指标定义可能依赖特定假设，需验证在不同城市或场景下的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从金融风险管理中的风险度量（如CVaR）借鉴思想，设计面向未来不确定性的准备度指标。

idea_spark.inspiration: 从金融风险管理中的风险度量（如CVaR）借鉴思想，设计面向未来不确定性的准备度指标。

en.tldr: Proposes a new preparedness metric to optimize ambulance dispatch and reassignment decisions under uncertainty.
en.motivation: Ambulance selection and reassignment decisions affect future emergency response capability, and existing methods struggle with uncertainty.
en.method: Defines a preparedness metric and solves a tractable optimization problem at each decision point.
en.result: Outperforms 9 literature methods on real-world data from a large city's emergency medical service.
en.help_to_user: Helps EMS managers make better ambulance fleet decisions under uncertainty, improving emergency response.

idea_spark.idea: Combine the preparedness metric with reinforcement learning for adaptive dispatching policies.
idea_spark.risk: The metric's definition may rely on specific assumptions; robustness across different cities or scenarios needs validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draw inspiration from risk measures in financial risk management (e.g., CVaR) to design preparedness metrics for future uncertainty.

papers.title: Classification and Metrization of Classes of Smooth measures
papers.summary: We classify the several classes of the set of smooth measures from the perspective of the denseness and the locality, and consider their relationships, in particular, that of the Kato class and Radon measures of finite energy integrals. We also introduce the Miyadera metric on the Dynkin class, and obtain the continuity of the Revuz correspondence.

ai.tldr: 从稠密性和局部性角度对光滑测度集进行分类，并研究各类之间的关系，特别是Kato类与有限能量积分Radon测度的关系，同时在Dynkin类上引入Miyadera度量并得到Revuz对应的连续性。
ai.motivation: 系统分类光滑测度并揭示其内在结构，尤其是Kato类与有限能量积分Radon测度之间的联系。
ai.method: 利用稠密性和局部性对光滑测度进行分类，并在Dynkin类上定义Miyadera度量。
ai.result: 建立了光滑测度各类之间的包含关系，证明了Miyadera度量下Revuz对应的连续性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解光滑测度的分类框架及其在势论和Dirichlet型中的应用。

idea_spark.idea: 将Miyadera度量应用于其他与测度相关的对应关系（如Riesz对应）。
idea_spark.risk: 新度量可能不满足完备性或与现有拓扑不兼容。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用度量结构研究测度类之间的拓扑性质，可能发现新的连续对应关系。

en.tldr: Classifies smooth measures by denseness and locality, explores relationships among classes (especially Kato class and Radon measures of finite energy integrals), introduces the Miyadera metric on the Dynkin class, and obtains continuity of the Revuz correspondence.
en.motivation: To systematically classify smooth measures and reveal their internal structure, particularly the connection between the Kato class and Radon measures of finite energy integrals.
en.method: Classification based on denseness and locality, and introduction of the Miyadera metric on the Dynkin class.
en.result: Established inclusion relations among classes of smooth measures and proved continuity of the Revuz correspondence under the Miyadera metric.
en.help_to_user: Provides a clear classification framework for smooth measures and their applications in potential theory and Dirichlet forms.

idea_spark.idea: Apply the Miyadera metric to other measure-related correspondences (e.g., Riesz correspondence).
idea_spark.risk: The new metric may lack completeness or be incompatible with existing topologies.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using metric structures to study topological properties of measure classes may reveal new continuous correspondences.

keywords_raw: radon measures of finite energy integrals

papers.title: Improved techniques for fine-tuning flow models via adjoint matching: a deterministic control pipeline
papers.summary: We propose a deterministic adjoint matching framework that formulates human preference alignment for flow-based generative models as an optimal control problem over velocity fields. One can directly regress the control toward a value-gradient-induced target under the current policy, leading to a simple and stable training objective. Building on this perspective, we introduce a truncated adjoint scheme that focuses computation on the terminal portion of the trajectory, where reward-relevant signals concentrate, which yields substantial computational savings while preserving alignment quality. We further generalize the framework beyond standard KL-based regularization, allowing more flexible trade-offs between alignment strength and distributional preservation. Experiments on SiT-XL/2 and FLUX.2-Klein-4B demonstrate consistent gains across multiple alignment metrics, along with substantially improved diversity and mode preservation.

ai.tldr: 提出一种确定性伴随匹配框架，将流模型的偏好对齐转化为速度场的最优控制问题，通过截断伴随方案降低计算成本，并在多个指标上提升对齐质量与多样性。
ai.motivation: 现有流模型偏好对齐方法计算成本高、训练不稳定，且难以灵活权衡对齐强度与分布保持。
ai.method: 将偏好对齐建模为速度场的最优控制问题，直接回归当前策略下的值梯度目标，并引入截断伴随方案聚焦轨迹末端计算。
ai.result: 在SiT-XL/2和FLUX.2-Klein-4B上，对齐指标一致提升，同时显著改善多样性和模式保持。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种稳定、高效的流模型偏好对齐方法，支持灵活的正则化权衡，适用于需要高质量生成与可控性的场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将截断伴随方案与强化学习中的值函数估计结合，进一步优化长轨迹生成中的计算效率。
idea_spark.risk: 截断可能丢失早期轨迹中的对齐信号，需验证对复杂偏好任务的适用性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从最优控制理论出发，将生成模型对齐视为确定性控制问题，启发更广泛的模型微调范式。

en.tldr: Proposes a deterministic adjoint matching framework that formulates preference alignment for flow models as an optimal control problem, using a truncated adjoint scheme to reduce computation while improving alignment quality and diversity.
en.motivation: Existing preference alignment methods for flow models suffer from high computational cost, training instability, and inflexible trade-offs between alignment strength and distribution preservation.
en.method: Formulates preference alignment as an optimal control problem over velocity fields, directly regressing toward a value-gradient-induced target under the current policy, and introduces a truncated adjoint scheme focusing computation on the terminal trajectory portion.
en.result: On SiT-XL/2 and FLUX.2-Klein-4B, consistent gains across alignment metrics with substantially improved diversity and mode preservation.
en.help_to_user: Provides a stable and efficient method for preference alignment of flow models with flexible regularization trade-offs, suitable for high-quality generation with controllability.

idea_spark.idea: Combine the truncated adjoint scheme with value function estimation in reinforcement learning to further optimize computational efficiency in long-trajectory generation.
idea_spark.risk: Truncation may lose alignment signals from early trajectory portions; applicability to complex preference tasks needs validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Drawing from optimal control theory, treating generative model alignment as a deterministic control problem inspires broader model fine-tuning paradigms.

papers.title: Frustrated Dynamics of Distance Matrices
papers.summary: We introduce the Frustrated Distance Matrix (FDM) model, a dynamic extension of the static distance-matrix ensemble on S^2 analyzed by Bogomolny, Bohigas, and Schmit (BBS). Its entries are pairwise geodesic distances between N Brownian particles on the sphere evolving under quenched random pairwise couplings linear in those distances. Where the static BBS theory recovers geometric information about the underlying manifold from spectra of distance matrices on i.i.d.\ samples, the time-resolved FDM spectrum carries information about structural changes of the underlying point process. The particle dynamics realize one such change: a fast collapse from a uniform configuration onto a one-dimensional ring, followed by slow rotational drift of the ring orientation; the particle-level picture provides the ground truth against which spectral diagnostics are calibrated. We find that the static BBS template is preserved at every time, with the dynamics entering as a redistribution of spectral mass within that template, sharp enough to flag ring formation. We propose self-averaging of the bulk density as the mechanism behind this preservation, verified by an i.i.d.-resample comparison, and extract a small set of spectral diagnostics of the structural change computable from the distance matrix alone. We suggest that our diagnostics can be applied in other similar inverse-problem settings: financial correlation matrices, graph and network adjacency spectra, similarity matrices in molecular dynamics, and dynamics on parameter manifolds.

ai.tldr: 提出受挫距离矩阵模型，研究球面上布朗粒子的成对测地距离动力学，发现静态谱模板在动态中保持，并可用于检测结构变化。
ai.motivation: 静态距离矩阵谱可恢复流形几何信息，但缺乏对点过程结构变化的动态刻画。
ai.method: 引入受挫距离矩阵模型，粒子受淬火随机线性耦合驱动，通过谱质量重新分布和自平均机制分析结构变化。
ai.result: 静态BBS模板在每一时刻保持，谱质量重新分布足以标记环形成，并提取出少量谱诊断量。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种仅依赖距离矩阵即可检测点过程结构变化的谱诊断方法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用自平均机制和谱质量重新分布，设计无需完整粒子轨迹的结构变化检测器。
idea_spark.risk: 模型假设球面布朗运动和线性耦合，实际系统可能偏离此理想化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从静态谱理论出发，通过动态扩展捕捉结构变化，启发其他逆问题中的动态谱分析。

en.tldr: Introduces the Frustrated Distance Matrix model for pairwise geodesic distances of Brownian particles on a sphere, showing that the static spectral template persists under dynamics and can flag structural changes.
en.motivation: Static distance-matrix spectra recover manifold geometry but lack dynamic characterization of structural changes in point processes.
en.method: Proposes the Frustrated Distance Matrix model with quenched random linear couplings; analyzes spectral mass redistribution and self-averaging of bulk density.
en.result: The static BBS template is preserved at every time; spectral mass redistribution is sharp enough to detect ring formation; a small set of spectral diagnostics is extracted.
en.help_to_user: Provides spectral diagnostics computable solely from distance matrices to detect structural changes in point processes.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage self-averaging and spectral mass redistribution to design structure-change detectors without full particle trajectories.
idea_spark.risk: Model assumptions (Brownian motion on sphere, linear couplings) may not hold in real systems.
idea_spark.inspiration: Extending static spectral theory to dynamic settings for structural change detection inspires similar approaches in other inverse problems.

papers.title: Dynamic Graph with Similarity-Aware Attention Graph Neural Network for Recommender Systems
papers.summary: Recommender systems are essential components of modern online platforms which presents personalized content in various domain. The traditional collaborative filtering methods depends on static user-item interaction graphs and a limited subset of similarity measures which fail to capture the changing nature of preferences of an individual. Recent graph neural network (GNN) based approaches focus on user-item bipartite graphs which do not use explicit user-user relational modelling and dynamic graph evolution during training. To address these limitations, this paper proposes a Dynamic Graph SimilarityAware Attention Graph Neural Network (DG-SA-GNN) framework that integrates dynamic user similarity graph construction with multi-similarity propagation and attention-based aggregation. The proposed architecture constructs four parallel user similarity graphs using Cosine, Jaccard, Discounted Pearson Correlation Coefficient (Discount PCC), and IPIJ similarity functions, each processed by a dedicated UserGNN module. A Graph Transformer fuses the four graph views, and a CrossAttention module refines user embeddings through interaction with item embeddings. Crucially, the graphs are reconstructed at scheduled epochs during training, enabling the model to adapt to the learned embedding space constituting the dynamic graph component. Mini-batch training with hard negative sampling improves scalability and convergence. Experiments on the MovieLens100K benchmark demonstrate that DG-SA-GNN achieves a Recall@20 of 0.162 and NDCG@20 of 0.065 which is better than the LightGCN baseline in recall. The results validate that dynamic multi-similarity graph construction coupled with attention-based fusion which produce recommendation performance

ai.tldr: 提出动态图相似性感知注意力图神经网络（DG-SA-GNN），通过动态构建多相似度用户图并融合注意力机制提升推荐性能。
ai.motivation: 传统协同过滤和现有GNN方法未能捕捉用户偏好的动态变化及显式用户-用户关系建模。
ai.method: 构建四个并行用户相似度图（余弦、Jaccard、折扣皮尔逊、IPIJ），每个图由专用UserGNN处理，经图Transformer融合，再通过交叉注意力与物品嵌入交互，并在训练中定期重建图。
ai.result: 在MovieLens100K上Recall@20达0.162，NDCG@20达0.065，优于LightGCN基线。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种动态多相似度图构建与注意力融合的推荐框架，可适应偏好变化。

idea_spark.idea: 探索更高效的图重建调度策略或自适应相似度函数选择。
idea_spark.risk: 多图并行计算开销大，需平衡动态性与效率。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将用户-用户相似度图与物品-物品图结合，或引入时间衰减权重。

idea_spark.inspiration: 将用户-用户相似度图与物品-物品图结合，或引入时间衰减权重。

en.tldr: Proposes Dynamic Graph Similarity-Aware Attention GNN (DG-SA-GNN) that dynamically constructs multi-similarity user graphs and fuses them with attention to improve recommendation.
en.motivation: Traditional CF and existing GNN methods fail to capture dynamic user preferences and explicit user-user relations.
en.method: Builds four parallel user similarity graphs (Cosine, Jaccard, Discounted Pearson, IPIJ), each processed by a dedicated UserGNN, fused via Graph Transformer, refined by cross-attention with item embeddings, and reconstructed periodically during training.
en.result: Achieves Recall@20 of 0.162 and NDCG@20 of 0.065 on MovieLens100K, outperforming LightGCN in recall.
en.help_to_user: Provides a dynamic multi-similarity graph construction and attention fusion framework for adaptive recommendations.

idea_spark.idea: Explore more efficient graph reconstruction schedules or adaptive similarity function selection.
idea_spark.risk: Multi-graph parallelism incurs high computational cost; balance between dynamics and efficiency needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine user-user similarity graphs with item-item graphs or introduce time-decay weights.

papers.title: Stability of the Monge Map in Semi-Dual Optimal Transport
papers.summary: This paper shows that the semi-dual formulation of the optimal transport problem has a degenerate saddle-point structure, and that its numerical solution is equivalent to solving a constrained optimization problem. We derive necessary and sufficient conditions for the convergence of Monge maps without requiring optimality of the dual potential. This analysis helps explain why, in practice, numerical algorithms often require more iterations to update the transport map than the potential.

ai.tldr: 本文证明了半对偶最优传输问题的退化鞍点结构，并指出其数值解等价于求解约束优化问题。推导了无需对偶势最优性即可保证Monge映射收敛的充要条件，解释了为何实际算法中更新传输映射比更新势需要更多迭代。
ai.motivation: 现有最优传输数值算法中，Monge映射的更新往往比对偶势的更新需要更多迭代，但缺乏理论解释。本文旨在从半对偶形式的结构出发，揭示这一现象的根本原因。
ai.method: 通过分析半对偶最优传输问题的退化鞍点结构，将其转化为约束优化问题，并推导Monge映射收敛的充要条件，不依赖于对偶势的最优性。
ai.result: 得到了Monge映射收敛的充要条件，解释了数值算法中映射更新迭代次数更多的原因。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解最优传输数值算法中Monge映射收敛的理论基础，为设计更高效的算法提供指导。

idea_spark.idea: 利用约束优化视角，设计一种交替更新策略，在每次迭代中优先更新对偶势，再基于收敛条件自适应调整Monge映射的更新步长。
idea_spark.risk: 约束优化问题的求解可能引入额外计算开销，且收敛条件在实际离散化中可能难以精确满足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受“无需最优性即可保证映射收敛”的启发，可尝试在非凸优化中放松对全局最优性的要求，转而关注局部收敛路径的稳定性。

zh.tldr: 本文证明了半对偶最优传输问题的退化鞍点结构，并指出其数值解等价于求解约束优化问题。推导了无需对偶势最优性即可保证Monge映射收敛的充要条件，解释了为何实际算法中更新传输映射比更新势需要更多迭代。

en.tldr: This paper reveals the degenerate saddle-point structure of the semi-dual optimal transport problem, showing its numerical solution is equivalent to a constrained optimization. It derives necessary and sufficient conditions for Monge map convergence without requiring dual potential optimality, explaining why algorithms need more iterations for the map than the potential.
en.motivation: Numerical algorithms for optimal transport often require more iterations to update the Monge map than the dual potential, but the reason is not well understood. This work aims to explain this phenomenon from the structure of the semi-dual formulation.
en.method: By analyzing the degenerate saddle-point structure of the semi-dual optimal transport problem, it is reformulated as a constrained optimization problem. Necessary and sufficient conditions for Monge map convergence are derived, independent of dual potential optimality.
en.result: Conditions for Monge map convergence are obtained, explaining why map updates require more iterations in practice.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical insight into the convergence of Monge maps in optimal transport algorithms, guiding the design of more efficient methods.

idea_spark.idea: Design an alternating update strategy that prioritizes dual potential updates and adaptively adjusts the Monge map update step based on convergence conditions derived from the constrained optimization perspective.
idea_spark.risk: Solving the constrained optimization may introduce extra computational cost, and the convergence conditions may be hard to satisfy exactly in discrete settings.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the result that map convergence does not require optimality of the dual potential, one could relax global optimality requirements in non-convex optimization and focus on local convergence path stability.

papers.title: A closer target setting approach to boundary problems with the Russell graph measure
papers.summary: A Russell graph measure (RGM) is one of the standard DEA models, but its efficiency measure is not well-defined--or has unacceptable properties--at the boundary of the nonnegative orthant. This is known as a boundary problem. Existing studies have tackled this issue; however, their models may fail to identify an efficient target or fail to satisfy some desirable properties of efficiency measures. In this paper, we incorporate a closer target setting approach into the RGM model with production trade-offs to overcome such issues. We demonstrate that the efficiency measure of the proposed model overcomes the boundary problem and has stronger properties than existing models. We also demonstrate that the efficiency scores of the proposed model can be computed by solving a series of LPs. We conduct a numerical experiment with a real-world dataset to illustrate how targets provided by our model are realistic compared with the existing model, which also suggests the validity of our model in applications.

ai.tldr: 提出一种结合更近目标设定与生产权衡的Russell图测度模型，解决了边界问题并增强了效率测度的性质。
ai.motivation: 现有Russell图测度模型在非负象限边界处效率测度定义不良或性质不可接受，且已有模型可能无法识别有效目标或满足理想性质。
ai.method: 将更近目标设定方法融入Russell图测度模型，并引入生产权衡，通过求解一系列线性规划计算效率得分。
ai.result: 新模型克服了边界问题，效率测度性质强于现有模型，且在实际数据集上提供的目标更现实。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过改进DEA模型获得更合理、可实现的效率目标。

idea_spark.idea: 将目标设定与生产权衡结合，可能启发在非参数效率分析中设计更稳健的测度。
idea_spark.risk: 模型复杂度增加，计算成本可能上升，且生产权衡的设定需领域知识。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从边界问题出发，通过调整目标设定策略提升模型实用性，类似思路可用于其他存在边界效应的优化问题。

zh.tldr: 提出一种结合更近目标设定与生产权衡的Russell图测度模型，解决了边界问题并增强了效率测度的性质。
