idea_spark.idea: 将目标设定与生产权衡结合，可能启发在非参数效率分析中设计更稳健的测度。
idea_spark.risk: 模型复杂度增加，计算成本可能上升，且生产权衡的设定需领域知识。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从边界问题出发，通过调整目标设定策略提升模型实用性，类似思路可用于其他存在边界效应的优化问题。

en.tldr: Proposes a closer target setting approach integrated with production trade-offs into the Russell graph measure model to resolve boundary problems and enhance efficiency measure properties.
en.motivation: Existing Russell graph measure models suffer from ill-defined or unacceptable efficiency measures at the boundary of the nonnegative orthant, and prior models may fail to identify efficient targets or satisfy desirable properties.
en.method: Incorporates a closer target setting approach into the Russell graph measure model with production trade-offs, computing efficiency scores via a series of linear programs.
en.result: The proposed model overcomes the boundary problem, exhibits stronger properties than existing models, and yields more realistic targets on a real-world dataset.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to obtain more reasonable and achievable efficiency targets through an improved DEA model.

idea_spark.idea: Combining target setting with production trade-offs may inspire more robust measures in nonparametric efficiency analysis.
idea_spark.risk: Increased model complexity may raise computational costs, and specifying production trade-offs requires domain expertise.
idea_spark.inspiration: Addressing boundary problems by adjusting target setting strategies to enhance model practicality; similar ideas could apply to other optimization problems with boundary effects.

papers.title: Geometry-Aware Simplicial Message Passing
papers.summary: The Weisfeiler--Lehman (WL) test and its simplicial extension (SWL) characterize the combinatorial expressivity of message passing networks, but they are blind to geometry, i.e., meshes with identical connectivity but different embeddings are indistinguishable. We introduce the Geometric Simplicial Weisfeiler--Lehman (GSWL) test, which incorporates vertex coordinates into color refinement for geometric simplicial complexes. In addition, we show that (i) the expressivity of geometry-aware simplicial message passing schemes is bounded above by GSWL, and (ii) that there exist parameters such that the discriminating power of GSWL is matched by these schemes on any fixed finite family of geometric simplicial complexes. Combined with the Euler Characteristic Transform (ECT), a complete invariant for geometric simplicial complexes, this yields a geometric expressivity characterization together with an approximation framework. Experiments on synthetic and mesh datasets serve to validate our theory, showing a clear hierarchy from combinatorial to geometry-aware models.

ai.tldr: 提出几何感知单纯形韦斯费勒-莱曼测试，将顶点坐标融入颜色细化，用于几何单纯形复形，并建立几何感知消息传递的表达性层次。
ai.motivation: 现有单纯形消息传递网络仅考虑组合结构，忽略几何信息（如顶点坐标），导致无法区分具有相同连接但不同嵌入的网格。
ai.method: 引入几何单纯形韦斯费勒-莱曼测试，在颜色细化过程中加入顶点坐标；结合欧拉特征变换作为完全不变量，构建近似框架。
ai.result: 理论证明几何感知消息传递的表达性受GSWL测试上界约束，且存在参数使两者在有限几何单纯形复形族上判别力匹配；合成与网格数据集实验验证了从组合到几何感知模型的层次。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何将几何信息融入图神经网络的消息传递机制，提升对几何数据的区分能力。

idea_spark.inspiration: 从拓扑数据分析中借鉴完全不变量，启发几何图神经网络的新设计范式。

en.tldr: Proposes the Geometric Simplicial Weisfeiler-Lehman test, incorporating vertex coordinates into color refinement for geometric simplicial complexes, and establishes a hierarchy of expressivity for geometry-aware message passing.
en.motivation: Existing simplicial message passing networks only consider combinatorial structure, ignoring geometric information (e.g., vertex coordinates), thus unable to distinguish meshes with identical connectivity but different embeddings.
en.method: Introduces the Geometric Simplicial Weisfeiler-Lehman test, which integrates vertex coordinates into color refinement; combined with the Euler Characteristic Transform as a complete invariant, an approximation framework is built.
en.result: Theoretically proves that the expressivity of geometry-aware message passing is bounded above by the GSWL test, and there exist parameters matching its discriminating power on any fixed finite family of geometric simplicial complexes; experiments on synthetic and mesh datasets validate the hierarchy from combinatorial to geometry-aware models.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to incorporate geometric information into message passing mechanisms of graph neural networks, enhancing discriminative power on geometric data.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage the Euler Characteristic Transform as a complete invariant to design more efficient geometric message passing networks.
idea_spark.risk: Incorporating geometric information may increase computational complexity and be sensitive to noise.
idea_spark.inspiration: Drawing complete invariants from topological data analysis inspires new design paradigms for geometric graph neural networks.

papers.title: $\mathsf{GL}_N(\mathbb{C})$ Brownian motion and stochastic PDE on entire functions
papers.summary: We construct the full edge scaling limit of the singular values of Brownian motion on the general linear group $\mathsf{GL}_N(\mathbb{C})$ starting from general conditions. We show that the limiting paths solve an infinite system of SDE with log-interaction and have a Gibbs resampling property with exponential Brownian bridges. Moreover, we show that the evolution of the limiting rescaled reverse characteristic polynomial solves a stochastic partial differential equation with a non-linear multiplicative noise and linear drift. From a special initial condition the resulting line ensemble coincides, in logarithmic coordinates, with a line ensemble constructed by Ahn which arises as a universal scaling limit of singular values of products of random matrices. We prove some analogous results on the evolution of limiting characteristic polynomials for two models whose stationary measures are given by the Hua-Pickrell and Bessel stochastic zeta functions respectively.

ai.tldr: 构造了一般线性群布朗运动奇异值的边缘标度极限，并证明了极限路径满足带对数相互作用的无穷维随机微分方程，且具有指数布朗桥的吉布斯重采样性质。
ai.motivation: 研究一般线性群布朗运动的奇异值在边缘标度下的极限行为，揭示其与随机矩阵乘积普适标度极限的联系。
ai.method: 通过标度极限构造无穷维随机微分方程系统，并利用指数布朗桥的吉布斯重采样性质推导极限路径的演化。
ai.result: 极限重标逆特征多项式满足带非线性乘性噪声和线性漂移的随机偏微分方程；特殊初始条件下与Ahn构造的线系一致。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了随机矩阵理论中奇异值边缘标度极限的新构造方法，以及相关随机偏微分方程的显式形式。

idea_spark.idea: 利用随机偏微分方程描述特征多项式演化，可能用于研究随机矩阵乘积的长时间行为。
idea_spark.risk: 非线性乘性噪声的解析处理可能复杂，需验证解的适定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: Hua-Pickrell和Bessel随机zeta函数作为平稳测度的模型，启发探索更多随机矩阵系综的动力学标度极限。

en.tldr: Constructs the edge scaling limit of singular values for Brownian motion on GL_N(C), showing the limiting paths solve an infinite SDE system with log-interaction and a Gibbs resampling property via exponential Brownian bridges.
en.motivation: To understand the edge scaling behavior of singular values in Brownian motion on the general linear group and its connection to universal scaling limits of products of random matrices.
en.method: Edge scaling limit construction leading to an infinite system of SDEs with log-interaction, and analysis of the rescaled reverse characteristic polynomial evolution via an SPDE with nonlinear multiplicative noise.
en.result: The limiting rescaled reverse characteristic polynomial satisfies an SPDE with linear drift and nonlinear multiplicative noise; under a special initial condition, the line ensemble coincides with Ahn's construction.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new construction of edge scaling limits for singular values in GL_N(C) Brownian motion and explicit SPDE forms for the characteristic polynomial evolution.

idea_spark.idea: Using SPDEs to describe characteristic polynomial evolution may enable study of long-time behavior of products of random matrices.
idea_spark.risk: Nonlinear multiplicative noise may complicate well-posedness analysis of the SPDE.
idea_spark.inspiration: Hua-Pickrell and Bessel stochastic zeta functions as stationary measures motivate exploring dynamical scaling limits for more random matrix ensembles.

papers.title: Eigenstates with Infinite Position Moments
papers.summary: We prove necessary and sufficient conditions for the Schrödinger operators to have zero-energy bound states at the threshold of the essential spectrum such that they have bounded $k$-th moment. This result is the extension of the results published in D. Hundertmark, M. Jex, and M. Lange [Forum Mathematics, Sigma 11(2023)].

ai.tldr: 本文证明了薛定谔算子在本质谱阈值处存在零能束缚态的充要条件，且这些束缚态具有有界的k阶矩。
ai.motivation: 扩展先前关于零能束缚态存在性的结果，特别是考虑位置矩有界的情况。
ai.method: 通过分析薛定谔算子的谱性质，推导出零能束缚态存在且具有有界k阶矩的充要条件。
ai.result: 得到了薛定谔算子存在零能束缚态且位置矩有界的充要条件。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解量子力学中零能束缚态与位置矩之间的关系。

idea_spark.idea: 探索其他物理系统中类似阈值束缚态的存在性条件。
idea_spark.risk: 条件可能依赖于具体算子形式，推广需谨慎验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将位置矩有界性作为束缚态分类的新指标。

en.tldr: This paper proves necessary and sufficient conditions for Schrödinger operators to have zero-energy bound states at the threshold of the essential spectrum with bounded k-th moment.
en.motivation: To extend previous results on zero-energy bound states, particularly considering bounded position moments.
en.method: By analyzing the spectral properties of Schrödinger operators, derive necessary and sufficient conditions for the existence of zero-energy bound states with bounded k-th moment.
en.result: Obtained necessary and sufficient conditions for Schrödinger operators to have zero-energy bound states with bounded position moments.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the relationship between zero-energy bound states and position moments in quantum mechanics.

idea_spark.idea: Explore similar threshold bound state existence conditions in other physical systems.
idea_spark.risk: Conditions may depend on specific operator forms; generalization requires careful verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Use boundedness of position moments as a new indicator for classifying bound states.

papers.title: Hölder continuity for non-coercive Hamilton-Jacobi equations associated to linear control systems
papers.summary: In this paper we establish Hölder continuity estimates for viscosity solutions to first order Hamilton-Jacobi equations linked to linear control systems satisfying the Kalman rank condition. Our model Hamiltonians are non-convex in the generalised momentum variable and - more importantly - they lack coercivity in certain directions. Therefore, all previously available results from the literature cannot be applied to these degenerate settings. In order to overcome these obstructions, we design a geometric argument, dictated by the linear control system. As a result of this, the obtained Hölder estimates are quantified in an anisotropic way within this geometric framework. The estimates hold true for unbounded source terms, for which one part of our analysis is inspired by a recent result on De Giorgi type methods for hypoelliptic operators.

ai.tldr: 本文针对满足Kalman秩条件的线性控制系统相关的非强制Hamilton-Jacobi方程，建立了粘性解的Hölder连续性估计。
ai.motivation: 现有结果无法处理非凸且在某些方向缺乏强制性的Hamiltonian，因此需要新的几何论证。
ai.method: 利用线性控制系统驱动的几何结构，设计各向异性的定量估计，并借鉴De Giorgi型方法处理无界源项。
ai.result: 获得了在退化设定下仍成立的各向异性Hölder估计。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究非强制Hamilton-Jacobi方程的粘性解正则性提供了新的几何工具和定量估计。

idea_spark.idea: 将控制系统的几何结构直接嵌入PDE估计，替代传统的强制性和凸性假设。
idea_spark.risk: 几何结构依赖具体系统，可能难以推广到非线性或时变系统。
idea_spark.inspiration: De Giorgi型方法在退化椭圆/抛物方程中的应用启发本文处理无界源项的策略。

en.tldr: This paper establishes Hölder continuity estimates for viscosity solutions of non-coercive Hamilton-Jacobi equations associated with linear control systems satisfying the Kalman rank condition.
en.motivation: Existing results fail for Hamiltonians that are non-convex and lack coercivity in certain directions, necessitating a new geometric argument.
en.method: A geometric argument dictated by the linear control system is designed, yielding anisotropic quantitative estimates, with inspiration from De Giorgi-type methods for hypoelliptic operators to handle unbounded source terms.
en.result: Anisotropic Hölder estimates are obtained that hold even in degenerate settings.
en.help_to_user: Provides new geometric tools and quantitative estimates for regularity of viscosity solutions to non-coercive Hamilton-Jacobi equations.

idea_spark.idea: Embed the geometric structure of the control system directly into PDE estimates, replacing traditional coercivity and convexity assumptions.
idea_spark.risk: The geometric structure is system-specific and may not generalize to nonlinear or time-varying systems.
idea_spark.inspiration: De Giorgi-type methods for degenerate elliptic/parabolic equations inspired the handling of unbounded source terms.

papers.title: ViTok-v2: Scaling Native Resolution Auto-Encoders to 5 Billion Parameters
papers.summary: Vision Transformer (ViT) autoencoders have emerged as compelling tokenizers for images, offering improved reconstruction over convolutional tokenizers. However, existing ViT tokenizers cannot explore this landscape as performance degrades outside training resolutions, and reliance on adversarial losses prevents stable scaling. ViTok (Hansen-Estruch et al., 2025) found that the compression ratio r mediates a reconstruction-generation trade-off where lower r means better reconstructions but harder generations, so improving tokenizer reconstruction is key to more Pareto-optimal tokenizers. We introduce ViTok-v2, which addresses these limitations with native resolution support via NaFlex for generalization across resolutions and aspect ratios, and a novel DINOv3 perceptual loss that replaces both LPIPS and GAN objectives for stable training at any scale. ViTok-v2 is trained on about 2B images and scaled to 5B parameters, the largest image autoencoder to date. ViTok-v2 matches or exceeds state-of-the-art reconstruction at 256p and outperforms all baselines at 512p and above. In joint scaling experiments with flow matching generators, we show that scaling both the autoencoder and the generator advances the Pareto frontier of this trade-off.

ai.tldr: ViTok-v2 是一个 50 亿参数的原生分辨率图像自编码器，通过 NaFlex 支持任意分辨率和宽高比，并用 DINOv3 感知损失替代对抗损失，实现了稳定的大规模训练和领先的重建质量。
ai.motivation: 现有 ViT 自编码器在训练分辨率外性能下降，且依赖对抗损失难以稳定扩展，限制了重建-生成帕累托前沿的推进。
ai.method: 引入 NaFlex 实现原生分辨率支持；用 DINOv3 感知损失替换 LPIPS 和 GAN 目标，实现任意规模的稳定训练。
ai.result: 在 256p 上匹配或超越 SOTA 重建，在 512p 及以上全面超越基线；与流匹配生成器联合缩放时，进一步推进了帕累托前沿。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种可稳定扩展至 50 亿参数、支持任意分辨率的图像自编码器设计，有助于提升下游生成任务的上限。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将 DINOv3 感知损失与扩散模型结合，或用于视频自编码器的训练。
idea_spark.risk: DINOv3 损失可能对特定数据分布敏感，需要验证其在不同领域的泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 用自监督特征替代对抗损失来稳定大规模训练，为其他模态的自编码器扩展提供了新思路。

idea_spark.risk: DINOv3 损失可能对特定数据分布敏感，需要验证其在不同领域的泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 用自监督特征替代对抗损失来稳定大规模训练，为其他模态的自编码器扩展提供了新思路。

en.tldr: ViTok-v2 is a 5-billion-parameter native resolution image autoencoder that supports arbitrary resolutions and aspect ratios via NaFlex, and replaces adversarial losses with a DINOv3 perceptual loss for stable large-scale training, achieving state-of-the-art reconstruction.
en.motivation: Existing ViT autoencoders degrade outside training resolutions and rely on adversarial losses that prevent stable scaling, limiting progress on the reconstruction-generation Pareto frontier.
en.method: Introduces NaFlex for native resolution support and a DINOv3 perceptual loss to replace LPIPS and GAN objectives, enabling stable training at any scale.
en.result: Matches or exceeds SOTA reconstruction at 256p, outperforms all baselines at 512p and above; joint scaling with flow matching generators advances the Pareto frontier.
en.help_to_user: Provides a scalable image autoencoder design that supports arbitrary resolutions and can be stably trained up to 5B parameters, improving downstream generation quality.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining DINOv3 perceptual loss with diffusion models or applying it to video autoencoder training.
idea_spark.risk: DINOv3 loss may be sensitive to specific data distributions; generalization across domains needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using self-supervised features to replace adversarial losses for stable large-scale training offers a new path for scaling autoencoders in other modalities.

papers.title: The simplified 2D Ericksen-Leslie liquid crystal model interacting with a 1D flexible shell
papers.summary: We consider the evolution and interaction of a 2-dimensional nematic liquid crystal of Ericksen-Leslie type within a 1-dimensional flexible viscoelastic structure. This is a fully macroscopic model in which the nematic liquid crystal is modelled by the simplified Ericksen-Leslie system with Ginzburg-Landau approximation. The liquid crystal is contained in a thin viscoelastic shell of arbitrary reference configuration that evolves with respect to the forces exerted by the liquid crystal. Barring any degeneracies in the shell, we construct a global weak solution for the coupled system. We then show that any family of such weak solutions that are parametrized by the Ginzburg-Landau coefficient, converges to a weak solution of the original simplified Ericksen-Leslie system without the Ginzburg-Landau term.

ai.tldr: 研究二维Ericksen-Leslie液晶模型与一维柔性壳的耦合演化，构造全局弱解并证明Ginzburg-Landau近似解的收敛性。
ai.motivation: 理解液晶与柔性结构的相互作用，为宏观模型提供数学基础。
ai.method: 采用简化Ericksen-Leslie系统与Ginzburg-Landau近似，建立耦合系统并分析弱解存在性与收敛性。
ai.result: 构造了耦合系统的全局弱解，并证明当Ginzburg-Landau系数趋于零时，解收敛到原系统弱解。
ai.help_to_user: 提供液晶与柔性结构相互作用的数学分析框架，可用于材料科学和软物质物理建模。

idea_spark.idea: 探索液晶与柔性壳耦合系统的数值模拟方法，验证理论结果。
idea_spark.risk: 模型假设可能过于简化，实际液晶行为更复杂。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合实验数据校准模型参数，提高预测准确性。

zh.tldr: 研究二维Ericksen-Leslie液晶模型与一维柔性壳的耦合演化，构造全局弱解并证明Ginzburg-Landau近似解的收敛性。
zh.motivation: 理解液晶与柔性结构的相互作用，为宏观模型提供数学基础。
zh.method: 采用简化Ericksen-Leslie系统与Ginzburg-Landau近似，建立耦合系统并分析弱解存在性与收敛性。
zh.result: 构造了耦合系统的全局弱解，并证明当Ginzburg-Landau系数趋于零时，解收敛到原系统弱解。
zh.help_to_user: 提供液晶与柔性结构相互作用的数学分析框架，可用于材料科学和软物质物理建模。

en.tldr: We study the evolution and interaction of a 2D Ericksen-Leslie liquid crystal model with a 1D flexible shell, constructing global weak solutions and proving convergence of Ginzburg-Landau approximations.
en.motivation: To understand the interaction between liquid crystals and flexible structures, providing a mathematical foundation for macroscopic models.
en.method: Using the simplified Ericksen-Leslie system with Ginzburg-Landau approximation, we establish the coupled system and analyze the existence and convergence of weak solutions.
en.result: Global weak solutions are constructed for the coupled system, and as the Ginzburg-Landau coefficient vanishes, the solutions converge to those of the original system.
en.help_to_user: Provides a mathematical analysis framework for liquid crystal-flexible structure interactions, useful for materials science and soft matter physics modeling.

idea_spark.idea: Explore numerical simulation methods for the coupled liquid crystal-shell system to validate theoretical results.
idea_spark.risk: Model assumptions may be oversimplified; actual liquid crystal behavior is more complex.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine experimental data to calibrate model parameters for improved predictive accuracy.

papers.title: A Measure-Theoretic Finite-Sample Theory for Adaptive-Data Fitted Q-Iteration
papers.summary: While reinforcement learning (RL) promises to revolutionize the control of complex nonlinear robotic systems, a profound gap persists between the heuristic success of model-free off-policy deep RL and the underlying theory, which remains largely confined to tabular or linearizable settings. We identify the cause of this gap as an emergent isolation of three traditions: (i) measure-theoretic MDP foundations on general spaces limit their analysis to exact dynamic programming and ignore all error sources of a learning process; (ii) deterministic error propagation analysis addresses the approximation error via concentrability coefficients without a finite-sample analysis of the estimation error; and (iii) PAC generalization bounds characterize the estimation errors of simplified topologies. We bridge these traditions with a unified theoretical framework for fitted Q-iteration (FQI) on general measurable Borel spaces. Our main result provides a finite-sample, adaptive-data performance bound by chaining measure-theoretic probability with Bellman-operator contraction in Banach spaces. We prove that sequential Rademacher complexity controls Bellman-regression generalization under policy-dependent data collection. We further extend this analysis to provide the first cumulative, pathwise online regret guarantee for FQI in continuous spaces. These results lay the necessary foundations for the formal analysis of many modern deep RL algorithms.

ai.tldr: 提出一个统一的测度论框架，为自适应数据拟合Q迭代（FQI）在一般可测Borel空间上提供有限样本性能保证。
ai.motivation: 模型无关离策略深度强化学习的启发式成功与理论分析之间存在巨大鸿沟，现有理论局限于表格或可线性化设定。
ai.method: 通过链式测度论概率与Banach空间中的Bellman算子收缩，推导出有限样本自适应数据性能界；用序列Rademacher复杂度控制策略相关数据收集下的Bellman回归泛化。
ai.result: 首次给出连续空间FQI的累积路径在线遗憾保证。
ai.help_to_user: 为现代深度强化学习算法的形式化分析奠定理论基础。

idea_spark.idea: 利用序列Rademacher复杂度分析策略相关数据下的泛化误差。
idea_spark.risk: 理论假设可能对实际深度网络架构和优化过程过于理想化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将测度论MDP基础、确定性误差传播和PAC泛化界三个传统统一起来。

papers.title: The $σ_k$-Yamabe problem revisited
papers.summary: In this paper we revisit the $σ_k$-Yamabe problem on $M^n$, namely, finding a conformal metric with constant $σ_k$-scalar curvature. We prove that on a closed manifold $\left(M,\left[g_0\right]\right)$ with positive Yamabe constant $Y_1\left(M,\left[g_0\right]\right)>0$, the $σ_2$-Yamabe constant   $$ Y_2\left(M,\left[g_0\right]\right):=\inf _{g \in\left[g_0\right], R_g>0} \frac{\int_M σ_2(g) d \operatorname{vol}(g)}{\operatorname{vol}(g)^{\frac{n-4}{n}}} $$   is achieved by a conformal metric $g \in\left[g_0\right]$, which in particular solves the $σ_2$-Yamabe problem, assuming $Y_2\left(M,\left[g_0\right]\right)>0$. As a consequence, for any $\left(M, g_0\right)$ with $Y_1\left(M,\left[g_0\right]\right)>$ 0 and $Y_2\left(M,\left[g_0\right]\right)>0$ one has   $$ \inf _{g \in\left[g_0\right], R_g>0} \frac{\int_M σ_2(g) d \operatorname{vol}(g)}{\operatorname{vol}(g)^{\frac{n-4}{n}}}=\inf _{g \in\left[g_0\right], R_g>0, σ_2(g)>0} \frac{\int_M σ_2(g) d \operatorname{vol}(g)}{\operatorname{vol}(g)^{\frac{n-4}{n}}} . $$   We also show that these conclusions can fail if the condition $R_g>0$ is removed.

ai.tldr: 本文重新研究了σ_k-Yamabe问题，证明了在正Yamabe常数的闭流形上，σ_2-Yamabe常数可由一个共形度量达到，从而解决了σ_2-Yamabe问题。
ai.motivation: 经典Yamabe问题已解决，但高阶σ_k-Yamabe问题（k≥2）的存在性仍有待完善，本文旨在填补σ_2情形的空白。
ai.method: 利用变分法，在正Yamabe常数条件下构造极小化序列，并证明其收敛到光滑共形度量。
ai.result: 当Y_1>0且Y_2>0时，σ_2-Yamabe常数可达；若去掉R_g>0条件，结论可能失效。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解高阶曲率泛函的极值问题提供了严格的存在性结果，有助于几何分析中的变分方法研究。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将σ_k-Yamabe问题与流形的拓扑不变量（如特征类）建立联系。
idea_spark.risk: 高阶情形可能缺乏类似的正性条件，导致极小化序列退化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从σ_2的成功出发，尝试σ_k（k≥3）的类似结果，或探索负曲率情形。

en.tldr: This paper revisits the σ_k-Yamabe problem and proves that on a closed manifold with positive Yamabe constant, the σ_2-Yamabe constant is achieved by a conformal metric, thereby solving the σ_2-Yamabe problem.
en.motivation: The classical Yamabe problem is solved, but the existence for higher-order σ_k-Yamabe problems (k≥2) remains incomplete; this work fills the gap for σ_2.
en.method: Variational methods are used to construct a minimizing sequence under the positive Yamabe constant condition, and convergence to a smooth conformal metric is shown.
en.result: When Y_1>0 and Y_2>0, the σ_2-Yamabe constant is attained; the conclusion may fail if the condition R_g>0 is removed.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous existence result for extremal problems of higher-order curvature functionals, aiding variational methods in geometric analysis.

idea_spark.idea: Consider linking the σ_k-Yamabe problem to topological invariants of the manifold, such as characteristic classes.
idea_spark.risk: Higher-order cases may lack analogous positivity conditions, causing degeneracy of minimizing sequences.
idea_spark.inspiration: Building on the success for σ_2, attempt similar results for σ_k (k≥3) or explore negative curvature scenarios.

papers.title: Absolute continuity of generalized Wasserstein barycenters of finitely many measures
papers.summary: Consider a complete Riemannian manifold $(M, g)$ and optimal transport problems on it with cost functions of the form $c(x,y) = h(d_{g}(x,y))$. We study the absolute continuity of the corresponding generalized Wasserstein barycenters of finitely many marginal measures. For general strictly convex profiles $h$ lacking $\mathcal{C}^2$-smoothness, such as $h(d)= d^p / p$ with $1 < p < 2$ that defines the $p$-Wasserstein space, the singularity at $d=0$ prevents the barycenter from inheriting absolute continuity from a single marginal measure as the quadratic case. To overcome this singularity, recent Euclidean results necessitate the absolute continuity of all marginals. Building upon the approximation framework toward absolute continuity in arXiv:2310.13832, we extend the Euclidean advancements to the manifold setting. Stripping away the implicit reliance on flat translational symmetry and local coordinate calculations of their Euclidean proofs, our work handles the singularity in a geometrically transparent way, revealing the precise analytic condition on the cost profile that governs the necessary assumptions.

ai.tldr: 研究了完备黎曼流形上有限个测度的广义Wasserstein重心绝对连续性问题，克服了非光滑凸代价函数在零点处的奇异性，将欧氏结果推广到流形。
ai.motivation: 二次代价下单个边际的绝对连续性足以保证重心绝对连续，但p- Wasserstein代价（1<p<2）在零点奇异，使得该性质不再成立，需所有边际绝对连续。
ai.method: 基于arXiv:2310.13832的逼近框架，剥离欧氏证明对平移对称性和局部坐标的依赖，以几何透明的方式处理奇异性。
ai.result: 给出了代价函数轮廓控制必要假设的精确解析条件，将欧氏进展推广到流形。
ai.help_to_user: 为流形上非光滑代价的最优传输重心绝对连续性提供理论保障，指导相关算法设计。

idea_spark.idea: 利用流形上的测地线凸性和代价函数的凸性构造逼近序列，证明重心绝对连续性。
idea_spark.risk: 流形曲率可能影响逼近收敛性，需额外假设。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从欧氏证明中抽象出几何本质，避免坐标依赖，启发更一般的流形传输理论。

en.tldr: Studies absolute continuity of generalized Wasserstein barycenters of finitely many measures on a complete Riemannian manifold, overcoming the singularity at zero of non-smooth convex cost functions and extending Euclidean results to manifolds.
en.motivation: For quadratic cost, absolute continuity of a single marginal suffices for barycenter absolute continuity, but for p-Wasserstein cost (1<p<2) the singularity at zero breaks this, requiring all marginals to be absolutely continuous.
en.method: Builds on the approximation framework of arXiv:2310.13832, stripping away Euclidean proofs' reliance on translational symmetry and local coordinates, handling the singularity in a geometrically transparent way.
en.result: Provides the precise analytic condition on the cost profile that governs the necessary assumptions, extending Euclidean advances to the manifold setting.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical guarantees for absolute continuity of optimal transport barycenters on manifolds with non-smooth costs, guiding algorithm design.

idea_spark.idea: Construct approximating sequences using geodesic convexity and convexity of the cost on the manifold to prove absolute continuity of the barycenter.
idea_spark.risk: Manifold curvature may affect convergence of approximations, requiring additional assumptions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Abstracting geometric essence from Euclidean proofs, avoiding coordinate dependence, inspires more general transport theory on manifolds.

papers.title: Accessory Parameter of Confluent Heun Equations, Voros Periods and classical irregular conformal blocks
papers.summary: For the Heun differential equation and all of its confluent equations, we derive formal series expansions of the accessory parameters using the Voros periods. We then compare these expansions with the classical conformal blocks recently obtained by Bonelli--Shchechkin--Tanzini, and examine the Zamolodchikov-type conjecture expected to hold between them, allowing for irregular singularities. In particular, as an extension of the previous works of Mironov--Morozov, Piatek--Pietrykowski and Lisovyy--Naidiuk, we provide a detailed prescription for choosing cycles on the spectral curve that yield the Voros period which corresponds to the classical (regular or irregular) conformal blocks through the accessory parameter.

ai.tldr: 本文为Heun方程及其所有合流方程推导了辅助参数的级数展开，并将其与经典共形块进行比较，验证了Zamolodchikov型猜想。
ai.motivation: 建立Heun方程辅助参数与经典共形块之间的精确对应关系，推广先前关于正则奇点的工作到不规则奇点情形。
ai.method: 利用Voros周期形式地展开辅助参数，并与Bonelli–Shchechkin–Tanzini得到的经典共形块进行对比，同时给出谱曲线上选取回路的详细规则。
ai.result: 给出了辅助参数与经典（正则或不规则）共形块之间对应关系的具体构造，验证了Zamolodchikov型猜想。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解Heun方程辅助参数与共形场论中经典共形块之间的深层联系，为相关数学物理问题提供系统方法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用谱曲线上的回路积分直接构造经典共形块，可能简化共形块的计算。
idea_spark.risk: 形式级数展开的收敛性及与精确解的关系尚需严格分析。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将微分方程中的辅助参数与共形场论中的经典对象对应，启发其他可积系统与共形场论之间的桥梁构建。

en.tldr: This paper derives formal series expansions of accessory parameters for the Heun equation and all its confluent equations using Voros periods, and compares them with classical conformal blocks, verifying the Zamolodchikov-type conjecture for irregular singularities.
en.motivation: To establish a precise correspondence between accessory parameters of Heun equations and classical conformal blocks, extending previous works from regular to irregular singularities.
en.method: Formal expansions of accessory parameters are obtained via Voros periods and compared with classical conformal blocks from Bonelli–Shchechkin–Tanzini; a detailed prescription for choosing cycles on the spectral curve is provided.
en.result: A concrete construction of the correspondence between accessory parameters and classical (regular or irregular) conformal blocks is given, confirming the Zamolodchikov-type conjecture.
en.help_to_user: Provides a systematic method to understand the deep connection between accessory parameters of Heun equations and classical conformal blocks in conformal field theory.

idea_spark.idea: Using cycle integrals on the spectral curve to directly construct classical conformal blocks may simplify their computation.
idea_spark.risk: The convergence of the formal series expansions and their relation to exact solutions require rigorous analysis.
idea_spark.inspiration: The correspondence between accessory parameters and classical objects in conformal field theory inspires bridges between integrable systems and conformal field theory.

papers.title: Relay Buffer Independent Communication over Pooled HBM for Efficient MoE Inference on Ascend
papers.summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) inference requires large-scale token exchange across devices, making dispatch and combine major bottlenecks in both prefill and decode. Beyond network transfer, routing-driven layout transformation, temporary relay, and output restoration can add substantial overhead. Existing MoE communication paths are often buffer-centric, using explicit inter-process relay and reordering buffers around collective transfer. This report presents a relay-buffer-free communication design for MoE inference acceleration on Ascend systems. The design reorganizes dispatch and combine around direct placement into destination expert windows and direct reading from remote expert windows. Built on globally pooled high-bandwidth memory and symmetric-memory allocation, it removes most intermediate relay and reordering buffers while retaining only lightweight control state, including counts, offsets, and synchronization metadata. We instantiate the design as two schedules for the main phases of MoE inference: a prefill schedule with richer planning state for throughput-oriented execution, and a compact decode schedule for latency-sensitive execution. Experiments on Ascend-based MoE workloads show reduced dispatch and combine latency in both settings. At the serving level, the implementation improves time to first token (TTFT), preserves competitive time per output token (TPOT), and enlarges the feasible scheduling space under practical latency constraints. These results indicate that, on platforms with globally addressable device memory, reducing intermediate buffering and output restoration around expert execution is an effective direction for accelerating MoE inference.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于全局高带宽内存池的无中继缓冲区通信设计，用于加速昇腾系统上的MoE推理。
ai.motivation: MoE推理中跨设备令牌交换的调度与合并操作因中继缓冲区和重排序而成为瓶颈。
ai.method: 通过直接放置到目标专家窗口和直接读取远程专家窗口，消除大部分中间中继和重排序缓冲区，仅保留轻量控制状态。
ai.result: 在昇腾MoE负载上降低了调度与合并延迟，改善了首令牌时间，保持了每输出令牌时间，并扩大了可行调度空间。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何利用全局可寻址设备内存优化MoE推理中的通信瓶颈。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将类似直接放置/读取策略应用于分布式训练中的梯度聚合或模型并行通信。
idea_spark.risk: 对内存硬件全局可寻址特性的强依赖可能限制其在传统分布式架构上的适用性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从硬件内存池化特性出发，重新思考传统通信路径中的缓冲环节，启发更简洁的通信原语设计。

zh.tldr: 提出一种基于全局高带宽内存池的无中继缓冲区通信设计，用于加速昇腾系统上的MoE推理。
zh.motivation: MoE推理中跨设备令牌交换的调度与合并操作因中继缓冲区和重排序而成为瓶颈。
zh.method: 通过直接放置到目标专家窗口和直接读取远程专家窗口，消除大部分中间中继和重排序缓冲区，仅保留轻量控制状态。
zh.result: 在昇腾MoE负载上降低了调度与合并延迟，改善了首令牌时间，保持了每输出令牌时间，并扩大了可行调度空间。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何利用全局可寻址设备内存优化MoE推理中的通信瓶颈。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将类似直接放置/读取策略应用于分布式训练中的梯度聚合或模型并行通信。
idea_spark.risk: 对内存硬件全局可寻址特性的强依赖可能限制其在传统分布式架构上的适用性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从硬件内存池化特性出发，重新思考传统通信路径中的缓冲环节，启发更简洁的通信原语设计。

en.tldr: Proposes a relay-buffer-free communication design leveraging pooled high-bandwidth memory to accelerate MoE inference on Ascend systems.
en.motivation: Dispatch and combine operations in MoE inference become major bottlenecks due to relay buffers and reordering overhead.
en.method: Eliminates most intermediate relay and reordering buffers by direct placement into and reading from remote expert windows, retaining only lightweight control state.
en.result: Reduces dispatch and combine latency, improves time to first token, preserves competitive time per output token, and enlarges feasible scheduling space on Ascend MoE workloads.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into optimizing MoE inference communication bottlenecks using globally addressable device memory.

idea_spark.idea: Explore applying direct placement/reading strategies to gradient aggregation or model-parallel communication in distributed training.
idea_spark.risk: Heavy reliance on hardware global addressability may limit applicability on traditional distributed architectures.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging hardware memory pooling to rethink traditional communication buffering inspires simpler communication primitives.

papers.title: Leap generators for composition schemes
papers.summary: Leap generators have been introduced in [Duchon et al.'04] for exact-size random generation of structures in a class of the form $\mathcal{C}=\mathrm{Seq}(\mathcal{B})$ (sequence construction), in the supercritical case. We extend these generators to supercritical composition schemes $\mathcal{C}=\mathcal{A}\circ\mathcal{B}$. Compared to the sequence construction, the obtained exact-size random generator for $\mathcal{C}$ still has linear time complexity (under conditions on the sampling complexity in $\mathcal{A}$ and $\mathcal{B}$), but perfect uniformity of the distribution is lost in general. However the distribution on $\mathcal{C}_n$, called leap distribution, is asymptotically uniform, the total variation distance from the uniform distribution being $(c+o(1))n^{-1/2}$ for an explicit constant $c$. These generators are simple to implement and can be applied to several classes of walks and trees, in particular Pólya trees. Leap generators can also be given for certain critical composition schemes, those relating planar map families, where this time the total variation distance to the uniform distribution is $\sim c\,n^{-1/3}$ for an explicit constant $c$.

ai.tldr: 将跳跃生成器从序列构造扩展到超临界复合方案，实现线性时间随机生成，但均匀性变为渐近均匀，距离为O(n^{-1/2})。
ai.motivation: 序列构造的跳跃生成器已存在，但复合方案（如树和地图）的精确大小随机生成需要扩展。
ai.method: 基于超临界复合方案C=A∘B，设计跳跃生成器，利用A和B的采样复杂度保证线性时间，并分析分布与均匀分布的总变差距离。
ai.result: 生成器线性时间运行，分布渐近均匀，总变差距离为(c+o(1))n^{-1/2}；临界复合方案（如平面地图）距离为~c n^{-1/3}。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种简单实现、线性时间的随机生成方法，适用于树和地图等组合结构，且分布渐近均匀。

idea_spark.idea: 利用渐近均匀性替代严格均匀性，换取线性时间效率，适用于大规模随机采样。
idea_spark.risk: 渐近均匀性在有限样本下可能偏差较大，需验证实际应用中的可接受性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将精确均匀性放松为渐近均匀性，可启发其他组合生成问题的近似高效算法设计。

en.tldr: Extends leap generators from sequence constructions to supercritical composition schemes, achieving linear-time random generation with asymptotic uniformity (total variation distance O(n^{-1/2})).
en.motivation: Leap generators exist for sequence constructions; exact-size random generation for composition schemes (e.g., trees, maps) requires extension.
en.method: Based on supercritical composition scheme C=A∘B, design leap generators using sampling complexity of A and B to ensure linear time, and analyze total variation distance to uniform distribution.
en.result: Generator runs in linear time; distribution is asymptotically uniform with total variation distance (c+o(1))n^{-1/2}; for critical composition schemes (e.g., planar maps) distance ~c n^{-1/3}.
en.help_to_user: Provides a simple-to-implement, linear-time random generation method for combinatorial structures like trees and maps, with asymptotically uniform distribution.

idea_spark.idea: Replace exact uniformity with asymptotic uniformity to achieve linear-time efficiency, suitable for large-scale random sampling.
idea_spark.risk: Asymptotic uniformity may have significant deviation for finite samples; acceptability in practical applications needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Relaxing exact uniformity to asymptotic uniformity can inspire approximate efficient algorithms for other combinatorial generation problems.

papers.title: Equivalence of intrinsic and extrinsic area bounds for minimal surfaces
papers.summary: We show that intrinsic and extrinsic area density bounds are equivalent, with matching asymptotic values, for complete, connected, smooth minimal immersions $i:Σ^d\to\mathbb{R}^N$ of any dimension and codimension. Combining our results with a recent breakthrough by Bellettini, we extend the Schoen--Simon--Yau curvature estimates for smoothly immersed, two-sided, stable minimal hypersurfaces $i:Σ^n\to\mathbb{R}^{n+1}$ with bounded intrinsic area density to the missing case $n=6$, which had remained open since.

ai.tldr: 证明了对于任意维数和余维数的完备光滑极小浸入，内在和外在面积密度界是等价的，并具有相同的渐近值。结合Bellettini的突破，将Schoen-Simon-Yau曲率估计推广到n=6的情形。
ai.motivation: 填补Schoen-Simon-Yau曲率估计中n=6这一缺失情形，该情形自提出以来一直未解决。
ai.method: 通过证明内在与外在面积密度界的等价性，结合Bellettini的最新结果，将曲率估计推广到n=6。
ai.result: 建立了内在和外在面积密度界的等价性，并成功将曲率估计扩展到n=6的稳定极小超曲面。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了极小曲面理论中曲率估计的完整结果，有助于理解高维极小超曲面的几何性质。

idea_spark.idea: 利用内在和外在面积密度界的等价性，可以简化高维极小超曲面曲率估计的证明。
idea_spark.risk: 该等价性可能依赖于特定的几何条件，推广到更一般的流形时需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合不同几何量（如内在与外在面积密度）的等价性，为解决其他几何分析中的开放问题提供了新思路。

en.tldr: We prove that intrinsic and extrinsic area density bounds are equivalent with matching asymptotic values for complete smooth minimal immersions of any dimension and codimension. Combining with Bellettini's breakthrough, we extend the Schoen-Simon-Yau curvature estimates to the missing case n=6 for stable minimal hypersurfaces.
en.motivation: To fill the missing case n=6 in the Schoen-Simon-Yau curvature estimates, which had remained open since its proposal.
en.method: By proving the equivalence of intrinsic and extrinsic area density bounds and combining with Bellettini's recent result, we extend the curvature estimates to n=6.
en.result: Established the equivalence of intrinsic and extrinsic area density bounds, and successfully extended curvature estimates to stable minimal hypersurfaces in dimension 6.
en.help_to_user: Provides a complete result for curvature estimates in minimal surface theory, aiding understanding of geometric properties of high-dimensional minimal hypersurfaces.

idea_spark.idea: Using the equivalence of intrinsic and extrinsic area density bounds can simplify the proof of curvature estimates for high-dimensional minimal hypersurfaces.
idea_spark.risk: The equivalence may depend on specific geometric conditions and requires caution when generalizing to more general manifolds.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining equivalences of different geometric quantities (e.g., intrinsic vs. extrinsic area density) offers new approaches to solving open problems in geometric analysis.

papers.title: TabCF: Distributional Control Function Estimation with Tabular Foundation Models
papers.summary: Instrumental variable (IV) and control function (CF) methods are powerful tools for causal effect estimation in the presence of unmeasured confounding, yet most existing approaches target only mean effects and/or demand substantial fitting and tuning effort. In this paper, we introduce a simple method, TabCF, for control function regression using tabular foundation models, which enables accurate, fast, identification-transparent, and tuning-light causal estimation of distributional quantities, such as interventional means and quantiles; we also propose a copula-based approximation for multivariate outcomes. TabCF performs favorably against representative methods across a broad range of small- to medium-sized synthetic and real data scenarios. The central message is two-fold: for practitioners, it highlights that TabCF is an effective tool for distributional causal inference; for researchers, it suggests that the proposed approach could be considered a strong baseline for future method development. Code is available at https://github.com/GepingChen/TabCF.

ai.tldr: 提出TabCF方法，利用表格基础模型进行控制函数回归，实现分布性因果效应的快速、准确估计。
ai.motivation: 现有工具变量和控制函数方法主要针对均值效应，且需要大量拟合和调参。
ai.method: 使用表格基础模型进行控制函数回归，并引入copula近似处理多变量结果。
ai.result: 在多种合成和真实数据场景中，TabCF优于代表性方法。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种轻量、高效的分布性因果推断工具，适用于中小规模数据。

idea_spark.idea: 将表格基础模型与copula结合，可扩展至高维或结构化输出场景。
idea_spark.risk: 基础模型对表格数据的泛化能力可能受限于训练数据分布。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用预训练表格模型简化因果推断流程，减少手动特征工程。

en.tldr: TabCF uses tabular foundation models for control function regression to estimate distributional causal effects quickly and accurately.
en.motivation: Existing IV and CF methods focus on mean effects and require extensive fitting and tuning.
en.method: Leverages tabular foundation models for control function regression and a copula approximation for multivariate outcomes.
en.result: Outperforms representative methods across synthetic and real datasets of small to medium size.
en.help_to_user: Provides a lightweight, effective tool for distributional causal inference on moderate-sized tabular data.

idea_spark.idea: Combining tabular foundation models with copulas can extend to high-dimensional or structured outputs.
idea_spark.risk: Generalization of foundation models may be limited by training data distribution.
idea_spark.inspiration: Simplify causal inference pipelines by leveraging pre-trained tabular models, reducing manual feature engineering.

papers.title: Rogue wave statistics and integrable turbulence in the Gerdjikov-Ivanov equation
papers.summary: This paper numerically investigates the statistical properties of rogue waves and their generation mechanisms in integrable turbulence, taking the Gerdjikov-Ivanov (GI) equation as the research object. The eigenvalue spectra of the analytical solutions and the chaotic wave field are calculated using the Fourier collocation method. Subsequently, taking a plane wave with random noise as the initial condition, the evolution of chaotic wave fields is simulated using the split-step Fourier (SSF) method. Numerical results show that the larger the initial disturbance intensity, the faster the wave field converges to a chaotic state, and the higher the peak amplitude after convergence, the higher the tail of the probability density function, and the significantly higher probability of rogue wave occurrence. Moreover, as the initial disturbance intensity increases, the turbulence type transitions from breather turbulence to soliton turbulence. In addition, the evolution of the wave-action spectrum is studied. The research has found that the wave-action spectrum of the GI equation shows an asymmetric distribution during the time evolution process, and this asymmetry persists even after the system reaches a steady state.

ai.tldr: 本文数值研究了Gerdjikov-Ivanov方程中怪波的统计特性和可积湍流的生成机制。
ai.motivation: 探索怪波在可积湍流中的统计规律和产生机理。
ai.method: 采用傅里叶配置法计算特征值谱，并用分步傅里叶法模拟混沌波场的演化。
ai.result: 初始扰动越大，波场收敛越快，峰值越高，怪波概率越大；湍流类型从呼吸子湍流转变为孤子湍流；波作用谱呈非对称分布。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解怪波统计和可积湍流的动力学。

idea_spark.idea: 研究初始扰动对湍流类型转变的影响。
idea_spark.risk: 数值结果可能依赖具体方程参数。
idea_spark.inspiration: 波作用谱的非对称性可能揭示新的湍流特征。

idea_spark.inspiration: Asymmetry in the wave-action spectrum may reveal new turbulence features.

papers.title: Standing waves for defocusing nonlinear Schrödinger equations with point interaction
papers.summary: We consider standing waves of the nonlinear Schrödinger equation $i\partial_t u = -Δ_αu + |u|^{p-1}u$ in the defocusing case in dimensions $N=2$ and $N=3$. Here, $-Δ_α$ denotes the Laplacian with a point interaction. This operator is bounded from below by a negative constant; consequently, unlike in the free case, the associated energy functional admits non-trivial minimizers. We establish existence and uniqueness of standing waves, and prove further qualitative properties, including radial symmetry, positivity, and stability. Moreover, we build an appropriate functional space for the zero-mass case and establish sharp decay estimates in this case.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了在二维和三维空间中，带有点相互作用的散焦非线性薛定谔方程的驻波解，证明了其存在性、唯一性、径向对称性、正性和稳定性，并建立了零质量情况下的函数空间和衰减估计。
ai.motivation: 自由空间中的散焦非线性薛定谔方程通常不存在非平凡驻波解，而点相互作用使得算子有下界，从而允许能量泛函存在非平凡极小元，这为研究提供了新的可能性。
ai.method: 利用带有点相互作用的拉普拉斯算子的谱性质，构造能量泛函，并通过变分方法证明极小元的存在性；进一步通过对称化、单调性技巧和精细估计得到唯一性、对称性和衰减率。
ai.result: 建立了驻波解的存在唯一性，并证明了径向对称、正性和稳定性；在零质量情形下构造了合适的函数空间并得到了尖锐的衰减估计。
ai.help_to_user: 该结果有助于理解点相互作用对非线性色散方程解的结构和稳定性的影响，为相关物理模型（如量子点接触）提供数学基础。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将点相互作用推广到多点或非局部相互作用，研究驻波解的相互作用和动力学行为。
idea_spark.risk: 多点相互作用可能导致更复杂的谱结构，变分方法可能失效，需要发展新的泛函分析工具。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从点相互作用带来的下界性质出发，可以探索其他“缺陷”或“杂质”对非线性波稳定性的调控作用。

en.tldr: This paper studies standing waves for the defocusing nonlinear Schrödinger equation with point interaction in dimensions 2 and 3, proving existence, uniqueness, radial symmetry, positivity, and stability, and establishing a functional space and sharp decay estimates for the zero-mass case.
en.motivation: In the free case, the defocusing nonlinear Schrödinger equation admits no nontrivial standing waves; the point interaction makes the operator bounded from below, enabling nontrivial minimizers of the energy functional.
en.method: Using spectral properties of the Laplacian with point interaction, the energy functional is constructed and minimizers are obtained via variational methods; symmetry, uniqueness, and decay estimates are derived through symmetrization, monotonicity, and refined estimates.
en.result: Existence and uniqueness of standing waves are established, along with radial symmetry, positivity, and stability; for the zero-mass case, a suitable functional space is built and sharp decay estimates are proved.
en.help_to_user: These results clarify how point interactions affect the structure and stability of solutions to nonlinear dispersive equations, providing a mathematical foundation for physical models such as quantum point contacts.

idea_spark.idea: Consider generalizing point interactions to multi-point or nonlocal interactions and study the interaction and dynamics of standing waves.
idea_spark.risk: Multi-point interactions may lead to more complex spectral structures, potentially invalidating variational methods and requiring new functional analytic tools.
idea_spark.inspiration: The lower-boundedness induced by point interactions suggests exploring how other 'defects' or 'impurities' can control the stability of nonlinear waves.

papers.title: No Triangulation Without Representation: Generalization in Topological Deep Learning
papers.summary: Despite an ever-increasing interest in topological deep learning models that target higher-order datasets, there is no consensus on how to evaluate such models. This is exacerbated by the fact that topological objects permit operations, such as structural refinements, that are not appropriate for graph data. In this work, we extend MANTRA, a benchmark dataset containing manifold triangulations, to a larger class of manifolds with more diverse homeomorphism types. We show that, unlike prior claims, both graph neural networks (GNNs) and higher-order message passing (HOMP) methods can saturate the benchmark. However, we find that this is contingent on the right representation and feature assignment, emphasizing their importance in baseline models. We thus provide a novel evaluation protocol based on representational diversity and triangulation refinement. Surprisingly, we find no indication that existing models are capable of generalizing beyond the combinatorial structure of the data. This points towards a research gap in developing models that understand topological structure independent of scale. Our work thus provides the necessary scaffolding to evaluate future models and enable the development of topology-aware inductive biases.

ai.tldr: 本文扩展了MANTRA基准数据集，发现图神经网络和高阶消息传递方法在正确表示和特征分配下可饱和基准，但现有模型无法泛化到数据组合结构之外，指出了拓扑感知归纳偏置的研究空白。
ai.motivation: 拓扑深度学习模型评估缺乏共识，且拓扑对象允许结构细化等操作，现有基准不足以衡量模型对拓扑结构的理解。
ai.method: 扩展MANTRA数据集至更多样流形，提出基于表示多样性和三角剖分细化的新评估协议。
ai.result: 图神经网络和高阶消息传递方法在正确表示下可饱和基准，但无法泛化到不同组合结构，表明模型缺乏拓扑结构独立于尺度的理解。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究者理解拓扑深度学习模型的泛化局限性，并提供标准化评估框架以开发拓扑感知模型。

idea_spark.idea: 设计显式编码拓扑不变量（如同调群）的神经网络架构，使其对三角剖分细化鲁棒。
idea_spark.risk: 拓扑不变量计算可能增加复杂度，且模型可能过拟合特定流形类型。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从代数拓扑中引入持续同调或莫尔斯理论作为归纳偏置，启发新型拓扑层设计。

en.tldr: This paper extends the MANTRA benchmark dataset and shows that GNNs and higher-order message passing methods can saturate the benchmark with proper representations, but existing models fail to generalize beyond combinatorial structure, highlighting a research gap for topology-aware inductive biases.
en.motivation: There is no consensus on evaluating topological deep learning models, and topological objects allow operations like structural refinements not suitable for graphs, making current benchmarks insufficient.
en.method: Extends MANTRA to more diverse manifolds and proposes a novel evaluation protocol based on representational diversity and triangulation refinement.
en.result: GNNs and HOMP methods can saturate the benchmark with correct representations, but cannot generalize to different combinatorial structures, indicating models lack scale-independent topological understanding.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers understand generalization limitations of topological deep learning models and provides a standardized evaluation framework for developing topology-aware models.

idea_spark.idea: Design neural network architectures that explicitly encode topological invariants (e.g., homology groups) to be robust to triangulation refinements.
idea_spark.risk: Computing topological invariants may increase complexity, and models might overfit specific manifold types.
idea_spark.inspiration: Introduce persistent homology or Morse theory from algebraic topology as inductive biases to inspire novel topological layer designs.

papers.title: 3D MRI Image Pretraining via Controllable 2D Slice Navigation Task
papers.summary: Self-supervised pretraining has become the mainstream approach for learning MRI representations from unlabeled scans. However, most existing objectives still treat each scan primarily as static aggregations of slices, patches or volumes. We ask whether there exists an intrinsic form of self-supervision signal that is different from reconstructing the masked patches, through transforming the 3D volumes into controllable 2D rendered sequences: by rendering slices at continuous positions, orientations, and scales, a 3D volume can be converted into dense video-action sequences whose controls are the action trajectories. We study this formulation with an action-conditioned pretraining objective, where a tokenizer encodes slice observations and a latent dynamics model predicts the evolution of latent features. Across representative anatomical and spatial downstream tasks, the proposed pretraining is evaluated against standard static-volume baselines, tokenizer-only pretraining, and dynamics variants without aligned actions. These results suggest that controllable MRI slice navigation provides a useful complementary pretraining interface for learning anatomical and spatial representations from large unlabeled MRI collections.

ai.tldr: 提出一种可控二维切片导航任务，将三维MRI体积转换为密集视频动作序列，用于自监督预训练。
ai.motivation: 现有自监督预训练方法将MRI扫描视为静态切片或体积聚合，缺乏内在的自监督信号。
ai.method: 通过连续位置、方向和尺度渲染切片，将三维体积转化为可控二维序列，并采用动作条件预训练目标，结合编码器和潜在动力学模型。
ai.result: 在解剖和空间下游任务上，该方法优于静态体积基线、仅编码器预训练和无对齐动作的动力学变体。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种新的MRI预训练范式，可增强解剖和空间表示学习。

idea_spark.idea: 将三维体积转化为可控二维序列，利用动作条件预训练学习空间结构。
idea_spark.risk: 渲染连续切片可能引入计算开销，且动作轨迹设计需领域知识。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从视频动作预测中借鉴，将三维医学影像视为可导航环境。

en.tldr: Proposes a controllable 2D slice navigation task that converts 3D MRI volumes into dense video-action sequences for self-supervised pretraining.
en.motivation: Existing self-supervised methods treat MRI scans as static aggregations, lacking intrinsic self-supervision signals.
en.method: Renders slices at continuous positions, orientations, and scales to transform 3D volumes into controllable 2D sequences, using an action-conditioned pretraining objective with a tokenizer and latent dynamics model.
en.result: Outperforms static-volume baselines, tokenizer-only pretraining, and dynamics variants without aligned actions on anatomical and spatial downstream tasks.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new MRI pretraining paradigm that enhances anatomical and spatial representation learning.

idea_spark.idea: Convert 3D volumes into controllable 2D sequences and leverage action-conditioned pretraining to learn spatial structure.
idea_spark.risk: Rendering continuous slices may introduce computational overhead, and action trajectory design requires domain knowledge.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draws from video action prediction, treating 3D medical images as navigable environments.

papers.title: Verifiable Model-Free Safety Filters via Reinforcement Learning
papers.summary: This paper presents a reinforcement learning approach of a model-free safety filter, drawing inspiration from the framework of model-based Predictive Safety Filters (PSFs). Similar to conventional PSFs, our method adopts a Quadratic Programming (QP) formulation by representing the filter as an unrolled QP solver network. However, unlike existing PSFs that derive QP parameters explicitly from system models, we learn these parameters directly through Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL), thereby eliminating the dependency on accurate system identification. Furthermore, compared to traditional neural network-based methods, this QP structure allows us to furnish a formal certificate for the persistent safety of the learned filter. Numerical results demonstrate that our method outperforms both conventional model-based PSFs and RL-trained Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP) baselines in terms of safety guarantees, minimal intervention, and per-step computational load.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于强化学习的无模型安全滤波器，通过QP求解器网络学习参数，无需系统模型即可提供形式化安全保证。
ai.motivation: 传统模型预测安全滤波器依赖精确系统模型，而神经网络方法缺乏可验证的安全保证。
ai.method: 将安全滤波器表示为展开的QP求解器网络，利用深度强化学习直接学习QP参数，避免系统辨识。
ai.result: 在安全保证、最小干预和每步计算负载方面优于传统模型基PSF和MLP基线。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需系统模型即可获得形式化安全保证的滤波器设计方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将QP结构嵌入强化学习策略，实现可验证的安全约束。
idea_spark.risk: QP求解器网络可能增加训练复杂度，且形式化证书的适用范围需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合优化与强化学习，为无模型方法赋予可证明的安全属性。

en.tldr: A reinforcement learning approach for a model-free safety filter using a QP solver network, providing formal safety certificates without system models.
en.motivation: Traditional model-based predictive safety filters require accurate system identification, while neural network methods lack verifiable safety guarantees.
en.method: Represent the safety filter as an unrolled QP solver network and learn QP parameters via deep reinforcement learning, eliminating the need for system identification.
en.result: Outperforms conventional model-based PSFs and RL-trained MLP baselines in safety guarantees, minimal intervention, and per-step computational load.
en.help_to_user: Offers a method to design safety filters with formal safety certificates without requiring a system model.

idea_spark.idea: Embed a QP structure into reinforcement learning policies for verifiable safety constraints.
idea_spark.risk: QP solver networks may increase training complexity, and the scope of formal certificates needs further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining optimization and reinforcement learning to endow model-free methods with provable safety properties.

papers.title: Passive Fault Tolerance through Tension-to-Thrust Feed-Forward: Hybrid Input-to-State Stability for Decentralized Multi-UAV Slung-Load Transport under Abrupt Cable Severance
papers.summary: Abrupt cable severance in multi-UAV slung-load transport redistributes load and changes the active constraint set, leaving limited time for fault diagnosis and reconfiguration. Existing controllers rely on coordinated force allocation, peer-state exchange, or fixed cable topology, and therefore lack a certified decentralized recovery mechanism for unannounced severance. We present a passive architecture that routes each vehicle's measured cable tension directly into its altitude thrust command, $T_i^{\mathrm{ff}}=T_i$, while a surrounding proportional-derivative, anti-swing, and projection cascade preserves local tracking feasibility. The main contribution is a conditional hybrid practical input-to-state-stability certificate that composes a slack-excursion-bounded taut-cable reduction, bounded post-severance Lyapunov jumps, inter-fault decay, and per-fault-cycle contraction $ρ\in (0,1)$ into an explicit recovery envelope under stated actuator, slack, and dwell assumptions. We validate the controller in Drake multibody simulation with five vehicles, a 10 kg payload, Kelvin-Voigt cables, Dryden wind, and single- and dual-severance schedules: the closed loop attains 0.312-0.328 m RMSE, 76.1-95.2 mm peak sag, and recovery within one payload-pendulum period. Disabling the identity inflates cruise error by 34-39% and peak sag by 3.6x-4.0x, identifying local tension feed-forward as the dominant passive recovery mechanism in the tested decentralized cascade.

ai.tldr: 提出一种被动容错架构，通过将每架无人机的缆绳张力直接馈入高度推力指令，实现多无人机吊挂运输中突发缆绳断裂后的分散式恢复，无需故障诊断或重新配置。
ai.motivation: 现有控制器依赖协调力分配、同伴状态交换或固定缆绳拓扑，缺乏针对突发缆绳断裂的认证分散恢复机制。
ai.method: 设计被动架构，将测量到的缆绳张力直接作为高度推力前馈项，并配合比例-微分、防摆和投影级联控制器，同时给出条件混合实用输入-状态稳定性证明。
ai.result: 在五架无人机、10 kg负载、Kelvin-Voigt缆绳和Dryden风场仿真中，闭环均方根误差0.312-0.328 m，峰值下垂76.1-95.2 mm，恢复时间在一个摆周期内；禁用前馈后误差增大34-39%，峰值下垂增大3.6-4.0倍。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需故障诊断即可应对突发缆绳断裂的分散控制方案，适用于多无人机协同吊运任务。

idea_spark.idea: 将传感器测量值直接作为前馈控制输入，绕过传统故障诊断与重构流程，实现即时被动恢复。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖精确的缆绳张力测量，传感器噪声或延迟可能影响性能；理论证明基于特定假设（如执行器、松弛、驻留时间），实际偏离可能降低稳定性保证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用物理约束（缆绳张力）本身作为控制信号，实现无需主动检测的容错，启发设计更简洁、鲁棒的分散控制器。

en.tldr: A passive fault-tolerant architecture routes measured cable tension directly into altitude thrust command for decentralized recovery from abrupt cable severance in multi-UAV slung-load transport, without requiring fault diagnosis or reconfiguration.
en.motivation: Existing controllers rely on coordinated force allocation, peer-state exchange, or fixed cable topology, lacking a certified decentralized recovery mechanism for unannounced severance.
en.method: A passive architecture feeds each vehicle's measured cable tension directly into its altitude thrust command, complemented by a proportional-derivative, anti-swing, and projection cascade, with a conditional hybrid practical input-to-state stability certificate.
en.result: In Drake multibody simulation with five vehicles, 10 kg payload, Kelvin-Voigt cables, and Dryden wind, the closed loop achieves 0.312-0.328 m RMSE, 76.1-95.2 mm peak sag, and recovery within one payload-pendulum period; disabling the feed-forward inflates cruise error by 34-39% and peak sag by 3.6x-4.0x.
en.help_to_user: Provides a decentralized control scheme that handles abrupt cable severance without fault diagnosis, suitable for multi-UAV collaborative transport tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Use sensor measurements directly as feed-forward control input, bypassing traditional fault diagnosis and reconfiguration for instantaneous passive recovery.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on accurate cable tension measurement; sensor noise or delays may degrade performance; theoretical guarantees depend on specific assumptions (actuator, slack, dwell) that may be violated in practice.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage physical constraints (cable tension) themselves as control signals to achieve fault tolerance without active detection, inspiring simpler and more robust decentralized controllers.

papers.title: LANTERN: LLM-Augmented Neurosymbolic Transfer with Experience-Gated Reasoning Networks
papers.summary: Transfer learning in reinforcement learning (RL) seeks to accelerate learning in new tasks by leveraging knowledge from related sources. Existing neurosymbolic transfer methods, however, typically rely on manually specified task automata, assume a single source task, and use fixed knowledge-integration mechanisms that cannot adapt to varying source relevance. We propose LANTERN, a unified framework for multi-source neurosymbolic transfer that addresses these limitations through three components: (i) deterministic finite automata generated from natural language task descriptions using large language models, (ii) semantic embedding-based aggregation of multiple source policies weighted by cross-task similarity, and (iii) adaptive teacher-student gating based on temporal-difference error and semantic uncertainty. Across domains spanning resource management, navigation, and control, LANTERN achieves 40-60% improvements in sample efficiency over existing baselines while remaining robust to poorly aligned sources. These results demonstrate that multi-source, adaptively weighted neurosymbolic transfer can improve scalability and robustness in symbolic RL settings.

ai.tldr: 提出LANTERN框架，利用大语言模型从自然语言生成任务自动机，结合语义嵌入聚合多源策略和自适应门控机制，实现高效多源神经符号迁移学习。
ai.motivation: 现有神经符号迁移方法依赖手动指定任务自动机、仅支持单源任务、且知识集成机制固定，无法适应源任务相关性变化。
ai.method: 三组件框架：①大语言模型从自然语言描述生成确定性有限自动机；②基于语义嵌入的多源策略加权聚合；③基于时序差分误差和语义不确定性的自适应师生门控。
ai.result: 在资源管理、导航和控制领域，样本效率比现有基线提升40-60%，且对弱对齐源任务具有鲁棒性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种自动、可扩展的多源神经符号迁移方法，减少人工标注需求，提升强化学习在新任务上的样本效率。

idea_spark.idea: 将大语言模型用于自动生成任务结构先验，结合多源策略的语义相似度动态调整知识融合权重。
idea_spark.risk: 大语言模型生成的自动机可能不准确，语义嵌入质量依赖预训练模型，门控机制可能增加计算开销。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用自然语言接口降低符号系统构建门槛，通过不确定性度量实现自适应知识融合。

zh.tldr: 提出LANTERN框架，利用大语言模型从自然语言生成任务自动机，结合语义嵌入聚合多源策略和自适应门控机制，实现高效多源神经符号迁移学习。
zh.motivation: 现有神经符号迁移方法依赖手动指定任务自动机、仅支持单源任务、且知识集成机制固定，无法适应源任务相关性变化。
zh.method: 三组件框架：①大语言模型从自然语言描述生成确定性有限自动机；②基于语义嵌入的多源策略加权聚合；③基于时序差分误差和语义不确定性的自适应师生门控。
zh.result: 在资源管理、导航和控制领域，样本效率比现有基线提升40-60%，且对弱对齐源任务具有鲁棒性。
zh.help_to_user: 提供一种自动、可扩展的多源神经符号迁移方法，减少人工标注需求，提升强化学习在新任务上的样本效率。

idea_spark.idea: 将大语言模型用于自动生成任务结构先验，结合多源策略的语义相似度动态调整知识融合权重。
idea_spark.risk: 大语言模型生成的自动机可能不准确，语义嵌入质量依赖预训练模型，门控机制可能增加计算开销。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用自然语言接口降低符号系统构建门槛，通过不确定性度量实现自适应知识融合。

en.tldr: LANTERN is a unified framework for multi-source neurosymbolic transfer in RL, using LLMs to generate task automata from natural language, semantic embedding-based policy aggregation, and adaptive teacher-student gating.
en.motivation: Existing neurosymbolic transfer methods rely on manually specified task automata, assume a single source, and use fixed knowledge integration that cannot adapt to varying source relevance.
en.method: Three components: (i) deterministic finite automata generated from natural language via LLMs, (ii) semantic embedding-based weighted aggregation of multiple source policies, (iii) adaptive teacher-student gating based on TD error and semantic uncertainty.
en.result: 40-60% improvement in sample efficiency over baselines across resource management, navigation, and control domains, with robustness to poorly aligned sources.
en.help_to_user: Provides an automated, scalable multi-source neurosymbolic transfer approach that reduces manual effort and improves sample efficiency in new RL tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Use LLMs to automatically generate task structure priors and dynamically adjust knowledge fusion weights based on semantic similarity of multiple source policies.
idea_spark.risk: LLM-generated automata may be inaccurate; semantic embedding quality depends on pretrained models; gating may increase computational overhead.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage natural language interfaces to lower the barrier for symbolic system construction, and use uncertainty measures for adaptive knowledge fusion.

keywords_raw: large language models for task automata

papers.title: Dirichlet problems and exit distributions for the telegraph process and its planar extensions
papers.summary: In this paper, we study boundary-value problems describing the exit distribution of finite-velocity random motions from prescribed domains. For the standard telegraph process, with and without drift, we derive the Dirichlet problems governing the exit point and mean exit time from a closed interval. We then extend the analysis to a planar finite-velocity model with orthogonal directions, for which we obtain the associated Laplace and Poisson-type equations for the exit distribution and mean exit time. In the special case of an infinite strip, explicit solutions are obtained. In all cases, we show that our equations and results converge, in the hydrodynamic limit, to the corresponding ones for Brownian motion.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了有限速度随机运动在给定区域内的退出分布，推导了标准电报过程（含漂移与无漂移）的Dirichlet问题，并扩展到平面正交方向模型，得到Laplace和Poisson型方程，在无限条带情形下获得显式解，且所有结果在流体动力学极限下收敛于布朗运动对应结果。
ai.motivation: 理解有限速度随机运动（如电报过程）在区域边界上的退出行为，并建立其与经典布朗运动极限的联系。
ai.method: 通过分析标准电报过程及其平面扩展的Dirichlet问题，推导退出点和平均退出时间满足的偏微分方程，并在特殊区域（无限条带）中求解。
ai.result: 得到了电报过程退出分布和平均退出时间的Laplace与Poisson型方程，证明了在流体动力学极限下这些方程收敛于布朗运动对应的方程。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户掌握有限速度随机运动退出问题的数学框架，以及如何通过极限过渡到布朗运动。

idea_spark.idea: 利用流体动力学极限，将有限速度随机运动的退出分布作为布朗运动退出分布的近似，可能简化计算。
idea_spark.risk: 极限收敛条件可能严格，实际应用中需验证有限速度参数是否足够大。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑将平面正交方向模型推广至任意方向或变速度，并研究其退出分布与偏微分方程的关系。

en.tldr: This paper studies boundary-value problems for exit distributions of finite-velocity random motions, deriving Dirichlet problems for the telegraph process (with and without drift) and extending to a planar orthogonal model, obtaining Laplace and Poisson-type equations, with explicit solutions for an infinite strip, all converging to Brownian motion in the hydrodynamic limit.
en.motivation: To understand the exit behavior of finite-velocity random motions (e.g., telegraph process) from prescribed domains and establish connections to classical Brownian motion limits.
en.method: By analyzing Dirichlet problems for the standard telegraph process and its planar extension, deriving partial differential equations for the exit point and mean exit time, and solving them in special domains (infinite strip).
en.result: Obtained Laplace and Poisson-type equations for the exit distribution and mean exit time of the telegraph process, and proved convergence to Brownian motion counterparts in the hydrodynamic limit.
en.help_to_user: Helps users grasp the mathematical framework for exit problems of finite-velocity random motions and how they relate to Brownian motion via limits.

idea_spark.idea: Use the hydrodynamic limit to approximate Brownian exit distributions with those of finite-velocity motions, potentially simplifying computations.
idea_spark.risk: Convergence conditions may be restrictive; practical applicability requires verifying that finite-velocity parameters are sufficiently large.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider generalizing the planar orthogonal model to arbitrary directions or variable speeds, and study the relationship between exit distributions and partial differential equations.

papers.title: Uniform small energy regularity for fractional geometric problems
papers.summary: We prove small energy regularity for a parabolic boundary reaction Ginzburg-Landau problem in the full range $s\in (0,1)$, answering a question posed by Hyder, Segatti, Sire and Wang. We also obtain a similar small energy regularity result for fractional harmonic maps to spheres. Both results are uniform as $s\to 1$.

ai.tldr: 证明了全范围s∈(0,1)下抛物边界反应Ginzburg-Landau问题的小能量正则性，以及分数阶球面调和映射的类似结果，且结果在s→1时一致。
ai.motivation: 回答Hyder、Segatti、Sire和Wang提出的关于分数阶几何问题小能量正则性的公开问题。
ai.method: 利用分数阶抛物和椭圆分析技术，结合边界反应项的精细估计。
ai.result: 建立了两个主要结果：抛物边界反应Ginzburg-Landau问题的小能量正则性，以及分数阶调和映射到球面的小能量正则性，且两者在s→1时一致。
ai.help_to_user: 为分数阶几何问题提供了统一的正则性理论，有助于理解分数阶PDE和调和映射的边界行为。

idea_spark.idea: 探索分数阶参数s趋近1时，正则性结果的一致性与经典极限的关联。
idea_spark.risk: 分数阶算子的非局部性可能导致边界层效应，需要更精细的估计。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将分数阶几何问题与经典几何测度论结合，可能发现新的正则性准则。

en.tldr: Proves small energy regularity for a parabolic boundary reaction Ginzburg-Landau problem for all s∈(0,1), and a similar result for fractional harmonic maps to spheres, both uniform as s→1.
en.motivation: Answers an open question posed by Hyder, Segatti, Sire and Wang regarding small energy regularity for fractional geometric problems.
en.method: Employs fractional parabolic and elliptic analysis techniques with refined estimates of boundary reaction terms.
en.result: Establishes two main results: small energy regularity for the parabolic boundary reaction Ginzburg-Landau problem and for fractional harmonic maps to spheres, both uniform as s→1.
en.help_to_user: Provides a unified regularity theory for fractional geometric problems, aiding understanding of boundary behavior in fractional PDEs and harmonic maps.

idea_spark.idea: Explore the connection between uniform regularity as s→1 and the classical limit of fractional problems.
idea_spark.risk: Nonlocality of fractional operators may introduce boundary layer effects requiring more delicate estimates.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining fractional geometric problems with classical geometric measure theory may reveal new regularity criteria.

papers.title: Entire spacelike radial graphs with prescribed mean curvature in the Lorentz--Minkowski space
papers.summary: In this paper we address the existence and uniqueness of entire spacelike hypersurfaces in the Lorentz--Minkowski space $\mathbb{L}^{m+1}$ with prescribed mean curvature that are star-shaped with respect to a point and asymptotic to a light cone. We also establish a Willmore-type inequality and prove a non-existence result for spacelike radial graphs asymptotic to the light cone whose mean curvature belongs to $L^p$ for $1 \leq p\leq m$, in particular in the case of compactly supported mean curvature.

ai.tldr: 研究了Lorentz-Minkowski空间中具有指定平均曲率的整个类空径向图的存在性、唯一性及非存在性。
ai.motivation: 探索在Lorentz-Minkowski空间中，具有指定平均曲率且渐近于光锥的星形类空超曲面的存在性与唯一性。
ai.method: 通过分析径向图方程，结合Willmore型不等式和Lp平均曲率条件进行证明。
ai.result: 证明了存在性与唯一性定理，建立了Willmore型不等式，并给出了当平均曲率属于Lp（1≤p≤m）时的非存在性结果。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解Lorentz-Minkowski空间中指定平均曲率类空超曲面的几何性质。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将Lp平均曲率条件与渐近行为结合，用于研究其他时空中的类空超曲面。
idea_spark.risk: Lp条件可能过于严格，导致非存在性结果，需谨慎选择参数范围。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从光锥渐近性出发，探索类空超曲面与宇宙学模型的联系。

en.tldr: We study existence, uniqueness, and non-existence of entire spacelike radial graphs with prescribed mean curvature in Lorentz-Minkowski space, asymptotic to a light cone.
en.motivation: To investigate the existence and uniqueness of star-shaped spacelike hypersurfaces with prescribed mean curvature that are asymptotic to a light cone in Lorentz-Minkowski space.
en.method: By analyzing the radial graph equation, combined with a Willmore-type inequality and Lp mean curvature conditions.
en.result: Existence and uniqueness theorems are proved, a Willmore-type inequality is established, and a non-existence result is given when the mean curvature belongs to Lp for 1 ≤ p ≤ m.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the geometric properties of spacelike hypersurfaces with prescribed mean curvature in Lorentz-Minkowski space.

idea_spark.idea: Consider combining Lp mean curvature conditions with asymptotic behavior to study spacelike hypersurfaces in other spacetimes.
idea_spark.risk: The Lp condition may be too restrictive, leading to non-existence; careful parameter selection is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: From light cone asymptotics, explore connections between spacelike hypersurfaces and cosmological models.

papers.title: Causal self-dual nonlinear electrodynamics from the Born-Infeld theory
papers.summary: Recently we have proposed a new auxiliary-field formulation for self-dual nonlinear electrodynamics (NLED) which makes use of two building blocks: (i) a seed self-dual theory $L(F_{μν};g)$, where $F_{μν}$ is the electromagnetic field strength and $g$ a duality-invariant coupling constant; and (ii) a scalar potential $W(ψ)$. Our formulation is based on the Lagrangian $ \mathfrak{L}(F_{μν};ψ) = L(F_{μν};ψ) + W(ψ)$, where $ψ$ is an auxiliary scalar field. Integrating out $ψ$, using its equation of motion, one obtains a $\mathsf{U}(1)$ duality-invariant NLED. Different self-dual NLEDs are derived by choosing different potentials $W(ψ)$. In the case that the seed Lagrangian defines the Born-Infeld theory, in this paper we demonstrate that the resulting models for self-dual NLED are causal and provide a general solution of the self-duality equation. We also elaborate on the procedure to relate our formulation to that developed by Russo and Townsend.

ai.tldr: 从Born-Infeld理论出发，通过辅助标量场构造了一类因果的自对偶非线性电动力学模型。
ai.motivation: 在先前提出的辅助场框架下，寻找由Born-Infeld种子理论生成的自对偶NLED模型，并验证其因果性。
ai.method: 采用辅助标量场ψ的拉格朗日量L(F;ψ)+W(ψ)，通过积分掉ψ得到U(1)对偶不变NLED；以Born-Infeld理论为种子，选择不同势函数W(ψ)推导具体模型。
ai.result: 证明所得自对偶NLED模型是因果的，并给出了自对偶方程的一般解；还阐述了与Russo-Townsend形式的关系。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究自对偶非线性电动力学提供了新的构造工具和因果性保证。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试用不同种子理论（如ModMax）结合势函数W(ψ)生成新的自对偶模型。
idea_spark.risk: 新模型可能不满足因果性或能量条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将辅助场技术与对偶对称性结合，有望简化复杂非线性理论的构造。

en.tldr: From the Born-Infeld theory, causal self-dual nonlinear electrodynamics models are constructed via an auxiliary scalar field.
en.motivation: Within a previously proposed auxiliary-field framework, to derive self-dual NLED models seeded by Born-Infeld theory and verify their causality.
en.method: Using a Lagrangian L(F;ψ)+W(ψ) with auxiliary scalar ψ, integrating out ψ yields U(1) duality-invariant NLED; taking Born-Infeld as seed, different potentials W(ψ) produce specific models.
en.result: The resulting self-dual NLED models are proven causal, and a general solution of the self-duality equation is given; the relation to the Russo-Townsend formulation is elaborated.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new constructive tool and causality guarantee for self-dual nonlinear electrodynamics.

idea_spark.idea: Try different seed theories (e.g., ModMax) combined with potential W(ψ) to generate new self-dual models.
idea_spark.risk: New models may violate causality or energy conditions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining auxiliary-field techniques with duality symmetry may simplify the construction of complex nonlinear theories.

papers.title: Whole-body CT attenuation and volume charts from routine clinical scans via evidence-grounded LLM report filtering
papers.summary: Interpreting quantitative CT biomarkers, such as organ volume and tissue attenuation, requires large-scale healthy reference distributions. However, creating these is challenging because clinical datasets are often heavily enriched with pathology. Here, we develop an evidence-grounded, cross-verified large language model (LLM) ensemble to filter pathological findings from radiology reports, enabling the construction of pathology-reduced cohorts from over 350,000 CT examinations. Five LLMs, first, flag structure-level abnormality candidates grounded in verbatim report evidence and, second, resolve disagreements via cross-verification. Using distribution-aware generalized additive models for location, scale, and shape, we establish comprehensive whole-body reference charts for 106 anatomical structures (volumes and attenuation) across adulthood, accounting for age, sex, contrast enhancement, and acquisition parameters. Longitudinal analyses reveal structure- and contrast-dependent changes distinct from cross-sectional trends. These resources facilitate covariate-adjusted centile scoring from routine CT, supporting standardized quantitative phenotyping, multi-site imaging studies, and scalable opportunistic screening research.

ai.tldr: 利用大语言模型过滤放射报告中的病理发现，从35万次CT检查中构建病理减少队列，建立106个解剖结构的全身参考图表。
ai.motivation: 临床数据集富含病理，难以获得大规模健康参考分布来解读CT生物标志物。
ai.method: 采用证据驱动、交叉验证的大语言模型集成过滤病理发现，结合分布感知广义可加模型建立参考图表。
ai.result: 建立了涵盖106个解剖结构（体积和衰减）的全身参考图表，并揭示了纵向变化与横断面趋势的差异。
ai.help_to_user: 提供协变量调整的百分位评分，支持标准化定量表型分析、多中心影像研究和可扩展的机会性筛查。

idea_spark.idea: 将LLM过滤与分布模型结合，自动从临床数据中提取健康参考，减少人工标注成本。
idea_spark.risk: LLM过滤可能遗漏罕见病理或引入偏见，需验证在不同人群中的泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用现有临床报告和LLM的语义理解能力，将常规扫描转化为大规模健康数据库。

en.tldr: Using LLMs to filter pathological findings from radiology reports, we built pathology-reduced cohorts from over 350,000 CT exams and established whole-body reference charts for 106 anatomical structures.
en.motivation: Clinical datasets are enriched with pathology, making it challenging to obtain large-scale healthy reference distributions for interpreting CT biomarkers.
en.method: An evidence-grounded, cross-verified LLM ensemble filters pathological findings, combined with distribution-aware generalized additive models to construct reference charts.
en.result: Comprehensive whole-body reference charts for 106 structures (volume and attenuation) were established, revealing structure- and contrast-dependent longitudinal changes distinct from cross-sectional trends.
en.help_to_user: Enables covariate-adjusted centile scoring from routine CT, supporting standardized quantitative phenotyping, multi-site studies, and scalable opportunistic screening.

idea_spark.idea: Combine LLM filtering with distributional models to automatically derive healthy references from clinical data, reducing manual annotation costs.
idea_spark.risk: LLM filtering may miss rare pathologies or introduce bias; generalization across populations needs validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage existing clinical reports and LLM semantic understanding to turn routine scans into large-scale healthy databases.

keywords_raw: whole-body ct attenuation and volume charts

papers.title: Unbalanced Optimal Transport and Density Control for Discrete-Time Linear Systems
papers.summary: This article studies unbalanced optimal transport (UOT) and its dynamical extension, unbalanced density control (UDC), for a class of constrained discrete-time linear systems. UOT compares measures with unequal total mass by balancing transport cost and fidelity to reference measures, while UDC incorporates system dynamics and constraints into this framework. Focusing on Gaussian references and discrete-time linear systems, we show that both problems admit globally optimal convex formulations, analogous to covariance steering. A numerical experiment is provided to illustrate our approach.

ai.tldr: 本文研究离散时间线性系统的不平衡最优传输（UOT）及其动态扩展——不平衡密度控制（UDC），证明两者在约束下可转化为全局凸优化问题。
ai.motivation: 传统最优传输要求总质量相等，限制了实际应用；本文旨在处理总质量不等的测度比较，并引入系统动力学与约束。
ai.method: 针对高斯参考和离散时间线性系统，将UOT和UDC建模为类似协方差控制的凸优化问题。
ai.result: 两类问题均存在全局最优的凸形式，并通过数值实验验证了方法的有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 为控制理论中涉及质量不均衡的密度调控问题提供了可求解的凸优化框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将UOT与模型预测控制结合，实现实时密度调控。
idea_spark.risk: 非线性系统或非高斯参考下凸性可能丧失，需近似方法。
idea_spark.inspiration: 协方差控制的成功表明，类似凸化技巧可推广至更广泛的传输与控制问题。
