en.tldr: This paper studies unbalanced optimal transport (UOT) and its dynamic extension, unbalanced density control (UDC), for constrained discrete-time linear systems, showing both admit globally optimal convex formulations.
en.motivation: Classical optimal transport requires equal total mass, limiting applications; this work handles measures with unequal mass while incorporating system dynamics and constraints.
en.method: For Gaussian references and discrete-time linear systems, UOT and UDC are formulated as convex optimization problems analogous to covariance steering.
en.result: Both problems yield globally optimal convex forms, validated by a numerical experiment.
en.help_to_user: Provides a solvable convex optimization framework for density control problems with mass imbalance in control theory.

idea_spark.idea: Combine UOT with model predictive control for real-time density regulation.
idea_spark.risk: Convexity may be lost for nonlinear systems or non-Gaussian references, requiring approximation methods.
idea_spark.inspiration: The success of covariance steering suggests similar convexification techniques can be extended to broader transport and control problems.

papers.title: P-Guide: Parameter-Efficient Prior Steering for Single-Pass CFG Inference
papers.summary: Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG) is essential for high-fidelity conditional generation in flow matching, yet it imposes significant computational overhead by requiring dual forward passes at each sampling step. In this work, we address this bottleneck by introducing \textbf{P-Guide}, a framework that achieves high-quality guidance through a single inference pass by modulating only the initial latent state. We further show that, under a first-order approximation, P-Guide is equivalent to CFG in the sense that it steers generation from the prior space, without requiring explicit velocity field extrapolation during sampling. We consider both homoscedastic and \textbf{heteroscedastic} priors, and find that jointly modeling the mean and variance enables adaptive loss attenuation and improved robustness to data uncertainty. Extensive experiments demonstrate that P-Guide reduces inference latency by approximately 50\% while maintaining fidelity and prompt alignment competitive with standard dual-pass CFG baselines.

ai.tldr: 提出P-Guide框架，通过仅调制初始隐状态实现单次前向传播的高质量条件生成，将推理延迟降低约50%。
ai.motivation: 标准无分类器引导（CFG）需要每步两次前向传播，计算开销大，成为流匹配模型推理的瓶颈。
ai.method: 仅对初始隐状态进行参数高效先验引导调制，在一阶近似下等价于CFG；同时建模均值和方差实现自适应损失衰减。
ai.result: 推理延迟降低约50%，保真度和提示对齐性与双次前向传播基线相当。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在不牺牲生成质量的前提下大幅加速条件生成推理。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将先验调制与自适应方差建模结合，用于其他生成任务（如文本到图像、文本到视频）的加速。
idea_spark.risk: 一阶近似在强非线性场景下可能偏离真实CFG效果，需验证泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从贝叶斯视角将引导视为先验调制，启发设计更高效的生成控制机制。

en.tldr: P-Guide achieves high-quality conditional generation with a single forward pass by modulating only the initial latent state, reducing inference latency by ~50% while maintaining fidelity.
en.motivation: Standard CFG requires dual forward passes per step, creating a computational bottleneck for flow matching inference.
en.method: Parameter-efficient prior steering via modulating only the initial latent state; under first-order approximation it is equivalent to CFG; jointly models mean and variance for adaptive loss attenuation.
en.result: Inference latency reduced by ~50% with competitive fidelity and prompt alignment compared to dual-pass CFG baselines.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to significantly accelerate conditional generation inference without sacrificing quality.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining prior modulation with adaptive variance modeling for accelerating other generation tasks (e.g., text-to-image, text-to-video).
idea_spark.risk: First-order approximation may deviate from true CFG in highly nonlinear regimes; generalization needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Viewing guidance as prior modulation from a Bayesian perspective inspires more efficient generation control mechanisms.

papers.title: Quantum Optimization for Electromagnetics: Physics-Informed QAOA for Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces
papers.summary: Optimizing Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces (RIS) is a high-dimensional combinatorial challenge. Current quantum algorithms often simplify this problem by ignoring physical constraints like mutual coupling, which significantly degrades real-world performance. Rather than targeting a fully realistic RIS description, we embed progressively more physics-informed models of mutual coupling into Quadratic Unconstrained Binary Optimization (QUBO) formulations. We evaluate four Ising interaction models ($J_{ij}$) for the Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA), ranging from idealized phase-only to fully dense physical models. Analyzing a $5 \times 5$ grid, our results expose a critical trade-off between spatial pointing accuracy and quantum hardware feasibility. While complete global coupling maximizes beamforming precision, dense Hamiltonians introduce prohibitive routing overhead and complicate convergence on near-term processors. Ultimately, we demonstrate that while physics-informed quantum optimization is mathematically viable, sparse, distance-penalized models remain a necessary compromise for execution on current noisy intermediate-scale quantum (NISQ) devices.

ai.tldr: 将物理信息逐步嵌入QUBO公式，评估四种Ising耦合模型在QAOA中优化RIS的性能，发现完全全局耦合虽精度高但硬件开销大，稀疏距离惩罚模型是NISQ设备上的必要折衷。
ai.motivation: 现有量子算法优化RIS时忽略互耦等物理约束，导致实际性能下降。
ai.method: 将逐步增强的互耦物理模型嵌入QUBO，用QAOA评估四种Ising相互作用模型（从理想相位到全密集物理模型）。
ai.result: 完全全局耦合波束赋形精度最高，但哈密顿量密集导致路由开销大、收敛困难；稀疏距离惩罚模型是当前NISQ设备上的可行折衷。
ai.help_to_user: 为RIS优化提供量子计算方案，并揭示物理保真度与硬件可行性之间的权衡。

idea_spark.idea: 探索混合量子-经典方案，用经典预处理器生成稀疏耦合拓扑，再用量子QAOA优化。
idea_spark.risk: 稀疏模型可能丢失关键物理效应，导致实际部署性能不足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴图神经网络学习耦合拓扑，自适应生成适合QAOA的稀疏哈密顿量。

en.tldr: We embed progressively physics-informed mutual coupling models into QUBO formulations and evaluate four Ising interaction models for QAOA on RIS optimization, finding that full global coupling maximizes beamforming precision but incurs prohibitive hardware overhead, making sparse distance-penalized models a necessary compromise for NISQ devices.
en.motivation: Current quantum algorithms for RIS optimization ignore physical constraints like mutual coupling, degrading real-world performance.
en.method: Embed progressively more physics-informed mutual coupling models into QUBO and evaluate four Ising interaction models (from idealized phase-only to fully dense physical) using QAOA.
en.result: Full global coupling achieves highest beamforming precision but dense Hamiltonians cause high routing overhead and convergence difficulty; sparse distance-penalized models are a necessary compromise for current NISQ devices.
en.help_to_user: Provides a quantum computing approach for RIS optimization and reveals the trade-off between physical fidelity and hardware feasibility.

idea_spark.idea: Explore hybrid quantum-classical schemes where a classical preprocessor generates sparse coupling topologies for QAOA optimization.
idea_spark.risk: Sparse models may miss critical physical effects, leading to insufficient real-world performance.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage graph neural networks to learn coupling topologies and adaptively generate sparse Hamiltonians suitable for QAOA.

papers.title: Wandering Exponents and the Free Energy of the High-Dimensional Elastic Polymer
papers.summary: We study the behavior of the elastic polymer, a model of a directed polymer in a continuous Gaussian random environment that is independent in time and correlated in space, as the dimension of the environment is taken to infinity. We give an explicit asymptotic formula for the free energy, which is given in terms of the distribution of the inner product of two sampled configurations, which we also obtain an implicit formula for. From this, we provide an explicit characterization of both the low- and high-temperature phases of this model in terms of the spatial correlation function of the environment. We find asymptotics for the wandering exponent when the spatial correlation function is either an exponential or a power-law decay. Our results show that when the correlations are either suitably weak or short ranged, the model is asymptotically diffusive. On the other hand, for suitably strong long ranged correlations, the model is asymptotically superdiffusive. Moreover, we show that this transition coincides exactly with another transition where the model goes from being one-step replica symmetry breaking to full-step replica symmetry breaking. This rigorously confirms many of the findings of Mezard and Parisi [53] in the physics literature.

ai.tldr: 在高斯随机环境中，弹性聚合物模型在高维极限下的自由能渐近公式被显式给出，并刻画了低温和高温相，揭示了游走指数从扩散到超扩散的转变与复制对称性破缺类型的对应。
ai.motivation: 理解高维随机环境中弹性聚合物的自由能行为，并揭示空间相关性对游走指数和复制对称性破缺相变的影响。
ai.method: 通过分析两个采样构型内积的分布，推导自由能的显式渐近公式，并利用空间相关函数的指数或幂律衰减得到游走指数的渐近行为。
ai.result: 当空间相关性弱或短程时，模型渐近扩散；当相关性足够强且长程时，模型渐近超扩散；该转变与从一步复制对称性破缺到全步复制对称性破缺的转变精确重合。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了高维弹性聚合物自由能和游走指数的精确渐近结果，有助于理解随机环境中聚合物行为的相变机制。

idea_spark.idea: 利用内积分布与自由能的关系，可能设计数值算法直接计算高维聚合物系统的自由能。
idea_spark.risk: 渐近结果依赖于空间相关函数的特定形式，对更一般的相关性可能不适用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 复制对称性破缺类型与游走指数之间的对应关系，启发在玻璃态系统中寻找类似相变标志。

en.tldr: For the elastic polymer in a Gaussian random environment, an explicit asymptotic formula for the free energy in the high-dimensional limit is given, characterizing low- and high-temperature phases and revealing that the transition from diffusive to superdiffusive wandering coincides with the transition from one-step to full-step replica symmetry breaking.
en.motivation: To understand the free energy behavior of the elastic polymer in high-dimensional random environments and to reveal how spatial correlations affect the wandering exponent and replica symmetry breaking transitions.
en.method: By analyzing the distribution of the inner product of two sampled configurations, an explicit asymptotic formula for the free energy is derived, and the wandering exponent asymptotics are obtained for exponential and power-law decaying spatial correlation functions.
en.result: When spatial correlations are weak or short-ranged, the model is asymptotically diffusive; when correlations are sufficiently strong and long-ranged, it is asymptotically superdiffusive; this transition exactly coincides with the transition from one-step to full-step replica symmetry breaking.
en.help_to_user: Provides precise asymptotic results for the free energy and wandering exponent of the high-dimensional elastic polymer, aiding understanding of phase transitions in random environment polymer models.

idea_spark.idea: Using the relation between inner product distribution and free energy, one might design numerical algorithms to directly compute the free energy of high-dimensional polymer systems.
idea_spark.risk: The asymptotic results rely on specific forms of spatial correlation functions and may not hold for more general correlations.
idea_spark.inspiration: The correspondence between replica symmetry breaking type and wandering exponent inspires searching for similar phase transition signatures in glassy systems.

papers.title: ReaComp: Compiling LLM Reasoning into Symbolic Solvers for Efficient Program Synthesis
papers.summary: LLMs can solve program synthesis tasks but remain inefficient and unreliable on hard instances requiring large combinatorial search. Given a small set of reasoning traces, we use coding agents to compile them into reusable symbolic program synthesizers over constrained DSLs. The resulting solvers require no LLM calls at test time and are strong standalone systems: symbolic solver ensembles reach 91.3% accuracy on PBEBench-Lite and 84.7% on PBEBench-Hard, outperforming LLMs with test-time scaling for the latter by +16.3 percentage points at zero LLM inference cost. They also complement LLM search, improving PBEBench-Hard accuracy from 68.4% to 85.8% while reducing reported token usage by 78%, and raising SLR-Bench hard-tier accuracy from 34.4% to 58.0% in a neuro-symbolic hybrid setting. Compared to directly using coding agents as per-instance solvers, induced solvers are substantially more Pareto-efficient, amortizing a small one-time construction cost over many zero-token executions. Finally, most solvers transfer zero-shot to a real historical linguistics task - predicting sound changes in natural language data - reaching 80.1% accuracy under ensembling and recovering some plausible linguistic rules. Together, these results show that reasoning traces can be compiled into reusable symbolic solvers that solve many tasks directly, complement LLM inference on hard cases, and provide a scalable route to domain-general solver induction. We release code and data for reproducibility.

ai.tldr: 提出ReaComp方法，将LLM推理轨迹编译为可复用的符号求解器，在程序合成任务上实现高准确率且无需测试时LLM调用。
ai.motivation: LLM在复杂程序合成任务上效率低且不可靠，需要大量组合搜索。
ai.method: 利用编码代理将少量推理轨迹编译为受限DSL上的可复用符号求解器，并集成多个求解器形成集成系统。
ai.result: 符号求解器集成在PBEBench-Lite和Hard上分别达91.3%和84.7%准确率，比带测试时扩展的LLM高16.3个百分点且零LLM推理成本；与LLM搜索结合可减少78% token用量并提升准确率；零样本迁移至历史语言学任务达80.1%准确率。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种将LLM推理能力转化为高效、可复用符号求解器的框架，适用于需要大量重复求解的程序合成场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将LLM生成的推理轨迹编译为符号求解器，实现零测试时LLM调用，并通过集成和神经符号混合进一步提升性能。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖高质量推理轨迹，且DSL设计可能限制求解器泛化能力；迁移至新领域需重新编译。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类将解题经验转化为通用方法的启发，将LLM的推理能力固化为可复用的符号工具。

en.tldr: ReaComp compiles LLM reasoning traces into reusable symbolic solvers, achieving high accuracy on program synthesis without test-time LLM calls.
en.motivation: LLMs are inefficient and unreliable on hard program synthesis tasks requiring large combinatorial search.
en.method: Coding agents compile a small set of reasoning traces into reusable symbolic program synthesizers over constrained DSLs; multiple solvers are ensembled.
en.result: Symbolic solver ensembles achieve 91.3% on PBEBench-Lite and 84.7% on PBEBench-Hard, outperforming LLMs with test-time scaling by +16.3 points at zero LLM cost; combined with LLM search, token usage drops 78% while accuracy improves; zero-shot transfer to historical linguistics reaches 80.1%.
en.help_to_user: Provides a framework to convert LLM reasoning into efficient, reusable symbolic solvers for program synthesis tasks requiring repeated solving.

idea_spark.idea: Compile LLM-generated reasoning traces into symbolic solvers that require zero test-time LLM calls, enhanced by ensembling and neuro-symbolic hybrids.
idea_spark.risk: Depends on high-quality reasoning traces; DSL design may limit generalization; recompilation needed for new domains.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by how humans turn problem-solving experience into general methods, solidifying LLM reasoning into reusable symbolic tools.

papers.title: Sharp local well-posedness for the Hirota-Satsuma system
papers.summary: We establish sharp local existence results for the Hirota-Satsuma system in $H^k(\mathbb{R}) \times H^s(\mathbb{R})$, depending on the ratio between the dispersion of the components. These theorems significantly generalize previous works, which were restricted to the diagonal case of equal regularity $s=k$. Furthermore, we extend the known global well-posedness theory to the off-diagonal regime. The argument relies on the Fourier restriction norm method coupled with the concept of integrated-by-parts strong solution - a framework that generalizes the classical notion of strong solution.

ai.tldr: 针对Hirota-Satsuma系统，建立了依赖于分量色散比的尖锐局部适定性结果，并推广了全局适定性理论。
ai.motivation: 先前工作仅处理了等正则性对角情形，需要推广到非对角正则性区域。
ai.method: 采用Fourier限制范数方法结合分部积分强解框架。
ai.result: 得到了$H^k(\mathbb{R}) \times H^s(\mathbb{R})$空间中的尖锐局部存在性，并扩展了全局适定性理论。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解色散耦合系统的适定性提供了更一般的理论工具。

idea_spark.idea: 利用色散比作为参数，设计更精细的Fourier限制范数估计。
idea_spark.risk: 非对角情形下可能遇到共振或低正则性障碍。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从色散比依赖的适定性结果出发，探索非线性耦合系统的临界正则性。

en.tldr: Sharp local well-posedness results for the Hirota-Satsuma system are established depending on the dispersion ratio, generalizing previous diagonal-case results and extending global theory.
en.motivation: Previous works were restricted to equal regularity; generalization to off-diagonal regimes was needed.
en.method: Fourier restriction norm method combined with integrated-by-parts strong solution framework.
en.result: Sharp local existence in $H^k(\mathbb{R}) \times H^s(\mathbb{R})$ and extended global well-posedness theory.

idea_spark.inspiration: Explore critical regularity for nonlinear coupled systems based on dispersion-ratio-dependent well-posedness.

papers.title: Continuous Expert Assembly: Instance-Conditioned Low-Rank Residuals for All-in-One Image Restoration
papers.summary: Real-world image degradation is often unknown, spatially non-uniform, and compositional, requiring all-in-one restoration models to adapt a single set of weights to diverse local corruption patterns without test-time degradation labels. Existing methods typically modulate a shared backbone with global prompts or degradation descriptors, or route features through predefined expert pools. However, compact global conditioning can bottleneck localized degradation evidence, while static expert routing may produce homogeneous updates or rely on unstable sparse assignments. We propose \textbf{Continuous Expert Assembly} (CEA), a token-wise dynamic parameterization framework for all-in-one image restoration. CEA employs a lightweight \textbf{Cross-Attention Hyper-Adapter} to probe intermediate spatial features and synthesize instance-conditioned low-rank routing bases and residual directions. Each spatial token then assembles its own residual update via dense signed dot-product affinities over the generated rank-wise components, avoiding external prompts, static expert banks, and discrete Top-   selection. The resulting assembly rule also admits a linear-attention perspective, making its dense token-wise routing behavior transparent. Experiments on AIO-3, AIO-5, and CDD-11 show that CEA improves average restoration quality over strong prompt-, descriptor-, and expert-based baselines, with the clearest gains on spatially varying and compositional degradations, while maintaining favorable parameter, FLOP, and runtime efficiency.

ai.tldr: 提出连续专家组装（CEA）框架，通过实例条件低秩残差实现全合一图像恢复，无需测试时退化标签。
ai.motivation: 真实图像退化未知、空间非均匀且组合多样，现有方法依赖全局提示或静态专家池，难以适应局部退化模式。
ai.method: 使用轻量级交叉注意力超适配器探测中间空间特征，合成实例条件低秩路由基和残差方向，每个空间令牌通过密集符号点积亲和度组装残差更新。
ai.result: 在AIO-3、AIO-5和CDD-11数据集上，CEA在平均恢复质量上优于基于提示、描述符和专家的基线，尤其在空间变化和组合退化上提升显著，且参数、FLOP和运行时效率良好。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过动态参数化实现无需退化标签的全合一图像恢复，提升对复杂退化的处理能力。

idea_spark.idea: 将交叉注意力超适配器与低秩残差结合，实现令牌级自适应，避免全局瓶颈和静态专家限制。
idea_spark.risk: 密集符号点积计算可能增加计算开销，且对超适配器设计敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从线性注意力视角解释路由行为，启发更透明的动态网络设计。

en.tldr: Proposes Continuous Expert Assembly (CEA), an instance-conditioned low-rank residual framework for all-in-one image restoration without test-time degradation labels.
en.motivation: Real-world degradation is unknown, spatially non-uniform, and compositional; existing methods using global prompts or static expert pools struggle with local patterns.
en.method: A lightweight Cross-Attention Hyper-Adapter probes intermediate spatial features to synthesize instance-conditioned low-rank routing bases and residual directions; each token assembles its residual via dense signed dot-product affinities.

en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how dynamic parameterization enables all-in-one image restoration without degradation labels, improving handling of complex degradations.

idea_spark.idea: Combining cross-attention hyper-adapter with low-rank residuals for token-level adaptation, avoiding global bottlenecks and static experts.
idea_spark.risk: Dense signed dot-product computation may increase overhead and is sensitive to hyper-adapter design.
idea_spark.inspiration: The linear-attention perspective on routing behavior inspires more transparent dynamic network designs.

papers.title: BioResearcher: Scenario-Guided Multi-Agent for Translational Medicine
papers.summary: Translational medicine turns underspecified development goals into evidence synthesis that must combine literature, trials, patents, and quantitative multi-omics analysis while preserving identifiers, uncertainty, and retrievable provenance. General-purpose foundation models and off-the-shelf tool-augmented or multi-agent systems are not built for this: they tend to produce single-shot answers or run open-endedly, and fall short on the auditable, scenario-specific workflows that heterogeneous biomedical sources demand.   This paper introduces Ingenix BioResearcher, a scenario-guided multi-agent system that maps queries to versioned research playbooks, delegates to specialized subagents over 30+ tools and machine-learning endpoints, mixes structured database access with sandboxed code for genome-scale analyses, and applies claim-level multi-model reconciliation before editorial assembly.   We evaluate BioResearcher across unit-level capabilities, open-ended biomedical reasoning, and end-to-end clinical discovery. It leads evaluated baselines on 109 single-step tests (83.49% pass rate; 0.892 average score), achieves strong biomedical benchmark performance (89.33% on BixBench-Verified-50 and the top 0.758 mean score on BaisBench Scientific Discovery), and leads on a 30-query clinical end-to-end benchmark with the highest positive hit rate (74.7% $\pm$ 3.3%) and negative clear rate (96.8% $\pm$ 0.2%). These results show broad, competitive performance across unit-level, open-ended, and end-to-end clinical evaluations.

ai.tldr: 提出一个场景引导的多智能体系统BioResearcher，用于转化医学中的证据综合与临床发现。
ai.motivation: 现有通用模型和工具增强系统无法处理转化医学中异构生物医学数据所需的可审计、场景特定工作流。
ai.method: 将查询映射到版本化研究剧本，委托给30多个工具和机器学习端点的专门子智能体，混合结构化数据库访问与沙箱代码进行基因组规模分析，并在编辑汇总前进行声明级多模型协调。
ai.result: 在109个单步测试中达到83.49%通过率和0.892平均分，在BixBench-Verified-50上89.33%，在BaisBench科学发现上0.758平均分，在30个临床端到端查询中阳性命中率74.7%±3.3%，阴性清除率96.8%±0.2%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员自动执行可审计、可复现的转化医学工作流，整合文献、试验、专利和多组学数据。

idea_spark.idea: 将声明级多模型协调与版本化研究剧本结合，确保结果的可追溯性和一致性。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖预定义剧本可能限制对全新问题的适应性；多模型协调增加计算开销。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受转化医学中证据综合需要多源、多步骤、可审计流程的启发。

en.tldr: Proposes BioResearcher, a scenario-guided multi-agent system for evidence synthesis and clinical discovery in translational medicine.
en.motivation: General-purpose models and tool-augmented systems cannot handle the auditable, scenario-specific workflows required by heterogeneous biomedical data in translational medicine.
en.method: Maps queries to versioned research playbooks, delegates to specialized subagents over 30+ tools and ML endpoints, mixes structured database access with sandboxed code for genome-scale analyses, and applies claim-level multi-model reconciliation before editorial assembly.

idea_spark.risk: Dependence on predefined playbooks may limit adaptability to novel problems; multi-model reconciliation adds computational overhead.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the need for multi-source, multi-step, auditable evidence synthesis in translational medicine.

papers.title: Beyond Autoregressive RTG: Conditioning via Injection Outside Sequential Modeling in Decision Transformer
papers.summary: Decision Transformer (DT) formulates offline reinforcement learning as autoregressive sequence modeling, achieving promising results by predicting actions from a sequence of Return-to-Go (RTG), state, and action tokens. However, RTG is a scalar that summarizes future rewards, containing far less information than typical state or action vectors, yet it consumes the same computational budget per token. Worse, the self-attention cost of Transformers grows quadratically with sequence length, so including RTG as a separate token adds unnecessary overhead. We propose SlimDT, which removes RTG from the autoregressive sequence. Instead, we inject RTG information into the state representations before the sequential modeling step, allowing the Transformer to process only a compact (state, action) sequence. This reduces the sequence length by one-third, directly improving inference efficiency. On the D4RL benchmark, SlimDT surpasses standard DT across various tasks and achieves performance comparable to existing state-of-the-art methods. Decoupling a sparse conditioning signal from an information-rich sequence thus yields both computational gains and higher task performance.

ai.tldr: 提出SlimDT，将RTG信息注入状态表示而非作为独立token，减少序列长度三分之一，提升推理效率并保持性能。
ai.motivation: 标准Decision Transformer中RTG作为标量token与状态、动作向量同等计算，但信息量少且增加自注意力开销。
ai.method: 将RTG信息在序列建模前注入状态表示，使Transformer仅处理(状态, 动作)序列，去除RTG token。
ai.result: 在D4RL基准上超越标准DT，性能与现有最优方法相当，同时提升推理效率。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种通过解耦稀疏条件信号与信息密集序列来提升Transformer效率的思路。

idea_spark.idea: 将外部条件（如目标、奖励）在序列建模前融合到状态表示中，而非作为独立token。
idea_spark.risk: 条件信息可能被过度压缩或丢失，需设计有效的注入机制。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受条件生成模型中条件注入方式的启发，将稀疏信号与密集表示分离处理。

en.tldr: Proposes SlimDT, which injects RTG information into state representations instead of using it as a separate token, reducing sequence length by one-third and improving inference efficiency while maintaining performance.
en.motivation: In standard Decision Transformer, RTG as a scalar token consumes the same computational budget as state/action vectors but contains less information and adds self-attention overhead.
en.method: Inject RTG information into state representations before sequential modeling, so the Transformer processes only (state, action) sequences, removing the RTG token.
en.result: Outperforms standard DT on D4RL benchmarks and achieves performance comparable to state-of-the-art methods, with improved inference efficiency.
en.help_to_user: Provides a strategy to improve Transformer efficiency by decoupling sparse conditioning signals from information-rich sequences.

idea_spark.idea: Fuse external conditions (e.g., goals, rewards) into state representations before sequence modeling rather than treating them as separate tokens.
idea_spark.risk: Conditioning information may be overly compressed or lost; effective injection mechanisms are needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by conditioning injection methods in conditional generative models, separating sparse signals from dense representations.

papers.title: Safety-Critical Camera Reliability Monitoring for ADAS via Degradation-Aware Uncertainty Pattern Analysis
papers.summary: Reliable camera input is essential for safety-critical ADAS perception, but most monitoring approaches detect sensor failures only after downstream performance has degraded. We propose a proactive camera reliability monitoring framework that estimates perception risk from degradation-induced uncertainty patterns before downstream failure becomes observable. The method introduces a Global Sensor Health Index (GSHI), a continuous reliability score that aggregates per-degradation severities using a risk-aware multiplicative formulation, allowing severe single-mode failures such as lens occlusion or motion blur to dominate the health estimate. A lightweight multi-task network predicts degradation type, severity, GSHI, and spatial uncertainty maps from a single RGB image without downstream task feedback. Training uses physics- and geometry-aware synthetic supervision over twelve camera degradation modes. Experiments on KITTI-derived degradations show that GSHI decreases monotonically with severity, achieves a health-estimation MAE of 0.064, and provides positive early-warning lead time of 0.47 $\pm$ 0.25 severity units before YOLOv8 detection failure. GSHI also outperforms IQA, detector-confidence, and clean-feature OOD baselines, and transfers zero-shot to real adverse-weather driving data. These results support degradation-aware uncertainty analysis as a practical direction for proactive camera reliability monitoring in intelligent vehicles.

ai.tldr: 提出一种主动式摄像头可靠性监控框架，通过退化感知的不确定性模式估计感知风险，无需下游任务反馈。
ai.motivation: 现有监控方法仅在感知性能下降后检测传感器故障，缺乏主动预警能力。
ai.method: 引入全局传感器健康指数（GSHI），使用风险感知乘法聚合退化严重度；轻量多任务网络从单张RGB图像预测退化类型、严重度、GSHI和空间不确定性图；利用物理和几何感知的合成监督训练。
ai.result: GSHI随严重度单调下降，健康估计MAE为0.064，在YOLOv8检测失败前提供0.47±0.25严重度单位的提前预警时间，优于IQA、检测置信度和干净特征OOD基线，并零样本迁移到真实恶劣天气数据。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助ADAS系统在摄像头退化导致感知失败前主动预警，提升安全性。

idea_spark.idea: 结合多传感器退化模式，构建统一健康指数，实现跨模态传感器可靠性评估。
idea_spark.risk: 合成数据与真实退化分布可能存在差异，影响零样本迁移效果。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用不确定性模式作为传感器健康指示器，避免依赖下游任务反馈，实现早期预警。

idea_spark.risk: 合成数据与真实退化分布可能存在差异，影响零样本迁移效果。

en.tldr: Proposes a proactive camera reliability monitoring framework that estimates perception risk from degradation-induced uncertainty patterns without downstream task feedback.
en.motivation: Existing monitoring approaches detect sensor failures only after downstream performance degrades, lacking proactive warning.
en.method: Introduces Global Sensor Health Index (GSHI) aggregating per-degradation severities via risk-aware multiplicative formulation; lightweight multi-task network predicts degradation type, severity, GSHI, and spatial uncertainty maps from a single RGB image; trained with physics- and geometry-aware synthetic supervision.
en.result: GSHI decreases monotonically with severity, achieves health-estimation MAE of 0.064, provides positive early-warning lead time of 0.47±0.25 severity units before YOLOv8 detection failure, outperforms IQA, detector-confidence, and clean-feature OOD baselines, and transfers zero-shot to real adverse-weather data.
en.help_to_user: Enables ADAS to proactively warn before camera degradation leads to perception failure, improving safety.

idea_spark.idea: Combine multi-sensor degradation modes to build a unified health index for cross-modal sensor reliability assessment.
idea_spark.risk: Distribution mismatch between synthetic and real degradations may affect zero-shot transfer performance.
idea_spark.inspiration: Use uncertainty patterns as sensor health indicators, avoiding reliance on downstream task feedback for early warning.

papers.title: Non-relativistic limit of generalized relativistic Pauli operators by Feynman-Kac formulae
papers.summary: The non-relativistic limit of a generalized relativistic Pauli operator\[H_c^{S,α}=\left(2c^β\bigl(σ\cdot(-i\nabla-a)\bigr)^2+(mc^γ)^{2/α}\right)^{α/2}-mc^γ+V\]on $L^2(\mathbb{R}^3;\mathbb{C}^2)$ is investigated under the constraint$2α=γβ+γ^2$.This operator generalizes the relativistic Pauli operator within the framework of Bernstein functions.The associated heat semigroup $e^{-tH_c^{S,α}}$ admits a Feynman--Kac representation involving Brownian motion, a subordinator, and a Poisson process.Using this representation, we prove that the semigroup $e^{-tH_c^{S,α}}$ converges strongly to $e^{-tH^{S,α}}$ as $c\to\infty$, where the limiting generator is given by\[H^{S,α}=\fracα{2m^{\frac{2}α-1}}\bigl(σ\cdot(-i\nabla-a)\bigr)^2+V.\]The non-relativistic limit of a generalized relativistic Schrödinger operator is also investigated.

ai.tldr: 研究了一类广义相对论Pauli算子在Feynman-Kac公式下的非相对论极限，证明了热半群强收敛到极限算子。
ai.motivation: 探索广义相对论Pauli算子在光速趋于无穷时的非相对论极限行为。
ai.method: 利用Feynman-Kac表示，结合布朗运动、从属过程和泊松过程，分析热半群的强收敛性。
ai.result: 证明了当c→∞时，广义相对论Pauli算子的热半群强收敛到非相对论极限算子。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了处理广义相对论算子的非相对论极限的严格数学框架。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将类似方法应用于相对论Dirac算子的非相对论极限。
idea_spark.risk: 高维或复杂势能下Feynman-Kac表示的构造可能困难。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从Bernstein函数框架出发，可探索更多广义相对论算子的极限行为。

en.tldr: The non-relativistic limit of a generalized relativistic Pauli operator is studied via Feynman-Kac formulae, proving strong convergence of the heat semigroup to the limiting operator.
en.motivation: To investigate the non-relativistic limit behavior of generalized relativistic Pauli operators as the speed of light tends to infinity.
en.method: Using Feynman-Kac representations involving Brownian motion, a subordinator, and a Poisson process to analyze strong convergence of the heat semigroup.
en.result: It is proved that the heat semigroup of the generalized relativistic Pauli operator converges strongly to the non-relativistic limit operator as c→∞.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical framework for studying non-relativistic limits of generalized relativistic operators.

idea_spark.idea: Consider applying similar techniques to the non-relativistic limit of the relativistic Dirac operator.
idea_spark.risk: Construction of Feynman-Kac representations may be challenging in higher dimensions or with complex potentials.
idea_spark.inspiration: The Bernstein function framework suggests exploring limit behaviors of more general relativistic operators.

papers.title: Schrödinger's problem with constraints
papers.summary: Motivated by the connection between the Kyle equilibrium with static private signal and the Brownian bridge, we study a much broader class of bridges that allow one to consider more general equilibrium models, for example ones including trading costs and default risk. We show that such bridges are solutions to problems of the Schrödinger-type. Leveraging this connection, we obtain that the equilibria in models with trading costs converge to equilibria in the classical Kyle model.

ai.tldr: 受Kyle均衡与布朗桥之间联系的启发，研究了一类更广泛的桥过程，用于建模包含交易成本和违约风险的均衡模型，并证明这些桥是薛定谔型问题的解。
ai.motivation: 将Kyle均衡与布朗桥的联系推广到更一般的均衡模型，以纳入交易成本和违约风险等实际因素。
ai.method: 将桥过程建模为薛定谔型问题的解，并利用该联系分析均衡的收敛性。
ai.result: 证明了包含交易成本的均衡收敛到经典Kyle均衡。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了将薛定谔问题应用于金融均衡建模的新视角，有助于理解交易成本对市场均衡的影响。

idea_spark.idea: 将市场微观结构中的均衡问题转化为薛定谔型约束优化问题。
idea_spark.risk: 模型假设可能过于理想化，实际市场中的信息结构和成本更为复杂。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受布朗桥与Kyle均衡联系的启发，探索更一般的桥过程在金融经济学中的应用。

en.tldr: Motivated by the connection between the Kyle equilibrium and the Brownian bridge, we study a broader class of bridges that allow modeling equilibria with trading costs and default risk, and show they are solutions to Schrödinger-type problems.
en.motivation: To generalize the Kyle equilibrium to include realistic features such as trading costs and default risk by leveraging the bridge process framework.
en.method: Model the bridges as solutions to Schrödinger-type problems and analyze the convergence of equilibria.
en.result: Equilibria with trading costs converge to the classical Kyle equilibrium.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new perspective on applying Schrödinger problems to financial equilibrium modeling, helping understand the impact of trading costs on market equilibria.

idea_spark.idea: Formulate market microstructure equilibrium as a Schrödinger-type constrained optimization problem.
idea_spark.risk: Model assumptions may be too idealized; real markets have more complex information structures and costs.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the connection between Brownian bridges and Kyle equilibrium, explore broader applications of bridge processes in financial economics.

papers.title: Finite-Time Optimal Control by Noisy Traps
papers.summary: The optimal control of passive systems in equilibrium typically favours quasistatic (infinite-time) protocols. We show that a breakdown of quasistatic optimality occurs when the controller itself is dissipative. Concretely, we study a Brownian particle confined by a harmonic trap with stochastically fluctuating stiffness, driven by an external protocol. When these fluctuations violate detailed balance, the probe-controller coupling continuously exchanges work with the system, altering the optimisation landscape. In this regime, optimal protocols are characterised by a finite duration which vanishes above a critical fluctuation strength. This transition can be directly observed in a short-time expansion of the mean work functional. When imposing an endpoint constraint, the transition to zero duration disappears and finite duration protocols remain optimal for all values of the controller fluctuations. These results demonstrate that finite-time optimality can emerge in passive systems under nonequilibrium control.

ai.tldr: 研究发现，当控制器本身具有耗散性时，被动系统在非平衡控制下会出现有限时间最优协议，打破了准静态最优的传统观念。
ai.motivation: 传统上，平衡态被动系统的最优控制倾向于准静态（无限时间）协议。本文旨在探究当控制器本身耗散时，这种最优性是否会被打破。
ai.method: 通过理论分析，研究一个由随机波动刚度的谐振阱约束的布朗粒子，在外加协议驱动下的行为。重点分析当波动违反细致平衡时，探针-控制器耦合如何持续与系统交换功，从而改变优化景观。
ai.result: 在非平衡控制下，最优协议具有有限持续时间，且当波动强度超过临界值时，该持续时间消失为零。若施加端点约束，则零持续时间转变消失，有限持续时间协议在所有波动强度下保持最优。
ai.help_to_user: 该研究为设计有限时间最优控制策略提供了理论依据，特别是在微纳尺度系统中，有助于提高能量利用效率。

idea_spark.idea: 利用噪声驱动而非抑制噪声，实现更高效的控制。
idea_spark.risk: 实际系统中噪声特性可能难以精确调控，且理论预测对参数敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受启发于非平衡热力学中“耗散导致有序”的思想，将控制器耗散视为一种可利用的资源。

idea_spark.risk: 实际系统中噪声特性可能难以精确调控，且理论预测对参数敏感。

en.tldr: The study reveals that when the controller itself is dissipative, finite-time optimal protocols emerge in passive systems under nonequilibrium control, breaking the conventional quasistatic optimality.
en.motivation: Traditionally, optimal control of passive systems in equilibrium favors quasistatic (infinite-time) protocols. This work aims to investigate whether this optimality breaks down when the controller is dissipative.
en.method: Through theoretical analysis, we study a Brownian particle confined by a harmonic trap with stochastically fluctuating stiffness, driven by an external protocol. We focus on how the probe-controller coupling continuously exchanges work with the system when fluctuations violate detailed balance, altering the optimization landscape.
en.result: Under nonequilibrium control, optimal protocols are characterized by a finite duration that vanishes above a critical fluctuation strength. When an endpoint constraint is imposed, the transition to zero duration disappears, and finite-duration protocols remain optimal for all fluctuation strengths.
en.help_to_user: This research provides a theoretical basis for designing finite-time optimal control strategies, particularly in microscale and nanoscale systems, potentially improving energy efficiency.

idea_spark.idea: Utilize noise as a resource rather than suppressing it to achieve more efficient control.
idea_spark.risk: In practical systems, noise characteristics may be difficult to precisely control, and theoretical predictions are sensitive to parameters.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the idea in nonequilibrium thermodynamics that 'dissipation leads to order', treating controller dissipation as a usable resource.

papers.title: Variational reduction of homogenous Lagrangian systems
papers.summary: In this paper we show that a variational reduction procedure can be defined for Lagrangian systems subject to scaling symmetries (i.e. Lagrangian systems defined by a homogenous Lagrangian function), in such a way that the trajectories of the system can be reconstructed up to quadratures from the critical points of the reduced variational principle. Also, we characterize the mentioned critical points in terms of a set of ordinary differential equations which are the scaling analogue of the Lagrange-Poincaré equations. Finally, we study if the homogeneous Lagrangian systems are naturally related or not with the Herglotz variational principle.

ai.tldr: 本文为具有缩放对称性的齐次拉格朗日系统定义了一种变分约化过程，使得系统轨迹可通过约化变分原理的临界点（至多到求积）重构，并给出了临界点满足的常微分方程组（缩放版本的拉格朗日-庞加莱方程），最后探讨了齐次拉格朗日系统与赫格洛茨变分原理的自然联系。
ai.motivation: 现有变分约化方法主要针对对称性（如李群作用），但缩放对称性（齐次拉格朗日函数）的变分约化尚未系统建立。本文旨在填补这一空白，并探索其与赫格洛茨变分原理的关系。
ai.method: 从齐次拉格朗日函数的缩放对称性出发，定义约化变分原理；通过分析临界点导出缩放版本的拉格朗日-庞加莱方程；利用求积方法重构原始系统轨迹。
ai.result: 成功定义了齐次拉格朗日系统的变分约化过程，给出了轨迹重构的求积条件，并推导了缩放拉格朗日-庞加莱方程；同时揭示了齐次系统与赫格洛茨变分原理之间的自然联系。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理具有缩放对称性的物理系统（如某些场论、天体力学模型）提供了一种新的变分约化工具，可简化分析并辅助数值计算。

idea_spark.idea: 将缩放拉格朗日-庞加莱方程与机器学习中的对称性约化（如等变神经网络）结合，自动发现并利用缩放对称性简化高维动力学模型。
idea_spark.risk: 缩放对称性在真实物理系统中可能不严格成立，近似齐次性可能导致约化误差；赫格洛茨变分原理的适用性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受赫格洛茨变分原理启发，可探索非保守系统中缩放对称性的变分约化，例如带阻尼的拉格朗日系统。

en.tldr: This paper defines a variational reduction procedure for homogeneous Lagrangian systems with scaling symmetries, enabling trajectory reconstruction up to quadratures from critical points of the reduced variational principle, and derives scaling analogues of Lagrange-Poincaré equations, while also examining the natural relation with the Herglotz variational principle.
en.motivation: Existing variational reduction methods focus on symmetries like Lie group actions, but scaling symmetries (homogeneous Lagrangians) lack a systematic variational reduction. This work fills that gap and explores connections with the Herglotz principle.
en.method: Starting from scaling symmetries of homogeneous Lagrangians, a reduced variational principle is defined; critical points yield scaling Lagrange-Poincaré equations; original trajectories are reconstructed via quadratures.
en.result: A variational reduction for homogeneous Lagrangian systems is established, providing quadrature-based reconstruction and scaling Lagrange-Poincaré equations; a natural link to the Herglotz variational principle is identified.
en.help_to_user: Offers a new variational reduction tool for physical systems with scaling symmetries (e.g., field theories, celestial mechanics), simplifying analysis and aiding numerical computation.

idea_spark.idea: Combine scaling Lagrange-Poincaré equations with machine learning symmetry reduction (e.g., equivariant neural networks) to automatically detect and exploit scaling symmetries in high-dimensional dynamics.
idea_spark.risk: Scaling symmetries may not hold exactly in real systems; approximate homogeneity could introduce reduction errors; applicability of the Herglotz principle requires further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the Herglotz principle, explore variational reduction for non-conservative systems with scaling symmetries, such as damped Lagrangian systems.

papers.title: Confidentiality of Linear Control Systems with Quadratic Output Under Sensor Attacks [Extended Version]
papers.summary: We study the state estimation problem for linear control systems with quadratic outputs which are locally unobservable at the equilibrium. We show that, despite this inherent lack of observability, an adversary with sensor read and write capability can induce observability by injecting an appropriate signal into the measurement channel. Taking the role of an adversary, we characterize when an injected signal can or cannot induce observability and, in the successful case, construct an observer that achieves local exponential convergence of state estimates to the true states of the system. A simulation study demonstrates our results.

ai.tldr: 研究了在传感器攻击下，具有二次输出的线性控制系统的状态估计问题，发现攻击者可通过注入信号诱导可观测性。
ai.motivation: 系统在平衡点局部不可观测，但攻击者可能利用传感器读写能力改变这一状况。
ai.method: 从攻击者角度分析注入信号能否诱导可观测性，并设计观测器实现状态估计的局部指数收敛。
ai.result: 成功表征了可诱导可观测性的条件，并构造了相应的观测器，仿真验证了有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解传感器攻击下系统状态的可观测性边界，以及如何利用攻击信号进行状态估计。

idea_spark.idea: 利用攻击信号主动改变系统可观测性，可能用于隐蔽状态估计或反制攻击。
idea_spark.risk: 攻击者可能利用此方法实现隐蔽状态估计，威胁系统安全。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将不可观测性转化为可观测性的思路，可启发设计主动防御策略。

idea_spark.risk: 攻击者可能利用此方法实现隐蔽状态估计，威胁系统安全。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将不可观测性转化为可观测性的思路，可启发设计主动防御策略。

en.tldr: Studies state estimation for linear control systems with quadratic outputs under sensor attacks, showing that an adversary can induce observability by injecting signals.
en.motivation: The system is locally unobservable at equilibrium, but an adversary with sensor access may alter this.
en.method: From an adversarial perspective, characterizes when injected signals induce observability and constructs an observer achieving local exponential convergence.
en.result: Successfully characterizes conditions for induced observability and constructs a corresponding observer, validated by simulation.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand observability boundaries under sensor attacks and how to leverage attack signals for state estimation.

idea_spark.idea: Actively using attack signals to alter observability may enable covert state estimation or countermeasures.
idea_spark.risk: Adversaries could exploit this method for covert state estimation, threatening system security.
idea_spark.inspiration: Turning unobservability into observability inspires proactive defense strategies.

papers.title: Proof of the Holevo-Utkin conjecture on sharp $\ell_p$ norms for zero-sum vectors

ai.tldr: 证明了Holevo-Utkin关于零和向量ℓp/ℓ2范数比极值的猜想在d≥4时成立。
ai.motivation: Holevo-Utkin猜想给出了零和向量ℓp范数与ℓ2范数之比的最小或最大值公式，但此前仅证明了d=3的情形。
ai.method: 通过分析向量分量的符号模式与范数比函数，结合不等式放缩技巧，对d≥4进行证明。
ai.result: 完整证实了Holevo-Utkin猜想，给出了所有d≥3时零和向量ℓp/ℓ2范数比的精确极值。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解高维零和向量的范数行为提供精确极值公式，可用于信号处理、压缩感知等领域的理论分析。

idea_spark.idea: 利用向量分量符号模式分类，将高维问题转化为低维极值问题。
idea_spark.risk: 证明依赖于特定范数比结构，可能不适用于更一般的范数组合。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从已知d=3的证明中提炼出符号模式分析策略，并推广到任意维数。

zh.tldr: 证明了Holevo-Utkin关于零和向量ℓp/ℓ2范数比极值的猜想在d≥4时成立。
zh.motivation: Holevo-Utkin猜想给出了零和向量ℓp范数与ℓ2范数之比的最小或最大值公式，但此前仅证明了d=3的情形。
zh.method: 通过分析向量分量的符号模式与范数比函数，结合不等式放缩技巧，对d≥4进行证明。
zh.result: 完整证实了Holevo-Utkin猜想，给出了所有d≥3时零和向量ℓp/ℓ2范数比的精确极值。
zh.help_to_user: 为理解高维零和向量的范数行为提供精确极值公式，可用于信号处理、压缩感知等领域的理论分析。

idea_spark.idea: 利用向量分量符号模式分类，将高维问题转化为低维极值问题。
idea_spark.risk: 证明依赖于特定范数比结构，可能不适用于更一般的范数组合。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从已知d=3的证明中提炼出符号模式分析策略，并推广到任意维数。

en.tldr: Proves the Holevo-Utkin conjecture on sharp ℓp norms for zero-sum vectors for all d≥4.
en.motivation: The conjecture gives exact min/max of ℓp/ℓ2 norm ratios for zero-sum vectors, but was only proven for d=3.
en.method: Analyzes sign patterns of vector components and uses inequality scaling techniques to handle dimensions d≥4.
en.result: Fully confirms the Holevo-Utkin conjecture, providing exact extremal values for all d≥3.
en.help_to_user: Provides exact extremal formulas for norm ratios of zero-sum vectors, useful in signal processing and compressed sensing theory.

idea_spark.idea: Reduce high-dimensional problems to low-dimensional extremal problems by classifying sign patterns of vector components.
idea_spark.risk: The proof relies on specific norm ratio structure and may not generalize to arbitrary norm combinations.
idea_spark.inspiration: Extract sign pattern analysis strategy from the known d=3 proof and generalize to arbitrary dimensions.

papers.title: Solving Constrained Affine Heaviside Composite Optimization Problems by a Progressive IP Approach
papers.summary: This paper discusses the computational resolution and presents numerical results for solving affine combinations of Heaviside composite optimization problems (abbreviated as A-HSCOPs) by a progressive integer programming (abbreviated as PIP) method. The characteristics of these problems are that the Heaviside functions, which appear in the objective and define the constraints, are discontinuous, and their mixed-signed combinations result in the overall objective lacking the matching semicontinuity needed for the optimization and in the feasible set being not necessarily closed. Added to these challenging properties is the nondifferentiability of the inner functions in the composition. In this paper, we propose resolutions to all these challenges by first an approximation to remedy the lack of semicontinuity in the objective and closedness in the constraints, followed by a progressive integer programming approach with successive decomposition to handle the intrinsically discrete nature of the Heaviside function. Convergence to the local optimizers of the given Heaviside optimization problem is established. The effectiveness of the overall solution strategy is supported by extensive computational experiments on the score-based and tree-based multiclass classification problems with precision constraints.

ai.tldr: 提出渐进整数规划方法求解仿射Heaviside复合优化问题，解决目标不半连续、可行集不闭及内函数不可微等挑战。
ai.motivation: Heaviside复合优化问题因函数不连续、混合符号组合导致目标缺乏半连续性且可行集不闭，现有方法难以处理。
ai.method: 先通过近似修复半连续性和闭性，再采用渐进整数规划结合逐次分解处理Heaviside函数的离散本质。
ai.result: 证明了收敛到局部最优解，并在基于分数和树的多元分类问题（含精度约束）上验证了有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理含不连续Heaviside函数的约束优化问题提供了一种收敛且实用的求解框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将不连续目标通过光滑近似转化为可处理形式，再结合整数规划处理离散性。
idea_spark.risk: 近似可能改变原问题最优解结构，需谨慎选择近似参数。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受启发于处理非光滑优化中常用的光滑化技术，将其与整数规划结合以应对离散不连续函数。

en.tldr: Proposes a progressive integer programming method for solving affine Heaviside composite optimization problems, addressing lack of semicontinuity, non-closed feasible set, and nondifferentiability of inner functions.
en.motivation: Heaviside composite optimization problems suffer from discontinuous functions and mixed-sign combinations causing lack of semicontinuity and non-closed feasible sets, which challenge existing methods.
en.method: First uses an approximation to remedy semicontinuity and closedness, then applies progressive integer programming with successive decomposition to handle the discrete nature of Heaviside functions.
en.result: Convergence to local optimizers is established, and effectiveness is demonstrated on score-based and tree-based multiclass classification problems with precision constraints.
en.help_to_user: Provides a convergent and practical framework for solving constrained optimization problems involving discontinuous Heaviside functions.

idea_spark.idea: Smooth the discontinuous objective via approximation, then handle discreteness with integer programming.
idea_spark.risk: Approximation may alter the optimal solution structure; careful parameter tuning is required.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by smoothing techniques in nonsmooth optimization, combined with integer programming to tackle discrete discontinuous functions.

papers.title: Histogramless Time-Domain Sketched Fluorescence Lifetime Imaging
papers.summary: We present a statistics-aware compression strategy that processes photon timestamps directly from time-correlated single-photon counting (TCSPC) modules for time-domain fluorescence lifetime imaging (FLIM). Rather than storing or transmitting the full histogram per pixel, timestamps are projected onto sparse, non-uniform one-dimensional spline sketches, with knot positions optimally allocated based on Fisher information. This knot allocation concentrates sketch channels where the decay signal exhibits the greatest statistical discriminability, rather than using a uniform allocation. The proposed approach is extensively validated on synthetic mono- and bi-exponential decay data and on experimental fluorescent dye data, demonstrating comparable accuracy to full-histogram non-linear least-squares fitting (NLSF) and Poisson maximum-likelihood estimation (MLE) at compression ratios of up to 256x. We further validate the feasibility of integrating the timestamp-to-sketch projection directly into firmware via fixed-point (FXP) lookup-table (LUT) simulation, targeting high-spatial-resolution single-photon avalanche diode (SPAD) arrays subject to significant data-throughput constraints.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于Fisher信息分配样条节点的统计感知压缩策略，直接处理TCSPC光子时间戳，实现高达256倍压缩比的荧光寿命成像。
ai.motivation: 传统FLIM逐像素存储完整直方图导致数据量巨大，难以满足高分辨率SPAD阵列的吞吐限制。
ai.method: 将光子时间戳投影到非均匀一维样条草图，依据Fisher信息最优分配节点位置，并验证了定点查找表固件集成方案。
ai.result: 在合成和实验数据上，压缩256倍时精度仍接近全直方图NLSF和Poisson MLE。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种高效压缩FLIM数据的思路，尤其适合硬件资源受限的高分辨率成像系统。

idea_spark.idea: 将样条草图与在线自适应节点更新结合，实现动态场景下的实时压缩FLIM。
idea_spark.risk: 固件实现中定点运算精度可能影响高动态范围衰减的拟合质量。
idea_spark.inspiration: 统计信息论与硬件友好压缩的交叉设计，启发其他传感器数据流的智能压缩方案。

idea_spark.inspiration: 统计信息论与硬件友好压缩的交叉设计，启发其他传感器数据流的智能压缩方案。

en.tldr: A statistics-aware compression strategy that projects photon timestamps onto non-uniform spline sketches with Fisher-information-optimized knot allocation, achieving up to 256x compression for fluorescence lifetime imaging.
en.motivation: Storing full histograms per pixel in FLIM generates massive data, challenging the throughput of high-resolution SPAD arrays.
en.method: Timestamps are projected onto sparse 1D spline sketches with knot positions allocated by Fisher information; a fixed-point LUT firmware integration is also simulated.
en.result: On synthetic and experimental data, accuracy at 256x compression is comparable to full-histogram NLSF and Poisson MLE.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient FLIM data compression method suitable for hardware-constrained high-resolution imaging systems.

idea_spark.idea: Combine spline sketching with online adaptive knot updates for real-time compressed FLIM in dynamic scenes.
idea_spark.risk: Fixed-point precision in firmware may degrade fitting quality for high-dynamic-range decays.
idea_spark.inspiration: The intersection of statistical information theory and hardware-friendly compression inspires intelligent compression schemes for other sensor data streams.

papers.title: Measuring Black-Box Confidence via Reasoning Trajectories: Geometry, Coverage, and Verbalization
papers.summary: Reliable confidence estimation enables safe deployment of chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning through text-only APIs. Yet the dominant black-box baseline, self-consistency over K samples, is linearly expensive and ignores the geometry of the trace. We propose a black-box trajectory-confidence score: we embed a CoT as a sliding-window trajectory and measure its convergence to external answer anchors with a one-parameter softmax. The method needs no logits, hidden states, or supervised calibrators. Across six (benchmark, reasoner) settings on MedQA-USMLE, GPQA Diamond, and MMLU-Pro with Gemini 3.1 Pro and Claude Sonnet 4.6, fusing this score with coverage and verbalized-confidence channels at K=4 yields Pareto improvements over self-consistency at K=8 in 6/6 settings (median AUC 0.78 vs 0.71, deltaAUC=+0.075). A fixed-pick control (+0.060) and E5 cross-embedder replication rule out answer switching and single-vendor artifacts. Geometry peaks in the penultimate window across benchmarks and reasoners, and inverts at the terminal window on GPQA Diamond. Three unscaffolded regimes separate black-box confidence into a judge-mediated Coverage prior (C), within-trace Geometry (G), and a conditional Verbalization channel (V). Across 18 benchmark x reasoner x proposer settings, C and G provide independent signal in 18/18 and 16/18, while V contributes residual signal in 6/18. Swapping the judge from GPT-5-mini to Claude Sonnet 4.6 leaves G-only AUC unchanged (|delta|<=0.013) and shifts C-only AUC by at most +/-0.02 (kappa=0.82). Fusion beats the best single channel in 17/18 settings (median AUC 0.78, max 0.92).

ai.tldr: 提出一种黑盒轨迹置信度评分，通过滑动窗口嵌入链式推理轨迹并测量其与答案锚点的收敛性，在六个基准测试中优于自一致性方法。
ai.motivation: 现有黑盒置信度基线（自一致性）计算成本线性增长且忽略推理轨迹的几何结构，需要更高效、无需内部状态的置信度估计方法。
ai.method: 将链式推理视为滑动窗口轨迹，使用单参数softmax测量轨迹与外部答案锚点的收敛性，融合覆盖先验和言语化置信度通道。
ai.result: 在K=4时融合评分在6/6设置中优于K=8的自一致性（中位AUC 0.78 vs 0.71），几何信息在倒数第二个窗口达到峰值。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户在不访问模型内部状态的情况下，仅通过文本API获得更可靠、更高效的置信度估计。

idea_spark.idea: 利用推理轨迹的几何收敛性作为置信度信号，无需对数概率或隐藏状态。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖外部答案锚点，在开放式生成任务中可能不适用；言语化通道在部分设置中贡献有限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将推理过程视为轨迹并分析其几何特性，启发对模型内部推理路径的间接观测方法。

en.tldr: Proposes a black-box trajectory-confidence score that embeds chain-of-thought as a sliding-window trajectory and measures its convergence to answer anchors, outperforming self-consistency across six benchmarks.
en.motivation: Existing black-box confidence baseline (self-consistency) is linearly expensive and ignores trace geometry; need efficient confidence estimation without internal states.
en.method: Embeds CoT as sliding-window trajectory, measures convergence to external answer anchors via one-parameter softmax, fuses with coverage prior and verbalized confidence channels.
en.result: Fusion at K=4 outperforms self-consistency at K=8 in 6/6 settings (median AUC 0.78 vs 0.71), geometry peaks at penultimate window.
en.help_to_user: Helps users obtain more reliable and efficient confidence estimates via text-only APIs without accessing model internals.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage geometric convergence of reasoning trajectories as confidence signal without logits or hidden states.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on external answer anchors, may not suit open-ended generation; verbalization channel contributes limited signal in some settings.
idea_spark.inspiration: Treating reasoning as trajectory and analyzing its geometry inspires indirect observation of model internal reasoning paths.

papers.title: Frustrated Fields: Statistical Field Theory for Frustrated Brownian Particles on 2D Manifolds
papers.summary: We develop a statistical field theory that describes the large-N limit of a system of Brownian particles with quenched random pairwise interactions on a compact two-dimensional Riemannian manifold. The resulting Frustrated Fields (F2) model is a non-linear field theory for a smooth self-interacting density field $ρ$ on the manifold, with local and non-local (in space and time) self-interactions characteristic of spin-glass dynamics. Particle simulations show \emph{adiabatic dimension reduction}: on $S^2$, the density concentrates on a slowly precessing great-circle ring whose orientation is a director ($\hat{\mathbf{n}} \sim -\hat{\mathbf{n}}$, even profile). Conditioned on this simulation-supported ring saddle and on a Born-Oppenheimer separation between the slow orientation and the gapped density fluctuations, symmetry fixes the low-energy dynamics to be the nonlinear sigma model (NLSM) on the real projective plane $S^2/\mathbb{Z}_2 = \mathbb{RP}^2$ (the $\mathbb{RP}^2$ NLSM on the projective rotor space) in $(0+1)$ dimensions, governed by a single low-energy constant, the rotational diffusion coefficient $D_{\text{rot}}$. With $D_{\text{rot}}$ and the static ring profile $f_0$ measured from particle simulations, the resulting effective theory reproduces multiple independent orientation- and density-sector diagnostics with no further adjustable parameters.

ai.tldr: 提出了一个描述二维紧致黎曼流形上受挫布朗粒子系统大N极限的统计场论模型（F2），并发现密度集中在缓慢进动的大圆环上，其低能动力学由RP^2上的非线性sigma模型描述。
ai.motivation: 建立受挫布朗粒子系统的统计场论，揭示其集体行为与低能有效理论。
ai.method: 通过粒子模拟观察绝热维度约化，利用Born-Oppenheimer分离快慢变量，推导出RP^2非线性sigma模型。
ai.result: 仅用一个可调参数（旋转扩散系数）即可复现多个独立诊断量。
ai.help_to_user: 展示了如何从复杂粒子系统提取低能有效理论，可用于理解类似受挫系统的集体动力学。

idea_spark.idea: 将粒子系统的密度场视为序参量，通过对称性分析直接得到低能有效拉格朗日量。
idea_spark.risk: 理论依赖于特定鞍点假设，可能不适用于非紧流形或强相互作用区域。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受挫相互作用导致的自发对称性破缺和维度约化可能为设计新型材料或量子模拟提供思路。

zh.tldr: 提出了一个描述二维紧致黎曼流形上受挫布朗粒子系统大N极限的统计场论模型（F2），并发现密度集中在缓慢进动的大圆环上，其低能动力学由RP^2上的非线性sigma模型描述。

idea_spark.idea: 将粒子系统的密度场视为序参量，通过对称性分析直接得到低能有效拉格朗日量。
idea_spark.risk: 理论依赖于特定鞍点假设，可能不适用于非紧流形或强相互作用区域。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受挫相互作用导致的自发对称性破缺和维度约化可能为设计新型材料或量子模拟提供思路。

en.tldr: A statistical field theory (F2) is developed for the large-N limit of frustrated Brownian particles on a compact 2D Riemannian manifold, revealing density concentration on a slowly precessing great-circle ring and low-energy dynamics governed by the RP^2 nonlinear sigma model.
en.motivation: To construct a field theory for frustrated Brownian particles and uncover the emergent low-energy effective theory.
en.method: Particle simulations show adiabatic dimension reduction; a Born-Oppenheimer separation of slow orientation and fast density fluctuations yields the RP^2 NLSM.
en.result: The effective theory, with only the rotational diffusion coefficient measured from simulations, reproduces multiple independent diagnostics.
en.help_to_user: Demonstrates how to derive a low-energy effective theory from a complex particle system, applicable to other frustrated or slow-fast systems.

idea_spark.idea: Use symmetry to directly write down the low-energy effective Lagrangian for the density field as an order parameter.
idea_spark.risk: The theory relies on a specific saddle-point assumption; may fail for non-compact manifolds or strong interactions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Frustration-induced spontaneous symmetry breaking and dimension reduction could inspire new materials or quantum simulators.

papers.title: Scenario-driven optimization of passive vehicle suspensions: explaining the effectiveness of asymmetric damping
papers.summary: Asymmetric damping is widely used in passive vehicle suspensions, with rebound damping often recommended to exceed compression damping by a factor of two to three. Despite its prevalence, this guideline remains largely empirical and lacks a systematic derivation based on vehicle dynamics and excitation conditions. This paper presents a scenario-driven optimization framework that provides a principled explanation for the effectiveness of asymmetric damping. A minimal quarter-car model is employed to isolate the key mechanisms governing the trade-off between ride comfort, road holding, and transient response, using standardized ISO~8608 road excitations. Rebound and compression damping ratios are treated as independent design variables, and optimal configurations are identified via a stochastic Cross-Entropy algorithm applied to a non-convex, simulation-based objective function. Performance is assessed through ISO~2631 weighted RMS acceleration, tire--ground contact force variability, and settling time. The results show that symmetric damping is often sufficient under moderate excitation, whereas asymmetric damping becomes necessary under severe conditions, with commonly cited rebound-to-compression ratios emerging as scenario-dependent near-optimal solutions rather than universal constants.

papers.title: $s$-harmonic functions in the small order limit
papers.summary: We study families $u_s$ of functions satisfying the equations $(-Δ)^s u_s=0$, $s \in (0,1)$ in a smooth bounded open set $Ω\subset \mathbb{R}^N$. The main purpose of this paper is twofold. First, we provide a detailed analysis of the asymptotics of these families in the zero order limit $s \to 0^+$. Second, we study the differentiability of $u_s$ as a function of $s$. Most of our results are devoted to the associated Poisson problem, where the family $u_s$ is determined by the exterior condition $u_s = g$ in $\mathbb{R}^N \setminus Ω$ for some fixed function $g \in L^\infty(\mathbb{R}^N \setminus Ω)$. Our results show that both the zero order asymptotics and the differentiability properties of $u_s$ can be expressed in terms of the logarithmic Laplacian of suitable extensions of $g$. This allows to deduce pointwise monotonicity properties of $u_s$ in the order parameter $s$ for a large class of functions $g$.

ai.tldr: 研究在光滑有界区域中，当分数阶拉普拉斯算子的阶数s趋近于0时，s-调和函数族的渐近行为及关于s的可微性。
ai.motivation: 理解分数阶拉普拉斯算子在小阶数极限下的行为，并建立其与对数拉普拉斯算子的联系。
ai.method: 通过分析由外部条件确定的Poisson问题，利用对数拉普拉斯算子表达零阶渐近和可微性。
ai.result: 零阶渐近和可微性均可由g的适当扩展的对数拉普拉斯表示，并推导出u_s关于s的点态单调性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供分数阶拉普拉斯算子小阶数极限的严格分析框架，可用于相关偏微分方程研究。

idea_spark.idea: 利用对数拉普拉斯算子统一描述分数阶拉普拉斯算子的极限行为，可能简化相关问题的分析。
idea_spark.risk: 对数拉普拉斯算子的定义和性质可能依赖于区域光滑性，对非光滑区域需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑将类似方法应用于其他分数阶算子（如分数阶热方程）的小阶数极限。

en.tldr: Studies the asymptotic behavior and differentiability in s of families of s-harmonic functions as s→0+ in smooth bounded domains.
en.motivation: To understand the small-order limit of the fractional Laplacian and its connection to the logarithmic Laplacian.
en.method: Analyzes the Poisson problem with exterior condition, expressing asymptotics and differentiability via the logarithmic Laplacian of suitable extensions of g.
en.result: Both zero-order asymptotics and differentiability are expressed in terms of the logarithmic Laplacian, yielding pointwise monotonicity of u_s in s for a large class of g.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous framework for the small-order limit of fractional Laplacians, useful in PDE research.

idea_spark.idea: Using the logarithmic Laplacian to unify limit behaviors of fractional Laplacians may simplify analysis of related problems.
idea_spark.risk: Properties of the logarithmic Laplacian may depend on domain smoothness; caution needed for non-smooth domains.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider applying similar methods to small-order limits of other fractional operators, e.g., fractional heat equations.

papers.title: Probability of Quota Violations in Divisor Apportionment Methods with Nonzero Allocations
papers.summary: Apportionment assigns indivisible items among groups. By the Balinski-Young theorem, no method can satisfy both house monotonicity and the quota rule. This paper investigates quota violations caused by nonzero allocation constraints, and derives exact probability formulas for their frequency. Such violations occur in systems like the U.S. House of Representatives, where each state is guaranteed at least one seat. We analyze the three-state case, introduce the $τ$ statistic to parametrize population distributions, and prove an Asymptotic Quota Stabilization theorem: for fixed $τ$, quota behavior stabilizes as populations grow, yielding probability results for quota violations determined by the set of ultimately violatory $τ$ values.   Applying this framework to the five classical divisor methods, we derive exact probability formulas. Additionally, we show that as the number of seats $M \to \infty$, these probabilities converge to method-specific constants. These results provide a precise, quantitative foundation for evaluating the fairness and frequency of quota violations in constrained apportionment systems.

ai.tldr: 研究除数分配法中非零分配约束导致的配额违规概率，推导精确公式并证明渐近配额稳定定理。
ai.motivation: Balinski-Young定理表明无方法同时满足单调性和配额规则，非零分配约束（如美国众议院每州至少一席）会引发配额违规，需量化其频率。
ai.method: 引入τ统计量参数化人口分布，分析三州情形，证明渐近配额稳定定理；对五种经典除数方法推导精确概率公式。
ai.result: 配额违规概率随席位M→∞收敛于方法特定常数，τ值决定最终违规集。
ai.help_to_user: 提供评估受限分配系统公平性和违规频率的定量基础。

idea_spark.idea: 将τ统计量用于动态分配系统（如随时间变化的人口分布），研究配额违规的演化。
idea_spark.risk: 模型假设人口分布固定，实际中人口变化可能影响结论。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合机器学习预测人口分布，实现分配方案的实时公平性评估。

en.motivation: Balinski-Young theorem states no method satisfies both monotonicity and quota rule; nonzero allocation constraints (e.g., U.S. House minimum one seat per state) cause violations, requiring quantitative frequency analysis.
en.method: Introduces τ statistic to parametrize population distributions, analyzes three-state case, proves Asymptotic Quota Stabilization theorem; derives exact probability formulas for five classical divisor methods.

papers.title: Galois Solvability of Finite-Size Bethe Solutions in the Heisenberg Chain
papers.summary: The spin-1/2 Heisenberg antiferromagnetic chain is the canonical example of an integrable quantum many-body model. Despite its exact solvability, explicit finite-size solutions are typically only accessible via numerical evaluation of the Bethe ansatz equations. Here, we analyse the algebraic structure of the exact, symbolic ground states for chains up to ten sites using the coordinate Bethe ansatz. We show that both the ground state wavefunction and the Bethe-roots rapidly develop algebraic complexity with respect to system size, but at different rates. The Bethe-roots appear to become Galois unsolvable for chains of eight or more sites, whereas the ground state wavefunction coefficients and energy appear to become unsolvable for ten or more sites. This demonstrates a lack of explicit analytic tractability in a quantum integrable model due to algebraic complexity.

ai.tldr: 分析海森堡链有限尺寸贝特解的代数结构，发现贝特根在8个及以上格点出现伽罗瓦不可解性，波函数系数和能量在10个及以上格点不可解。
ai.motivation: 尽管海森堡反铁磁链是精确可积模型，但有限尺寸解通常只能数值求解，缺乏显式解析可解性。
ai.method: 使用坐标贝特拟设，对最多10个格点的链进行符号计算，分析基态波函数和贝特根的代数结构。
ai.result: 贝特根在8个格点后出现伽罗瓦不可解性，波函数系数和能量在10个格点后不可解，表明代数复杂性阻碍了显式解析可解性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解量子可积模型中有限尺寸解的代数复杂性及其对解析可解性的限制。

idea_spark.idea: 探索是否可以通过引入对称性或近似方法绕过伽罗瓦不可解性，获得近似解析解。
idea_spark.risk: 伽罗瓦不可解性可能意味着根本不存在封闭解析形式，近似方法可能无法保证精度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合数值与符号方法，研究更大尺寸系统的代数结构，或寻找新的可解子类。

en.tldr: Analyzing the algebraic structure of finite-size Bethe solutions in the Heisenberg chain reveals that Bethe-roots become Galois unsolvable for chains of eight or more sites, while wavefunction coefficients and energy become unsolvable for ten or more sites.
en.motivation: Despite the exact solvability of the Heisenberg antiferromagnetic chain, finite-size solutions are typically numerical, lacking explicit analytic tractability.
en.method: Using the coordinate Bethe ansatz, we perform symbolic computations for chains up to ten sites, analyzing the algebraic structure of the ground state wavefunction and Bethe-roots.
en.result: Bethe-roots become Galois unsolvable at eight sites, and wavefunction coefficients and energy become unsolvable at ten sites, demonstrating that algebraic complexity prevents explicit analytic solutions.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the algebraic complexity of finite-size solutions in quantum integrable models and its limitation on explicit analytic solvability.

idea_spark.idea: Explore whether symmetries or approximation methods can bypass Galois unsolvability to obtain approximate analytic solutions.
idea_spark.risk: Galois unsolvability may imply no closed-form solution exists, and approximations may lack guaranteed accuracy.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine numerical and symbolic methods to study algebraic structures in larger systems, or search for new solvable subclasses.

papers.title: Time-sensitive anytime-valid testing
papers.summary: Anytime-valid tests allow evidence to be checked during data collection: one can either continue testing or stop and reject the null while still controlling type-I error. Yet, in many applications rejection is useful only if it comes soon enough. We introduce a time-sensitive testing-by-betting framework that favours early rejection by assigning rewards to rejection times and maximising their expected value under a given alternative. This encompasses hard deadlines and softer time preferences. The resulting optimal control problem admits a Bellman representation in terms only of time and evidence against the null, rather than the full history. For hard deadlines, the simple-vs-simple case reduces to a finite-horizon Neyman--Pearson problem and identify the corresponding optimal e-process. Furthermore, we show that exponentially decaying rewards admit a stationary approximation, yielding the exponential-decay-optimal (EDO) criterion: a finite-time-scale counterpart to the classical growth-rate-optimal (GRO) viewpoint in anytime-valid statistics, with the GRO criterion recovered in the large-time-scale limit.

ai.tldr: 提出一种时间敏感的随时有效检验框架，通过奖励早期拒绝来优化检验决策，并推导出最优控制问题的贝尔曼表示。
ai.motivation: 传统随时有效检验允许在数据收集过程中随时检查证据，但许多应用中只有及时拒绝才有意义，因此需要引入时间偏好。
ai.method: 将检验问题建模为最优控制问题，使用贝尔曼方程仅依赖时间和证据状态，并针对硬截止和指数衰减奖励分别给出最优解。
ai.result: 硬截止情形简化为有限时域Neyman-Pearson问题，得到最优e过程；指数衰减奖励导出指数衰减最优准则，作为经典增长率最优准则的有限时间尺度对应。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究者设计在时间约束下仍能控制错误率的在线检验方法，适用于需要及时决策的统计应用。

idea_spark.idea: 将指数衰减奖励与e过程结合，可能启发新的自适应停止规则，平衡早期拒绝与统计效力。
idea_spark.risk: 实际应用中时间偏好函数的选择可能影响检验性能，需谨慎校准。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从最优停止理论中借鉴贝尔曼方程，为统计检验提供动态规划视角，可能推动其他在线学习问题的解法创新。

idea_spark.idea: 将指数衰减奖励与e过程结合，可能启发新的自适应停止规则，平衡早期拒绝与统计效力。

en.tldr: Introduces a time-sensitive anytime-valid testing framework that rewards early rejection, with a Bellman representation for the optimal control problem and solutions for hard deadlines and exponential decay rewards.
en.motivation: Standard anytime-valid tests allow continuous monitoring but ignore the utility of early rejection, which is crucial in many applications.
en.method: Formulates testing as an optimal control problem, uses Bellman equations depending only on time and evidence, and solves for hard deadlines (finite-horizon Neyman-Pearson) and exponential decay rewards (stationary approximation).
en.result: Derives the optimal e-process for hard deadlines and the exponential-decay-optimal criterion as a finite-time-scale counterpart to the growth-rate-optimal criterion.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers design online tests that control error rates while incorporating time preferences, useful for applications requiring timely decisions.

idea_spark.idea: Combining exponential decay rewards with e-processes may inspire new adaptive stopping rules that balance early rejection and statistical power.
idea_spark.risk: The choice of time preference function may affect test performance and requires careful calibration in practice.
idea_spark.inspiration: Borrowing Bellman equations from optimal stopping theory provides a dynamic programming perspective for statistical testing, potentially driving innovations in other online learning problems.

papers.title: From Coordinate Matching to Structural Alignment: Rethinking Prototype Alignment in Heterogeneous Federated Learning
papers.summary: Heterogeneous federated learning (HtFL) aims to enable collaboration among clients that differ in both data distributions and model architectures. Prototype-based methods, which communicate class-level feature centers (prototypes) instead of full model parameters, have recently shown strong potential for HtFL. Existing prototype-based HtFL methods typically reuse the MSE-based or cosine-based alignment mechanism developed for homogeneous FL when aligning client-specific representations with global prototypes. These approaches are essentially coordinate alignment, where representations of clients are forced to match the global prototypes in the embedding space in an element-wise manner. Such alignment implicitly assumes that all clients should map their representations into the feature subspace defined by the global prototypes. This assumption is reasonable in homogeneous FL, where all clients share the same feature extractor. However, it becomes problematic in HtFL, since heterogeneous feature extractors naturally induce client-specific feature subspaces, and forcing all clients to optimize within a single global subspace unnecessarily suppresses their learning capacity. We observe that coordinate alignment implicitly couples two distinct objectives: aligning inter-class semantic structure, which is directly beneficial for classification, and enforcing a shared feature basis, which is unnecessary and even harmful under model heterogeneity. Building on this insight, we design FedSAF, which shifts the alignment objective from absolute coordinates to inter-class relational structure. We demonstrate that structural alignment consistently outperforms coordinate alignment in heterogeneous settings. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that our structural alignment outperforms state-of-the-art prototype-based HtFL methods by up to 3.52\%.

ai.tldr: 提出FedSAF，将异构联邦学习中的原型对齐从坐标对齐转为结构对齐，提升性能。
ai.motivation: 现有原型对齐方法本质是坐标对齐，强制异构客户端共享特征子空间，抑制了学习能力。
ai.method: 设计FedSAF，对齐客户端表示与全局原型的类间关系结构而非绝对坐标。
ai.result: 在多个基准上，结构对齐优于坐标对齐，最高提升3.52%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解异构联邦学习中原型对齐的局限，并提供改进方向。

papers.title: Global solutions to a two-dimensional chemotaxis-Euler system with robin boundary conditions on oxygen
papers.summary: This paper is concerned with the global well-posedness of a chemotaxis-Euler system in bounded domains of $\mathbb{R}^2$. Completing the system with physical boundary conditions, we show that the corresponding initial boundary value problem admits a unique global solution provided that the initial oxygen concentration is suitably small.

ai.tldr: 本文证明了二维有界域中带有Robin边界条件的趋化-Euler系统在初始氧浓度适当小时存在唯一全局解。
ai.motivation: 研究趋化-Euler系统在物理边界条件下的全局适定性，填补理论空白。
ai.method: 通过分析初始边界值问题，利用小初始氧浓度条件建立全局解的存在唯一性。
ai.result: 在初始氧浓度适当小的条件下，系统存在唯一全局解。
ai.help_to_user: 为趋化流体耦合系统的数学分析提供理论基础，有助于理解生物聚集现象。

idea_spark.idea: 探索非Robin边界条件或高维情形下的全局解存在性。
idea_spark.risk: 小初始条件可能过于严格，实际生物系统中氧浓度未必满足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合数值模拟验证理论结果，并研究解的大时间行为。

en.tldr: This paper proves the unique global solution for a chemotaxis-Euler system with Robin boundary conditions in bounded domains of R^2, provided the initial oxygen concentration is suitably small.
en.motivation: To establish global well-posedness of the chemotaxis-Euler system under physical boundary conditions, filling a theoretical gap.
en.method: By analyzing the initial boundary value problem and using the smallness of initial oxygen concentration to ensure global existence and uniqueness.
en.result: A unique global solution exists when the initial oxygen concentration is suitably small.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical foundation for chemotaxis-fluid coupled systems, aiding understanding of biological aggregation phenomena.

papers.title: $\mathcal{B}^{3}$-Net: Controlled Posterior Bridge Learning for Multi-Task Dense Prediction
papers.summary: Multi-task dense prediction solves complementary pixel-level tasks in a unified model, such as semantic segmentation, depth estimation, surface normal estimation, and edge detection. Existing decoder-side interactions use attention, prompts, routing, diffusion, Mamba, or bridge features to exchange task evidence, but most of them organize this evidence implicitly. They usually fuse task features by similarity or affinity, without explicitly modeling that evidence reliability varies across tasks and spatial locations. As a result, unreliable evidence may contaminate the shared representation and intensify negative transfer. We propose $\mathcal{B}^{3}$-Net, a controlled posterior bridge learning framework for multi-task dense prediction. Our method decomposes decoder-side interaction into reliability estimation, posterior bridge construction, and bounded redistribution. The Precision Field Estimator estimates patch-wise evidence precision from task-reference alignment and local variation. The Posterior Bridge Operator builds a precision-weighted posterior bridge through heteroscedastic evidence fusion, yielding a shared state more reliable than uniform or heuristic mixtures. The Contractive Dispatch Operator redistributes the bridge to each task branch through a bounded update, reducing uncontrolled feature injection. Experiments on NYUD-v2, PASCAL-Context, and Cityscapes show that $\mathcal{B}^{3}$-Net achieves competitive or superior trade-offs over representative CNN-, Transformer-, diffusion-, Mamba-, and bridge-feature-based methods. Backbone-matched comparisons and extensive analyses further verify that the gains arise from controlled posterior bridge learning rather than backbone capacity or decoder scale.

ai.tldr: 提出B³-Net，通过受控后验桥学习实现多任务密集预测，显式建模证据可靠性并减少负迁移。
ai.motivation: 现有方法隐式融合任务证据，未考虑证据可靠性随任务和空间位置变化，导致不可靠证据污染共享表示。
ai.method: 将解码器交互分解为可靠性估计、后验桥构建和有界重分配：精度场估计器估计块级证据精度，后验桥算子通过异方差融合构建精度加权后验桥，收缩调度算子通过有界更新分配桥特征。
ai.result: 在NYUD-v2、PASCAL-Context和Cityscapes上达到与CNN、Transformer、扩散、Mamba和桥特征方法相当或更优的权衡。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种显式控制多任务特征融合可靠性的框架，适用于需要同时处理多个像素级任务的场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将证据可靠性建模为可学习的精度场，并利用异方差融合生成更可靠的后验共享表示。
idea_spark.risk: 精度场估计可能引入额外计算开销，且对噪声数据敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从贝叶斯后验融合和异方差回归中获得灵感，将多任务证据视为不同精度的观测。
