en.tldr: Proposes B³-Net for multi-task dense prediction via controlled posterior bridge learning, explicitly modeling evidence reliability to reduce negative transfer.
en.motivation: Existing methods fuse task evidence implicitly without considering varying reliability across tasks and spatial locations, causing unreliable evidence to contaminate shared representations.
en.method: Decomposes decoder interaction into reliability estimation, posterior bridge construction, and bounded redistribution: Precision Field Estimator estimates patch-wise evidence precision, Posterior Bridge Operator builds a precision-weighted posterior bridge via heteroscedastic fusion, and Contractive Dispatch Operator redistributes the bridge with bounded updates.
en.result: Achieves competitive or superior trade-offs on NYUD-v2, PASCAL-Context, and Cityscapes compared to CNN-, Transformer-, diffusion-, Mamba-, and bridge-feature-based methods.
en.help_to_user: Provides a framework to explicitly control the reliability of multi-task feature fusion, useful for scenarios requiring simultaneous pixel-level tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Model evidence reliability as a learnable precision field and use heteroscedastic fusion to produce a more reliable posterior shared representation.
idea_spark.risk: Precision field estimation may introduce extra computation and be sensitive to noisy data.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by Bayesian posterior fusion and heteroscedastic regression, treating multi-task evidence as observations with varying precision.

papers.title: On the Role of Language Representations in Auto-Bidding: Findings and Implications
papers.summary: Auto-bidding is a crucial task in real-time advertising markets, where policies must optimize long-horizon value under delivery constraints (e.g., budget and CPA). Existing methods for auto-bidding rely on compact numerical state representations: while they can implicitly capture delivery dynamics, they offer limited support for explicitly representing and controlling high-level intent, evolving feedback, and operator-style strategic guidance in real campaigns. Meanwhile, Large Language Models (LLMs) offer a powerful method for encoding semantic information, it remains unclear when LLMs help and how to integrate them without sacrificing numerical precision. Through systematic preliminary studies, we find that (1) LLM embeddings contain bidding-relevant cues yet cannot replace numerical features, and (2) gains emerge only with careful semantic--numeric integration rather than naive concatenation. Motivated by these findings, we propose \textit{SemBid}, a novel auto-bidding framework that injects LLM-encoded semantics into offline bidding trajectories at the token level. SemBid introduces three semantic inputs: \textit{Task}, \textit{History}, and \textit{Strategy}. It injects these semantics as tokens alongside numerical trajectory tokens and uses self-attention to integrate them, improving controllability and generalization across objectives. Across diverse scenarios and budget regimes, SemBid outperforms competitive baselines from offline RL and generative sequence modeling, with more consistent gains in overall performance, constraint satisfaction, and robustness. Our code is available at: \href{https://github.com/AlanYu04/SemBid-KDD2026}{\textcolor{blue}{here}}.

ai.tldr: 提出SemBid框架，通过将LLM语义编码注入离线竞价轨迹，提升自动出价的可控性和泛化能力。
ai.motivation: 现有自动出价方法依赖数值状态表示，难以显式表达高级意图、动态反馈和策略指导；LLM虽能编码语义，但如何有效整合而不损失数值精度尚不明确。
ai.method: 设计SemBid框架，引入任务、历史、策略三种语义输入，以token形式与数值轨迹拼接，通过自注意力机制融合。
ai.result: 在多种场景和预算设置下，SemBid在整体性能、约束满足和鲁棒性上优于离线RL和生成序列建模基线。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何将LLM语义与数值特征结合以改进自动出价系统。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将LLM生成的策略建议作为额外token注入离线轨迹，增强模型对策略变化的适应能力。
idea_spark.risk: 语义注入可能引入噪声或过拟合特定策略模式，需验证泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受LLM在自然语言处理中token级融合的启发，将语义信息视为序列中的特殊token与数值特征共同建模。

en.motivation: Existing auto-bidding methods rely on numerical state representations, which cannot explicitly capture high-level intent, dynamic feedback, or strategic guidance; LLMs offer semantic encoding but it is unclear when and how to integrate them without losing numerical precision.

papers.title: Formal Stability of Tetrahedral Non-Zonal Flows on the Sphere
papers.summary: We investigate the formal stability of finite-amplitude non-zonal flows bifurcating from the trivial state in the unforced 2D Euler equations on the sphere. To bypass the degeneracy of the spherical Laplacian and filter out the low-frequency Fjørtoft instabilities, we restrict the functional space to the invariant subspace of the tetrahedral symmetry group. Using Arnold's Energy-Casimir method, we prove that the linearized elliptic operator derived via Liapunov-Schmidt reduction acts as the Hessian of the conserved functional. By tracking the critical eigenvalue along the bifurcating branches via the Crandall-Rabinowitz theorem, we establish a relation between the bifurcation topology and formal stability. Applying this framework to four distinct geophysical profile functions, we demonstrate that subcritical polynomial and supercritical sine-Gordon flows achieve a negative-definite second variation, that is, their formal stability. In contrast, subcritical sinh-Gordon and supercritical Liouville exponential flows generate saddle points, making them unstable. This classification identifies the specific nonlinear interactions required for the persistence of large-scale coherent waves in planetary atmospheres.

ai.tldr: 研究了球面上无强迫二维欧拉方程中从平凡态分岔的有限振幅非纬向流的正式稳定性，通过四面体对称群约化滤除低频不稳定性，利用Arnold能量-Casimir方法证明线性化椭圆算子是守恒泛函的Hessian，并基于Crandall-Rabinowitz定理建立分岔拓扑与正式稳定性的关系。对四种地球物理剖面函数分类：次临界多项式和超临界正弦-戈登流具有负定二阶变分（正式稳定），而次临界双曲正弦-戈登和超临界Liouville指数流产生鞍点（不稳定）。
ai.motivation: 理解行星大气中大规模相干波持续存在的非线性相互作用机制，需要分析球面上非纬向流的稳定性。
ai.method: 将函数空间限制在四面体对称群的不变子空间以绕过球面拉普拉斯算子的退化性；使用Arnold能量-Casimir方法证明线性化椭圆算子的Hessian性质；通过Crandall-Rabinowitz定理跟踪分岔分支上的临界特征值。
ai.result: 次临界多项式和超临界正弦-戈登流正式稳定；次临界双曲正弦-戈登和超临界Liouville指数流不稳定（鞍点）。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了球面上非纬向流稳定性分类的严格数学框架，可用于大气动力学中相干结构持久性的理论预测。

idea_spark.idea: 将四面体对称群约化与分岔拓扑结合，可能用于设计稳定的大尺度环流模式。
idea_spark.risk: 实际大气中非对称扰动可能破坏理想化的对称性假设。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从分岔拓扑与稳定性的关系出发，可探索其他对称群（如二十面体）对球面流稳定性的影响。

en.tldr: We investigate the formal stability of finite-amplitude non-zonal flows bifurcating from the trivial state in the unforced 2D Euler equations on the sphere. By restricting to the tetrahedral symmetry subspace and using Arnold's Energy-Casimir method with Liapunov-Schmidt reduction, we classify four geophysical profile functions: subcritical polynomial and supercritical sine-Gordon flows are formally stable (negative-definite second variation), while subcritical sinh-Gordon and supercritical Liouville exponential flows are unstable (saddle points).
en.motivation: To understand the nonlinear interactions required for persistence of large-scale coherent waves in planetary atmospheres by analyzing stability of non-zonal flows on the sphere.

en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical classification of formal stability for non-zonal flows on the sphere, useful for theoretical predictions of coherent structure persistence in atmospheric dynamics.

idea_spark.idea: Combining tetrahedral symmetry reduction with bifurcation topology may help design stable large-scale circulation patterns.
idea_spark.risk: Real atmospheres may break the idealized symmetry assumptions due to asymmetric perturbations.
idea_spark.inspiration: From the relation between bifurcation topology and stability, explore the effect of other symmetry groups (e.g., icosahedral) on spherical flow stability.

papers.title: A Novel Graph-Regulated Disentangling Mamba Model with Sparse Tokens for Enhanced Tree Species Classification from MODIS Time Series
papers.summary: Although tree species classification from Moderate Resolution Imaging Spectroradiometer (MODIS) time series data is critical for supporting various environmental applications, it is a challenging task due to several key difficulties: the subtle signature differences among tree species, strong spatial-spectral-temporal information coupling, and the difficulty of modeling large-scale topological context information. To better address these challenges, this paper presents a novel Graph-regulated Disentangled Sparse Mamba model (GDS-Mamba) for enhanced tree species classification, with the following contributions. (1) First, to improve large-scale context modeling, we design a mini-batch graph-regulated approach that explicitly explores topological correlation effects among input images. (2) Second, to disentangle the high-dimensional spatial-spectral-temporal information coupling for improved feature extraction, we propose a novel disentangling Mamba architecture tailored for capturing independent spatial patterns, spectral signatures, and temporal phenology behaviors in MODIS time series. (3) Third, to improve efficiency and subtle feature learning, we design novel sparse token approaches that adaptively learn the optimum subset of tokens to better address the correlation decay problem that bottlenecks standard Mamba models. Extensive experiments using large-scale annual MOD13Q1 data across two Canadian provinces (i.e., Alberta and Saskatchewan) achieved an overall accuracy of 93.94\% in Alberta and 80.19\% in cross-provincial evaluations, outperforming twelve state-of-the-art classification models.

ai.tldr: 提出图调控解缠Mamba模型（GDS-Mamba），结合稀疏令牌，从MODIS时间序列中增强树种分类。
ai.motivation: MODIS时间序列树种分类面临物种间细微差异、空间-光谱-时间强耦合以及大规模拓扑上下文建模困难。
ai.method: 设计小批量图调控方法建模拓扑相关性；提出解缠Mamba架构分离空间、光谱和时间模式；设计稀疏令牌自适应学习最优子集。
ai.result: 在加拿大两省的大规模年度MODIS数据上，阿尔伯塔省总体精度93.94%，跨省评估80.19%，优于12种先进模型。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种处理高维耦合遥感时间序列的分类框架，尤其适用于树种精细识别。

idea_spark.idea: 将Mamba与图神经网络结合，通过稀疏化令牌缓解长序列相关性衰减问题。
idea_spark.risk: 稀疏令牌可能丢失关键信息，需验证在不同数据分布下的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受Mamba在长序列建模中的效率启发，结合图结构先验提升空间上下文感知能力。

en.tldr: Proposes a Graph-regulated Disentangled Sparse Mamba model (GDS-Mamba) with sparse tokens for enhanced tree species classification from MODIS time series.
en.motivation: Tree species classification from MODIS time series faces challenges of subtle inter-species differences, strong spatial-spectral-temporal coupling, and difficulty in modeling large-scale topological context.
en.method: Designs a mini-batch graph regulation approach to model topological correlations; proposes a disentangling Mamba architecture to separate spatial, spectral, and temporal patterns; designs sparse token approaches to adaptively learn optimal token subsets.
en.result: On large-scale annual MODIS data across two Canadian provinces, achieves 93.94% overall accuracy in Alberta and 80.19% in cross-provincial evaluation, outperforming 12 state-of-the-art models.
en.help_to_user: Provides a classification framework for handling high-dimensional coupled remote sensing time series, especially for fine-grained tree species identification.

idea_spark.idea: Combines Mamba with graph neural networks and uses token sparsification to mitigate long-sequence correlation decay.
idea_spark.risk: Sparse tokens may lose critical information; robustness across different data distributions needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by Mamba's efficiency in long-sequence modeling, integrates graph-structured priors to enhance spatial context awareness.

papers.title: Earth-o1: A Grid-free Observation-native Atmospheric World Model
papers.summary: Despite the unprecedented volume of multimodal data provided by modern Earth observation systems, our ability to model atmospheric dynamics remains constrained. Traditional modeling frameworks force heterogeneous measurements into predefined spatial grids, inherently limiting the full exploitation of raw sensor data and creating severe computational bottlenecks. Here we present Earth-o1, an observation-native atmospheric world model that overcomes these structural limitations. Rather than relying on conventional atmospheric dynamical modeling systems or traditional data assimilation, Earth-o1 directly learns the continuous, three-dimensional physical evolution of the Earth system from ungridded observational data. By integrating diverse sensor inputs into a unified, grid-free dynamical field, the model autonomously advances the atmospheric state in space and time. We show that this fundamentally distinct paradigm enables direct, real-time forecasting and cross-sensor inference without the overhead of explicit numerical solvers. In hindcast evaluations, Earth-o1 achieves surface forecast skill comparable to the operational Integrated Forecasting System (IFS). These results establish that continuous, observation-driven world models -- a new class of fully observation-native geophysical simulators -- can match the fidelity of established physical frameworks, providing a scalable data-driven foundation for a digital twin of the Earth.

ai.tldr: 提出一种无网格、观测原生的地球大气世界模型Earth-o1，直接从非网格观测数据学习连续三维物理演化，实现实时预报与跨传感器推理，性能媲美传统数值模式。
ai.motivation: 传统建模将异构观测强制映射到预设网格，限制了原始传感器数据的充分利用并造成计算瓶颈。
ai.method: 将多种传感器输入整合为统一的无网格连续动态场，模型自主推进大气状态在时空中的演化，无需显式数值求解器。
ai.result: 在回算评估中，地表预报技巧与业务化集成预报系统（IFS）相当。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种可扩展的数据驱动地球数字孪生基础，帮助用户摆脱网格化预处理，直接利用原始观测进行高保真大气模拟。

idea_spark.idea: 将Earth-o1的观测原生思想与强化学习结合，构建能主动选择最优观测配置的自适应地球观测系统。
idea_spark.risk: 模型对观测数据的覆盖密度和噪声敏感，在观测稀疏区域可能产生较大不确定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受神经辐射场（NeRF）连续场景表示的启发，将类似思想用于地球系统状态的空间-时间连续建模。

en.tldr: We present Earth-o1, a grid-free, observation-native atmospheric world model that learns continuous 3D physical evolution directly from ungridded observational data, achieving real-time forecasting and cross-sensor inference with skill comparable to the operational IFS.
en.motivation: Traditional modeling frameworks force heterogeneous measurements into predefined spatial grids, limiting full exploitation of raw sensor data and creating computational bottlenecks.
en.method: The model integrates diverse sensor inputs into a unified, grid-free dynamical field and autonomously advances the atmospheric state in space and time without explicit numerical solvers.
en.result: In hindcast evaluations, Earth-o1 achieves surface forecast skill comparable to the operational Integrated Forecasting System (IFS).
en.help_to_user: Provides a scalable data-driven foundation for a digital twin of the Earth, enabling users to bypass gridded preprocessing and directly leverage raw observations for high-fidelity atmospheric simulation.

idea_spark.idea: Combine Earth-o1's observation-native approach with reinforcement learning to build an adaptive Earth observation system that actively selects optimal sensor configurations.
idea_spark.risk: The model is sensitive to observation coverage density and noise, potentially leading to large uncertainties in data-sparse regions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by neural radiance fields (NeRF) for continuous scene representation, we apply a similar idea to spatiotemporal continuous modeling of the Earth system.

papers.title: Joint Consistency: A Unified Test-Time Aggregation Framework via Energy Minimization
papers.summary: This paper studies test-time aggregation, an approach that generates multiple reasoning traces and aggregates them into a final answer. Most existing methods rely on evaluation signals collected from candidate traces in isolation or answer frequencies, while ignoring comparative interactions among candidates. We propose Joint Consistency (JC), formulated as a constrained Ising-type energy minimization problem, where independent evaluation signals act as external fields and pairwise comparisons act as interactions. JC provides a unified framework for test-time aggregation that subsumes existing voting and weighted aggregation methods as special cases. Our construction of the interaction matrix leverages LLM-as-a-judge comparisons, and admits a theoretical interpretation under answer-level homogeneity assumptions. Moreover, we develop an efficient approximation strategy that makes interaction modeling practical for large-scale test-time aggregation. Experiments on math and code reasoning benchmarks show that JC consistently outperforms existing baselines across tasks, judge models, trace budgets, and trace-generation settings.

ai.tldr: 提出联合一致性（JC）框架，将测试时聚合建模为约束伊辛型能量最小化问题，统一了投票和加权聚合方法。
ai.motivation: 现有测试时聚合方法忽略候选答案间的比较交互，仅依赖独立评估信号或答案频率。
ai.method: 将独立评估信号作为外场，LLM评判的成对比较作为相互作用，构建约束伊辛能量模型，并开发高效近似策略。
ai.result: 在数学和代码推理基准上，JC一致优于现有基线，跨任务、评判模型、轨迹预算和生成设置均有效。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种统一的测试时聚合框架，可提升大模型推理的准确性和鲁棒性。

idea_spark.idea: 将成对比较的交互项扩展到更复杂的图结构，或引入可学习的相互作用权重。
idea_spark.risk: 成对比较的计算成本可能随候选数平方增长，需平衡效率与效果。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受统计物理中伊辛模型启发，将推理轨迹视为自旋，通过能量最小化实现全局一致聚合。

en.tldr: Proposes Joint Consistency (JC), a unified test-time aggregation framework formulated as a constrained Ising-type energy minimization problem, subsuming voting and weighted aggregation methods.
en.motivation: Existing test-time aggregation methods ignore comparative interactions among candidates, relying solely on independent evaluation signals or answer frequencies.
en.method: Models independent evaluation signals as external fields and LLM-as-a-judge pairwise comparisons as interactions in a constrained Ising energy model, with an efficient approximation for large-scale use.
en.result: JC consistently outperforms baselines on math and code reasoning benchmarks across tasks, judge models, trace budgets, and generation settings.
en.help_to_user: Provides a unified aggregation framework that improves accuracy and robustness of LLM reasoning.

idea_spark.idea: Extend pairwise interactions to more complex graph structures or introduce learnable interaction weights.
idea_spark.risk: Pairwise comparison cost may scale quadratically with candidate count, requiring trade-offs between efficiency and effectiveness.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the Ising model in statistical physics, treating reasoning traces as spins and achieving globally consistent aggregation via energy minimization.

papers.title: An Exact Algorithm for Load-Dependent Traveling Salesman Problem for Unmanned Aerial Vehicle Package Delivery
papers.summary: In this article, we present a novel formulation for the load-dependent traveling salesman problem (LD-TSP), in which travel cost (or energy expended) depends on the vehicle's current load. This problem is relevant for package delivery and urban air mobility, where vehicles must transport and drop cargo at specified locations. The challenge lies in modeling the cost, which varies with both route sequence and onboard load. Our key contributions are: (i) formulating an energy dissipation model and proving energy expenditure depends linearly on vehicle mass and distance; and (ii) formulating a mixed-integer nonlinear programming formulation and providing a novel relaxation to obtain a mixed-integer linear program. Extensive numerical results show that optimal solutions for most instances with up to 50 targets are obtained within one minute. For unsolved instances within a 10-minute limit, optimality gaps are under 13%, highlighting the formulation's tightness. We further benchmark our approach against three proposed baseline formulations and another algorithm from a related problem, and demonstrate that our formulation outperforms all baselines.

ai.tldr: 提出一种负载依赖旅行商问题的精确算法，用于无人机包裹配送，在1分钟内可求解最多50个目标的最优解。
ai.motivation: 无人机配送中能耗随负载变化，现有模型未充分考虑这一依赖关系，导致路径规划不准确。
ai.method: 建立能耗线性模型，将混合整数非线性规划松弛为混合整数线性规划，并设计精确求解算法。
ai.result: 50个目标以内实例1分钟内得最优解，10分钟未解实例最优间隙低于13%，优于所有基线方法。
ai.help_to_user: 为无人机配送路径规划提供高效精确的求解工具，降低能耗成本。

idea_spark.idea: 将负载依赖能耗模型与动态充电站选址结合，设计多无人机协同配送方案。
idea_spark.risk: 模型假设能耗与负载线性相关，实际中非线性因素（如风速、电池衰减）可能影响精度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受物流行业“最后一公里”配送效率瓶颈启发，利用精确算法替代启发式方法。

en.tldr: An exact algorithm for the load-dependent traveling salesman problem (LD-TSP) for UAV package delivery, solving instances with up to 50 targets optimally within one minute.
en.motivation: Energy consumption in UAV delivery varies with payload, but existing models lack accurate load-dependent cost modeling.
en.method: Formulated a linear energy dissipation model, relaxed mixed-integer nonlinear programming to mixed-integer linear programming, and developed an exact algorithm.
en.result: Optimal solutions for most instances up to 50 targets within one minute; optimality gaps under 13% for unsolved instances within 10 minutes, outperforming all baselines.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient exact solver for UAV delivery route planning, reducing energy costs.

idea_spark.idea: Combine load-dependent energy model with dynamic charging station placement for multi-UAV collaborative delivery.
idea_spark.risk: Linear energy assumption may not capture nonlinear real-world factors like wind or battery degradation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the efficiency bottleneck in last-mile logistics, replacing heuristic methods with exact algorithms.

papers.title: egenioussBench: A New Dataset for Geospatial Visual Localisation
papers.summary: We present egenioussBench, a visual localisation benchmark built on geospatial reference data: a city-scale airborne 3D mesh and a CityGML LoD2 model. This pairing reflects deployable mapping assets and supports true scalability beyond traditional SfM-based approaches. The query data comprise smartphone images with centimetre-accurate, map-independent ground truth obtained via PPK and GCP/CP-aided adjustment. From 2,709 images, we derive a non-co-visible subset by estimating the full co-visibility matrix from rendered depth and selecting a maximum independent set; the released data include a test split of 42 non-co-visible images with withheld ground truth and a validation split of 412 sequential images with poses, e.g. for training of pose regressors and self-validation. The benchmark features a public leaderboard evaluated with binning metrics at multiple pose-error thresholds alongside global statistics (median, RMSE, outlier ratio), ensuring fair, like-for-like comparison across mesh- and LoD2-based methods. Together, these design choices expose realistic cross-view and cross-domain challenges while providing a rigorous, scalable path for advancing large-scale visual localisation. We make the evaluation code and data availeable at https://github.com/fratopa/egenioussBench and https://www.egeniouss.eu/

ai.tldr: 提出了一个基于城市级航空3D网格和CityGML LoD2模型的地理视觉定位基准数据集，包含智能手机图像和厘米级真值，并设计了非共视测试集和排行榜。
ai.motivation: 现有视觉定位基准多依赖SfM重建，难以扩展到城市级真实地图资产，缺乏跨视角和跨域挑战的标准化评估。
ai.method: 利用航空3D网格和CityGML LoD2模型作为参考数据，通过PPK和GCP/CP辅助调整获取厘米级真值；从2709张图像中估计共视矩阵并选择最大独立集，得到42张非共视测试图像和412张序列验证图像。
ai.result: 发布了包含非共视测试集和序列验证集的数据集，并提供了基于多阈值分箱指标和全局统计的排行榜评估代码。
ai.help_to_user: 可用于评估和比较基于网格和LoD2模型的大规模视觉定位方法，尤其适合跨视角和跨域场景。

idea_spark.idea: 利用航空3D网格和CityGML模型作为参考，结合智能手机图像和厘米级真值，构建了一个可扩展的视觉定位基准。
idea_spark.risk: 非共视测试集规模较小（42张），可能不足以全面评估方法性能；依赖特定城市数据，泛化性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将地理信息系统中的标准数据模型（如CityGML）引入视觉定位基准，为跨领域融合提供了新思路。

idea_spark.risk: 非共视测试集规模较小（42张），可能不足以全面评估方法性能；依赖特定城市数据，泛化性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将地理信息系统中的标准数据模型（如CityGML）引入视觉定位基准，为跨领域融合提供了新思路。

en.tldr: Presents a geospatial visual localisation benchmark using city-scale airborne 3D mesh and CityGML LoD2 model, with smartphone images and cm-accurate ground truth, featuring a non-co-visible test set and leaderboard.
en.motivation: Existing benchmarks rely on SfM reconstructions, limiting scalability to real-world mapping assets and lacking standardized cross-view/cross-domain evaluation.
en.method: Uses airborne 3D mesh and CityGML LoD2 as reference; obtains cm-accurate ground truth via PPK and GCP/CP adjustment; estimates co-visibility matrix from rendered depth and selects maximum independent set, yielding 42 non-co-visible test images and 412 sequential validation images.
en.result: Releases dataset with non-co-visible and sequential splits, plus evaluation code and leaderboard using multi-threshold binning metrics and global statistics.
en.help_to_user: Enables fair comparison of mesh- and LoD2-based visual localisation methods, especially for cross-view and cross-domain scenarios.

idea_spark.idea: Leverages airborne 3D mesh and CityGML models as reference, combined with smartphone images and cm-accurate ground truth, to build a scalable visual localisation benchmark.
idea_spark.risk: Small non-co-visible test set (42 images) may limit evaluation robustness; city-specific data may affect generalizability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Introducing standard geospatial data models (e.g., CityGML) into visual localisation benchmarks opens new cross-domain integration possibilities.

papers.title: A transition in the hole probability at finite temperature for free fermions in $d$ dimensions
papers.summary: In a free Fermi gas at temperature $T$ much higher than the Fermi temperature one expects that the fluctuations of the number of particles in a given region has Poissonian/classical statistics. On the other hand at low temperature the Pauli exclusion principle leads to non trivial counting statistics. It is of great interest from a theoretical and experimental point of view to characterize the crossover between these two limits. Here we focus on the hole probability $P(R,T)$, i.e. the probability that a region of size $R$ is devoid of particles, in dimension $d$, and on the case of a spherical region of large radius $R$. We show that at low temperature it takes the scaling form $P(R,T)\sim \exp\big[-(k_F R)^{d+1}Φ_d(u=2R\,T/k_F)\big],$ where $k_F$ is the Fermi momentum. By mapping the problem to an effective Coulomb gas, we compute exactly the scaling function $Φ_d(u)$ in any dimension. Remarkably, it exhibits a transition of order $\tfrac{3}{2}(d+1)$ at the universal critical value $u_c=2/π$, signaling a sharp change in the mechanism of rare fluctuations, associated with the emergence of a macroscopic gap in the optimal density of the associated Coulomb gas. Our analytical predictions are supported by precise numerical evaluations of the corresponding Fredholm determinants.

ai.motivation: 从理论和实验角度表征低温量子统计与高温泊松统计之间的交叉。
ai.method: 将问题映射为有效库仑气体，精确计算标度函数，并用Fredholm行列式数值验证。
ai.result: 空穴概率在低温下呈标度形式，并在临界值u_c=2/π处发生阶数为3(d+1)/2的相变。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了理解自由费米子计数统计中罕见涨落机制转变的精确解析结果。

en.tldr: We study the crossover of the hole probability in a free Fermi gas from low to high temperature, revealing a universal phase transition.
en.motivation: To characterize the crossover between quantum counting statistics at low temperature and Poissonian statistics at high temperature, both theoretically and experimentally.
en.method: Mapping to an effective Coulomb gas, exact computation of the scaling function, and numerical verification via Fredholm determinants.
en.result: The hole probability takes a scaling form at low temperature and exhibits a phase transition of order 3(d+1)/2 at the universal critical value u_c=2/π.
en.help_to_user: Provides exact analytical results for the mechanism of rare fluctuations in free fermion counting statistics.

idea_spark.idea: Use the phase transition in hole probability to design experiments probing fermionic statistics.
idea_spark.risk: The theory assumes a spherical region and large radius; finite-size effects may modify the critical behavior.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine large deviation theory from statistical physics with quantum many-body systems to reveal universal classes.

papers.title: Soliton gas resolution and statistics of random wave fields in semiclassical integrable turbulence
papers.summary: We develop a general analytical framework for determining the probability distribution of random nonlinear wave fields governed by the focusing nonlinear Schrödinger equation (fNLSE) in regimes where typical realizations are dominated by solitons. We formulate the soliton gas resolution conjecture for the long-time evolution of slowly varying ("semiclassical") random initial states and implement a stochastic analogue of the inverse scattering transform by establishing a relationship between the spectral density of states of the underlying bound-state soliton gas and the probability density function (PDF) of the intensity of the resulting turbulent wave field. The derived explicit integral representation for the PDF is shown to be in excellent agreement with direct numerical simulations across several representative regimes of fNLSE integrable turbulence. The results have broad applicability to physical systems including water waves, nonlinear optics, and superfluids.

ai.tldr: 提出半经典可积湍流中孤子气体分辨率的分析框架，建立束缚态孤子气体谱密度与湍流波场强度概率密度函数的关系。
ai.motivation: 理解由聚焦非线性薛定谔方程描述的随机非线性波场在孤子主导区域的长时统计特性。
ai.method: 发展孤子气体分辨率猜想，利用逆散射变换的随机类比，将谱密度与强度概率密度函数通过积分表示联系起来。
ai.result: 导出的概率密度函数显式积分表示与多个代表性区域的直接数值模拟高度吻合。
ai.help_to_user: 提供分析可积湍流中随机波场统计特性的通用框架，适用于水波、非线性光学和超流体等系统。

idea_spark.idea: 将逆散射变换的随机类比与机器学习结合，从实验数据中直接推断孤子气体谱密度。

en.motivation: To understand the long-time statistics of random nonlinear wave fields governed by the focusing nonlinear Schrödinger equation in soliton-dominated regimes.

idea_spark.risk: The semiclassical assumption may break down under strong nonlinearity or non-integrable perturbations; robustness needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the soliton gas concept, one could explore statistical descriptions of 'quasiparticle gases' in other nonlinear wave systems.

papers.title: Wick Renormalized Parabolic Stochastic Quantization Equations on Rough Metric Measure Spaces
papers.summary: On metric measure spaces with sub-Gaussian heat kernel behavior in small time, we obtain a sufficient condition to solve Wick renormalized stochastic quantization equations with polynomial interaction. Given the power of the nonlinearity, the local solution condition depends on the Hausdorff dimension $d_h$, the walk dimension $d_w$, and the maximal spatial Hölder regularity of the heat kernel $Θ$. A slightly more restrictive condition based on the same parameters is required for a global solution. For all global solutions, we construct an invariant measure for the Markov process defined by the solution. Our results apply to many rough spaces such as Barlow--Kigami type fractals as well as their Cartesian products and open up the possibility of making rigorous various structures in quantum field theory and statistical mechanics in non-integer dimensions. In the process, we build entirely from the short-time heat semigroup the necessary analytic framework that accommodates the issues which come with allowing rough local geometry.

ai.tldr: 在具有次高斯热核行为的粗糙度量测度空间上，得到了Wick重整化随机量子化方程的多项式相互作用局部和全局解的存在条件，并构造了不变测度。
ai.motivation: 将随机量子化方程推广到非整数维的粗糙空间（如分形），为量子场论和统计力学中的严格结构提供基础。
ai.method: 利用短时热半群建立分析框架，通过Hausdorff维数、行走维数和热核Hölder正则性参数给出解的条件。
ai.result: 得到了局部解和全局解的充分条件，并证明了全局解对应的马尔可夫过程存在不变测度。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了在粗糙度量测度空间上处理Wick重整化随机量子化方程的理论工具和存在性条件。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将类似的重整化方法应用于非整数维上的其他非线性随机偏微分方程。
idea_spark.risk: 粗糙空间的局部几何不规则性可能导致分析工具失效，需要更精细的正则性条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从分形上的热核估计出发，探索非整数维量子场论的新结构。

en.tldr: On rough metric measure spaces with sub-Gaussian heat kernel behavior, we obtain sufficient conditions for local and global solutions to Wick renormalized stochastic quantization equations with polynomial interaction, and construct an invariant measure.
en.motivation: To extend stochastic quantization equations to rough spaces with non-integer dimensions (e.g., fractals), providing a rigorous foundation for quantum field theory and statistical mechanics.
en.method: Build an analytic framework entirely from the short-time heat semigroup, using Hausdorff dimension, walk dimension, and maximal spatial Hölder regularity of the heat kernel to characterize solution conditions.
en.result: Sufficient conditions for local and global solutions are derived, and an invariant measure for the Markov process defined by the global solution is constructed.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical tools and existence conditions for handling Wick renormalized stochastic quantization equations on rough metric measure spaces.

idea_spark.risk: Irregular local geometry of rough spaces may cause analytic tools to fail, requiring more refined regularity conditions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Explore new structures of quantum field theory in non-integer dimensions starting from heat kernel estimates on fractals.

papers.title: SDFlow: Similarity-Driven Flow Matching for Time Series Generation
papers.summary: Vector quantization (VQ) with autoregressive (AR) token modeling is a widely adopted and highly competitive paradigm for time-series generation. However, such models are fundamentally limited by exposure bias: during inference, errors can accumulate across sequential predictions, leading to pronounced quality degradation in long-horizon generation. To address this, we propose SDFlow ($\textbf{S}$imilarity-$\textbf{D}$riven $\textbf{Flow}$ Matching), a non-autoregressive framework that operates entirely in the frozen VQ latent space and enables parallel sequence generation via flow matching. We tackle three key challenges in making this transition: (1) eliminating exposure bias by replacing step-wise token prediction with a global transport map; (2) mitigating the high-dimensionality of VQ token spaces via a low-rank manifold decomposition with a learned anchor prior over the latent manifold; and (3) incorporating discrete supervision into continuous transport dynamics by introducing a categorical posterior over codebook indices within a variational flow-matching formulation. Extensive experiments show that SDFlow achieves state-of-the-art performance, improving Discriminative Score and substantially reducing Context-FID, particularly for challenging long-sequence generation. Moreover, SDFlow provides significant inference speedups over autoregressive baselines, offering both high fidelity and computational efficiency. Code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/SDFlow-D6F3/

ai.tldr: 提出SDFlow，一种非自回归的流匹配框架，在冻结的VQ潜在空间中并行生成时间序列，消除曝光偏差，提升长序列生成质量与推理速度。
ai.motivation: 自回归VQ模型存在曝光偏差，长序列生成时误差累积导致质量下降。
ai.method: 在VQ潜在空间中使用流匹配进行并行序列生成，通过低秩流形分解降低维度，引入分类后验实现离散监督。
ai.result: 在判别分数和Context-FID上达到最先进性能，尤其长序列生成显著提升，推理速度大幅加快。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户高效生成高质量长序列时间序列数据，避免自回归模型的误差累积问题。

idea_spark.idea: 利用低秩流形分解和分类后验将离散监督融入连续流匹配，为离散数据生成提供新思路。
idea_spark.risk: 低秩假设可能限制复杂序列的表示能力，分类后验的引入增加训练复杂度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从连续归一化流与离散表示的融合中获得启发，探索非自回归生成范式。

en.tldr: Proposes SDFlow, a non-autoregressive flow matching framework that generates time series in parallel within a frozen VQ latent space, eliminating exposure bias and improving long-sequence quality and inference speed.
en.motivation: Autoregressive VQ models suffer from exposure bias, causing error accumulation and quality degradation in long-horizon generation.
en.method: Employs flow matching in the VQ latent space for parallel sequence generation, reduces dimensionality via low-rank manifold decomposition, and incorporates discrete supervision through a categorical posterior.
en.result: Achieves state-of-the-art performance on Discriminative Score and Context-FID, especially for long sequences, with significant inference speedups.
en.help_to_user: Helps users generate high-quality long time series efficiently, avoiding error accumulation of autoregressive models.

idea_spark.idea: Using low-rank manifold decomposition and categorical posterior to integrate discrete supervision into continuous flow matching offers a new approach for discrete data generation.
idea_spark.risk: The low-rank assumption may limit representation of complex sequences; categorical posterior adds training complexity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the fusion of continuous normalizing flows and discrete representations, exploring non-autoregressive generation paradigms.

papers.title: Pro-Tensor Network
papers.summary: We introduce the pro-tensor network, a categorification of the tensor network, as a fully rigorous yet graphically transparent framework for studying the collection of many many-body theories, which we dub many-many-body theory. We provide a comprehensive toolbox for the graphical calculations using pro-tensor networks. As applications, we recover the Levin-Wen model as a "uniform" pro-tensor network and generalize a result of Kitaev and Kong by characterizing particles as modules over promonads. One can also interpret the string-net pro-tensor network as the space of symmetric tensor networks, thus our framework also applies to the study of generalized symmetry and topological holography. Notably, our generalization dispenses with the assumptions of semisimplicity, finiteness, and rigidity, potentially facilitating the exploration of many-body physics beyond these constraints.

ai.tldr: 提出了pro-张量网络作为张量网络的范畴化，为研究多体理论集合提供了严格且图形透明的框架。
ai.motivation: 现有张量网络框架在处理非半单、非有限、非刚性多体系统时存在局限，需要更一般的数学结构。
ai.method: 通过范畴化张量网络引入pro-张量网络，并建立图形计算工具箱。
ai.result: 恢复了Levin-Wen模型作为均匀pro-张量网络，推广了Kitaev-Kong的结果，将粒子刻画为promonad上的模，并解释了弦网pro-张量网络与对称张量网络的关系。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究广义对称性和拓扑全息术提供了统一框架，可处理超越传统假设的多体物理问题。

idea_spark.idea: 利用promonad模刻画任意子激发，可能为拓扑量子计算提供新模型。
idea_spark.risk: 非半单范畴的计算复杂性可能阻碍实际应用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将张量网络视为范畴对象，启发用范畴论重新审视其他数值方法。

en.tldr: Proposes the pro-tensor network as a categorification of tensor networks, providing a rigorous and graphically transparent framework for studying collections of many-body theories.
en.motivation: Existing tensor network frameworks have limitations when dealing with non-semisimple, non-finite, and non-rigid many-body systems, necessitating a more general mathematical structure.
en.method: Introduces pro-tensor networks via categorification of tensor networks and develops a comprehensive graphical calculus toolbox.
en.result: Recovers the Levin-Wen model as a uniform pro-tensor network, generalizes Kitaev-Kong's result by characterizing particles as modules over promonads, and interprets the string-net pro-tensor network as the space of symmetric tensor networks.
en.help_to_user: Provides a unified framework for studying generalized symmetry and topological holography, enabling exploration of many-body physics beyond conventional assumptions.

idea_spark.idea: Using promonad modules to characterize anyonic excitations may lead to new models for topological quantum computing.
idea_spark.risk: Computational complexity of non-semisimple categories may hinder practical applications.
idea_spark.inspiration: Viewing tensor networks as categorical objects inspires rethinking other numerical methods through category theory.

papers.title: A Computationally Tractable Path-Planning Method for Airborne Wind Energy Systems
papers.summary: Airborne Wind Energy Systems (AWES) have emerged as a promising renewable energy technology that exploits stronger, more consistent high-altitude winds via tethered airborne devices. Among the various concepts, crosswind systems, where efficient flight control is essential to maximise energy output, offer significant potential. This paper addresses the problem of reference selection for crosswind flight control, focusing on the design of power-maximising geometric flight paths for the reel-out phase of Groundgen systems.   To overcome the computational challenges associated with optimal control approaches, a computationally tractable framework is proposed in which a path-planning problem is formulated as a nonlinear program. The method optimises the parameters of a Lissajous curve to maximise the average power production over the reel-out phase, while incorporating curvature constraints. The proposed approach provides an efficient alternative to existing optimal control and learning-based methods.

ai.tldr: 提出一种计算高效的路径规划方法，用于优化地面发电型空中风能系统放线阶段的几何飞行路径，以最大化平均功率输出。

ai.result: 该方法在保证计算效率的同时，有效提升放线阶段的平均功率。

en.tldr: Proposes a computationally tractable path-planning method that optimizes Lissajous curve parameters via nonlinear programming to maximize average power during the reel-out phase of groundgen airborne wind energy systems.
en.motivation: Airborne wind energy systems require efficient flight control for power maximization, but optimal control approaches are computationally expensive.
en.method: Formulates path planning as a nonlinear program optimizing Lissajous curve parameters with curvature constraints.
en.result: The method provides an efficient alternative to optimal control and learning-based methods, enhancing average power output.
en.help_to_user: Offers a fast and practical reference trajectory generation scheme for flight control of airborne wind energy systems.

idea_spark.idea: Combine machine learning to predict wind field changes and dynamically adjust Lissajous curve parameters.
idea_spark.risk: Simplified model may ignore real wind stochasticity and system dynamic coupling.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining geometric curve optimization with real-time control inspires trajectory design for other renewable energy systems.

papers.title: GCCM: Enhancing Generative Graph Prediction via Contrastive Consistency Model
papers.summary: Conditional generative models, particularly diffusion-based methods, have recently been applied to graph prediction by modeling the target as a conditional distribution given the input graph, yielding competitive results compared to deterministic predictor. However, existing diffusion-based prediction methods typically require expensive iterative denoising at inference and often suffer from unstable sampling, which motivates recent efforts to reduce inference denoising steps and enable stable sampling via techniques such as consistency training. Despite this progress, we find that existing consistency training methods for graph prediction could potentially fall into a shortcut solution: the model may attempt to satisfy the self-consistency constraint by ignoring the noisy target (i.e., assigning it negligible weight), ultimately collapsing into a purely deterministic predictor. To mitigate such shortcut solution, we propose GCCM, a graph contrastive consistency model that goes beyond isolated pairwise matching between the same target at different noise levels by introducing negative pairs into a contrastive consistency objective. This adds an additional separation requirement, making the shortcut solution no longer trivially sufficient to satisfy the proposed objective. Moreover, we apply feature perturbation to the input node/edge features to break identical conditioning on the input graph, so that the shortcut no longer yields the same predictions across noise levels and becomes less attractive. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate that GCCM mitigates the shortcut solution and yields consistent performance improvements in graph prediction compared to deterministic predictors.

ai.tldr: 提出GCCM，通过对比一致性目标缓解图预测中一致性训练的捷径解问题。
ai.motivation: 现有扩散图预测方法推理慢、采样不稳定；一致性训练虽能加速，但易陷入捷径解（忽略噪声目标，退化为确定性预测）。
ai.method: 引入负样本对构建对比一致性目标，迫使模型区分不同噪声级别的目标；同时对输入图特征施加扰动，打破相同条件，使捷径解失效。
ai.result: 在基准数据集上，GCCM有效缓解捷径解，性能持续优于确定性预测器。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种改进图预测生成模型稳定性和效率的思路，尤其适用于需要快速可靠推理的场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将对比学习与一致性训练结合，通过负样本和特征扰动强制模型学习有意义的噪声-目标映射。
idea_spark.risk: 负样本选择策略可能影响效果；特征扰动需谨慎设计以避免破坏关键信息。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从对比学习避免表示坍塌的思路出发，解决生成模型中的捷径解问题。

en.tldr: Proposes GCCM, which mitigates shortcut solutions in consistency training for graph prediction via a contrastive consistency objective.
en.motivation: Existing diffusion-based graph prediction methods suffer from slow inference and unstable sampling; consistency training accelerates but often collapses into a shortcut solution (ignoring noisy targets, degenerating to deterministic prediction).
en.method: Introduces negative pairs into a contrastive consistency objective to force discrimination between targets at different noise levels; applies feature perturbation to input graph features to break identical conditioning, making the shortcut less attractive.
en.result: On benchmark datasets, GCCM effectively mitigates the shortcut solution and yields consistent performance improvements over deterministic predictors.
en.help_to_user: Provides a way to improve the stability and efficiency of generative graph prediction models, especially for applications requiring fast and reliable inference.

idea_spark.idea: Combine contrastive learning with consistency training, using negative samples and feature perturbation to force the model to learn meaningful noise-target mappings.
idea_spark.risk: Negative sample selection strategy may affect performance; feature perturbation must be carefully designed to avoid destroying critical information.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draws from contrastive learning's ability to avoid representation collapse to address shortcut solutions in generative models.

papers.title: Render, Don't Decode: Weight-Space World Models with Latent Structural Disentanglement
papers.summary: Training world models on vast quantities of unlabelled videos is a critical step toward fully autonomous intelligence. However, the prevailing paradigm of encoding raw pixels into opaque latent spaces and relying on heavy decoders for reconstruction leaves these models computationally expensive and uninterpretable. We address this problem by introducing NOVA, a world modelling framework that represents the system state as the weights and biases of an auxiliary coordinate-based implicit neural representation (INR). This structured representation is analytically rendered, which eliminates the decoder bottleneck while conferring compactness, portability, and zero-shot super-resolution. Furthermore, like most latent action models, NOVA can be distilled into a context-dependent video generator via an action-matching objective. Surprisingly, without resorting to auxiliary losses or adversarial objectives, NOVA can disentangle structural scene components such as background, foreground, and inter-frame motion, enabling users to edit either content or dynamics without compromising the other. We validate our framework on several challenging datasets, achieving strong controllable forecasting while operating on a single consumer GPU at $\sim$40M parameters. Ultimately, structured representations like INRs not only enhance our understanding of latent dynamics but also pave the way for immersive and customisable virtual experiences.

ai.tldr: 提出NOVA框架，用坐标基隐式神经表示的权重作为系统状态，实现可解析渲染的世界模型，消除解码器瓶颈，并实现结构解耦。
ai.motivation: 现有世界模型依赖编码-解码范式，计算昂贵且不可解释，缺乏结构解耦能力。
ai.method: 将系统状态表示为辅助坐标基隐式神经表示的权重，通过解析渲染替代解码器；使用动作匹配目标蒸馏为视频生成器。
ai.result: 在单消费级GPU上以约40M参数实现强可控预测，零样本超分辨率，并解耦背景、前景和帧间运动。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种高效、可解释、可编辑的世界模型构建方法，适用于视频预测和虚拟体验定制。

idea_spark.idea: 利用隐式神经表示的权重作为状态，结合解析渲染，实现结构解耦和高效推理。
idea_spark.risk: 权重空间维度可能随场景复杂度增长，需验证可扩展性；解耦效果依赖数据分布。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将模型参数视为可编辑的表示，启发新的可控生成和交互式模拟范式。

en.tldr: Proposes NOVA, a world model that represents system state as weights of an auxiliary coordinate-based implicit neural representation, enabling analytic rendering to eliminate the decoder bottleneck and achieve structural disentanglement.
en.motivation: Existing world models rely on encode-decode paradigms that are computationally expensive, uninterpretable, and lack structural disentanglement.
en.method: Represents system state as weights of a coordinate-based INR, uses analytic rendering instead of a decoder, and distills into a video generator via action-matching objective.
en.result: Achieves strong controllable forecasting on a single consumer GPU with ~40M parameters, zero-shot super-resolution, and disentanglement of background, foreground, and inter-frame motion.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient, interpretable, and editable world model for video prediction and customizable virtual experiences.

idea_spark.idea: Use INR weights as state representation with analytic rendering to achieve structural disentanglement and efficient inference.
idea_spark.risk: Weight-space dimensionality may scale with scene complexity; disentanglement quality depends on data distribution.
idea_spark.inspiration: Treating model parameters as editable representations inspires new controllable generation and interactive simulation paradigms.

papers.title: R2H-Diff: Guided Spectral Diffusion Model for RGB-to-Hyperspectral Reconstruction
papers.summary: RGB-to-hyperspectral image reconstruction is a highly ill-posed inverse problem, since multiple plausible spectral distributions may correspond to the same RGB observation. Existing regression-based methods usually learn a deterministic mapping, which limits their ability to model reconstruction uncertainty and often leads to over-smoothed spectral responses. Although diffusion models provide strong distribution modeling capability, their direct application to hyperspectral reconstruction remains challenging due to the high spectral dimensionality, strong inter-band correlations, and strict requirement for spectral fidelity. To this end, we propose R2H-Diff, an efficient diffusion-based framework tailored for RGB-to-HSI reconstruction. Specifically, R2H-Diff formulates spectral recovery as a conditional iterative refinement process, enabling progressive reconstruction under RGB guidance. We proposed a Guided Spectral Refinement Module for RGB-conditioned feature fusion and a Hyperspectral-Adaptive Transposed Attention module for efficient spatial--spectral dependency modeling. Furthermore, a normalization-free denoising backbone is adopted to preserve spectral amplitude consistency, while a task-adapted linear noise schedule enables high-quality reconstruction with only five denoising steps. Extensive experiments on NTIRE2022, CAVE, and Harvard demonstrate that R2H-Diff achieves a favorable balance between reconstruction quality and computational efficiency. Notably, on NTIRE2022, R2H-Diff obtains 35.37 dB PSNR with a sub-million-parameter model of 0.58M parameters and 12.25G FLOPs, achieving the lowest model complexity among the evaluated methods while maintaining strong reconstruction fidelity.

ai.tldr: 提出R2H-Diff扩散模型，用于RGB到高光谱图像重建，仅需5步去噪即可实现高质量重建，模型参数仅0.58M。
ai.motivation: 现有回归方法无法建模重建不确定性，直接应用扩散模型面临高光谱维度高、波段间相关性强、光谱保真度要求严格等挑战。
ai.method: 将光谱恢复建模为条件迭代细化过程，设计引导光谱细化模块和超光谱自适应转置注意力，采用无归一化去噪主干和任务自适应线性噪声调度。
ai.result: 在NTIRE2022上PSNR达35.37 dB，模型参数0.58M，FLOPs 12.25G，在低复杂度下保持高保真度。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种高效的高光谱重建方法，适合资源受限场景。

idea_spark.idea: 利用任务自适应噪声调度大幅减少扩散步数，同时保持重建质量。
idea_spark.risk: 对噪声调度和注意力机制的泛化性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 无归一化设计可启发其他保幅度的生成任务。

idea_spark.inspiration: 无归一化设计可启发其他保幅度的生成任务。

en.tldr: Proposes R2H-Diff, a diffusion model for RGB-to-hyperspectral reconstruction, achieving high-quality results with only 5 denoising steps and 0.58M parameters.
en.motivation: Regression methods fail to model uncertainty; direct diffusion application struggles with high spectral dimensionality, strong inter-band correlations, and strict spectral fidelity.
en.method: Formulates spectral recovery as conditional iterative refinement, with Guided Spectral Refinement Module, Hyperspectral-Adaptive Transposed Attention, normalization-free backbone, and task-adapted linear noise schedule.
en.result: On NTIRE2022, achieves 35.37 dB PSNR with 0.58M parameters and 12.25G FLOPs, balancing quality and efficiency.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient hyperspectral reconstruction method suitable for resource-constrained settings.

idea_spark.idea: Task-adapted noise schedule drastically reduces diffusion steps while maintaining reconstruction quality.
idea_spark.risk: Generalizability of noise schedule and attention mechanisms needs further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Normalization-free design may inspire other amplitude-preserving generation tasks.

papers.title: Martingale Methods for Maximal Large Deviations and Young Towers
papers.summary: We develop a martingale approximation framework yielding quantitative maximal large deviations estimates for invertible dynamical systems. From suitable decay of correlations, we deduce these estimates and, as an application, we obtain Young structures with matching recurrence tails for partially hyperbolic diffeomorphisms with mostly expanding central direction. In a second application, we prove maximal large deviation estimates for systems modelled by Young towers with subexponential contraction and expansion. Many examples of slowly mixing billiards are covered by this result.

ai.tldr: 提出鞅逼近框架，从相关性衰减导出极大偏差估计，并应用于部分双曲微分同胚和次指数收缩扩张的Young塔系统。
ai.motivation: 为可逆动力系统建立定量极大偏差估计的统一方法，并推广到慢混合台球等系统。
ai.method: 利用鞅逼近将相关性衰减转化为极大偏差估计，结合Young塔结构处理次指数收缩扩张。
ai.result: 得到部分双曲微分同胚的Young塔递归尾匹配，以及次指数收缩扩张系统的极大偏差估计。
ai.help_to_user: 提供鞅方法在动力系统大偏差中的系统化应用，适合研究慢混合或部分双曲系统的学者。

idea_spark.idea: 将鞅方法与Young塔结合，处理非指数混合系统的极大偏差。
idea_spark.risk: 对相关性衰减条件要求严格，可能不适用于弱混合系统。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发利用鞅方法研究其他非指数混合系统的极限定理。

en.tldr: Develops a martingale approximation framework yielding quantitative maximal large deviations estimates for invertible dynamical systems, applied to partially hyperbolic diffeomorphisms and Young towers with subexponential contraction.
en.motivation: To provide a unified method for quantitative maximal large deviations in invertible systems, extending to slowly mixing billiards.
en.method: Uses martingale approximation to convert decay of correlations into maximal large deviations estimates, combined with Young tower structures for subexponential contraction and expansion.
en.result: Obtains Young structures with matching recurrence tails for partially hyperbolic diffeomorphisms and maximal large deviation estimates for subexponential Young towers.
en.help_to_user: Offers a systematic martingale approach to large deviations in dynamical systems, useful for researchers studying slow mixing or partially hyperbolic systems.

idea_spark.idea: Combine martingale methods with Young towers to handle maximal large deviations in non-exponentially mixing systems.
idea_spark.risk: The conditions on decay of correlations may be too restrictive for weakly mixing systems.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires the use of martingale techniques for limit theorems in other non-exponential mixing systems.

papers.title: The Efron-Stein inequality for identically distributed pairs
papers.summary: We prove that the classical Efron--Stein inequality holds for independent exchangeable pairs \((X_i,Y_i)\). The same inequality fails for independent identically distributed pairs; a simple trigonometric counterexample shows that the trivial Cauchy--Schwarz bound of factor \(n\) is sharp. When each random variable takes at most \(k_i\) values, a useful bound still holds with explicit constant \(ρ(k)\le\max_i k_i/2\).

ai.tldr: 证明了经典Efron-Stein不等式对独立可交换对成立，但对独立同分布对不成立，并给出了一个三角函数反例说明Cauchy-Schwarz界是紧的。
ai.motivation: 研究Efron-Stein不等式在更一般的配对结构下的适用性。
ai.method: 通过构造反例和推导有限支撑下的显式常数来证明。
ai.result: 独立同分布对情形下不等式不成立，且Cauchy-Schwarz界因子n是紧的；当变量取值有限时，有显式常数界。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解Efron-Stein不等式的适用范围和紧性。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑用类似三角函数构造检验其他概率不等式在非交换对下的表现。
idea_spark.risk: 反例可能过于特殊，难以直接推广到一般分布。
idea_spark.inspiration: 有限支撑下的显式常数提示可对离散分布设计更紧的界。

en.tldr: The classical Efron-Stein inequality holds for independent exchangeable pairs but fails for independent identically distributed pairs; a trigonometric counterexample shows the Cauchy-Schwarz bound is sharp.
en.motivation: To investigate the applicability of the Efron-Stein inequality under more general pairing structures.
en.method: By constructing a counterexample and deriving explicit constants for finite support.
en.result: The inequality fails for i.i.d. pairs, the Cauchy-Schwarz factor n is sharp, and a useful bound with explicit constant holds when variables take finitely many values.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the scope and sharpness of the Efron-Stein inequality.

idea_spark.idea: Consider using similar trigonometric constructions to test other probability inequalities under non-exchangeable pairs.
idea_spark.risk: The counterexample may be too specific to generalize to arbitrary distributions.
idea_spark.inspiration: The explicit constant for finite support suggests designing tighter bounds for discrete distributions.

papers.title: Logarithmic Mixing of Random Walks on Dynamical Random Cluster Models
papers.summary: We study random walks on dynamically evolving graphs, where the environment is given by a time-dependent subset of the edges of an underlying graph. Concretely, following the recently introduced framework of Lelli and Stauffer, we consider a random walk interacting with a dynamical random-cluster environment, in which edges are updated with rate $μ>0$ according to Glauber dynamics with parameters $p$ and $q$, and the walker moves at rate 1 but may only traverse edges that are present at the time of the move. This setting introduces strong dependencies between the walk and the environment, as edge-update probabilities depend on the global connectivity structure.   We focus on the case where the underlying graph is a random $d$-regular graph and the parameters lie in the subcritical regime $p < p_{\mathrm{u}}(q, d)$ where it is known that the Glauber dynamics mixes quickly. Our main result is to show that for any $\varepsilon >0$ and all $q \ge 1$, for all $p$ in the subcritical regime, the mixing time of the joint process is $Θ(\log n)$ (in continuous time) whenever $μ\geq \varepsilon \log n$. This matches the mixing time of the simple random walk on a static random regular graph, showing that in this regime the evolving environment does not slow down mixing. Our proof is based on a coupling argument that uses path-count techniques to overcome the dependencies in the edge dynamics by controlling the structure of the environment along typical trajectories.

ai.tldr: 研究在动态随机团簇环境中随机游走的混合时间，证明在亚临界参数下，当环境更新速率足够快时，联合过程的混合时间为Θ(log n)，与静态图上的简单随机游走相同。
ai.motivation: 理解动态图环境中随机游走的混合行为，特别是环境演化如何影响游走的混合时间。
ai.method: 采用耦合论证和路径计数技术，控制环境沿典型轨迹的结构，克服边动力学中的依赖关系。
ai.result: 对于任意ε>0和q≥1，在亚临界区域p < p_u(q,d)内，当μ ≥ ε log n时，联合过程的混合时间为Θ(log n)。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了动态随机环境中随机游走混合时间的理论界限，有助于设计高效的马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛算法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用环境快速更新来解耦游走与环境之间的依赖，从而简化分析。
idea_spark.risk: 结果依赖于亚临界假设和随机正则图结构，可能不适用于临界或超临界区域。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑将类似方法应用于社交网络或交通网络中的动态过程分析。

en.tldr: We study the mixing time of random walks on dynamically evolving graphs under a dynamical random cluster model, showing that in the subcritical regime with sufficiently fast environment updates, the mixing time is Θ(log n), matching that on static random regular graphs.
en.motivation: To understand how an evolving environment affects the mixing of random walks, especially under strong dependencies between walk and environment.
en.method: We use a coupling argument combined with path-count techniques to control the environment structure along typical trajectories, overcoming dependencies in edge dynamics.
en.result: For any ε>0 and all q≥1, in the subcritical regime p < p_u(q,d), when μ ≥ ε log n, the mixing time of the joint process is Θ(log n).
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical guarantees for mixing times in dynamic random environments, useful for designing efficient MCMC algorithms.

idea_spark.idea: Exploit fast environment updates to decouple walk-environment dependencies, simplifying analysis.
idea_spark.risk: Results rely on subcritical regime and random regular graph structure; may not hold in critical or supercritical regimes.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider applying similar methods to analyze dynamic processes in social or transportation networks.

papers.title: Algorithmic Phase Transition for Large Independent Sets in Dense Hypergraphs
papers.summary: We study the algorithmic tractability of finding large independent sets in dense random hypergraphs. In the sparse regime, much of the natural algorithms can be formulated within either the local or the low-degree polynomial (LDP) framework, and a rich literature has subsequently identified nearly sharp algorithmic thresholds within these classes by exploiting their stability. In the dense setting, however, the algorithmic paradigms are fundamentally different: they are online and thus need not be stable. Perhaps more crucially, even for the classical Erdős-Rényi random graph $G(n,p)$, LDPs are conjectured to fail in the 'easy' regime accessible to online algorithms, thereby challenging their viability for dense models.   Our focus is on two models: (i) finding large independent sets in dense $r$-uniform Erdős-Rényi hypergraphs, and (ii) the more challenging problem of finding large $γ$-balanced independent sets in dense $r$-uniform $r$-partite hypergraphs, where the $i$-th coordinate of $γ\in\mathbb{Q}^r$ specifies the proportion of vertices from $V_i$ in the independent set. For both models, we pinpoint the size of the largest independent set and design online algorithms that achieve a multiplicative approximation factor of $r^{1/(r-1)}$ in the uniform and $(\max_i γ_i)^{-1/(r-1)}$ in the $r$-partite model. Furthermore, we establish matching algorithmic lower bounds, showing that these computational gaps are sharp: no online algorithms can breach these gaps.

ai.tldr: 研究了稠密随机超图中寻找大独立集的算法可处理性，确定了最大独立集的大小，并设计了在线算法，同时证明了匹配的算法下界。
ai.motivation: 在稀疏超图中，局部算法和低次多项式框架已取得显著进展，但稠密场景下的算法范式完全不同（在线且无需稳定），且经典Erdős–Rényi图上的低次多项式被推测在在线算法可处理的“容易”区域失效，因此需要专门研究稠密超图的算法极限。
ai.method: 针对两种模型（均匀r-部Erdős–Rényi超图和γ-平衡独立集问题），通过理论分析确定最大独立集大小，设计在线算法并证明其乘法近似因子，同时建立匹配的算法下界。
ai.result: 在均匀模型中达到乘法近似因子r^{1/(r-1)}，在r-部模型中达到(\max_i γ_i)^{-1/(r-1)}，且这些间隙是紧的——没有在线算法能突破。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解稠密随机超图中独立集问题的算法可处理性边界，以及在线算法在此类问题中的能力与局限。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将在线算法与随机图上的相变理论结合，设计针对稠密超图的其他组合问题（如最大匹配、最小顶点覆盖）的近似算法。
idea_spark.risk: 在线算法在稠密场景下的最优性可能依赖于超图的具体随机模型，推广到一般稠密图时可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受“算法相变”概念启发，可探索其他组合问题在稠密随机模型中的算法可处理性相变现象。

en.tldr: Studies the algorithmic tractability of finding large independent sets in dense random hypergraphs, pinpoints the size of the largest independent set, designs online algorithms, and establishes matching lower bounds.
en.motivation: In sparse hypergraphs, local and low-degree polynomial frameworks have achieved significant progress, but dense settings require fundamentally different online algorithms that need not be stable. Moreover, LDPs are conjectured to fail in the 'easy' regime accessible to online algorithms even for classical Erdős–Rényi graphs, motivating a dedicated study of dense hypergraphs.
en.method: For two models (uniform r-partite Erdős–Rényi hypergraphs and γ-balanced independent sets), we determine the size of the largest independent set, design online algorithms with multiplicative approximation factors, and prove matching algorithmic lower bounds.
en.result: Achieves approximation factor r^{1/(r-1)} in the uniform model and (\max_i γ_i)^{-1/(r-1)} in the r-partite model, and these gaps are sharp—no online algorithm can breach them.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the algorithmic tractability boundaries for independent set problems in dense random hypergraphs, and the capabilities and limitations of online algorithms in such problems.

idea_spark.idea: Combine online algorithms with phase transition theory in random graphs to design approximation algorithms for other combinatorial problems on dense hypergraphs (e.g., maximum matching, minimum vertex cover).
idea_spark.risk: Optimality of online algorithms in dense settings may depend on the specific random hypergraph model and may fail when generalized to arbitrary dense graphs.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the concept of 'algorithmic phase transition', explore phase transition phenomena for algorithmic tractability of other combinatorial problems in dense random models.

papers.title: XDecomposer: Learning Prior-Free Set Decomposition for Multiphase X-ray Diffraction
papers.summary: Multiphase powder X-ray diffraction (PXRD) analysis remains a fundamental bottleneck in structure identification, as real-world synthesis often produces complex mixtures whose constituent phases (components) cannot be reliably disentangled. While recent advances in representation-based crystal retrieval and generation suggest the possibility of inferring structures directly from PXRD, existing approaches largely assume single-phase inputs and break down in multiphase settings. Here, we present XDecomposer, a prior-free framework for joint decomposition and identification of multiphase XRD patterns without requiring candidate phase lists, structural templates, or prior knowledge of phase number. We formulate multiphase diffraction analysis as a set prediction problem, where the model infers an unordered set of phase-resolved components, their mixture proportions, and corresponding structural representations within a unified architecture. A phase-query-driven decomposition mechanism, together with diffraction-consistent physical reconstruction, enables accurate source separation while preserving crystallographic fidelity. Extensive experiments on both simulated and experimental datasets show that XDecomposer substantially improves reconstruction accuracy and phase identification across diverse chemical systems, while maintaining strong generalization to unseen mixtures. These results provide a practical route toward data-driven, source-resolved multiphase XRD analysis and reduce long-standing dependence on prior-guided iteratively phase matching. The code is openly available at https://github.com/Licht0812/XDecomposer

ai.tldr: 提出XDecomposer，一种无需先验的多相XRD分解与识别框架，将多相衍射分析建模为集合预测问题，实现无候选列表的相位分离与结构推断。
ai.motivation: 真实合成样品常为多相混合物，现有单相假设的XRD分析方法无法可靠分解，且依赖先验相位列表或模板，限制了自动化结构识别。
ai.method: 将多相衍射分析转化为集合预测任务，通过相位查询驱动分解机制和衍射一致性物理重建，同时推断无序相位集合、混合比例及对应结构表示。
ai.result: 在模拟和实验数据集上，XDecomposer显著提升重建精度和相位识别能力，对未见混合物保持强泛化性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户自动分解复杂多相XRD图谱，无需先验知识即可识别各相结构及比例，加速材料表征流程。

idea_spark.idea: 结合扩散模型或变分自编码器生成缺失相的结构候选，进一步提升未知相识别能力。
idea_spark.risk: 对高度重叠或噪声严重的衍射峰，分解可能不唯一，需引入额外物理约束或不确定性量化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受目标检测中集合预测（如DETR）启发，将相位视为可学习查询，实现端到端多相分析。

en.tldr: Proposes XDecomposer, a prior-free framework for multiphase XRD decomposition and identification, formulating the problem as set prediction to achieve phase separation and structure inference without candidate lists.
en.motivation: Real-world synthesized samples are often multiphase mixtures, and existing single-phase XRD methods fail to reliably disentangle components, relying on prior phase lists or templates, hindering automated structure identification.
en.method: Formulates multiphase diffraction analysis as a set prediction problem, using a phase-query-driven decomposition mechanism and diffraction-consistent physical reconstruction to jointly infer an unordered set of phases, their proportions, and structural representations.
en.result: On simulated and experimental datasets, XDecomposer substantially improves reconstruction accuracy and phase identification, with strong generalization to unseen mixtures.
en.help_to_user: Helps users automatically decompose complex multiphase XRD patterns, identifying each phase's structure and proportion without prior knowledge, accelerating materials characterization.

idea_spark.idea: Combine with diffusion models or variational autoencoders to generate structural candidates for missing phases, further enhancing unknown phase identification.
idea_spark.risk: For heavily overlapping or noisy diffraction peaks, decomposition may be non-unique, requiring additional physical constraints or uncertainty quantification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by set prediction in object detection (e.g., DETR), treating phases as learnable queries for end-to-end multiphase analysis.

papers.title: Back to the Beginning of Heuristic Design: Bridging Code and Knowledge with LLMs
papers.summary: Large language models (LLMs) have recently advanced automatic heuristic design (AHD) for combinatorial optimization (CO), where candidate heuristics are iteratively proposed, evaluated, and refined. Most existing approaches search over executable programs and distill insights from execution feedback to guide later iterations. Because this process moves from low-level implementations to high-level principles, we refer to it as a bottom-up paradigm. We argue that this view is incomplete and introduce a complementary top-down perspective: knowledge becomes the primary search object and code merely instantiates and tests it, making what is learned explicit and reusable across problems and trajectories. We formalize this shift through a statistical-learning view that exposes a distortion--compression trade-off, and instantiate it in both population-based and tree-based AHD frameworks. Across CO and tasks beyond it, knowledge-first search improves discovery efficiency, transfer, and generalization, often outperforming code-centric pipelines, while combining both strategies yields further gains. Our results suggest that progress in AHD depends on iteratively constructing and evolving interpretable hypotheses that retain value beyond a single search trajectory.

ai.tldr: 提出一种知识优先的启发式设计范式，将知识作为主要搜索对象，代码仅用于实例化和测试，以提高发现效率、可迁移性和泛化能力。
ai.motivation: 现有自动启发式设计方法多采用自底向上的代码搜索范式，从低级实现中提炼高级原则，但忽略了知识本身的显式表达和跨问题复用。
ai.method: 通过统计学习视角形式化知识优先的搜索，引入失真-压缩权衡，并在基于种群和基于树的框架中实例化，结合代码与知识两种策略。
ai.result: 在组合优化及其他任务上，知识优先搜索优于纯代码中心管线，且两种策略结合可进一步提升性能。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何利用大语言模型将领域知识显式化，从而更高效地设计启发式算法。

idea_spark.idea: 将启发式设计中的知识显式建模为可解释的假设，并利用LLM进行迭代演化，可能催生新的自动算法设计框架。
idea_spark.risk: 知识表示的质量和完整性可能成为瓶颈，过度抽象可能导致搜索空间过大或丢失关键细节。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受统计学习中的率失真理论启发，将启发式设计视为知识压缩与保真度的权衡过程。

idea_spark.risk: 知识表示的质量和完整性可能成为瓶颈，过度抽象可能导致搜索空间过大或丢失关键细节。

en.tldr: Proposes a knowledge-first heuristic design paradigm where knowledge is the primary search object and code merely instantiates it, improving discovery efficiency, transfer, and generalization.
en.motivation: Existing automatic heuristic design methods follow a bottom-up code search paradigm, extracting high-level principles from low-level implementations, but neglect explicit knowledge representation and cross-problem reuse.
en.method: Formalizes knowledge-first search via a statistical-learning view introducing a distortion-compression trade-off, instantiated in population-based and tree-based frameworks, combining both code and knowledge strategies.
en.result: On combinatorial optimization and beyond, knowledge-first search outperforms code-centric pipelines, and combining both strategies yields further gains.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to leverage LLMs to make domain knowledge explicit for more efficient heuristic design.

idea_spark.idea: Explicitly modeling knowledge as interpretable hypotheses and iteratively evolving them with LLMs may lead to novel automatic algorithm design frameworks.
idea_spark.risk: Quality and completeness of knowledge representation may become bottlenecks; excessive abstraction could enlarge search space or lose critical details.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by rate-distortion theory in statistical learning, viewing heuristic design as a trade-off between knowledge compression and fidelity.

papers.title: Dynamical cooling driven by self-similar fronts in the 2D nonlinear Schrödinger model
papers.summary: We analyze the dynamics towards partial thermalization and subsequent cooling in the defocusing two-dimensional nonlinear Schrödinger model, using direct simulations and insights from the wave-kinetic equations (WKE) and a fourth-order differential approximation model (DAM). We show that the evolving WKE spectrum exhibits two distinct similarity ranges--the quasi-thermal core and the ultraviolet tail--whereas in the DAM, an additional range of infrared self-similarity appears. By stretching the quasi-thermal region, the self-similar fronts drive an effective dynamical cooling process towards the formal but ill-defined equilibrium state at vanishing temperature--analogous to an ultraviolet catastrophe in a system of classical waves.

ai.tldr: 分析了二维非线性薛定谔模型中自相似前沿驱动的动力学冷却过程，该过程趋向于零温平衡态，类似于经典波系统中的紫外灾难。
ai.motivation: 理解二维非线性薛定谔模型中部分热化后的冷却动力学及其与波动力学方程和近似模型的关系。
ai.method: 使用直接数值模拟、波动力学方程和四阶微分近似模型进行分析。
ai.result: 发现波动力学方程谱呈现准热核心和紫外尾两个相似区域，而近似模型还出现红外自相似区域；自相似前沿拉伸准热区域，驱动有效的动力学冷却。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了关于非线性波系统中非平衡动力学和自相似行为的深入见解。

idea_spark.idea: 探索在实验或数值模拟中如何利用自相似前沿控制或加速冷却过程。
idea_spark.risk: 模型简化可能忽略实际系统中的耗散或量子效应，导致预测偏差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从经典波系统的紫外灾难类比中，可启发对有限温度平衡态定义的新思考。

en.tldr: Analyzes dynamical cooling driven by self-similar fronts in the 2D nonlinear Schrödinger model, tending toward a zero-temperature equilibrium state analogous to an ultraviolet catastrophe in classical waves.
en.motivation: To understand the cooling dynamics after partial thermalization in the 2D nonlinear Schrödinger model and its relation to wave-kinetic and approximate models.
en.method: Direct numerical simulations, wave-kinetic equations, and a fourth-order differential approximation model.
en.result: The WKE spectrum shows two similarity ranges (quasi-thermal core and ultraviolet tail), while the DAM adds an infrared self-similar range; self-similar fronts stretch the quasi-thermal region, driving dynamical cooling.
en.help_to_user: Provides insights into nonequilibrium dynamics and self-similar behavior in nonlinear wave systems.

idea_spark.idea: Explore how self-similar fronts can be used to control or accelerate cooling in experiments or simulations.
idea_spark.risk: Model simplifications may neglect dissipation or quantum effects in real systems, leading to prediction biases.
idea_spark.inspiration: The analogy to the ultraviolet catastrophe in classical waves inspires new thinking on the definition of finite-temperature equilibrium states.

papers.title: Mixed Global Dynamics of the Forced Vibro-Impact Oscillator with Coulomb Friction and its Symplectic Structure, KAM Tori, and Persistence
papers.summary: The forced vibro-impact oscillator with Amonton-Coulomb friction and elastic walls was shown by Gendelman et al. (2019) to exhibit a coexistence of Hamiltonian stability islands and dissipative attractors in a single phase space. We provide a complete mathematical analysis of this phenomenon. We prove global well-posedness of the associated Filippov flow and construct a global lift to a piecewise smooth Hamiltonian system on a covering manifold. On the maximal forward-invariant non-sticking set, we show that the time-$T$ stroboscopic map is exact symplectic, within the formalism of symplectic dynamics. We derive a closed-form existence equation for symmetric $T$-periodic orbits and establish a parameter-dependent saddle-center bifurcation at $f_{\rm sc}(F,ω,R)$, correcting a universality claim in prior work. Using Moser's twist theorem, we prove the existence of invariant Cantor families (KAM tori) near elliptic non-sticking periodic orbits, while a Melnikov analysis yields hyperbolic dynamics conjugate to a Bernoulli shift near the associated saddle. We further show that any positive restitution defect or viscous damping destroys the conservative structure: elliptic periodic orbits persist but become asymptotically stable, replacing Hamiltonian islands by a single attracting basin. The approach extends to multi-particle systems with elastic collisions, where a symplectic structure and higher-dimensional KAM tori are obtained. A computer-assisted proof verifies the existence and ellipticity of a non-sticking periodic orbit at a specific parameter point.

ai.tldr: 本文对受迫振动-冲击振子（含库仑摩擦和弹性壁）中哈密顿稳定岛与耗散吸引子共存的现象进行了完整的数学分析。
ai.motivation: 解释并严格证明Gendelman等人观察到的混合全局动力学现象，纠正先前工作中的普适性论断。
ai.method: 利用Filippov流、全局提升至分段光滑哈密顿系统、精确辛映射、Moser扭转定理和Melnikov分析。
ai.result: 证明了非粘滞集上时间T频闪映射的精确辛性；导出了对称T周期轨道的闭式存在方程；发现了参数依赖的鞍-中心分岔；证明了KAM环面的存在；揭示了正恢复系数缺陷或粘性阻尼对保守结构的破坏。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解含摩擦和碰撞的非线性振子中保守与耗散行为的共存机制及其数学基础。

idea_spark.idea: 利用精确辛映射和KAM环面存在性，设计具有鲁棒准周期响应的工程振子。
idea_spark.risk: 实际系统中不可避免的阻尼会破坏保守结构，需评估参数敏感性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将混合动力学（保守岛+耗散吸引子）的思想应用于能量采集或振动控制中，利用岛状区域实现能量保持。

en.tldr: This paper provides a complete mathematical analysis of the coexistence of Hamiltonian stability islands and dissipative attractors in a forced vibro-impact oscillator with Coulomb friction and elastic walls.
en.motivation: To rigorously explain and prove the mixed global dynamics observed by Gendelman et al., correcting a universality claim in prior work.
en.method: Filippov flow, global lift to a piecewise smooth Hamiltonian system, exact symplectic stroboscopic map, Moser's twist theorem, and Melnikov analysis.
en.result: Proved exact symplecticity of the time-T map on the non-sticking set; derived a closed-form existence equation for symmetric T-periodic orbits; identified a parameter-dependent saddle-center bifurcation; proved existence of KAM tori; showed that restitution defect or viscous damping destroys the conservative structure.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the coexistence of conservative and dissipative behaviors in nonlinear oscillators with friction and impacts, along with its mathematical foundations.

idea_spark.idea: Design engineering oscillators with robust quasiperiodic responses using exact symplectic maps and KAM tori.
idea_spark.risk: Inevitable damping in real systems destroys the conservative structure; parameter sensitivity must be assessed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Apply the mixed dynamics (conservative islands + dissipative attractors) to energy harvesting or vibration control, leveraging island regions for energy retention.

papers.title: Geometric Means and Lebesgue-type Decomposition of Completely Positive Maps
papers.summary: We introduce the geometric mean and the parallel sum of completely positive (CP) maps on von Neumann algebras, based on the Pusz--Woronowicz theory of positive sesquilinear forms. We provide a concrete characterization via a block matrix positivity condition and establish their fundamental properties, including the AM--GM--HM inequality with respect to the CP order.   In finite-dimensional settings, our construction is compatible with the Choi--Jamiolkowski correspondence, under which the geometric mean of CP maps corresponds to the Kubo--Ando geometric mean of their Choi matrices. This yields a natural operator-theoretic framework for interpolating quantum channels.   As an application, we obtain index-type inequalities for conditional expectations in subfactor theory.   Finally, we establish a Lebesgue-type decomposition of CP maps via a parallel sum construction, thereby providing a unified framework that simultaneously generalizes Ando's decomposition of bounded positive operators and Kosaki's decomposition of normal positive functionals on von Neumann algebras.

ai.tldr: 在冯·诺依曼代数上引入完全正映射的几何平均与平行和，并建立其勒贝格型分解。
ai.motivation: 为完全正映射提供一种自然的算子理论框架，用于量子信道的插值以及推广正算子与正泛函的经典分解。
ai.method: 基于Pusz-Woronowicz正半双线性型理论，通过块矩阵正定性条件刻画几何平均与平行和，并利用Choi-Jamiolkowski对应与Kubo-Ando几何平均建立联系。
ai.result: 建立了完全正映射的AM-GM-HM不等式、条件期望的指标型不等式，以及统一推广Ando分解与Kosaki分解的勒贝格型分解。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解完全正映射之间的插值、分解与不等式，为量子信息与算子代数研究提供新工具。

idea_spark.idea: 利用勒贝格型分解将任意完全正映射唯一分解为绝对连续部分与奇异部分，可能用于量子信道容量的分析。
idea_spark.risk: 在无限维情形下，分解的唯一性与构造的显式表达式可能依赖于代数结构，推广至一般C*代数时需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将正算子与正泛函的经典分解统一到完全正映射的框架，启发类似分解在量子马尔可夫链或量子纠错中的应用。
