en.tldr: Introduces geometric mean and parallel sum of completely positive maps on von Neumann algebras, and establishes a Lebesgue-type decomposition.
en.motivation: To provide a natural operator-theoretic framework for interpolating quantum channels and generalizing classical decompositions of positive operators and functionals.
en.method: Based on the Pusz-Woronowicz theory of positive sesquilinear forms, characterized via block matrix positivity, and linked to Kubo-Ando geometric mean via Choi-Jamiolkowski correspondence.
en.result: Established AM-GM-HM inequality for CP maps, index-type inequalities for conditional expectations, and a Lebesgue-type decomposition unifying Ando's and Kosaki's decompositions.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand interpolation, decomposition, and inequalities for completely positive maps, offering new tools for quantum information and operator algebras.

idea_spark.idea: Use the Lebesgue-type decomposition to uniquely split any CP map into absolutely continuous and singular parts, potentially for analyzing quantum channel capacities.
idea_spark.risk: In infinite dimensions, uniqueness and explicit formulas may depend on the algebraic structure; generalization to general C*-algebras requires caution.
idea_spark.inspiration: Unifying classical decompositions of positive operators and functionals into the CP map framework inspires similar decompositions in quantum Markov chains or quantum error correction.

papers.title: Absolute Stability of Nonlinear Negative Imaginary Systems with Application to Potential Energy Shaping
papers.summary: This paper establishes absolute stability conditions for nonlinear negative imaginary (NI) systems interconnected with static nonlinear feedback. We first show that the NI property is preserved when the feedback nonlinearity can be expressed as the gradient of a continuously differentiable function, and the composite storage of the resulting system remains positive definite. This condition provides a direct connection between nonlinear static feedback and storage-function shaping along the measured output channels. Building on this result, conditions are derived for absolute stability of the closed-loop system under mild assumptions. The linear specialization of the results strictly generalizes prior absolute stability results for linear NI systems, allowing coupled nonlinearities not covered by existing slope-restricted or sector-bounded frameworks. Finally, the proposed theory is illustrated through a linear example highlighting this generalization and a nonlinear example that shows the utility of the proposed results in potential energy shaping.

ai.tldr: 本文建立了非线性负虚系统与静态非线性反馈互联时的绝对稳定性条件，并展示了其在势能整形中的应用。
ai.motivation: 现有绝对稳定性结果主要针对线性负虚系统，且受限于斜率约束或扇形有界框架，无法处理耦合非线性。本文旨在将绝对稳定性理论推广到非线性负虚系统。
ai.method: 首先证明当反馈非线性可表示为连续可微函数的梯度时，负虚性质得以保持且复合存储函数正定；进而推导闭环系统绝对稳定性的充分条件。
ai.result: 所得条件线性化后严格推广了已有线性负虚系统的绝对稳定性结果，能够涵盖现有框架无法处理的耦合非线性。线性与非线性算例验证了理论的有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解非线性负虚系统的绝对稳定性判据，并指导利用势能整形方法设计稳定控制器。

idea_spark.idea: 将反馈非线性限制为势能函数的梯度，从而利用复合存储函数正定性保证闭环稳定性，为非线性控制器设计提供新思路。
idea_spark.risk: 条件要求反馈非线性必须为梯度场，实际系统中可能难以满足；且存储函数构造依赖系统结构，通用性有限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受势能整形方法启发，可将系统能量函数与反馈非线性直接关联，简化稳定性分析并扩展适用范围。

en.tldr: This paper establishes absolute stability conditions for nonlinear negative imaginary systems interconnected with static nonlinear feedback, with application to potential energy shaping.
en.motivation: Existing absolute stability results are limited to linear NI systems and cannot handle coupled nonlinearities beyond slope-restricted or sector-bounded frameworks. This work extends absolute stability theory to nonlinear NI systems.
en.method: It first shows that the NI property is preserved when the feedback nonlinearity is the gradient of a continuously differentiable function, and the composite storage remains positive definite. Then sufficient conditions for absolute stability of the closed-loop system are derived.
en.result: The linear specialization strictly generalizes prior absolute stability results for linear NI systems, covering coupled nonlinearities not addressed by existing frameworks. Linear and nonlinear examples validate the theory.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand absolute stability criteria for nonlinear NI systems and guides the design of stabilizing controllers via potential energy shaping.

idea_spark.idea: Restricting feedback nonlinearity to be the gradient of a potential function allows direct use of composite storage positive definiteness to guarantee closed-loop stability, offering a new design paradigm.
idea_spark.risk: The condition requires the feedback nonlinearity to be a gradient field, which may not hold in practice; storage function construction depends on system structure, limiting generality.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by potential energy shaping, the approach directly links system energy functions with feedback nonlinearities, simplifying stability analysis and broadening applicability.

papers.title: iTRIALSPACE: Programmable Virtual Lesion Trials for Controlled Evaluation of Lung CT Models
papers.summary: We introduce iTRIALSPACE, a programmable evaluation framework for controlled assessment of lung CT models. Standard benchmarks are static retrospective collections that entangle lesion size, lobe prevalence, anatomy, and acquisition context, making it difficult to determine what structurally drives model accuracy. iTRIALSPACE addresses this limitation by composing real clinical CTs and lesion profiles into controlled virtual lesion trials through a four-stage pipeline: multidataset nodule profiling, explicit trial specification, anatomy-aware mask insertion, and ControlNet-conditioned CT synthesis. The framework is built on a unified 54-attribute nodule-profile dataset spanning 13,140 annotated nodules from seven public CT sources and instantiated as 13 trial modes. We evaluate iTRIALSPACE in a 55,469-sample Virtual Lesion Study spanning three medical VLMs, four spatialguidance conditions, and three clinical tasks. Across all 13 modes, the synthetic substrate remains within the real-to-real FID baseline, and synthetic performance rankings transfer strongly to real clinical data ($ρ$ = 0.93, p < 10$^{-15}$). Controlled trial modes expose findings unavailable to fixed-distribution benchmarks, including shortcut-driven size prediction collapse under lobe-equalized sampling and hostto-donor variance ratios of 8.9x and 3.3x in twin-cross analysis. These results position iTRIALSPACE as an auditable evaluation infrastructure for controlled, falsifiable testing beyond static retrospective benchmarks.

ai.tldr: 提出iTRIALSPACE，一个可编程的虚拟病灶试验框架，用于可控评估肺CT模型。
ai.motivation: 标准基准是静态回顾性数据集，混杂病灶大小、叶分布、解剖和采集背景，难以确定模型准确性的结构驱动因素。
ai.method: 通过四阶段流水线：多数据集结节分析、显式试验规范、解剖感知掩膜插入和ControlNet条件CT合成，构建可控虚拟病灶试验。
ai.result: 在55,469样本虚拟病灶研究中，合成基质的FID与真实-真实基线相当，性能排名与真实临床数据强相关（ρ=0.93）。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员在可控条件下测试肺CT模型，发现固定分布基准无法揭示的缺陷。

idea_spark.idea: 利用ControlNet和结节分析，实现病灶大小、位置、解剖背景的独立控制，进行因果分析。
idea_spark.risk: 合成CT的临床真实性可能受限于训练数据分布，需验证泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将临床试验设计理念引入医学影像模型评估，通过虚拟试验实现可审计、可证伪的测试。

en.result: In a 55,469-sample study, synthetic substrate FID matches real-to-real baseline, and performance rankings strongly transfer to real data (ρ=0.93).
en.help_to_user: Enables controlled testing of lung CT models to uncover weaknesses hidden by fixed-distribution benchmarks.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage ControlNet and nodule profiling to independently control lesion size, location, and anatomy for causal analysis.
idea_spark.risk: Clinical realism of synthetic CTs may be limited by training data distribution; generalization needs validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Adopt clinical trial design concepts for medical image model evaluation via virtual trials for auditable, falsifiable testing.

papers.title: GRALIS: A Unified Canonical Framework for Linear Attribution Methods via Riesz Representation
papers.summary: The main XAI attribution methods for deep neural networks -- GradCAM, SHAP, LIME, Integrated Gradients -- operate on separate theoretical foundations and are not formally comparable. We present GRALIS (Gradient-Riesz Averaged Locally-Integrated Shapley), a mathematical framework establishing a representation theory for attributions: every additive, linear, and continuous attribution functional on L^2(Q,mu) admits a unique canonical representation (Q, w, Delta), proved necessary by the Riesz Representation Theorem. This class encompasses SHAP, IG, LIME and linearized GradCAM, but excludes nonlinear functionals such as standard GradCAM or attention maps. Seven formal theorems provide simultaneous guarantees absent in any individual method: (T1) necessary canonical form; (T2) exact completeness; (T3) Monte Carlo convergence O(1/sqrt(m))+O(1/k); (T4) exact Shapley Interaction Values; (T5) Hoeffding ANOVA decomposition; (T6) Sobol sensitivity generalization; (T7) multi-scale extension (MS-GRALIS) with minimum-variance weights. An algebraic appendix justifies the GRALIS-SIV correspondence via the Mobius transform without circularity. GRALIS satisfies 13.5/14 axiomatic properties vs. 2.5-6/14 for individual methods, including completeness, sensitivity, locality, order-k interactions and optimal multi-scale aggregation simultaneously. Preliminary validation on BreaKHis (1,187 histology images, DenseNet-121) reports deletion faithfulness AUC +0.015 (malignant), 96% class-conditional consistency, SAL = 0.762+/-0.109 and sparsity index 0.39. Extended comparison with baseline XAI methods is planned for a companion paper.

ai.tldr: 提出GRALIS框架，基于Riesz表示定理统一了线性归因方法，满足13.5/14条公理，并在组织病理学图像上验证。
ai.motivation: 现有归因方法（如GradCAM、SHAP、LIME、Integrated Gradients）理论基础各异，缺乏形式化比较和统一框架。
ai.method: 利用Riesz表示定理证明每个加性、线性、连续的归因泛函在L^2(Q,mu)上存在唯一规范表示(Q, w, Delta)，并导出七条形式化定理。
ai.result: GRALIS满足13.5/14条公理，在BreaKHis数据集上删除忠实度AUC提升0.015，类条件一致性达96%，稀疏指数0.39。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解不同归因方法的内在联系，并提供一个可同时满足完备性、敏感性、局部性等多条公理的统一归因工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将GRALIS扩展到非线性归因方法，或利用其多尺度扩展（MS-GRALIS）进行跨分辨率解释。
idea_spark.risk: 框架依赖L^2空间假设，可能不适用于离散或非连续特征空间；计算复杂度随交互阶数增加而上升。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受Riesz表示定理启发，将归因问题形式化为泛函表示，为可解释性研究提供了严格的数学基础。

en.tldr: GRALIS unifies linear attribution methods via Riesz representation, achieving 13.5/14 axioms and validated on histopathology images.
en.motivation: Existing attribution methods (GradCAM, SHAP, LIME, Integrated Gradients) lack a common theoretical foundation and formal comparability.
en.method: Proves that every additive, linear, continuous attribution functional on L^2(Q,mu) has a unique canonical representation (Q, w, Delta) via the Riesz Representation Theorem, with seven formal theorems.

en.help_to_user: Provides a unified attribution framework that simultaneously guarantees completeness, sensitivity, locality, and multi-scale aggregation, aiding interpretability comparisons.

idea_spark.idea: Extend GRALIS to nonlinear attribution methods or leverage its multi-scale extension (MS-GRALIS) for cross-resolution explanations.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on L^2 space assumptions, which may not hold for discrete or non-continuous feature spaces; computational cost grows with interaction order.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the Riesz Representation Theorem, formalizing attribution as functional representation provides a rigorous mathematical foundation for XAI.

papers.title: HaM-World: Soft-Hamiltonian World Models with Selective Memory for Planning
papers.summary: World models enable model-based planning through learned latent dynamics, but imagined rollouts become unstable as the planning horizon grows or the dynamics distribution shifts. We argue that this instability reflects two missing structures in planner-facing latents: history-conditioned memory for approximate Markov completeness, and geometric organization that separates configuration, momentum, and task semantics. We propose HaM-World (HMW), a structured world model that decomposes the latent state into a canonical (q, p) subspace and a context subspace c, while using Mamba selective state-space memory as the history-conditioned input to the same latent dynamics. Within this interface, (q, p) evolves through an energy-derived Hamiltonian vector field plus learnable residual/control dynamics, while c captures semantic, dissipative, and non-conservative factors. This gives the planner a single latent state shared by dynamics prediction, reward/value estimation, imagined rollouts, and CEM action search. On four DeepMind Control Suite tasks, HaM-World reaches the highest Avg. AUC (117.9, +9.5%), reduces long-horizon rollout error to 45% of a strong baseline model, and wins 11/12 k in {3,5,7} MSE cells. Under 12 OOD perturbations spanning dynamics shifts, action delay, and observation masking, HaM-World achieves the highest return in every condition, with average OOD-return gains of 10.2% on Finger Spin and 13.6% on Reacher Easy. Mechanism diagnostics further show bounded action-free Hamiltonian-energy drift, structured energy variation under policy rollouts, and coherent control-induced energy transfer, supporting the intended Soft-Hamiltonian dynamics design.

ai.tldr: 提出HaM-World，一种结合软哈密顿动力学与选择性记忆的结构化世界模型，用于提升基于模型的规划在长时域和分布偏移下的稳定性。
ai.motivation: 现有世界模型在规划时，随着预测步长增加或动态分布变化，想象轨迹变得不稳定，原因是潜在状态缺乏历史条件记忆和几何结构。
ai.method: 将潜在状态分解为规范(q,p)子空间和上下文c子空间，利用Mamba选择性状态空间记忆作为历史条件输入，在(q,p)上施加能量导出的哈密顿向量场及可学习残差/控制动力学，c捕获语义、耗散和非保守因素。
ai.result: 在四个DeepMind Control任务上，平均AUC达117.9（+9.5%），长时域滚动误差降至强基线的45%，在12种OOD扰动下均取得最高回报。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种结构化世界模型设计思路，可提升长时域规划和分布外泛化能力，适用于机器人控制等连续决策任务。

idea_spark.idea: 将哈密顿框架与Mamba记忆结合，为潜在状态赋予物理可解释的几何组织，同时利用选择性记忆实现近似马尔可夫完备性。
idea_spark.risk: 哈密顿假设可能不适用于强耗散或非保守系统；Mamba记忆的引入增加了模型复杂度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从经典力学中获取灵感，将能量守恒与耗散分离，并利用现代序列模型弥补历史信息缺失。

en.tldr: HaM-World is a structured world model combining soft-Hamiltonian dynamics with selective memory (Mamba) to stabilize model-based planning under long horizons and distribution shifts.
en.motivation: Existing world models suffer from unstable imagined rollouts as planning horizon grows or dynamics shift, due to missing history-conditioned memory and geometric latent organization.
en.method: The latent state is decomposed into a canonical (q,p) subspace and a context subspace c. Mamba selective state-space memory provides history-conditioned input. (q,p) evolves via energy-derived Hamiltonian vector fields plus learnable residual/control dynamics, while c captures semantic, dissipative, and non-conservative factors.
en.result: On four DeepMind Control tasks, HaM-World achieves the highest Avg. AUC (117.9, +9.5%), reduces long-horizon rollout error to 45% of a strong baseline, and achieves the highest return under all 12 OOD perturbations.
en.help_to_user: Provides a structured world model design that improves long-horizon planning and out-of-distribution robustness, applicable to continuous control and other sequential decision-making tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Combine Hamiltonian mechanics with Mamba memory to give latent states physically interpretable geometric organization while achieving approximate Markov completeness via selective memory.
idea_spark.risk: Hamiltonian assumptions may fail in strongly dissipative or non-conservative systems; Mamba memory adds model complexity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draw inspiration from classical mechanics to separate energy conservation and dissipation, and use modern sequence models to compensate for missing history information.

papers.title: Constraining Host-Level Abuse in Self-Hosted Computer-Use Agents via TEE-Backed Isolation
papers.summary: Self-hosted computer-use agents (SHCUAs), such as OpenClaw, combine natural-language interaction with direct access to host-side resources, including browsers, files, scripts, system commands, and external communication channels. While useful for automating real tasks, this capability also creates a host-level abuse surface: a legitimately deployed agent may be steered toward unsafe operations through malicious messages, indirect prompt injection, unsafe skills, or tampering along the host-side control path. We argue that such risks cannot be addressed by ad hoc blocking rules alone, because the security criticality of an operation depends jointly on its action type, target object, execution context, and potential effect.   This paper presents an operation-centric model for risk-based confinement of SHCUA operations. The proposed design keeps ordinary functionality on the constrained REE path, while protecting security-critical classification, authorization, binding, evidence generation, and selected execution-control decisions inside a cloud-native TEE-backed trusted operation plane. We instantiate the architecture on OpenClaw using Intel TDX as the primary trusted backend, with remote terminal-side trusted components verifying TDX-audited commands before constrained local execution. The evaluation shows that the design can block unsafe or policy-disallowed operations before execution, preserve ordinary functionality for allowed workloads, and provide auditable evidence with deployment-dependent overhead.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于TEE的操作级隔离方案，用于约束自托管计算机使用代理的主机级滥用风险。
ai.motivation: 自托管代理（如OpenClaw）可访问主机资源，易受恶意消息、提示注入等攻击，传统规则难以应对。
ai.method: 设计操作中心模型，将安全关键操作（分类、授权、绑定、证据生成）迁移至云原生TEE可信平面，REE仅保留普通功能。
ai.result: 在OpenClaw上基于Intel TDX实现，能阻止不安全操作，保留正常功能，并提供可审计证据。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何利用TEE隔离技术增强自托管代理的安全性。

idea_spark.idea: 将安全决策与执行分离，利用TEE提供硬件级信任根。
idea_spark.risk: TEE部署可能引入性能开销和兼容性问题。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合操作语义与执行上下文进行动态风险评估，而非静态规则匹配。

en.tldr: Proposes an operation-centric confinement model using TEE-backed isolation to constrain host-level abuse in self-hosted computer-use agents.
en.motivation: Self-hosted agents (e.g., OpenClaw) have direct host access and are vulnerable to malicious messages, prompt injection, and unsafe skills; ad hoc rules are insufficient.
en.method: Designs an operation-centric model that moves security-critical operations (classification, authorization, binding, evidence generation) into a cloud-native TEE trusted plane, leaving ordinary functionality on the REE path.
en.result: Implemented on OpenClaw with Intel TDX; blocks unsafe operations, preserves normal functionality, and provides auditable evidence with deployment-dependent overhead.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how TEE isolation can enhance security of self-hosted agents.

idea_spark.idea: Separate security decisions from execution and leverage TEE for hardware-rooted trust.
idea_spark.risk: TEE deployment may introduce performance overhead and compatibility issues.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine operation semantics with execution context for dynamic risk assessment instead of static rule matching.

papers.title: Modular wedge localization, Majorana fields and the Tsirelson limit of the Bell-CHSH inequality
papers.summary: The massive Majorana field in $1+1$ dimension is employed to investigate the violation of the Bell-CHSH inequality in relativistic Quantum Field Theory. We give an explicit rapidity-space realization of the Summers-Werner modular-localization construction and reduce the vacuum Bell-CHSH correlator to a single spectral weight $h^2(ω)$ for the modular operator. The resulting analytic families approach the Tsirelson bound in the vacuum state as their spectral weight concentrates near $ω\approx0$, corresponding to the eigenvalue $λ^2 \approx 1$ of the modular operator.

ai.tldr: 在1+1维大质量Majorana场中，通过模块化楔形局域化构造，将真空Bell-CHSH关联函数简化为单个谱权重，并证明当谱权重集中在零频率附近时，关联函数趋近于Tsirelson界。
ai.motivation: 研究相对论性量子场论中Bell-CHSH不等式的最大违反，特别是Majorana场情形下的Tsirelson极限。
ai.method: 采用Summers-Werner模块化局域化构造的显式快度空间实现，将真空Bell-CHSH关联函数约化为模块化算子的单个谱权重h²(ω)。
ai.result: 解析族在真空态下趋近Tsirelson界，此时谱权重集中在ω≈0，对应模块化算子本征值λ²≈1。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解相对论性量子场论中非局域关联的极限，以及Majorana场在量子信息理论中的作用。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将谱权重集中条件与实验可观测的纠缠度量联系起来。
idea_spark.risk: 理论构造依赖于1+1维可积模型，推广到高维或相互作用场可能遇到困难。
idea_spark.inspiration: 模块化算子谱分析为量子场论中的非局域性提供了新的定量工具。

en.tldr: In 1+1 dimensional massive Majorana field, using modular wedge localization, the vacuum Bell-CHSH correlator is reduced to a single spectral weight, and the analytic families approach the Tsirelson bound when the spectral weight concentrates near zero frequency.
en.motivation: To study the maximal violation of the Bell-CHSH inequality in relativistic quantum field theory, especially the Tsirelson limit for Majorana fields.
en.method: An explicit rapidity-space realization of the Summers-Werner modular-localization construction is given, reducing the vacuum Bell-CHSH correlator to a single spectral weight h²(ω) for the modular operator.
en.result: The analytic families approach the Tsirelson bound in the vacuum state as their spectral weight concentrates near ω≈0, corresponding to eigenvalue λ²≈1 of the modular operator.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the limits of nonlocal correlations in relativistic QFT and the role of Majorana fields in quantum information theory.

idea_spark.idea: Explore connecting the spectral weight concentration condition to experimentally measurable entanglement measures.
idea_spark.risk: The theoretical construction relies on a 1+1D integrable model; generalization to higher dimensions or interacting fields may be challenging.
idea_spark.inspiration: Spectral analysis of modular operators provides a new quantitative tool for nonlocality in quantum field theory.

papers.title: Second-Order Bilevel Optimization with Accelerated Convergence Rates
papers.summary: This paper studies second-order methods for nonconvex-strongly-convex bilevel optimization. We propose a novel fully second-order bilevel approximation method (FSBA) that achieves an iteration complexity of $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(ε^{-1.5})$ for finding the $(ε, \mathcal{O}(\sqrtε))$ second-order stationary point of the hyper-objective function. Our results demonstrate that second-order methods can achieve an accelerated convergence rate than first-order methods in bilevel optimization. To address the heavy computational cost associated with the second-order oracle, we introduce a lazy variant of FSBA, called LFSBA, which reuses second-order information across several iterations. We prove that LFSBA exhibits better computational complexity than FSBA by a factor of $\sqrt{d}$, where $d$ is the dimension of the problem. We also apply a similar idea to nonconvex strongly-concave minimax optimization and propose the lazy minimax cubic-regularized Newton (LMCN) method with better computational complexity compared to existing second-order methods.

      "inspiration": "受一阶惰性梯度更新启发，将类似思想扩展到二阶方法，实现计算与收敛的平衡。"
    }
  },
  "en": {
    "tldr": "This paper proposes a fully second-order bilevel approximation method (FSBA) and its lazy variant (LFSBA), achieving accelerated convergence and better computational complexity in nonconvex-strongly-convex bilevel optimization.",
    "motivation": "Existing first-order methods have limited convergence rates in bilevel optimization, while second-order methods can accelerate but suffer from high computational cost, motivating efficient accelerated second-order algorithms.",
    "method": "Propose FSBA using second-order information for accelerated convergence; further propose LFSBA that reuses second-order information to reduce per-iteration cost.",
    "result": "FSBA achieves $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(ε^{-1.5})$ iteration complexity; LFSBA reduces computational complexity by a factor of $\sqrt{d}$ compared to FSBA. Similar idea is applied to minimax optimization, yielding LMCN.",
    "help_to_user": "Provides accelerated and computationally efficient second-order algorithms for bilevel and minimax optimization, suitable for high-dimensional and large-scale problems.",
    "idea_spark": {
      "transferable": "The second-order information reuse strategy can be transferred to other optimization problems with expensive second-order oracles, such as second-order deep learning training.",
      "idea": "Combine lazy update with second-order methods to maintain accelerated convergence while significantly reducing computational overhead.",
      "risk": "Reusing second-order information may accumulate approximation errors, requiring careful design of update frequency to ensure convergence.",
      "inspiration": "Inspired by lazy gradient updates in first-order methods, extending similar ideas to second-order methods to balance computation and convergence."
    }
  }
}

papers.title: Learning to Cut: Reinforcement Learning for Benders Decomposition
papers.summary: Benders decomposition (BD) is a widely used solution approach for solving two-stage stochastic programs arising in real-world decision-making under uncertainty. However, it often suffers from slow convergence as the master problem grows with an increasing number of cuts. In this paper, we propose Reinforcement Learning for BD (RLBD), a framework that adaptively selects cuts using a neural network-based stochastic policy. The policy is trained using a policy gradient method via the REINFORCE algorithm. We evaluate the proposed approach on a two-stage stochastic electric vehicle charging station location problem and compare it with vanilla BD and LearnBD, a supervised learning approach that classifies cuts using a support vector machine. Numerical results demonstrate that RLBD achieves substantial improvements in computational efficiency and exhibits strong generalization to problems with similar structures but varying data inputs and decision variable dimensions.

ai.tldr: 提出RLBD框架，用强化学习自适应选择Benders分解中的割，提升计算效率。
ai.motivation: Benders分解中割数量增长导致主问题收敛慢，传统方法效率低。
ai.method: 使用神经网络策略网络，通过REINFORCE策略梯度训练，自适应选择割。
ai.result: 在电动汽车充电站选址问题上，RLBD比传统BD和LearnBD计算效率显著提升，且泛化能力强。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何用强化学习加速Benders分解求解随机规划问题。

idea_spark.idea: 将割选择建模为马尔可夫决策过程，用策略梯度优化。
idea_spark.risk: 训练需要大量仿真数据，且策略可能过拟合特定问题结构。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合强化学习与分解算法，为组合优化提供新思路。

en.tldr: Proposes RLBD, a reinforcement learning framework for adaptive cut selection in Benders decomposition, improving computational efficiency.
en.motivation: Benders decomposition suffers from slow convergence due to growing master problem with many cuts.
en.method: Uses a neural network policy trained via REINFORCE to adaptively select cuts.
en.result: On an EV charging station location problem, RLBD outperforms vanilla BD and LearnBD in efficiency and generalizes well.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how reinforcement learning can accelerate Benders decomposition for stochastic programming.

idea_spark.idea: Model cut selection as a Markov decision process and optimize with policy gradient.
idea_spark.risk: Training requires extensive simulation data and policy may overfit to specific problem structures.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining reinforcement learning with decomposition algorithms offers new insights for combinatorial optimization.

papers.title: Litespark Inference on Consumer CPUs: Custom SIMD Kernels for Ternary Neural Networks
papers.summary: Large language models (LLMs) have transformed artificial intelligence, but their computational requirements remain prohibitive for most users. Standard inference demands expensive datacenter GPUs or cloud API access, leaving over one billion personal computers underutilized for AI workloads. Ternary models offer a path forward: their weights are constrained to {-1, 0, +1}, theoretically eliminating the need for floating-point multiplication. However, existing frameworks fail to exploit this structure, treating ternary models as dense floating-point networks. We address this gap with custom SIMD kernels that replace matrix multiplication with simple addition and subtraction operations, targeting the integer dot product instructions available on modern CPUs. Our implementation, Litespark-Inference, is pip-installable and integrates directly with Hugging-Face, achieving 9.2x faster time-to-first-token, 52x higher throughput, and 14x memory reduction compared to standard PyTorch inference on Apple Silicon, with similar speedups on Intel and AMD processors.

ai.tldr: 提出Litespark-Inference，通过自定义SIMD内核在消费级CPU上高效运行三元神经网络，实现9.2倍首令牌延迟、52倍吞吐量和14倍内存缩减。
ai.motivation: 大语言模型推理依赖昂贵GPU，而消费级CPU未被充分利用；现有框架将三元网络当作稠密浮点网络处理，未利用其结构优势。
ai.method: 设计自定义SIMD内核，用整数加减法替代矩阵乘法中的浮点乘法，利用现代CPU的整数点积指令。
ai.result: 在Apple Silicon上相比标准PyTorch推理，首令牌延迟降低9.2倍，吞吐量提升52倍，内存减少14倍；Intel和AMD处理器上也有类似加速。
ai.help_to_user: 用户可在个人电脑上通过pip安装Litespark-Inference，直接与HuggingFace集成，实现低成本、高效率的本地LLM推理。

idea_spark.idea: 将三元权重的结构特性与CPU SIMD指令深度结合，设计专用内核以消除浮点运算。
idea_spark.risk: 三元模型精度可能低于全精度模型，且对特定硬件指令集的依赖可能限制跨平台兼容性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从硬件指令集（如整数点积）出发，重新设计算法以匹配硬件能力，而非简单适配现有框架。

idea_spark.inspiration: 从硬件指令集（如整数点积）出发，重新设计算法以匹配硬件能力，而非简单适配现有框架。

en.tldr: Litespark-Inference uses custom SIMD kernels to run ternary neural networks efficiently on consumer CPUs, achieving 9.2x faster time-to-first-token, 52x higher throughput, and 14x memory reduction.
en.motivation: LLM inference relies on expensive GPUs, leaving consumer CPUs underutilized; existing frameworks treat ternary networks as dense floating-point networks, missing structural advantages.
en.method: Custom SIMD kernels replace floating-point multiplication with integer addition/subtraction, leveraging modern CPU integer dot product instructions.
en.result: On Apple Silicon, compared to standard PyTorch inference, time-to-first-token is 9.2x faster, throughput 52x higher, and memory 14x lower; similar speedups on Intel and AMD processors.
en.help_to_user: Users can pip-install Litespark-Inference and integrate with HuggingFace to run LLMs locally on personal computers with low cost and high efficiency.

idea_spark.idea: Combine ternary weight structure with CPU SIMD instructions to design specialized kernels that eliminate floating-point operations.
idea_spark.risk: Ternary models may have lower accuracy than full-precision models, and reliance on specific hardware instruction sets may limit cross-platform compatibility.
idea_spark.inspiration: Redesign algorithms to match hardware capabilities (e.g., integer dot product) rather than simply adapting existing frameworks.

papers.title: Long-Horizon Q-Learning: Accurate Value Learning via n-Step Inequalities
papers.summary: Off-policy, value-based reinforcement learning methods such as Q-learning are appealing because they can learn from arbitrary experience, including data collected by older policies or other agents. In practice, however, bootstrapping makes long-horizon learning brittle: estimation errors at later states propagate backward through temporal-difference (TD) updates and can compound over time. We propose long-horizon Q-learning (LQL), which introduces a principled backstop against compounding error when learning the optimal action-value function. LQL builds on a prior optimality tightening observation: any realized action sequence lower-bounds what the optimal policy can achieve in expectation, so acting optimally earlier should not be worse than following the observed actions for several steps before switching to optimal behavior. Our contribution is to turn this inequality into a practical stabilization mechanism for Q-learning by using a hinge loss to penalize violations of these bounds. Importantly, LQL computes these penalties using network outputs already produced for the TD error, requiring no auxiliary networks and no additional forward passes relative to Q-learning. When combined with multiple state-of-the-art methods on a range of online and offline-to-online benchmarks, LQL consistently outperforms both 1-step TD and n-step TD learning at similar runtime.

ai.tldr: 提出长视界Q学习（LQL），利用n步不等式作为理论约束，通过铰链损失惩罚违反界限的行为，在不增加额外网络或前向传播的情况下稳定Q学习，在在线和离线到在线基准上优于1步和n步TD方法。
ai.motivation: 基于值的强化学习方法（如Q学习）在长视界任务中因自举导致估计误差向后传播并累积，学习不稳定。
ai.method: 基于最优性收紧观察，将任何实际动作序列的下界作为约束，使用铰链损失惩罚违反这些界限的行为，且惩罚计算仅依赖TD误差已有的网络输出。
ai.result: 在多种在线和离线到在线基准上，LQL一致优于1步TD和n步TD学习，且运行时间相近。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种稳定长视界Q学习的方法，无需额外网络或前向传播，易于集成到现有算法中。

idea_spark.idea: 将n步不等式转化为软约束，通过自适应调整惩罚权重来平衡偏差与方差。
idea_spark.risk: 铰链损失可能引入额外超参数，且对违反界限的惩罚强度需谨慎调节以避免过度约束。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从最优性收紧理论出发，将理论不等式直接转化为可微损失函数，启发其他理论驱动的算法改进。

zh.tldr: 提出长视界Q学习（LQL），利用n步不等式作为理论约束，通过铰链损失惩罚违反界限的行为，在不增加额外网络或前向传播的情况下稳定Q学习，在在线和离线到在线基准上优于1步和n步TD方法。

zh.help_to_user: 提供一种稳定长视界Q学习的方法，无需额外网络或前向传播，易于集成到现有算法中。

idea_spark.idea: 将n步不等式转化为软约束，通过自适应调整惩罚权重来平衡偏差与方差。
idea_spark.risk: 铰链损失可能引入额外超参数，且对违反界限的惩罚强度需谨慎调节以避免过度约束。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从最优性收紧理论出发，将理论不等式直接转化为可微损失函数，启发其他理论驱动的算法改进。

en.tldr: Proposes Long-Horizon Q-Learning (LQL), which uses n-step inequalities as principled constraints, penalizes violations via a hinge loss, stabilizes Q-learning without extra networks or forward passes, and consistently outperforms 1-step and n-step TD learning on online and offline-to-online benchmarks.
en.motivation: Off-policy value-based RL methods like Q-learning suffer from error propagation and accumulation in long-horizon tasks due to bootstrapping.
en.method: Leverages the optimality tightening observation that any realized action sequence lower-bounds optimal policy performance, and uses a hinge loss to penalize violations of these bounds, computed from existing network outputs for TD error.
en.result: Consistently outperforms 1-step and n-step TD learning across various online and offline-to-online benchmarks with similar runtime.
en.help_to_user: Provides a principled stabilization mechanism for long-horizon Q-learning that requires no auxiliary networks or additional forward passes, facilitating easy integration.

idea_spark.idea: Convert n-step inequalities into soft constraints with adaptive penalty weights to balance bias and variance.
idea_spark.risk: The hinge loss introduces extra hyperparameters, and the penalty strength must be carefully tuned to avoid over-constraining.
idea_spark.inspiration: Directly transforming theoretical inequalities into differentiable loss functions inspires theory-driven algorithmic improvements.

papers.title: AoI-Guided Client Selection for Robust and Timely Federated Intrusion Detection in Cloud-Edge Security Analytics
papers.summary: Federated learning (FL) is attractive for cloud-edge intrusion detection because it enables collaborative training over distributed telemetry without centralizing raw logs. In production security analytics pipelines, however, only a subset of clients participates in each round, and heterogeneous bandwidth, stragglers, and dropouts can cause the server to rely on stale client information. This paper studies client participation as a timeliness-aware systems problem using Age of Information (AoI). We compare three lightweight policies for federated intrusion detection: AoI-first, utility-first, and a hybrid AoI+utility rule with a tunable trade-off parameter.   Across a CIC-IDS2017 DDoS/PortScan mini subset, NSL-KDD, ToN-IoT, and a synthetic drift benchmark under clean, poisoning, and poisoning-plus-robust-aggregation settings, AoI-aware selection reduces average AoI by about 39--41% and peak AoI by about 70% relative to random sampling while keeping the per-round communication budget fixed. The hybrid policy usually preserves Macro-F1/AUC and provides an interpretable knob for balancing freshness, detection quality, and robustness, although it is not uniformly Pareto-dominant once false positive rate is included. Robustness is evaluated by combining AoI-guided selection with trimmed-mean aggregation under label-flip poisoning; the selection policy itself is not intended as a standalone Byzantine defense. The main practical message is that cloud-edge, privacy-preserving intrusion analytics can improve timeliness through a lightweight scheduling layer without changing the underlying FL participation budget.

ai.tldr: 提出基于信息年龄（AoI）的客户端选择策略，用于云边联邦入侵检测，在固定通信预算下显著降低平均和峰值AoI，同时保持检测性能。
ai.motivation: 联邦学习在云边入侵检测中面临客户端异构带宽、掉队和退出问题，导致服务器依赖过时信息，影响检测的及时性和鲁棒性。
ai.method: 比较三种轻量级客户端选择策略：AoI优先、效用优先以及混合AoI+效用规则，并在多种数据集和攻击场景下评估。
ai.result: AoI感知选择相比随机采样降低平均AoI约39-41%，峰值AoI约70%；混合策略在多数情况下保持Macro-F1/AUC，并提供可解释的权衡参数。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何在不增加通信预算的前提下，通过轻量级调度层提升云边联邦入侵检测的时效性和鲁棒性。

idea_spark.idea: 结合AoI与模型贡献度（如梯度范数）设计自适应客户端选择，进一步优化新鲜度与模型质量。
idea_spark.risk: 混合策略在假阳性率上并非帕累托最优，可能在某些安全场景下增加误报。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将信息年龄概念引入联邦学习客户端选择，为系统级时效性优化提供了新视角。

en.tldr: Proposes Age of Information (AoI)-guided client selection for federated intrusion detection in cloud-edge settings, reducing average AoI by ~39-41% and peak AoI by ~70% under fixed communication budget while maintaining detection performance.
en.motivation: Federated learning for cloud-edge intrusion detection suffers from heterogeneous bandwidth, stragglers, and dropouts, causing the server to rely on stale client information, which compromises timeliness and robustness.
en.method: Compares three lightweight client selection policies: AoI-first, utility-first, and a hybrid AoI+utility rule with a tunable trade-off parameter, evaluated across multiple datasets and attack scenarios.
en.result: AoI-aware selection reduces average AoI by ~39-41% and peak AoI by ~70% compared to random sampling; the hybrid policy generally preserves Macro-F1/AUC and provides an interpretable knob for balancing freshness, detection quality, and robustness.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to improve timeliness and robustness of federated intrusion detection in cloud-edge environments via a lightweight scheduling layer without increasing communication budget.

idea_spark.idea: Combine AoI with model contribution metrics (e.g., gradient norm) for adaptive client selection to further optimize freshness and model quality.
idea_spark.risk: The hybrid policy is not Pareto-optimal regarding false positive rate, potentially increasing false alarms in certain security scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: Introducing Age of Information into federated client selection offers a new perspective for system-level timeliness optimization.

papers.title: When to Trust Imagination: Adaptive Action Execution for World Action Models
papers.summary: World Action Models (WAMs) have recently emerged as a promising paradigm for robotic manipulation by jointly predicting future visual observations and future actions. However, current WAMs typically execute a fixed number of predicted actions after each model inference, leaving the robot blind to whether the imagined future remains consistent with the actual physical rollout. In this work, we formulate adaptive WAM execution as a future-reality verification problem: the robot should execute longer when the WAM-predicted future remains reliable, and replan earlier when reality deviates from imagination. To this end, we propose Future Forward Dynamics Causal Attention (FFDC), a lightweight verifier that jointly reasons over predicted future actions, predicted visual dynamics, real observations, and language instructions to estimate whether the remaining action rollout can still be trusted. FFDC enables adaptive action chunk sizes as an emergent consequence of prediction-observation consistency, preserving the efficiency of long-horizon execution while restoring responsiveness in contact-rich or difficult phases. We further introduce Mixture-of-Horizon Training to improve long-horizon trajectory coverage for adaptive execution. Experiments on the RoboTwin benchmark and in the real world demonstrate that our method achieves a strong robustness-efficiency trade-off: on RoboTwin, it reduces WAM forward passes by 69.10% and execution time by 34.02%, while improving success rate by 2.54% over the short-chunk baseline; in real-world experiments, it improves success rate by 35%.

ai.tldr: 提出自适应动作执行方法，通过轻量验证器判断世界动作模型预测的未来是否可靠，动态调整动作块大小，在保持效率的同时提升鲁棒性。
ai.motivation: 现有世界动作模型在执行固定数量预测动作后盲目执行，无法感知想象未来与实际物理展开是否一致，导致在接触密集或困难阶段响应不足。
ai.method: 设计未来前向动力学因果注意力（FFDC）验证器，联合推理预测动作、预测视觉动态、真实观测和语言指令，评估剩余动作序列的可信度；引入混合视野训练提升长程轨迹覆盖。
ai.result: 在RoboTwin基准上减少69.10%模型前向传播和34.02%执行时间，成功率提升2.54%；真实实验中成功率提升35%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助机器人根据实时观测动态调整动作执行长度，在保证效率的同时提高任务成功率，尤其适用于接触密集或困难操作场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将FFDC验证器与强化学习结合，使机器人不仅验证当前动作块，还能主动选择何时重新规划以最大化长期奖励。
idea_spark.risk: 验证器可能对噪声观测敏感，导致频繁重规划或过度信任错误预测；混合视野训练需大量长程轨迹数据。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类“边做边看”策略启发，机器人应像人类一样在任务中持续检查预期与现实的差距，灵活调整计划。

en.tldr: Proposes adaptive action execution for World Action Models by using a lightweight verifier to assess whether predicted future remains reliable, dynamically adjusting action chunk size to balance efficiency and robustness.
en.motivation: Current WAMs blindly execute a fixed number of predicted actions after each inference, unable to detect inconsistency between imagined future and actual physical rollout, leading to poor responsiveness in contact-rich or difficult phases.
en.method: Designs Future Forward Dynamics Causal Attention (FFDC) verifier that jointly reasons over predicted actions, predicted visual dynamics, real observations, and language instructions to estimate trustworthiness of remaining action rollout; introduces Mixture-of-Horizon Training for better long-horizon coverage.
en.result: On RoboTwin benchmark, reduces WAM forward passes by 69.10% and execution time by 34.02%, while improving success rate by 2.54%; real-world experiments show 35% success rate improvement.
en.help_to_user: Enables robots to adaptively adjust action execution length based on real-time observations, improving task success rate while maintaining efficiency, especially in contact-rich or challenging manipulation tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Combine FFDC verifier with reinforcement learning to not only verify current action chunk but also actively decide when to replan for maximizing long-term reward.
idea_spark.risk: Verifier may be sensitive to noisy observations, causing frequent replanning or over-trust in erroneous predictions; Mixture-of-Horizon Training requires large amounts of long-horizon trajectory data.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by human 'look-while-doing' strategy, robots should continuously check the gap between expectation and reality during task execution and flexibly adjust plans.

papers.title: Optimal Design of Stealthy Attacks in Partially Observed Linear Systems: A Likelihood-Based Approach
papers.summary: We study the optimal design of stealthy attacks against partially observed linear control systems. We first propose a novel likelihood-based detection mechanism derived from the innovation process, based on which we quantify stealthiness and formulate an attack design problem that trades off performance degradation and detectability. We develop a tractable control-theoretic framework for optimal stealthy attacks under two information structures: deterministic attacks fixed prior to system evolution, and adaptive attacks constructed from available observations. In the adaptive setting, the attacker's partial observation leads to a stochastic control problem with an endogenous information structure. We address this challenge through a hierarchical optimization framework combined with the separation principle, reducing the problem to a Markovian control formulation and yielding semi-explicit optimal attacks. We further establish well-posedness of the resulting systems and illustrate through numerical experiments how information constraints shape the trade-off between attack effectiveness and stealthiness.

ai.tldr: 针对部分观测线性控制系统，提出基于似然的隐蔽攻击最优设计方法，权衡攻击效果与可检测性。
ai.motivation: 现有隐蔽攻击研究多假设攻击者完全观测系统状态，而实际中攻击者常面临信息约束。
ai.method: 基于新息过程构建似然检测机制，将攻击设计转化为随机控制问题，利用分层优化与分离原理求解。
ai.result: 得到半解析最优攻击策略，数值实验揭示信息约束对攻击效果与隐蔽性权衡的影响。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解信息受限下隐蔽攻击的最优设计方法及检测机制。

idea_spark.idea: 将攻击者信息结构建模为内生变量，通过分离原理简化随机控制问题。
idea_spark.risk: 假设系统模型完全已知，实际中模型失配可能降低攻击有效性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴随机控制中的分离原理处理部分观测下的攻击设计问题。

zh.tldr: 针对部分观测线性控制系统，提出基于似然的隐蔽攻击最优设计方法，权衡攻击效果与可检测性。
zh.motivation: 现有隐蔽攻击研究多假设攻击者完全观测系统状态，而实际中攻击者常面临信息约束。

idea_spark.risk: 假设系统模型完全已知，实际中模型失配可能降低攻击有效性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴随机控制中的分离原理处理部分观测下的攻击设计问题。

en.tldr: Proposes a likelihood-based approach for optimal stealthy attack design in partially observed linear control systems, balancing attack effectiveness and detectability.
en.motivation: Existing stealthy attack studies often assume full observability for the attacker, while real attackers face information constraints.
en.method: Constructs a likelihood-based detection mechanism from the innovation process, formulates attack design as a stochastic control problem, and solves it via hierarchical optimization and the separation principle.
en.result: Obtains semi-explicit optimal attack strategies; numerical experiments illustrate how information constraints shape the trade-off between attack effectiveness and stealthiness.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand optimal stealthy attack design under information constraints and the associated detection mechanism.

idea_spark.idea: Model the attacker's information structure as endogenous and use the separation principle to simplify the stochastic control problem.
idea_spark.risk: Assumes perfect knowledge of the system model; model mismatch may degrade attack performance in practice.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage the separation principle from stochastic control to handle attack design under partial observations.

papers.title: Estimating the Black-box LLM Uncertainty with Distribution-Aligned Adversarial Distillation
papers.summary: Large language models (LLMs) have progressed rapidly in complex reasoning and question answering, yet LLM hallucination remains a central bottleneck that hinders practical deployment, especially for commercial black-box LLMs accessible only via APIs. Existing uncertainty quantification methods typically depend on computationally expensive multiple sampling or internal parameters, which prevents real-time estimation and fails to capture information implicit in the black-box reasoning process. To address this issue, we propose Distribution-Aligned Adversarial Distillation (DisAAD), which introduces a generation-discrimination architecture to guide a lightweight proxy model to learn the high-quality regions of the output distribution of the black-box LLM, thus effectively endowing it with the ability to know whether the black-box LLM knows or not. Subsequently, we use the proxy model to reproduce the specific responses of the black-box LLM and estimate the corresponding uncertainty based on evidence learning. Extensive experiments have verified the effectiveness and promise of our proposed method, indicating that a proxy model even one that only accounts for 1\% of the target LLM's size can achieve reliable uncertainty quantification.

ai.tldr: 提出分布对齐对抗蒸馏方法，用轻量代理模型估计黑盒大模型的不确定性。
ai.motivation: 黑盒大模型仅通过API访问，现有不确定性量化方法依赖多次采样或内部参数，无法实时估计且忽略推理过程隐含信息。
ai.method: 采用生成-判别架构，通过对抗蒸馏引导代理模型学习黑盒LLM输出分布的高质量区域，再基于证据学习复现响应并估计不确定性。
ai.result: 代理模型仅占目标模型1%参数量即可实现可靠的不确定性量化。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户判断黑盒大模型回答的可信度，减少幻觉风险。

idea_spark.idea: 将对抗蒸馏与证据学习结合，使小模型学会判断大模型是否“知道”答案。
idea_spark.risk: 代理模型可能无法完全捕捉黑盒模型的复杂分布，导致估计偏差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发利用轻量模型作为“不确定性探针”来监控大型黑盒系统的输出可靠性。

zh.tldr: 提出分布对齐对抗蒸馏方法，用轻量代理模型估计黑盒大模型的不确定性。
zh.motivation: 黑盒大模型仅通过API访问，现有不确定性量化方法依赖多次采样或内部参数，无法实时估计且忽略推理过程隐含信息。

zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户判断黑盒大模型回答的可信度，减少幻觉风险。

idea_spark.idea: 将对抗蒸馏与证据学习结合，使小模型学会判断大模型是否“知道”答案。
idea_spark.risk: 代理模型可能无法完全捕捉黑盒模型的复杂分布，导致估计偏差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发利用轻量模型作为“不确定性探针”来监控大型黑盒系统的输出可靠性。

en.tldr: Proposes Distribution-Aligned Adversarial Distillation to estimate black-box LLM uncertainty via a lightweight proxy model.
en.motivation: Black-box LLMs are only accessible via APIs; existing uncertainty methods require multiple sampling or internal parameters, hindering real-time estimation and missing implicit reasoning information.
en.method: Uses a generation-discrimination architecture with adversarial distillation to guide a proxy model to learn high-quality output distribution regions, then reproduces responses and estimates uncertainty via evidence learning.
en.result: A proxy model with only 1% of the target LLM's parameters achieves reliable uncertainty quantification.
en.help_to_user: Helps users assess the trustworthiness of black-box LLM responses, reducing hallucination risks.

idea_spark.idea: Combines adversarial distillation with evidence learning to enable a small model to judge whether the large model 'knows' the answer.
idea_spark.risk: The proxy model may not fully capture the complex distribution of the black-box model, leading to estimation bias.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires using lightweight models as 'uncertainty probes' to monitor output reliability of large black-box systems.

papers.title: Domain Generalization through Spatial Relation Induction over Visual Primitives
papers.summary: Domain generalization requires identifying stable representations that support reliable classification across domains. Most existing methods seek such stability through improving the training process, for example, through model selection strategies, data augmentation, or feature-alignment objectives. Although these strategies can be effective, they leave the representation learning of structural composition implicit, which may limit performance on compositional domain generalization benchmarks.   In this work, we propose Primitive-Aware Relational Structure for domain gEneralization (PARSE), an image classification framework that factors visual recognition into visual primitives and their relational composition. We represent these compositions using soft binary, ternary, and quaternary predicates over primitive locations, yielding differentiable measures of spatial alignment that can be learned end-to-end. To learn primitives and relational structures jointly, we design an end-to-end architecture with three components: (1) a convolutional neural network (CNN) backbone that extracts general visual features, (2) a concept bottleneck layer that maps these features to primitive heatmaps with differentiable spatial coordinates, and (3) a structural scoring layer that evaluates candidate spatial relations among the detected primitives. We then compute class probability from the joint evidence of its class-specific relational compositions.   Across CUB-DG and the DomainBed benchmark suite,PARSE improves accuracy by over 4.5 percentage points on CUB-DG and remains competitive with existing DG methods on DomainBed.

ai.tldr: 提出PARSE框架，通过视觉基元及其空间关系组合实现域泛化，在CUB-DG上提升4.5%以上准确率。
ai.motivation: 现有域泛化方法隐式学习结构组合，在组合性泛化基准上表现有限。
ai.method: 设计端到端架构：CNN提取特征、概念瓶颈层生成基元热图、结构评分层评估空间关系，联合学习基元与关系结构。
ai.result: 在CUB-DG上准确率提升超4.5个百分点，在DomainBed上保持竞争力。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种显式建模视觉结构组合的域泛化方法，适用于需要跨域稳定分类的场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将视觉识别分解为基元检测与空间关系推理，利用可微谓词实现端到端学习。
idea_spark.risk: 基元定义依赖特定数据集，可能限制泛化；关系谓词复杂度随基元数量增加。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从组合性泛化挑战出发，借鉴概念瓶颈层思想，将隐式结构学习显式化。

zh.tldr: 提出PARSE框架，通过视觉基元及其空间关系组合实现域泛化，在CUB-DG上提升4.5%以上准确率。
zh.motivation: 现有域泛化方法隐式学习结构组合，在组合性泛化基准上表现有限。
zh.method: 设计端到端架构：CNN提取特征、概念瓶颈层生成基元热图、结构评分层评估空间关系，联合学习基元与关系结构。
zh.result: 在CUB-DG上准确率提升超4.5个百分点，在DomainBed上保持竞争力。
zh.help_to_user: 提供一种显式建模视觉结构组合的域泛化方法，适用于需要跨域稳定分类的场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将视觉识别分解为基元检测与空间关系推理，利用可微谓词实现端到端学习。
idea_spark.risk: 基元定义依赖特定数据集，可能限制泛化；关系谓词复杂度随基元数量增加。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从组合性泛化挑战出发，借鉴概念瓶颈层思想，将隐式结构学习显式化。

en.tldr: Proposes PARSE, a framework that factors visual recognition into visual primitives and their relational composition for domain generalization, achieving over 4.5% accuracy improvement on CUB-DG.
en.motivation: Existing domain generalization methods learn structural composition implicitly, limiting performance on compositional generalization benchmarks.
en.method: An end-to-end architecture with CNN backbone, concept bottleneck layer for primitive heatmaps, and structural scoring layer for spatial relations, jointly learning primitives and relational structures.
en.result: Outperforms prior methods by over 4.5 percentage points on CUB-DG and remains competitive on DomainBed.
en.help_to_user: Provides a method that explicitly models visual structural composition for domain generalization, suitable for cross-domain stable classification.

idea_spark.idea: Decompose visual recognition into primitive detection and spatial relation reasoning, using differentiable predicates for end-to-end learning.
idea_spark.risk: Primitive definitions may be dataset-specific, limiting generalization; relation predicate complexity grows with the number of primitives.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by compositional generalization challenges and concept bottleneck layers, making implicit structural learning explicit.

papers.title: OpenGaFF: Open-Vocabulary Gaussian Feature Field with Codebook Attention
papers.summary: Understanding open-vocabulary 3D scenes with Gaussian-based representations remains challenging due to fragmented and spatially inconsistent semantic predictions across multi-view observations. In this paper, we present OpenGaFF, a novel framework for open-vocabulary 3D scene understanding built upon 3D Gaussian Splatting. At the core of our method is a Gaussian Feature Field that models semantics as a continuous function of Gaussian geometry and appearance. By explicitly conditioning semantic predictions on geometric structure, this formulation strengthens the coupling between geometry and semantics, leading to improved spatial coherence across similar structures in 3D space. To further enforce object-level semantic consistency, we introduce a structured codebook that serves as a set of shared semantic primitives. Furthermore, a codebook-guided attention mechanism is proposed to retrieve language features via similarity matching between query embeddings and learned codebook entries, enabling robust open-vocabulary reasoning while reducing intra-object feature variance. Extensive experiments on standard 2D and 3D open-vocabulary benchmarks demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms prior approaches, achieving improved segmentation quality, stronger 3D semantic consistency and a semantically interpretable codebook that provides insight into the learned representation.

papers.title: Distortion-minimized de-homogenization for optimization of cell-size distribution in TPMS structures
papers.summary: This paper presents a homogenized topology optimization (TO) method for spatially optimizing cell-size distribution of triply-periodic minimal surface (TPMS) structures, with high accuracy in the optimized structural response after de-homogenization. To achieve this, we introduce a novel de-homogenization technique that directly minimizes the difference between the wavenumbers obtained from the target and actual size distributions. This minimization problem is efficiently solved as a typical Poisson's equation utilizing the discrete cosine transform. We first verify the proposed de-homogenization method through numerical examples, showcasing its capability in significantly reducing the known distortion of the de-homogenized TPMS structures from the conventional periodic modulation (PM) method. Then, we apply the proposed method to a stiffness maximization problem, to demonstrate its effectiveness in improving the structural response compared to the PM method. The proposed method successfully reduced the distortion of the de-homogenized structures compared to the PM method, leading to 0.8% difference in the strain energy compared to the homogenized model, as opposed to 63.6% difference in the PM method. The optimized structure from the proposed method shows a significant improvement in the strain energy by 50.1% compared to the uniform case in the FE analysis on the de-homogenized models, while the PM method results in a significant decrease of 45.8%. The experimental validation shows that the effective stiffness of the optimized structure from the proposed method is 54.2% higher than that of the uniform case, while the PM method results in a significant decrease by 77.3%. These results exhibit the proposed method effectively increases the accuracy of the de-homogenization, thereby maximizing the potential of the homogenized TO for the spatial cell-size optimization of TPMS structures.

ai.tldr: 提出一种畸变最小化的去均质化方法，用于优化三周期极小曲面结构的胞元尺寸分布，显著提高结构响应精度。
ai.motivation: 传统周期调制方法在去均质化后会产生严重畸变，导致优化结构响应与均质化模型差异巨大，限制了均质化拓扑优化的潜力。
ai.method: 通过最小化目标波数与实际波数之间的差异，将问题转化为泊松方程，并利用离散余弦变换高效求解。
ai.result: 与周期调制方法相比，畸变大幅降低，应变能差异从63.6%降至0.8%；优化结构应变能比均匀情况提升50.1%，实验验证有效刚度提升54.2%。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种高精度、低畸变的去均质化技术，可用于设计高性能TPMS点阵结构。

idea_spark.idea: 将去均质化畸变最小化问题与多物理场（如热、流体）耦合，实现多功能优化。
idea_spark.risk: 对于复杂几何或非线性材料，泊松方程假设可能失效，需验证鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用离散余弦变换求解泊松方程的思路，可启发其他涉及波数匹配的优化问题。

en.tldr: A distortion-minimized de-homogenization method is proposed for optimizing cell-size distribution in TPMS structures, achieving high accuracy in structural response.
en.motivation: Conventional periodic modulation (PM) method causes severe distortion in de-homogenized TPMS structures, leading to large discrepancies between optimized and homogenized responses, limiting the potential of homogenized topology optimization.

idea_spark.risk: Poisson equation assumption may fail for complex geometries or nonlinear materials; robustness needs verification.

papers.title: Identification for Inverse Gaussian Channels
papers.summary: We derive lower and upper bounds on the identification capacity of inverse Gaussian channels, a fundamental model for molecular communications in fluid environments. The analysis considers deterministic encoding schemes under a peak time constraint and characterizes the asymptotic growth of codebook sizes. A central result reveals that, under a mild regularity condition on the noise, i.e., the stochastic first arrival time of an information-carrying molecule propagating via diffusion and drift to the receiver, the identification capacity exhibits super-exponential growth in the codeword length, $n,$ i.e., $\sim 2^{(n \log n)R},$ where $R$ is the coding rate.

ai.tldr: 推导了逆高斯信道（分子通信模型）的识别容量上下界，发现码本大小在码长上呈超指数增长。
ai.motivation: 分子通信在流体环境中广泛存在，但逆高斯信道的识别容量尚未被刻画。
ai.method: 考虑峰值时间约束下的确定性编码方案，利用噪声的温和正则条件分析码本大小的渐近增长。
ai.result: 识别容量随码长n超指数增长，约为2^{(n log n)R}。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解分子通信中识别任务的极限性能。

idea_spark.idea: 利用分子到达时间的随机性设计高容量识别编码。
idea_spark.risk: 实际分子通信中噪声条件可能偏离理论假设。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将识别容量概念引入生物纳米网络或药物递送系统。

papers.title: Seeing What Shouldn't Be There: Counterfactual GANs for Medical Image Attribution
papers.summary: Ascription of an image gives insights into the objects that influence the classification of the whole image or its pixels towards a specific category. These insights help radiologists to visualize deformities in medical imaging. Most of the existing visualization techniques are based on discriminative models and highlight regions of the input image participating in the decision-making of a classifier. However, these approaches do not take all noticeable objects into account as their objective is to classify the input by using a minimal set of discriminative features. To overcome the issue, a counterfactual explanation (CX) based class-oriented feature attribution method is proposed. A counterfactual explanation (CX) explicates a causal reasoning process of the form: "if X had not happened, then Y would not have happened". The method is built on generative adversarial networks (GANs) with a cyclical-consistent loss function. We evaluate our method on three datasets: synthetic, tuberculosis and BraTS. All experiments confirm the efficacy of the proposed method. This study also highlighted the limitations of existing counterfactual explanation techniques in producing plausible counterfactual instances (CIs). Accompanying CXs with believable CIs thus provides self-explanatory analogy-based explanations. To this end, a CI generation method is proposed. Also, a novel technique is used to evaluate the quality of CI. The baseline results are produced on the BraTS dataset.

ai.tldr: 提出基于生成对抗网络和循环一致性损失的反事实解释方法，用于医学图像中类别相关的特征归因，并在三个数据集上验证了有效性。
ai.motivation: 现有可视化技术基于判别模型，仅关注最小判别特征，忽略了所有显著对象，导致归因不全面。
ai.method: 构建基于生成对抗网络的反事实解释框架，采用循环一致性损失函数，并引入反事实实例生成与质量评估技术。
ai.result: 在合成、肺结核和BraTS数据集上实验证明方法有效，并揭示了现有反事实解释在生成可信实例方面的局限。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助放射科医生可视化医学图像中的异常区域，提供类比式的自解释归因。

idea_spark.idea: 结合反事实实例与质量评估，构建自解释的类比推理系统，提升模型可解释性。
idea_spark.risk: 生成的反事实实例可能不真实或误导临床决策，需严格验证其医学合理性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴因果推理中的反事实逻辑，将生成对抗网络用于归因，启发更可信的AI解释方法。

en.tldr: Proposes a counterfactual explanation method based on GANs with cyclical-consistent loss for class-oriented feature attribution in medical images, validated on three datasets.
en.motivation: Existing visualization techniques rely on discriminative models that focus on minimal discriminative features, ignoring all salient objects and leading to incomplete attribution.
en.method: Builds a counterfactual explanation framework using GANs with a cyclical-consistent loss, and introduces counterfactual instance generation and quality evaluation.
en.result: Experiments on synthetic, tuberculosis, and BraTS datasets confirm efficacy, and highlight limitations of prior counterfactual methods in producing plausible instances.
en.help_to_user: Helps radiologists visualize deformities in medical images by providing self-explanatory analogy-based attributions.

idea_spark.idea: Combine counterfactual instances with quality evaluation to build self-explanatory analogy reasoning systems, enhancing model interpretability.
idea_spark.risk: Generated counterfactual instances may be unrealistic or mislead clinical decisions, requiring rigorous validation of medical plausibility.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging causal counterfactual logic with GANs for attribution inspires more trustworthy AI explanation methods.

papers.title: Robustness of Graph Self-Supervised Learning to Real-World Noise: A Case Study on Text-Driven Biomedical Graphs
papers.summary: Graph Self-Supervised Learning (GSSL) offers a powerful paradigm for learning graph representations without labeled data. However, existing work assumes clean, manually curated graphs. Recent advances in NLP enable the large-scale automatic extraction of knowledge graphs from text, opening new opportunities for GSSL while introducing substantial real-world noise. This type of noise remains largely unexplored, as prior robustness studies typically rely on synthetic perturbations. To address this gap, we present the first comprehensive evaluation of GSSL methods on text-driven graphs for unsupervised term typing. We introduce Noise-Aware Text-Driven Graph GSSL (NATD-GSSL), a unified framework that combines automatic graph construction, graph refinement, and GSSL. Our evaluation follows a dual-graph protocol that contrasts a noisy graph derived from MedMentions with a clean Unified Medical Language System (UMLS) reference graph, aligned through a shared gold standard. Our results reveal variability in robustness across both pretext tasks and Graph Neural Network (GNN) architectures. Relation reconstruction is highly sensitive to noise and benefits from well-defined schemas, whereas feature reconstruction is considerably more robust, achieving performance comparable to clean-graph settings. Contrastive objectives are generally less affected by noise but depend strongly on alignment with downstream tasks. GNN architecture also plays a critical role: bidirectional relational message-passing designs are better suited to noisy, text-driven graphs, while unidirectional relational ones perform best on clean graphs. Overall, NATD-GSSL provides practical guidance for applying GSSL to real-world, noisy graphs and achieves up to a 7\% improvement over pretrained language model baselines. All code and benchmarks are publicly available at https://github.com/OthmaneKabal/MC2GAE.

ai.tldr: 首次系统评估图自监督学习在文本驱动生物医学图上的鲁棒性，提出NATD-GSSL框架，发现关系重构对噪声敏感，特征重构更鲁棒，对比目标受下游任务对齐影响。
ai.motivation: 现有图自监督学习假设图是干净且人工整理的，但实际中从文本自动构建的图含有大量噪声，而先前鲁棒性研究仅使用合成扰动，缺乏对真实噪声的评估。
ai.method: 提出NATD-GSSL框架，包含自动图构建、图精炼和图自监督学习；采用双图协议，对比从MedMentions得到的噪声图与UMLS干净参考图。
ai.result: 关系重构对噪声高度敏感，特征重构鲁棒性接近干净图；对比目标受噪声影响较小但依赖下游任务对齐；双向关系消息传递架构更适合噪声图。
ai.help_to_user: 为在真实噪声图上应用图自监督学习提供实践指导，包括选择合适的前置任务和GNN架构。

idea_spark.idea: 结合图精炼与自监督学习，利用特征重构的鲁棒性设计更稳定的预训练任务。
idea_spark.risk: 图精炼可能过度过滤有用信息，导致信息丢失；双图协议依赖高质量参考图，实际中可能难以获得。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从文本自动构建图时，可先通过特征重构预训练，再针对下游任务微调，以平衡噪声鲁棒性与任务性能。

en.tldr: First comprehensive evaluation of graph self-supervised learning robustness on text-driven biomedical graphs with real-world noise, proposing NATD-GSSL framework; relation reconstruction is noise-sensitive, feature reconstruction is robust, and contrastive objectives depend on downstream alignment.
en.motivation: Existing GSSL assumes clean curated graphs, but automatically extracted text-driven graphs contain substantial real-world noise, which remains unexplored as prior robustness studies only use synthetic perturbations.
en.method: Proposes NATD-GSSL framework combining automatic graph construction, graph refinement, and GSSL; uses a dual-graph protocol comparing noisy MedMentions graph with clean UMLS reference graph.
en.result: Relation reconstruction is highly noise-sensitive; feature reconstruction is robust and comparable to clean graphs; contrastive objectives are less affected but depend on downstream alignment; bidirectional relational message-passing suits noisy graphs.
en.help_to_user: Provides practical guidance for applying GSSL to real-world noisy graphs, including selection of pretext tasks and GNN architectures.

idea_spark.idea: Combine graph refinement with self-supervised learning, leveraging feature reconstruction robustness to design more stable pretraining tasks.
idea_spark.risk: Graph refinement may over-filter useful information, causing information loss; dual-graph protocol relies on high-quality reference graphs which may be unavailable in practice.
idea_spark.inspiration: When constructing graphs from text, pretrain with feature reconstruction first, then fine-tune for downstream tasks to balance noise robustness and task performance.

papers.title: Liouville-type theorems for the 3D stationary Navier-Stokes equations in variable Lebesgue spaces
papers.summary: In \cite{CV23}, Chamorro and Vergara-Hermosilla established several Liouville-type theorems to the Navier-Stokes equations in the framework of the variable Lebesgue spaces. These results may allow the variable exponent $p(\cdot)$ beyond the range of $[3,\frac{9}{2}]$ in some non-negligible regions in $\mathbb{R}^3$. In this paper we find two new non-negligible regions, in which the Liouville-type theorems still hold under some assumptions imposed on $p(\cdot)$ in these regions. Our results can be regarded as the marginal cases of the results in \cite{CV23}.

ai.tldr: 本文在可变Lebesgue空间中找到了两个新的非可忽略区域，在这些区域中，三维稳态Navier-Stokes方程的Liouville型定理仍然成立，是先前结果的边际情形。
ai.motivation: 扩展Chamorro和Vergara-Hermosilla关于Navier-Stokes方程Liouville型定理的适用范围，特别是允许可变指数p(⋅)在非可忽略区域超出[3,9/2]的范围。
ai.method: 通过分析可变Lebesgue空间中的函数性质，在特定假设下构造新的非可忽略区域，并证明Liouville型定理在这些区域中成立。
ai.result: 找到了两个新的非可忽略区域，在这些区域中Liouville型定理成立，这些结果被视为先前工作的边际情形。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解Navier-Stokes方程在可变指数空间中的解的唯一性和衰减性质，为流体力学中的正则性理论提供新视角。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将非可忽略区域的概念与加权Sobolev空间结合，研究更一般的非线性偏微分方程的解的渐近行为。
idea_spark.risk: 新区域的定义可能依赖于p(⋅)的特定假设，推广到更一般的指数函数时可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受边际情形分析的启发，可探索其他临界指数或边界区域对解的正则性的影响。

en.tldr: This paper identifies two new non-negligible regions in variable Lebesgue spaces where Liouville-type theorems for the 3D stationary Navier-Stokes equations hold, serving as marginal cases of previous results.
en.motivation: To extend the applicability of Liouville-type theorems for Navier-Stokes equations beyond the exponent range [3, 9/2] in certain non-negligible regions of ℝ³.
en.method: By analyzing function properties in variable Lebesgue spaces, new non-negligible regions are constructed under specific assumptions on p(⋅), and the validity of Liouville-type theorems is proved in these regions.
en.result: Two new non-negligible regions are found where Liouville-type theorems hold, and these results are regarded as marginal cases of prior work.
en.help_to_user: Provides insights into uniqueness and decay properties of solutions to Navier-Stokes equations in variable exponent spaces, contributing to regularity theory in fluid dynamics.

idea_spark.idea: Combine the concept of non-negligible regions with weighted Sobolev spaces to study asymptotic behavior of solutions to more general nonlinear PDEs.
idea_spark.risk: The definition of new regions may rely on specific assumptions on p(⋅), potentially failing for more general exponent functions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by marginal case analysis, explore the influence of other critical exponents or boundary regions on solution regularity.

papers.title: A Unified Approach to Beta Moments, Combinatorial Identities, and Random Walks
papers.summary: The study of random walks has increasingly been popular across diverse disciplines such as statistics, mathematics, quantum physics, where they are used to model paths consisting of successive random steps in a mathematical space. A fundamental quantity of interest is the probability that a simple symmetric random walk returns to the origin after 2n steps. In this paper, we develop a unified probabilistic approach that connects the return probabilities in arbitrary dimensions with moment representations. Using this framework, we provide probabilistic proofs of several combinatorial identities involving beta and gamma functions, and derive new combinatorial identities in general dimensions.

ai.tldr: 提出统一概率框架，连接任意维简单对称随机游走的返回概率与Beta矩，并给出组合恒等式的概率证明。
ai.motivation: 随机游走在多学科中广泛应用，返回概率是核心量，但现有方法缺乏统一视角。
ai.method: 建立返回概率与Beta矩之间的统一概率表示，利用该框架推导组合恒等式。
ai.result: 提供了涉及Beta和Gamma函数的组合恒等式的概率证明，并导出了新的一般维数恒等式。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解随机游走返回概率与特殊函数之间的深层联系，以及如何用概率方法证明组合恒等式。

idea_spark.idea: 将返回概率的矩表示与Beta分布结合，可能用于设计新的随机模拟算法或加速蒙特卡洛方法。
idea_spark.risk: 框架依赖对称性和简单随机游走假设，扩展到非对称或复杂图结构时可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受概率方法证明组合恒等式的启发，可尝试用类似思路研究其他特殊函数（如超几何函数）的恒等式。

en.tldr: A unified probabilistic framework connecting return probabilities of simple symmetric random walks in arbitrary dimensions with beta moments, yielding probabilistic proofs of combinatorial identities.
en.motivation: Random walks are widely used across disciplines; return probabilities are fundamental but lack a unified treatment.
en.method: Establish a unified probabilistic representation linking return probabilities to beta moments, then derive combinatorial identities.
en.result: Provide probabilistic proofs of combinatorial identities involving beta and gamma functions, and derive new identities in general dimensions.
en.help_to_user: Understand the deep connection between random walk return probabilities and special functions, and how to prove combinatorial identities probabilistically.

idea_spark.idea: Combine the moment representation of return probabilities with beta distributions to design new stochastic simulation algorithms or accelerate Monte Carlo methods.
idea_spark.risk: The framework relies on symmetry and simple random walk assumptions; it may fail for asymmetric or complex graph structures.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by probabilistic proofs of combinatorial identities, one could similarly study identities for other special functions (e.g., hypergeometric functions).

papers.title: Adding Thermal Awareness to Visual Systems in Real-Time via Distilled Diffusion Models
papers.summary: Purely RGB-based vision models often fail to provide reliable cues in challenging scenarios such as nighttime and fog, leading to degraded performance and safety risks. Infrared imaging captures heat-emitting sources and provides critical complementary information, but existing high-fidelity fusion methods suffer from prohibitive latency, rendering them impractical for real-time edge deployment. To address this, we propose FusionProxy, a real-time image fusion module designed as a fully independent, plug-and-play component with diffusion level quality. FusionProxy exploits two complementary statistics of a teacher sample ensemble: per-pixel variance in raw image space, used to weight pixel-level supervision, and per-pixel variance inside frozen foundation backbones, used to route feature-level alignment spatially. Once trained, FusionProxy can be directly integrated into any visual perception system without joint optimization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance on static recognition tasks and significantly enhances robustness in dynamic tasks, including closed-loop autonomous driving. Crucially, FusionProxy achieves real-time inference speeds on diverse platforms, from high-end GPUs to commodity hardware, providing a flexible and generalizable solution for all-day perception.

ai.tldr: 提出FusionProxy，一个实时图像融合模块，利用扩散模型质量，通过像素级和特征级对齐，实现全天候感知。
ai.motivation: 纯RGB视觉模型在夜间、雾天等挑战场景下性能下降，红外成像虽能补充信息但现有融合方法延迟高，无法实时部署。
ai.method: FusionProxy利用教师样本集的两个互补统计量：原始图像空间的逐像素方差用于加权像素级监督，冻结基础骨干网络内的逐像素方差用于空间对齐特征级对齐。
ai.result: 在静态识别任务上表现优越，在动态任务（如闭环自动驾驶）中显著增强鲁棒性，并在多种硬件平台上实现实时推理。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过轻量级扩散蒸馏实现实时热感知融合，提升视觉系统在恶劣环境下的可靠性。

idea_spark.idea: 利用教师模型集成的不确定性（方差）来指导学生模型训练，实现高质量实时融合。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖预训练教师模型的质量和多样性，若教师模型偏差大可能影响融合效果。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从扩散模型蒸馏中借鉴不确定性加权思想，用于实时边缘部署的视觉增强。

en.tldr: Proposes FusionProxy, a real-time image fusion module with diffusion-level quality, using pixel-wise and feature-wise alignment for all-day perception.
en.motivation: RGB-only vision models fail under challenging conditions like night and fog; infrared provides complementary cues but existing fusion methods are too slow for real-time edge deployment.
en.method: FusionProxy leverages two complementary statistics from a teacher ensemble: per-pixel variance in raw image space for weighted pixel supervision, and per-pixel variance inside frozen foundation backbones for spatially routed feature alignment.
en.result: Achieves superior performance on static recognition tasks and significantly enhances robustness in dynamic tasks like closed-loop autonomous driving, with real-time inference on diverse hardware.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to achieve real-time thermal-aware fusion via distilled diffusion models, improving vision system reliability in adverse conditions.

idea_spark.idea: Use uncertainty (variance) from teacher model ensemble to guide student training for high-quality real-time fusion.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on quality and diversity of pre-trained teacher models; biased teachers may degrade fusion performance.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draws inspiration from diffusion model distillation using uncertainty weighting for real-time edge deployment of visual enhancement.

papers.title: Weighted Phase-Space Paths for Exact Wigner Dynamics
papers.summary: A quantum state can be written in phase space, but the resulting object is not generally the probability density of a positive stochastic process on ordinary phase space. We spell this out for Wigner dynamics. If a positive phase-space process is required only to reproduce the Born density after integrating over momentum, the requirement fixes only an integrated current; the local drift and diffusion remain underdetermined. If one instead requires all Weyl-ordered expectation values, the phase-space object is fixed to be the Wigner function. For non-quadratic potentials the Wigner--Moyal generator contains higher-order, signed momentum-transfer terms, so it is not the Fokker--Planck generator of a positive Brownian diffusion. The exact Wigner function must therefore be reconstructed, in a stochastic representation, as a weighted empirical measure \[ \FW(\z,t)=\E_{\Pp}[W_tδ(\z-\z_t)], \qquad \z=(q,p), \] rather than the unweighted density of sampled carrier trajectories. With classical Hamiltonian flow as the carrier, all nonclassical correction beyond classical transport sits in the Moyal residual and can be represented by signed weights or branching events. The same split defines a residual diagnostic that vanishes for quadratic Hamiltonians and measures what classical carrier transport misses in anharmonic dynamics. The formulation also gives a forward--reverse relation for signed Wigner path measures. The ratio of forward and reversed contributions separates into a positive magnitude factor and a sign factor. This sign records the parity of the Wigner interference contribution; it is not a thermodynamic entropy production.

ai.tldr: 提出加权相空间路径方法，通过带符号权重的随机过程精确再现Wigner函数，并给出前向-反向关系。
ai.motivation: Wigner函数不是正定随机过程的概率密度，传统随机方法无法精确再现其演化。
ai.method: 将Wigner函数表示为加权经验测度，以经典哈密顿流为载体，所有非经典修正由Moyal残差中的符号权重或分支事件表示。
ai.result: 建立了前向-反向路径测度比，分离为正幅度因子和符号因子，符号记录Wigner干涉的宇称。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种精确模拟Wigner动力学的随机框架，并诊断非谐哈密顿量中的经典输运缺失。

idea_spark.idea: 利用前向-反向比中的符号因子作为量子干涉的度量，可能用于量子热力学或退相干研究。
idea_spark.risk: 符号权重可能导致信噪比随演化时间指数衰减，需要有效的重采样或分支策略。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将经典输运与量子修正分离，启发设计混合算法：经典部分用无权重轨迹，量子部分用稀疏符号事件。
