idea_spark.inspiration: 将经典输运与量子修正分离，启发设计混合算法：经典部分用无权重轨迹，量子部分用稀疏符号事件。

en.tldr: Proposes weighted phase-space paths to exactly reproduce the Wigner function via signed stochastic weights, and derives a forward-reverse relation.
en.motivation: The Wigner function is not a probability density of a positive stochastic process, so standard stochastic methods cannot reproduce its exact evolution.
en.method: Represent the Wigner function as a weighted empirical measure with classical Hamiltonian flow as carrier; all nonclassical corrections are captured by signed weights or branching events from the Moyal residual.
en.result: Establishes a forward-reverse path measure ratio that separates into a positive magnitude factor and a sign factor, where the sign records the parity of Wigner interference.
en.help_to_user: Provides a stochastic framework for exact Wigner dynamics and a diagnostic for what classical transport misses in anharmonic Hamiltonians.

idea_spark.idea: Use the sign factor in the forward-reverse ratio as a measure of quantum interference, potentially applicable to quantum thermodynamics or decoherence studies.
idea_spark.risk: Signed weights may cause exponential decay of signal-to-noise ratio over time, requiring efficient resampling or branching strategies.
idea_spark.inspiration: Separating classical transport from quantum corrections inspires hybrid algorithms: classical part with weightless trajectories, quantum part with sparse signed events.

papers.title: Hölder Stability from Exact Uniqueness for Finite-Dimensional Analytic Inverse Problems
papers.summary: We prove a stability theorem for finite-dimensional analytic inverse problems. Let \(U\subset\R^m\) be an open parameter set, let \(F(p)\) be a boundary measurement operator, and let \(R(p)\) be the finite-dimensional quantity to be recovered. If \(F\) is real analytic and \[   F(p)=F(q)\quad\Longrightarrow\quad R(p)=R(q), \] then \(R\) satisfies a Hölder stability estimate on every compact subset of \(U\). The proof uses a Hilbert--Schmidt scalarization of the operator equation \(F(p)=F(q)\) and the Łojasiewicz distance inequality. We also prove that, after fixing countable dense families of boundary inputs and tests, finitely many scalar matrix elements of the data give the same Hölder recovery on compact parameter sets. This finite-measurement conclusion is qualitative: the proof does not give an effective measurement list, exponent, or constant. The finite-measurement statement follows from finite determinacy of real analytic zero sets. We apply the result to local Neumann-to-Dirichlet data for piecewise constant anisotropic conductivities and to localized Dirichlet-to-Neumann data for piecewise homogeneous anisotropic elasticity.

ai.tldr: 证明了有限维解析反问题中，若映射F是实解析且由F唯一决定R，则在紧集上R满足Hölder稳定性估计。
ai.motivation: 为解析反问题提供统一的稳定性理论，并说明有限测量数据仍能保证Hölder恢复。
ai.method: 利用Hilbert–Schmidt标量化将算子方程转化为标量方程，结合Łojasiewicz距离不等式证明稳定性；再通过实解析零集的有限决定性得到有限测量结论。
ai.result: 在紧参数集上得到Hölder稳定性估计，并证明存在可数稠密边界输入/测试族使得有限个矩阵元即可实现相同恢复。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解解析反问题中唯一性蕴含稳定性的机制，以及有限测量数据的理论可行性。

idea_spark.idea: 利用实解析零集的有限决定性，将无限维数据压缩为有限个标量测量仍保持恢复能力。
idea_spark.risk: 结论是定性的，未给出有效测量列表、指数或常数，实际应用需额外构造。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可尝试将类似有限测量思想用于非线性反问题或含噪声数据场景。

idea_spark.risk: 结论是定性的，未给出有效测量列表、指数或常数，实际应用需额外构造。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可尝试将类似有限测量思想用于非线性反问题或含噪声数据场景。

en.tldr: Proves that for finite-dimensional analytic inverse problems, if F is real analytic and R is uniquely determined by F, then R satisfies a Hölder stability estimate on compact subsets.
en.motivation: To provide a unified stability theory for analytic inverse problems and show that finitely many measurements still guarantee Hölder recovery.
en.method: Uses Hilbert–Schmidt scalarization to convert the operator equation into scalar equations, combined with the Łojasiewicz distance inequality; finite-measurement conclusion follows from finite determinacy of real analytic zero sets.
en.result: Obtains Hölder stability on compact parameter sets and proves existence of countable dense families of boundary inputs/tests such that finitely many scalar matrix elements yield the same recovery.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how uniqueness implies stability in analytic inverse problems and the theoretical feasibility of finite measurements.

idea_spark.idea: Exploit finite determinacy of real analytic zero sets to compress infinite-dimensional data into finitely many scalar measurements while preserving recovery capability.
idea_spark.risk: The conclusion is qualitative; no effective measurement list, exponent, or constant is provided, requiring additional construction for practical use.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider applying similar finite-measurement ideas to nonlinear inverse problems or noisy data scenarios.

papers.title: DCR: Counterfactual Attractor Guidance for Rare Compositional Generation
papers.summary: Diffusion models generate realistic visual content, yet often fail to produce rare but plausible compositions. When prompted with combinations that are valid but underrepresented in training data, such as a snowy beach or a rainbow at night, the generation process frequently collapses toward more common alternatives. We identify this failure mode as default completion bias, where denoising trajectories are implicitly attracted toward high-frequency semantic configurations. Existing guidance mechanisms do not explicitly model this competing tendency and therefore struggle to prevent such collapse. We introduce Default Completion Repulsion (DCR), a training-free framework that explicitly models and suppresses default completion behavior. DCR constructs a counterfactual attractor by relaxing the rare compositional factor while preserving surrounding semantics, inducing an alternative denoising trajectory reflecting the model's preferred completion. We define the discrepancy between target and attractor trajectories as a counterfactual drift, and propose a projection-based repulsion mechanism that removes guidance components aligned with this drift direction. This suppresses undesired frequent completions while preserving other semantic components. DCR operates entirely within the standard diffusion sampling process without retraining or architectural modification. Experiments on rare compositional prompts show that DCR improves compositional fidelity while maintaining visual quality. Our analysis further shows that the framework exposes and counteracts intrinsic model biases, offering a new perspective on controllable generation beyond explicit constraint enforcement.

ai.tldr: 提出默认完成排斥（DCR）框架，通过构建反事实吸引子和投影排斥机制，抑制扩散模型在罕见组合生成中的默认完成偏差。
ai.motivation: 扩散模型在生成罕见但合理的组合（如雪地海滩、夜间彩虹）时，常因训练数据中的高频语义配置而坍缩为常见结果，现有引导方法无法显式建模这种竞争倾向。
ai.method: DCR通过放松罕见组合因子构建反事实吸引子，定义目标轨迹与吸引子轨迹之间的反事实漂移，并采用基于投影的排斥机制移除沿该漂移方向的引导分量。
ai.result: 在罕见组合提示上，DCR在保持视觉质量的同时提升了组合保真度，并揭示了模型内在偏差。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户生成罕见但合理的视觉组合，避免模型偏向常见模式。

idea_spark.idea: 将反事实吸引子与投影排斥结合，无需重新训练即可引导生成过程。
idea_spark.risk: 反事实吸引子的构造可能引入新的偏差，且对罕见组合的语义放松程度需谨慎设定。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从因果推断中的反事实推理获得启发，将模型默认行为视为一种“因果效应”进行干预。

en.tldr: Proposes Default Completion Repulsion (DCR), a training-free framework that constructs counterfactual attractors and uses projection-based repulsion to suppress default completion bias in diffusion models for rare compositional generation.
en.motivation: Diffusion models often collapse to common alternatives when generating rare but plausible compositions (e.g., snowy beach, rainbow at night) due to high-frequency semantic configurations in training data; existing guidance methods fail to explicitly model this competing tendency.
en.method: DCR constructs a counterfactual attractor by relaxing the rare compositional factor, defines the discrepancy between target and attractor trajectories as counterfactual drift, and applies projection-based repulsion to remove guidance components aligned with this drift.
en.result: On rare compositional prompts, DCR improves compositional fidelity while maintaining visual quality, and reveals intrinsic model biases.
en.help_to_user: Helps users generate rare but plausible visual compositions, avoiding the model's bias toward common patterns.

idea_spark.idea: Combining counterfactual attractors with projection repulsion enables guidance without retraining.
idea_spark.risk: Construction of counterfactual attractors may introduce new biases, and the degree of semantic relaxation for rare compositions needs careful tuning.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by counterfactual reasoning in causal inference, treating the model's default behavior as a 'causal effect' to be intervened upon.

papers.title: Global self-optimizing control of batch processes
papers.summary: This work considers to achieve near-optimal operation for a class of batch processes by employing self-optimizing control (SOC). Comparing with a continuous one, a batch process exhibits stronger nonlinearity with dynamics because of the non-steady operation condition. This necessitates a global version of SOC to achieve satisfactory performance. Meanwhile, it also makes the existing global SOC (gSOC) not directly applicable to batch processes due to the causality amongst variables. Therefore, it is necessary to extend the original gSOC to batch processes. In addition to the nonconvexity challenge of the original gSOC problem, the new extension for batch processes has to face even more challenges. Particularly, the causality due to dynamics of batch processes brings in structural constraints on controlled variables (CVs), making a CV selection problem even more difficult. To address these challenges, the gSOC problem is recast in a vectorized formulation and it is proved that the structural constraints considered are linear in the vectorized formulation. Moreover, a novel shortcut method is proposed to efficiently find sub-optimal but more transparent solutions for this problem. The effectiveness of the new approach is validated through a case study of a fed-batch reactor, where CVs are constructed through a combination matrix with a repetitive structure, resulting in a simple SOC scheme. This simplicity facilitates the implementation of the SOC approach and enhances its practical applicability and robustness.

ai.tldr: 针对间歇过程的强非线性和动态特性，提出一种全局自优化控制方法，通过向量化重构和快捷方法解决受控变量选择的结构约束问题。
ai.motivation: 间歇过程因非稳态操作而呈现强非线性和动态性，现有全局自优化控制方法因变量间的因果性不直接适用，需要扩展以处理结构约束。
ai.method: 将全局自优化控制问题重新表述为向量化形式，证明结构约束在该形式下是线性的；并提出一种快捷方法高效求解次优但更透明的解。
ai.result: 在补料间歇反应器案例中，通过具有重复结构的组合矩阵构造受控变量，得到简单的自优化控制方案，验证了方法的有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何为间歇过程设计全局自优化控制器，简化实施并提高鲁棒性。

idea_spark.idea: 将快捷方法扩展到多变量或大规模间歇过程，或结合机器学习自动发现重复结构。
idea_spark.risk: 次优解可能在某些工况下偏离最优性，需评估实际性能边界。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从动态因果约束的线性化处理中获得启发，可探索其他非线性约束的线性化近似方法。

en.tldr: A global self-optimizing control method is proposed for batch processes, addressing nonlinearity and dynamics via a vectorized formulation and a shortcut method to handle structural constraints on controlled variables.
en.motivation: Batch processes exhibit strong nonlinearity and dynamics due to non-steady operation, making existing global self-optimizing control inapplicable because of causality among variables; an extension is needed to handle structural constraints.
en.method: The global self-optimizing control problem is recast in a vectorized formulation, where structural constraints become linear; a novel shortcut method efficiently finds sub-optimal but more transparent solutions.
en.result: A case study on a fed-batch reactor demonstrates that controlled variables constructed via a repetitive combination matrix yield a simple self-optimizing control scheme, validating the approach.
en.help_to_user: Helps users design global self-optimizing controllers for batch processes, simplifying implementation and enhancing robustness.

idea_spark.idea: Extend the shortcut method to multivariable or large-scale batch processes, or integrate machine learning to automatically discover repetitive structures.
idea_spark.risk: Sub-optimal solutions may deviate from optimality under certain conditions; performance bounds need evaluation.
idea_spark.inspiration: The linearization of dynamic causality constraints inspires exploration of linear approximations for other nonlinear constraints.

papers.title: EchoXFlow: A Beamspace Echocardiography Dataset for Cardiac Motion, Flow, and Function
papers.summary: We introduce EchoXFlow, a clinical echocardiography dataset for learning from ultrasound in its native acquisition geometry rather than from scan-converted Cartesian videos. Existing public datasets offer limited opportunities to study cross-modal relationships between cardiac anatomy, myocardial motion, and blood flow, as Doppler is typically absent or fused as RGB overlays, and acquisitions are released after lossy vendor display processing. EchoXFlow comprises 37125 recordings from 666 routine-care examinations, preserving the timing, geometry, and modality relationships needed for physically grounded echo learning. Each recording is retained as separable modality-specific streams: temporally resolved 1D, 2D, and 3D data alongside multiple Doppler modalities, paired with a synchronized ECG. Clinical annotations span guideline-based measurements to dense 2D myocardial contours and 3D left-ventricular endocardial meshes. With its associated open-source tooling, EchoXFlow enables cross-modal, acquisition-aware learning tasks that cannot be formulated from conventional scan-converted videos alone, and serves as a testbed for 4D vision and physically grounded multi-modal learning more broadly.

ai.tldr: EchoXFlow是一个临床超声心动图数据集，保留原生采集几何结构，包含多模态流和同步ECG，支持跨模态和物理驱动的学习任务。
ai.motivation: 现有公开数据集缺乏多普勒模态或经过有损处理，难以研究心脏解剖、心肌运动和血流之间的跨模态关系。
ai.method: 收集666次常规检查的37125条记录，保留时序、几何和模态关系，提供分离的1D/2D/3D数据和多普勒模态，并配有同步ECG和临床标注。
ai.result: 数据集支持传统扫描转换视频无法实现的跨模态、采集感知学习任务，并可作为4D视觉和物理驱动多模态学习的测试平台。
ai.help_to_user: 提供原生几何超声数据和多模态标注，便于研究心脏运动、血流和功能的物理驱动学习。

idea_spark.idea: 利用EchoXFlow训练一个统一模型，同时预测心肌运动、血流速度和心功能指标。
idea_spark.risk: 数据量有限（666次检查），可能影响模型泛化性；多模态对齐噪声可能引入误差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受物理驱动学习和4D视觉启发，探索超声数据在原生几何下的端到端学习范式。

en.tldr: EchoXFlow is a clinical echocardiography dataset preserving native acquisition geometry, with multi-modal streams and synchronized ECG, enabling cross-modal and physically grounded learning tasks.
en.motivation: Existing public datasets lack Doppler modalities or undergo lossy processing, limiting the study of cross-modal relationships between cardiac anatomy, myocardial motion, and blood flow.
en.method: Collected 37,125 recordings from 666 routine exams, preserving timing, geometry, and modality relationships, providing separable 1D/2D/3D data and multiple Doppler modalities with synchronized ECG and clinical annotations.
en.result: The dataset enables cross-modal, acquisition-aware learning tasks not possible from conventional scan-converted videos, and serves as a testbed for 4D vision and physically grounded multi-modal learning.
en.help_to_user: Provides native-geometry ultrasound data and multi-modal annotations for studying physically grounded learning of cardiac motion, flow, and function.

idea_spark.idea: Train a unified model on EchoXFlow to simultaneously predict myocardial motion, blood flow velocity, and cardiac function indices.
idea_spark.risk: Limited data size (666 exams) may affect model generalization; multi-modal alignment noise could introduce errors.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by physically grounded learning and 4D vision, exploring end-to-end learning paradigms for ultrasound in its native geometry.

papers.title: Edge Triggering in IoT Mesh Networks: A Comparative Monte Carlo Study of Seven Detection Algorithms
papers.summary: Real-time event detection in Internet of Things (IoT) mesh sensor networks presents significant challenges due to time-varying noise conditions, limited computational resources at edge nodes, and the need for autonomous operation without centralised coordination. This paper presents a comprehensive Monte Carlo simulation study comparing the Temporal Spectral Noise-Floor Adaptation (TSNFA) method against six alternative detection algorithms, evaluated across a 200-node mesh network over 24 hours with realistic noise models including 60 Hz electromagnetic interference (EMI), sinusoidally drifting noise power (+/- 6 dB), and intermittent digital switching bursts. TSNFA achieves 100% detection rate with zero false positives, uniquely combining three interlocking defences: spectral band selection, temporal persistence filtering, and adaptive noise-floor tracking. Every competing algorithm omits at least one of these three defences and fails correspondingly, with false-positive rates ranging from 0 (Send-on-Delta, which also detects nothing) to 13,387,930 (broadband energy ratio). These results identify the three-defence combination as necessary and sufficient for autonomous edge triggering in resource-constrained IoT deployments.

ai.tldr: 本文通过蒙特卡洛模拟，在200节点物联网网状网络中比较了七种边缘触发检测算法，发现TSNFA算法通过三种防御组合实现100%检测率和零误报。
ai.motivation: 物联网网状传感器网络面临时变噪声、边缘节点计算资源有限和自主运行需求，现有算法难以在资源受限环境下实现可靠边缘触发。
ai.method: 构建200节点网状网络，模拟24小时真实噪声（60Hz电磁干扰、正弦漂移噪声、数字开关突发），比较TSNFA与六种对比算法的检测性能。
ai.result: TSNFA达到100%检测率且零误报，而所有对比算法因缺少至少一种防御（频谱选择、时间持久滤波、自适应噪声跟踪）而失败，误报率最高达13387930。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解在资源受限的物联网边缘节点上，实现可靠事件检测所需的关键算法设计原则。

idea_spark.idea: 将TSNFA算法应用于低功耗蓝牙网状网络，或结合联邦学习实现分布式噪声模型自适应。
idea_spark.risk: 算法在非高斯噪声或快速变化噪声场景下可能失效，需进一步验证鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受TSNFA的模块化防御启发，可设计可配置的检测框架，允许用户根据噪声特性选择防御组合。

en.tldr: This paper compares seven edge-triggering detection algorithms in a 200-node IoT mesh network via Monte Carlo simulation, showing TSNFA achieves 100% detection rate with zero false positives through a three-defense combination.
en.motivation: IoT mesh sensor networks face challenges from time-varying noise, limited edge node resources, and autonomous operation needs, making reliable edge triggering difficult in resource-constrained environments.
en.method: A 200-node mesh network was simulated over 24 hours with realistic noise (60Hz EMI, sinusoidal drifting noise, digital switching bursts), comparing TSNFA against six alternative algorithms.
en.result: TSNFA achieved 100% detection rate and zero false positives, while all competing algorithms failed due to missing at least one defense (spectral selection, temporal persistence filtering, adaptive noise-floor tracking), with false positive rates up to 13,387,930.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand key algorithm design principles for reliable event detection on resource-constrained IoT edge nodes.

idea_spark.idea: Apply TSNFA to Bluetooth Low Energy mesh networks, or combine with federated learning for distributed noise model adaptation.
idea_spark.risk: The algorithm may fail under non-Gaussian or rapidly changing noise, requiring further robustness validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by TSNFA's modular defenses, a configurable detection framework could be designed allowing users to select defense combinations based on noise characteristics.

papers.title: AI CFD Scientist: Toward Open-Ended Computational Fluid Dynamics Discovery with Physics-Aware AI Agents
papers.summary: Recent LLM-based agents have closed substantial portions of the scientific discovery loop in software-only machine-learning research, in chemistry, and in biology. Extending the same loop to high-fidelity physical simulators is harder, because solver completion does not imply physical validity and many failure modes appear only in field-level imagery rather than in solver logs. We present AI CFD Scientist, an open-source AI scientist for computational fluid dynamics (CFD) that, to our knowledge, is the first to span literature-grounded ideation, validated execution, vision-based physics verification, source-code modification, and figure-grounded writing within a single inspectable workflow. Three coupled pathways cover parameter sweeps within a fixed solver, case-local C++ library compilation for new physical models, and open-ended hypothesis search against a reference comparator, all running on OpenFOAM through Foam-Agent. At the center of the framework is a vision-language physics-verification gate that inspects rendered flow fields before any result is accepted, rerun, or written into a manuscript. On five tasks under a shared GPT-5.5 backbone, AI CFD Scientist autonomously discovers a Spalart-Allmaras runtime correction that reduces lower-wall Cf RMSE against DNS by 7.89% on the periodic hill at Reh=5600; under matched LLM cost, two strong general AI-scientist baselines (ARIS, DeepScientist) execute partial CFD workflows but lack the domain-specific validity gates needed to convert runs into defensible scientific claims; and a controlled planted-failure ablation shows that the vision-language gate detects 14 of 16 silent failures missed by solver-level checks. Code, prompts, and run artifacts are released at https://github.com/csml-rpi/cfd-scientist.

ai.tldr: 提出AI CFD Scientist，首个结合文献构思、验证执行、视觉物理验证和自动写作的开放源码计算流体力学AI科学家。
ai.motivation: 现有LLM智能体在软件、化学、生物学中已实现科学发现闭环，但高保真物理模拟因求解器完成不代表物理有效、失败模式常出现在场图像而非日志中而难以扩展。
ai.method: 构建三条耦合路径：固定求解器参数扫描、新物理模型C++库编译、开放假设搜索；核心是视觉-语言物理验证门，检查渲染流场后才接受结果。
ai.result: 在GPT-5.5骨干下，自主发现Spalart-Allmaras运行时修正，使周期山Cf RMSE降低7.89%；视觉-语言门检测出16个静默失败中的14个。
ai.help_to_user: 提供可复现的AI驱动CFD研究框架，帮助用户自动化文献启发、模拟验证和论文撰写。

idea_spark.idea: 将视觉-语言门与强化学习结合，让智能体主动探索失败模式并优化求解器。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖LLM的视觉理解能力，可能对复杂三维流场误判；计算成本高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受AI科学家在化学、生物学中成功启发，将闭环扩展至物理模拟。

zh.tldr: 提出AI CFD Scientist，首个结合文献构思、验证执行、视觉物理验证和自动写作的开放源码计算流体力学AI科学家。
zh.motivation: 现有LLM智能体在软件、化学、生物学中已实现科学发现闭环，但高保真物理模拟因求解器完成不代表物理有效、失败模式常出现在场图像而非日志中而难以扩展。
zh.method: 构建三条耦合路径：固定求解器参数扫描、新物理模型C++库编译、开放假设搜索；核心是视觉-语言物理验证门，检查渲染流场后才接受结果。
zh.result: 在GPT-5.5骨干下，自主发现Spalart-Allmaras运行时修正，使周期山Cf RMSE降低7.89%；视觉-语言门检测出16个静默失败中的14个。
zh.help_to_user: 提供可复现的AI驱动CFD研究框架，帮助用户自动化文献启发、模拟验证和论文撰写。

idea_spark.idea: 将视觉-语言门与强化学习结合，让智能体主动探索失败模式并优化求解器。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖LLM的视觉理解能力，可能对复杂三维流场误判；计算成本高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受AI科学家在化学、生物学中成功启发，将闭环扩展至物理模拟。

en.tldr: Proposes AI CFD Scientist, the first open-source AI scientist for computational fluid dynamics that integrates literature-grounded ideation, validated execution, vision-based physics verification, and automated writing.
en.motivation: Existing LLM agents close the scientific discovery loop in software, chemistry, and biology, but extending to high-fidelity physical simulators is harder because solver completion does not guarantee physical validity and failures often appear in field images rather than solver logs.
en.method: Three coupled pathways: parameter sweeps, C++ library compilation for new models, and open-ended hypothesis search; core is a vision-language physics-verification gate that inspects rendered flow fields before accepting results.
en.result: Under GPT-5.5 backbone, autonomously discovers a Spalart-Allmaras runtime correction reducing Cf RMSE by 7.89% on periodic hill; vision-language gate detects 14 of 16 silent failures missed by solver checks.
en.help_to_user: Provides a reproducible AI-driven CFD research framework to automate literature-inspired simulation, validation, and manuscript writing.

idea_spark.idea: Combine the vision-language gate with reinforcement learning to let agents actively explore failure modes and optimize solvers.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on LLM visual understanding, which may misjudge complex 3D flow fields; high computational cost.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by successful AI scientist loops in chemistry and biology, extending the closed loop to physical simulations.

papers.title: Coordination Matters: Evaluation of Cooperative Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
papers.summary: Cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) benchmarks commonly emphasize aggregate outcomes such as return, success rate, or completion time. While essential, these metrics often fail to reveal how agents coordinate, particularly in settings where agents, tasks, and joint assignment choices scale combinatorially. We propose a coordination-aware evaluation perspective that supplements return with process-level diagnostics. We instantiate this perspective using STAT, a controlled commitment-constrained spatial task-allocation testbed that systematically varies agents, tasks, and environment size while holding observation access and task rules fixed. We evaluate six representative value-based MARL methods across varying levels of centralization. Our results show that similar return trends can reflect distinct coordination mechanisms, including differences in redundant assignment, assignment diversity, and task-completion efficiency. We find that in commitment-constrained task allocation, performance under scale is shaped not only by nominal action-space size, but also by assignment pressure, sparse decision opportunities, and redundant choices among interdependent agents. Our findings motivate coordination-aware evaluation as a necessary complement to return-based benchmarking for cooperative MARL.

ai.tldr: 提出一种协调感知的评估视角，通过过程级诊断补充回报指标，揭示多智能体强化学习中的协调机制差异。
ai.motivation: 现有基准主要关注回报等聚合指标，无法揭示智能体在组合性任务中的协调方式。
ai.method: 构建约束承诺的空间任务分配测试床STAT，系统变化智能体、任务和环境规模，评估六种基于价值的MARL方法。
ai.result: 相似回报趋势可能对应不同的协调机制，包括冗余分配、分配多样性和任务完成效率的差异。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究者理解多智能体协调的细微差别，避免仅依赖回报指标误导评估。

idea_spark.idea: 设计动态调整承诺约束的机制，以平衡协调灵活性与任务分配效率。
idea_spark.risk: 过程级诊断可能增加评估复杂度，且需领域专家解释协调模式。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴人类团队协作中的角色分配和冗余策略，启发更鲁棒的MARL算法设计。

en.tldr: Proposes a coordination-aware evaluation perspective that supplements return with process-level diagnostics to reveal differences in coordination mechanisms in cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning.
en.motivation: Existing benchmarks emphasize aggregate outcomes like return, which fail to reveal how agents coordinate in combinatorially scaling settings.
en.method: Introduces STAT, a commitment-constrained spatial task-allocation testbed, and evaluates six value-based MARL methods across varying centralization levels.
en.result: Similar return trends can reflect distinct coordination mechanisms, including differences in redundant assignment, assignment diversity, and task-completion efficiency.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers understand nuances in multi-agent coordination and avoid misleading conclusions from return-only evaluation.

idea_spark.idea: Design mechanisms that dynamically adjust commitment constraints to balance coordination flexibility and task allocation efficiency.
idea_spark.risk: Process-level diagnostics may increase evaluation complexity and require domain expertise to interpret coordination patterns.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draws inspiration from role assignment and redundancy strategies in human teamwork to inspire more robust MARL algorithms.

papers.title: Sheet as Token: A Graph-Enhanced Representation for Multi-Sheet Spreadsheet Understanding
papers.summary: Workbook-scale spreadsheet understanding is increasingly important for language-model-based data analysis agents, but remains challenging because relevant information is often distributed across multiple sheets with heterogeneous schemas, layouts, and implicit relationships. Existing retrieval-augmented approaches typically decompose spreadsheets into rows, columns, or blocks to improve scalability; however, such chunk-centric representations can fragment worksheets into isolated text spans and weaken global sheet-level semantics. We propose Sheet as Token, a graph-enhanced framework that treats each worksheet as a unified semantic unit for multi-sheet spreadsheet retrieval. Our method extracts schema-aware records from sheet names, column headers, representative values, and layout features, and encodes each worksheet into a compact dense token. Given a natural-language query, a Graph Retriever constructs a query-specific candidate graph over sheet tokens using semantic, query-conditioned, schema-consistency, and shape-compatibility relations, and composes these channels through a multi-stage graph transformer to retrieve supporting sheet sets. Experiments on a constructed multi-sheet spreadsheet corpus show that sheet-level tokenization learns stable representations, and that graph-enhanced cross-sheet reasoning improves listwise retrieval over a shallow graph baseline with limited additional graph-side computation. These results suggest that sheet-level tokenization is a promising abstraction for scalable multi-sheet spreadsheet understanding.

ai.tldr: 提出 Sheet as Token 框架，将每个工作表编码为紧凑的密集令牌，并通过图增强检索实现多工作表理解。
ai.motivation: 现有方法将工作表分解为行/列/块，导致全局语义碎片化，难以处理跨工作表的异构关系。
ai.method: 提取模式感知记录（表名、列头、代表值、布局特征）编码为令牌；构建查询特定候选图，利用语义、查询条件、模式一致性和形状兼容性关系，通过多阶段图变换器检索支持工作表集。
ai.result: 在构建的多工作表语料库上，工作表级令牌化学习到稳定表示，图增强跨表推理在列表检索上优于浅层图基线，且额外计算开销有限。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何将工作表视为统一语义单元，结合图神经网络实现可扩展的多工作表检索与理解。

idea_spark.idea: 将每个工作表视为一个令牌，利用图结构建模跨表关系，避免传统分块导致的语义丢失。
idea_spark.risk: 图构建和变换器可能引入额外计算成本，且对模式一致性假设敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受图神经网络在关系推理中的成功启发，将表格理解问题转化为图节点检索问题。

en.tldr: Proposes Sheet as Token, a graph-enhanced framework that encodes each worksheet as a compact dense token for multi-sheet spreadsheet retrieval.
en.motivation: Existing chunk-centric representations fragment worksheets into isolated spans, weakening global sheet-level semantics for cross-sheet reasoning.
en.method: Extracts schema-aware records (sheet names, column headers, representative values, layout features) to encode each worksheet into a token; builds a query-specific candidate graph with semantic, query-conditioned, schema-consistency, and shape-compatibility relations, then uses a multi-stage graph transformer to retrieve supporting sheets.
en.result: On a constructed multi-sheet corpus, sheet-level tokenization learns stable representations, and graph-enhanced cross-sheet reasoning improves listwise retrieval over a shallow graph baseline with limited extra computation.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to treat worksheets as unified semantic units and leverage graph neural networks for scalable multi-sheet retrieval and understanding.

idea_spark.idea: Treat each worksheet as a token and use graph structures to model cross-sheet relations, avoiding semantic loss from chunking.
idea_spark.risk: Graph construction and transformer may introduce extra computational cost and are sensitive to schema consistency assumptions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the success of graph neural networks in relational reasoning, reformulating table understanding as a graph node retrieval problem.

papers.title: Rethinking RL for LLM Reasoning: It's Sparse Policy Selection, Not Capability Learning
papers.summary: Reinforcement learning has become the standard for improving reasoning in large language models, yet evidence increasingly suggests that RL does not teach new strategies; it redistributes probability mass over solutions the base model already contains. In this work, we ask: if RL merely steers the model toward paths it already knows, is the RL optimization loop itself necessary? Through token-level analysis across multiple model families and RL algorithms, we find that RL's beneficial footprint is a sparse, predictable correction concentrated at high-entropy decision points where the model is uncertain which branch to take. Only 1--3\% of token positions are affected, the promoted token always lies within the base model's top-5 alternatives, and targeted corrections at those few positions causally recover a large fraction of RL's accuracy gain, while random corrections fail. The base model's own entropy identifies these positions without any RL-trained model, and the entire correction is low-dimensional, representable in a tiny fraction of model parameters. These findings reframe reasoning improvement as sparse policy selection, not capability acquisition. We translate this insight into ReasonMaxxer, a minimal RL-free method that applies contrastive loss only at entropy-gated decision points, using a few hundred base-model rollouts and no online generation. Across three model families, six scales, and six math reasoning benchmarks, ReasonMaxxer matches or exceeds full RL performance while requiring only tens of problems and minutes of single-GPU training, a reduction in training cost of roughly three orders of magnitude.

ai.tldr: 强化学习提升大模型推理能力并非学习新策略，而是稀疏地选择已有策略。
ai.motivation: 现有证据表明强化学习并未教会模型新策略，而是重新分配概率质量，因此质疑强化学习优化循环的必要性。
ai.method: 通过token级分析发现强化学习仅影响1-3%的高熵决策点，并据此提出ReasonMaxxer，一种无强化学习的对比损失方法。
ai.result: ReasonMaxxer在三个模型家族、六个规模、六个数学推理基准上匹配或超越完整强化学习性能，训练成本降低约三个数量级。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解强化学习在推理任务中的实际作用，并提供一种高效替代方案。

idea_spark.idea: 利用模型自身熵值识别关键决策点，仅在这些点上施加对比损失，避免完整强化学习循环。
idea_spark.risk: 该方法可能对高熵点定义敏感，且在不同任务或模型上泛化性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从强化学习稀疏有效性的观察出发，设计更轻量的训练范式。

idea_spark.risk: 该方法可能对高熵点定义敏感，且在不同任务或模型上泛化性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从强化学习稀疏有效性的观察出发，设计更轻量的训练范式。

en.tldr: RL improves LLM reasoning not by learning new capabilities but by sparse policy selection at high-entropy decision points.
en.motivation: Evidence suggests RL only redistributes probability mass over existing solutions, questioning the necessity of the full RL loop.
en.method: Token-level analysis reveals RL affects only 1-3% of high-entropy positions; ReasonMaxxer applies contrastive loss only at those gated points using base-model rollouts.
en.result: ReasonMaxxer matches or exceeds full RL performance across three model families, six scales, and six math benchmarks, reducing training cost by ~1000x.
en.help_to_user: Clarifies the true role of RL in reasoning and offers a drastically cheaper alternative.

idea_spark.idea: Use model's own entropy to identify critical decision points and apply contrastive loss only there, bypassing full RL.
idea_spark.risk: Sensitivity to entropy threshold and potential limited generalization across tasks.
idea_spark.inspiration: Derive lightweight training paradigms from the observation that RL's effect is sparse and predictable.

papers.title: LAMP: Localization Aware Multi-camera People Tracking in Metric 3D World
papers.summary: Tracking 3D human motion from egocentric multi-camera headset is challenged by severe egomotion, partial visibility or occlusions and lack of training data. Existing methods designed for monocular video often require static or slowly-moving cameras and cannot efficiently leverage multi-view, calibrated and localized input. This makes them brittle and prone to fail on dynamic egocentric captures. We propose LAMP (Localization Aware Multi-camera People Tracking): a novel, simple framework to solve this via early disentanglement of observer and target motion. LAMP introduces a two-step process. First, we leverage the known device 6 DoF motion and calibration to convert detected 2D body keypoints from all cameras over a temporal window into a unified 3D world reference frame. Second, an end-to-end-trained spatio-temporal transformer fits 3D human motion directly to this 3D ray cloud. This "lift-then-fit" approach allows LAMP to learn and leverage a natural human motion prior in the world-space, as well as providing an elegant framework to flexibly incorporate information from multiple temporally asynchronous, partially observing and moving cameras. LAMP achieves state-of-the-art results on monocular benchmarks, while significantly outperforming baselines for our targeted egocentric setting.

ai.tldr: 提出LAMP框架，通过早期解耦观察者与目标运动，利用多相机头戴设备的6自由度位姿和标定，将2D关键点提升至统一3D世界坐标系，再使用时序Transformer拟合3D人体运动，在单目和自中心多相机场景均达最优。
ai.motivation: 现有单目人体跟踪方法依赖静态或慢速相机，无法有效利用多视角、已标定和定位的输入，在自中心动态捕捉中易失败。
ai.method: 两阶段流程：先利用设备6自由度运动和标定，将时间窗口内所有相机的2D关键点转换到统一3D世界参考系形成3D射线云；再通过端到端训练的时空Transformer直接拟合3D人体运动。
ai.result: 在单目基准上达到最优，在自中心多相机设置中显著超越基线。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种鲁棒的自中心多相机3D人体跟踪方案，适用于头戴式设备等动态场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将多相机2D关键点提升为3D射线云，再统一拟合，简化了多视角融合与运动建模。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖准确的设备6自由度位姿和标定，位姿误差可能影响跟踪精度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受“先提升再拟合”范式启发，可探索将类似思路用于其他传感器（如LiDAR点云）的人体跟踪。

zh.result: 在单目基准上达到最优，在自中心多相机设置中显著超越基线。
zh.help_to_user: 提供一种鲁棒的自中心多相机3D人体跟踪方案，适用于头戴式设备等动态场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将多相机2D关键点提升为3D射线云，再统一拟合，简化了多视角融合与运动建模。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖准确的设备6自由度位姿和标定，位姿误差可能影响跟踪精度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受“先提升再拟合”范式启发，可探索将类似思路用于其他传感器（如LiDAR点云）的人体跟踪。

en.tldr: Proposes LAMP, a framework that disentangles observer and target motion early, lifts 2D keypoints from multiple cameras into a unified 3D world using device 6-DoF poses and calibration, then fits 3D human motion via a spatio-temporal transformer, achieving state-of-the-art on both monocular and egocentric multi-camera settings.
en.motivation: Existing monocular human tracking methods assume static or slow cameras and cannot leverage multi-view calibrated inputs, failing in dynamic egocentric captures.
en.method: Two-stage pipeline: first, convert 2D keypoints from all cameras over a temporal window into a unified 3D world reference frame using known device 6-DoF motion and calibration, forming a 3D ray cloud; second, an end-to-end spatio-temporal transformer directly fits 3D human motion to this ray cloud.
en.result: Achieves state-of-the-art on monocular benchmarks and significantly outperforms baselines in the targeted egocentric setting.
en.help_to_user: Provides a robust solution for egocentric multi-camera 3D human tracking, suitable for head-mounted devices in dynamic scenes.

idea_spark.idea: Lifting multi-camera 2D keypoints into a 3D ray cloud and then fitting simplifies multi-view fusion and motion modeling.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on accurate device 6-DoF poses and calibration; pose errors may degrade tracking accuracy.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the 'lift-then-fit' paradigm, similar ideas could be explored for human tracking with other sensors like LiDAR point clouds.

papers.title: A Rayleigh criterion for mechanical instability: inducing activity by chemo-mechanical coupling
papers.summary: Instabilities in thermodynamic systems are often undesirable, as they can lead to loss of control or even catastrophic behavior. Yet, the same mechanisms can also generate rich nonequilibrium behavior and may play a constructive role in living systems. We introduce a theoretical framework, inspired by Rayleigh's analysis of thermoacoustic instabilities, to study the emergence of mechanical activity. In particular, we derive Rayleigh-like criteria governing the onset of activity and the generation of rotational motion in a slow Newtonian probe coupled to driven chemical processes, described by Markov jump processes. These criteria are expressed in terms of the phase relation between entropic and frenetic contributions, providing a transparent condition for when chemical driving results in sustained rotational or active mechanical motion.

ai.tldr: 受瑞利热声不稳定性分析启发，提出一个理论框架，研究化学驱动与机械运动耦合导致的力学活性涌现。
ai.motivation: 热力学系统中的不稳定性常被视为失控或灾难的根源，但在生命系统中，相同机制可能产生丰富的非平衡行为并发挥建设性作用。
ai.method: 将慢速牛顿探针耦合到由马尔可夫跳跃过程描述的驱动化学过程，推导出类似瑞利准则的条件，以熵和 frenetic 贡献的相位关系表达。
ai.result: 得到了化学驱动产生持续旋转或主动机械运动的透明条件，即瑞利类判据。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解化学-力学耦合如何诱导机械活性，为设计活性材料或微机械提供理论指导。

en.tldr: Inspired by Rayleigh's analysis of thermoacoustic instabilities, we propose a theoretical framework to study the emergence of mechanical activity via chemo-mechanical coupling.
en.motivation: Instabilities in thermodynamic systems are often undesirable, but in living systems they can generate rich nonequilibrium behavior and play a constructive role.
en.method: We derive Rayleigh-like criteria for a slow Newtonian probe coupled to driven chemical processes described by Markov jump processes, expressed in terms of the phase relation between entropic and frenetic contributions.
en.result: We obtain transparent conditions for when chemical driving results in sustained rotational or active mechanical motion.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical understanding of how chemo-mechanical coupling induces mechanical activity, guiding the design of active materials or microdevices.

idea_spark.idea: Design chemically driven micro-rotors by tuning the phase relation of chemical processes to achieve controlled rotation.
idea_spark.risk: The theoretical assumptions may be oversimplified; noise and thermal fluctuations in real systems could mask the phase effects.
idea_spark.inspiration: Bringing classical thermoacoustic instability ideas into active matter opens new perspectives for exploiting instabilities to achieve functionality.

papers.title: Two Steps Are All You Need: Efficient 3D Point Cloud Anomaly Detection with Consistency Models
papers.summary: Diffusion models are rapidly redefining 3D anomaly detection in point cloud data. As 3D sensing becomes integral to modern manufacturing, reliable anomaly detection is essential for high-throughput quality assurance and process control. Yet practical deployment on resource-constrained, latency-critical systems remains limited. Existing methods are often computationally prohibitive or unreliable in complex, unmasked regions, and diffusion pipelines are inherently bottlenecked by iterative denoising. In this work, we address this bottleneck by reformulating reconstructionbased anomaly detection through consistency learning, enabling direct prediction of anomaly-free geometry in one or two network evaluations. We further introduce a novel hybrid loss formulation that explicitly enforces reconstruction toward clean data. This design substantially reduces inference cost, achieving up to 80x faster runtime than the current state-of-the-art method, without GPU acceleration, while preserving strong detection performance. It outperforms R3D-AD on Anomaly-ShapeNet with 76.20% I-AUROC and remains competitive on Real3DAD with 72.80% I-AUROC, enabling efficient, low-latency anomaly detection on resource-constrained platforms, including drones, smart industrial cameras, and other edge devices.

ai.tldr: 提出基于一致性模型的3D点云异常检测方法，仅需一或两步网络评估即可实现高效检测，推理速度比现有方法快80倍。
ai.motivation: 现有扩散模型在3D点云异常检测中计算开销大、推理延迟高，难以部署在资源受限的边缘设备上。
ai.method: 通过一致性学习将迭代去噪过程压缩为单步或两步预测，并设计混合损失函数强制重建干净数据。
ai.result: 在Anomaly-ShapeNet上I-AUROC达76.20%，在Real3D-AD上达72.80%，推理速度比SOTA方法快80倍。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户快速理解如何用轻量级扩散模型实现3D点云异常检测，适合工业质检和边缘部署场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将混合损失函数中的干净数据先验与一致性模型结合，可能进一步用于无监督域适应或少样本异常检测。
idea_spark.risk: 在高度遮挡或噪声严重的点云上，单步预测可能丢失细节，需验证鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受扩散模型加速技术启发，探索将迭代过程压缩为极简步骤，同时保持生成质量。

en.tldr: Proposes a consistency-model-based 3D point cloud anomaly detection method that requires only one or two network evaluations, achieving up to 80x faster inference than prior methods.
en.motivation: Existing diffusion models for 3D point cloud anomaly detection suffer from high computational cost and latency, hindering deployment on resource-constrained edge devices.
en.method: Reformulates iterative denoising into one or two steps via consistency learning, and introduces a hybrid loss to enforce reconstruction toward clean data.
en.result: Achieves 76.20% I-AUROC on Anomaly-ShapeNet and 72.80% on Real3D-AD, with 80x speedup over state-of-the-art.
en.help_to_user: Helps users quickly grasp how to perform efficient 3D point cloud anomaly detection using lightweight diffusion models, suitable for industrial inspection and edge deployment.

idea_spark.idea: Combining the clean-data prior in the hybrid loss with consistency models may enable unsupervised domain adaptation or few-shot anomaly detection.
idea_spark.risk: Single-step prediction may lose fine details under heavy occlusion or noise; robustness needs further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by diffusion acceleration techniques, exploring extreme compression of iterative processes while maintaining generation quality.

papers.title: An extremely coarse feedback signal is sufficient for learning human-aligned visual representations
papers.summary: Artificial neural networks trained on visual tasks develop internal representations resembling those of the primate visual system, a discovery that has guided a decade of computational neuroscience. Research on building brain-aligned models has progressively embraced finer-grained supervisory signals, from object classification to contrastive self-supervised objectives that maximize distinctions among individual images, yet the role of supervisory signal granularity on brain alignment remains largely unexamined. Here we systematically investigate how the coarseness of a learning signal shapes representational alignment with human vision. We parametrically vary the level of signal granularity using a data-driven approach that partitions a set of training images into varied numbers of categories (2, 4, 8, 16, ..., 64) via PCA-based splits of pretrained embeddings. We train hundreds of neural networks across convolutional and transformer architectures on these coarse classification tasks and compare their representations to macaque electrophysiology recordings and human fMRI responses. We find that networks trained to distinguish as few as 8 broad categories learn representations that match or exceed the neural alignment of models distinguishing 1,000-classes. Even more strikingly, these coarsely trained networks align more closely with human perceptual similarity judgments than all other models evaluated, including networks trained with fine-grained supervision or self-supervision as well as leading large-scale vision models. These results demonstrate that human-like visual representations emerge from remarkably coarse feedback, reframing what learning signals vision may require and opening a path toward building AI systems that are more aligned with human perception.

ai.tldr: 研究发现，仅使用8个粗粒度类别进行训练的神经网络，其视觉表征与人类视觉系统的对齐程度，甚至优于使用1000类精细标签或自监督训练的模型。
ai.motivation: 探究监督信号的粗粒度程度如何影响神经网络与人类视觉的对齐，挑战了“精细监督信号是学习类人视觉表征所必需”的普遍假设。
ai.method: 通过PCA对预训练嵌入进行分割，将训练图像划分为2到64个不等的粗类别，训练数百个卷积和Transformer网络，并与猕猴电生理和人类fMRI数据比较。
ai.result: 仅用8个粗类别训练的模型，其神经对齐度达到甚至超过1000类模型，且在人类感知相似性判断上优于所有其他模型。
ai.help_to_user: 为构建更符合人类感知的AI系统提供了新思路：无需精细标签，粗粒度反馈即可学习类人视觉表征。

idea_spark.idea: 利用极少量粗类别（如8类）训练视觉编码器，再结合少量人类偏好数据微调，可高效获得与人类对齐的视觉特征。
idea_spark.risk: 粗类别定义依赖预训练嵌入的PCA分割，可能引入偏差；在复杂场景下粗类别可能不足以捕捉细粒度差异。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发我们重新思考学习信号的信息量：或许“正确”的粗粒度比“更多”的细粒度更重要，类似于人类婴儿通过少量概念学习视觉世界。

idea_spark.risk: 粗类别定义依赖预训练嵌入的PCA分割，可能引入偏差；在复杂场景下粗类别可能不足以捕捉细粒度差异。

en.tldr: Training neural networks with as few as 8 coarse categories yields visual representations that match or exceed the brain alignment of models trained on 1,000 fine-grained classes, and outperform all others in human perceptual similarity judgments.
en.motivation: To systematically investigate how the coarseness of supervisory signals affects representational alignment with human vision, challenging the prevailing assumption that fine-grained supervision is necessary for learning human-like visual representations.
en.method: Parametrically varied signal granularity by partitioning training images into 2 to 64 categories via PCA-based splits of pretrained embeddings, trained hundreds of CNNs and Transformers, and compared representations to macaque electrophysiology and human fMRI.
en.result: Networks trained on only 8 broad categories achieved neural alignment comparable to or better than 1,000-class models, and aligned more closely with human perceptual similarity than all other evaluated models.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new direction for building AI systems aligned with human perception: coarse feedback signals suffice, eliminating the need for fine-grained labels.

idea_spark.idea: Train a vision encoder with very few coarse categories (e.g., 8), then fine-tune with a small amount of human preference data to efficiently obtain human-aligned visual features.
idea_spark.risk: Coarse category definition relies on PCA splits of pretrained embeddings, which may introduce bias; coarse categories may fail to capture fine-grained differences in complex scenes.
idea_spark.inspiration: Challenges the notion that more detailed supervision is always better; suggests that the 'right' coarse granularity may be more important than 'more' fine-grained information, akin to how human infants learn visual concepts from a few broad categories.

papers.title: Towards Wedge Construction of Four-Dimensional Non-Supersymmetric Theories and Torsion Classes
papers.summary: Motivated by recent proposals relating non-supersymmetric Type 0A theory to M-theory compactified on a singular wedge geometry, we study an M-theory compactification on a seven-manifold with G_2 structure, realized as a deformed K3 fibration over a compact three-manifold. In the Morrison--Vafa limit, the deformed K3 may be described locally as a non-trivial torus fibration over a base that is itself a pinched circle fibered over an interval. Once the doubled-spectrum decomposition and the local pinched structure are specified, we show that the G_2 torsion classes provide a natural and efficient way to characterize both the torsion of the seven-manifold and the resulting supersymmetry breaking in four dimensions. Reducing the system to ten dimensions in two inequivalent ways leads respectively to Type 0A and Type 0 heterotic theories compactified on two different non-Kahler manifolds, for which the SU(3) torsion classes furnish the appropriate mathematical description. In particular, we argue that the pinching deformation lies in the 27 of G_2, and that under the two reductions it is distributed differently into the W_2 and W_3 torsion classes of the corresponding SU(3) structures. In the supersymmetric limit, and under suitable assumptions, the two resulting theories may become U-dual to one another. Away from that limit, however, we argue that any such duality should be treated with considerable caution.

ai.tldr: 本文研究M理论在具有G_2结构的七维流形上的紧化，通过楔形几何构造四维非超对称理论，并利用挠率类描述超对称破缺。
ai.motivation: 受近期将非超对称Type 0A理论与M理论在奇异楔形几何上紧化的提议启发，探索更一般的构造。
ai.method: 将七维流形实现为变形K3纤维化，在Morrison-Vafa极限下局部描述为非平凡环面纤维化，并利用G_2挠率类刻画七维流形的挠率和四维超对称破缺。
ai.result: 展示了G_2挠率类如何自然地表征超对称破缺，并指出两种不等价约化分别得到Type 0A和Type 0杂化理论，其SU(3)挠率类分布不同。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解非超对称弦理论与M理论紧化之间的几何联系，以及挠率类在超对称破缺中的作用。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将楔形几何和挠率类分类应用于更一般的四维有效场论构造。
idea_spark.risk: 远离超对称极限时，对偶性需谨慎处理，可能缺乏严格数学证明。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从几何挠率类出发，可能启发新的超对称破缺模型或弦宇宙学场景。

en.tldr: This paper studies M-theory compactification on a seven-manifold with G_2 structure, realized as a deformed K3 fibration, to construct four-dimensional non-supersymmetric theories via wedge geometry, using torsion classes to characterize supersymmetry breaking.
en.motivation: Motivated by recent proposals linking non-supersymmetric Type 0A theory to M-theory on a singular wedge geometry, we explore a more general construction.
en.method: We realize the seven-manifold as a deformed K3 fibration over a compact three-manifold, describe it locally as a non-trivial torus fibration in the Morrison-Vafa limit, and use G_2 torsion classes to characterize both the torsion of the seven-manifold and the resulting supersymmetry breaking in four dimensions.
en.result: We show that G_2 torsion classes provide a natural characterization of supersymmetry breaking, and that two inequivalent reductions lead to Type 0A and Type 0 heterotic theories with different distributions of SU(3) torsion classes.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the geometric connection between non-supersymmetric string theories and M-theory compactifications, and the role of torsion classes in supersymmetry breaking.

idea_spark.idea: Explore applying wedge geometry and torsion class classification to more general four-dimensional effective field theory constructions.
idea_spark.risk: Away from the supersymmetric limit, dualities should be treated with caution and may lack rigorous mathematical proof.
idea_spark.inspiration: Geometric torsion classes may inspire new models of supersymmetry breaking or string cosmology scenarios.

papers.title: On Unbiased Parameter Estimation and Signal Reconstruction
papers.summary: In this paper, we expand the theory of depth-unbiased source localization to unbiased parameter estimation and signal reconstruction of an arbitrary number of non-zero parameters to be recovered. The topic touches on the concept of exact reconstructibility, most commonly known in compressed sensing and multisource estimation in various imaging problems. The theoretical results derive upper bounds on the number of recoverable parameters in the noiseless case, and a probability measure is defined to assess the probability of obtaining all non-zero parameters with correct magnitude order. The work provides a mathematical explanation of the open question regarding the noise robustness of standardized and unbiased methods. Also, the paper reveals a trade-off between the number of sensors and the signal-to-noise ratio. Numerical experiments demonstrate the theoretical findings.

ai.tldr: 本文扩展了深度无偏源定位理论，用于任意数量非零参数的无偏估计与信号重建，给出了无噪声情况下可恢复参数数量的上界，并定义了概率度量来评估正确幅度顺序下获得所有非零参数的概率。
ai.motivation: 为无偏参数估计和信号重建提供统一的理论框架，解释标准化和无偏方法的噪声鲁棒性这一开放问题。
ai.method: 基于精确可重构性概念，推导无噪声情况下的上界，定义概率度量，并分析传感器数量与信噪比之间的权衡。
ai.result: 给出了可恢复参数数量的上界，揭示了传感器数量与信噪比的权衡关系，数值实验验证了理论发现。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解无偏估计和信号重建的理论极限，以及噪声鲁棒性的数学基础。

idea_spark.idea: 利用概率度量设计自适应传感器配置，以在给定信噪比下最大化可恢复参数数量。
idea_spark.risk: 理论假设可能在实际噪声模型下不成立，需要验证对非高斯噪声的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 传感器数量与信噪比的权衡可启发低信噪比场景下采用更多传感器的策略。

en.tldr: This paper extends depth-unbiased source localization to unbiased parameter estimation and signal reconstruction for an arbitrary number of non-zero parameters, providing upper bounds on recoverable parameters in the noiseless case and a probability measure for correct magnitude order. It explains the noise robustness of standardized and unbiased methods and reveals a trade-off between sensor count and signal-to-noise ratio.
en.motivation: To provide a unified theoretical framework for unbiased parameter estimation and signal reconstruction, and to explain the open question of noise robustness in standardized and unbiased methods.
en.method: Based on the concept of exact reconstructibility, derive upper bounds for the noiseless case, define a probability measure, and analyze the trade-off between sensor count and signal-to-noise ratio.
en.result: Upper bounds on the number of recoverable parameters are given, a trade-off between sensor count and SNR is revealed, and numerical experiments validate the theoretical findings.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the theoretical limits of unbiased estimation and signal reconstruction, as well as the mathematical basis of noise robustness.

idea_spark.idea: Use the probability measure to design adaptive sensor configurations that maximize the number of recoverable parameters given a fixed SNR.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical assumptions may not hold under real-world noise models; robustness to non-Gaussian noise needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: The trade-off between sensor count and SNR can inspire strategies using more sensors in low-SNR scenarios.

papers.title: Continuous-Time Distribution Matching for Few-Step Diffusion Distillation
papers.summary: Step distillation has become a leading technique for accelerating diffusion models, among which Distribution Matching Distillation (DMD) and Consistency Distillation are two representative paradigms. While consistency methods enforce self-consistency along the full PF-ODE trajectory to steer it toward the clean data manifold, vanilla DMD relies on sparse supervision at a few predefined discrete timesteps. This restricted discrete-time formulation and mode-seeking nature of the reverse KL divergence tends to exhibit visual artifacts and over-smoothed outputs, often necessitating complex auxiliary modules -- such as GANs or reward models -- to restore visual fidelity. In this work, we introduce Continuous-Time Distribution Matching (CDM), migrating the DMD framework from discrete anchoring to continuous optimization for the first time. CDM achieves this through two continuous-time designs. First, we replace the fixed discrete schedule with a dynamic continuous schedule of random length, so that distribution matching is enforced at arbitrary points along sampling trajectories rather than only at a few fixed anchors. Second, we propose a continuous-time alignment objective that performs active off-trajectory matching on latents extrapolated via the student's velocity field, improving generalization and preserving fine visual details. Extensive experiments on different architectures, including SD3-Medium and Longcat-Image, demonstrate that CDM provides highly competitive visual fidelity for few-step image generation without relying on complex auxiliary objectives. Code is available at https://github.com/byliutao/cdm.

ai.tldr: 提出连续时间分布匹配（CDM），将分布匹配蒸馏从离散时间步扩展到连续优化，无需复杂辅助模块即可实现少步图像生成的高视觉保真度。
ai.motivation: 现有分布匹配蒸馏（DMD）依赖稀疏的离散时间步监督，导致视觉伪影和过度平滑输出，常需GAN或奖励模型等辅助模块。
ai.method: 采用动态连续时间调度替代固定离散调度，并在学生速度场外推的隐变量上执行主动离轨迹匹配。
ai.result: 在SD3-Medium和Longcat-Image等架构上，CDM在少步生成中取得高视觉保真度，无需复杂辅助目标。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过连续时间优化提升扩散模型蒸馏的生成质量，减少对辅助模块的依赖。

idea_spark.idea: 将离散时间步的分布匹配扩展为连续时间优化，并引入离轨迹匹配以增强泛化。
idea_spark.risk: 连续时间调度可能增加训练复杂度，且离轨迹匹配的稳定性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从连续时间视角重新设计蒸馏框架，避免离散时间步的局限性。

en.tldr: Proposes Continuous-Time Distribution Matching (CDM), extending distribution matching distillation from discrete timesteps to continuous optimization, achieving high visual fidelity for few-step image generation without complex auxiliary modules.
en.motivation: Vanilla DMD relies on sparse discrete timestep supervision, leading to visual artifacts and over-smoothed outputs, often requiring auxiliary modules like GANs or reward models.
en.method: Replaces fixed discrete schedule with a dynamic continuous schedule and performs active off-trajectory matching on latents extrapolated via the student's velocity field.

idea_spark.risk: Continuous scheduling may increase training complexity, and the stability of off-trajectory matching needs further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Redesigning distillation framework from a continuous-time perspective to overcome limitations of discrete timesteps.

papers.title: VideoRouter: Query-Adaptive Dual Routing for Efficient Long-Video Understanding
papers.summary: Video large multimodal models increasingly face a scalability bottleneck: long videos produce excessively long visual-token sequences, which sharply increase memory and latency during inference. While existing compression methods are effective in specific settings, most are either weakly query-aware or apply a fixed compression policy across frames, proving suboptimal when visual evidence is unevenly distributed over time. To address this, we present VideoRouter, a query-adaptive dual-router framework built on InternVL for budgeted evidence allocation. The Semantic Router predicts the dominant allocation policy, choosing between broad temporal coverage and adaptive high-resolution preservation, while the Image Router uses early LLM layers to score frame relevance. This enables aggressive compression on less relevant frames while preserving detail on critical evidence frames. To train both routers, we build Video-QTR-10K for allocation-policy supervision and Video-FLR-200K for frame-relevance supervision. Experiments on VideoMME, MLVU, and LongVideoBench show that VideoRouter consistently improves over the InternVL baseline under comparable or lower budgets, achieving up to a 67.9% token reduction.

ai.tldr: 提出VideoRouter，一种查询自适应双路由框架，用于高效长视频理解，在InternVL基础上实现高达67.9%的token压缩。
ai.motivation: 长视频产生过长的视觉token序列，导致推理时内存和延迟剧增；现有压缩方法要么查询感知弱，要么对所有帧采用固定策略，无法适应视觉证据不均匀分布的情况。
ai.method: 构建双路由框架：语义路由预测主导分配策略（宽时间覆盖或自适应高分辨率保留），图像路由利用早期LLM层评分帧相关性，对不相关帧激进压缩，对关键帧保留细节。
ai.result: 在VideoMME、MLVU和LongVideoBench上，VideoRouter在相同或更低预算下持续优于InternVL基线，最高实现67.9%的token减少。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户高效处理长视频，降低计算成本，同时保持或提升理解准确性。

idea_spark.idea: 将查询自适应路由与早期LLM层评分结合，实现动态预算分配。
idea_spark.risk: 路由训练需要大量标注数据（Video-QTR-10K和Video-FLR-200K），可能限制泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类视觉注意力机制启发，对重要区域分配更多计算资源。

en.tldr: Proposes VideoRouter, a query-adaptive dual-router framework for efficient long-video understanding, achieving up to 67.9% token reduction on InternVL.
en.motivation: Long videos produce excessively long visual-token sequences, sharply increasing memory and latency; existing compression methods are either weakly query-aware or apply fixed policies, suboptimal for unevenly distributed visual evidence.
en.method: Builds a dual-router framework: Semantic Router predicts dominant allocation policy (broad temporal coverage or adaptive high-resolution preservation), Image Router uses early LLM layers to score frame relevance, enabling aggressive compression on irrelevant frames while preserving detail on critical ones.
en.result: On VideoMME, MLVU, and LongVideoBench, VideoRouter consistently outperforms InternVL baseline under comparable or lower budgets, achieving up to 67.9% token reduction.
en.help_to_user: Helps users efficiently process long videos, reducing computational cost while maintaining or improving understanding accuracy.

idea_spark.idea: Combining query-adaptive routing with early LLM layer scoring for dynamic budget allocation.
idea_spark.risk: Router training requires large annotated datasets (Video-QTR-10K and Video-FLR-200K), potentially limiting generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by human visual attention, allocating more computation to important regions.

papers.title: Liouville Theorems for Stationary Navier-Stokes Equations via the Radial Velocity Component
papers.summary: We study Liouville-type results for the stationary Navier--Stokes equations in $\mathbb{R}^3$. We prove that any $\dot{H}^1(\mathbb{R}^3)$ solution is trivial under an integrability condition imposed only on the radial component of the velocity, namely $u_ρ(x) \in L^p(\mathbb{R}^3)$ with $3/2 < p \leq 3$. We also establish a uniqueness result in a variable-exponent setting, where an $L^6$-type condition is required only on a bounded region, while the exponent approaches the critical value $3$ at infinity. Our analysis reveals that the rigidity of the stationary Navier--Stokes system can be driven by localized and radial integrability properties, rather than uniform global conditions.

ai.tldr: 研究三维稳态Navier-Stokes方程的Liouville型结果，证明在径向速度分量的可积条件下，任何H^1解都是平凡的，并建立了变指数设定下的唯一性结果。
ai.motivation: 探索稳态Navier-Stokes方程解的刚性是否可由局部和径向可积性驱动，而非全局一致条件。
ai.method: 利用径向速度分量的可积性条件（L^p，3/2 < p ≤ 3）和变指数设定，结合H^1空间分析。
ai.result: 在径向速度分量的可积条件下，任何H^1解都是平凡的；在变指数设定下，仅在有限区域上施加L^6型条件，指数在无穷远处趋近临界值3，得到唯一性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了稳态Navier-Stokes方程解的唯一性和平凡性判据，有助于理解流体动力学中的刚性现象。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将径向速度分量的可积性条件与涡量或压力场结合，探索更弱的全局条件。
idea_spark.risk: 变指数设定可能难以直接应用于数值模拟或实验验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 局部可积性驱动全局刚性，启发在湍流或边界层问题中寻找类似局部条件。

zh.tldr: 研究三维稳态Navier-Stokes方程的Liouville型结果，证明在径向速度分量的可积条件下，任何H^1解都是平凡的，并建立了变指数设定下的唯一性结果。

zh.help_to_user: 提供了稳态Navier-Stokes方程解的唯一性和平凡性判据，有助于理解流体动力学中的刚性现象。

en.tldr: We study Liouville-type results for the stationary Navier-Stokes equations in R^3, proving that any H^1 solution is trivial under an integrability condition on the radial velocity component, and establish a uniqueness result in a variable-exponent setting.
en.motivation: To explore whether rigidity of stationary Navier-Stokes solutions can be driven by localized and radial integrability properties rather than uniform global conditions.
en.method: Using integrability conditions on the radial velocity component (L^p, 3/2 < p ≤ 3) and a variable-exponent setting with an L^6-type condition on a bounded region, combined with H^1 space analysis.
en.result: Any H^1 solution is trivial under the radial integrability condition; uniqueness is obtained in the variable-exponent setting where the exponent approaches the critical value 3 at infinity.
en.help_to_user: Provides criteria for triviality and uniqueness of stationary Navier-Stokes solutions, aiding understanding of rigidity in fluid dynamics.

idea_spark.idea: Try combining radial velocity integrability with vorticity or pressure fields to explore weaker global conditions.
idea_spark.risk: Variable-exponent settings may be difficult to apply directly in numerical simulations or experimental validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Local integrability driving global rigidity inspires searching for similar local conditions in turbulence or boundary layer problems.

papers.title: GATHER: Convergence-Centric Hyper-Entity Retrieval for Zero-Shot Cell-Type Annotation
papers.summary: Zero-shot single-cell cell-type annotation aims to determine a cell's type from a given set of expressed genes without any training. Existing knowledge-graph-based RAG approaches retrieve evidence by expanding from source entities and relying on iterative LLM reasoning. However, in this setting each query contains tens to hundreds of genes, where no single gene is decisive and the label emerges only from their collective co-occurrence. Such hyper-entity queries fundamentally challenge local, entity-wise exploration strategies, which reason from individual genes, leading to poor scalability and substantial LLM cost. We propose GATHER (Graph-Aware Traversal with Hyper-Entity Retrieval), a convergence-centric retriever tailored to hyper-entity queries. It performs global multi-source graph traversal and identifies topological convergence points -- nodes jointly reachable from many input genes. These convergence nodes act as high-information hyper-entities that capture entity synergy. By incorporating node- and path-importance scoring, GATHER selects informative evidence entirely without LLM involvement during retrieval. Instantiated on a self-constructed cell-centric biological knowledge graph (VCKG), GATHER outperforms strong KG-RAG baselines (ToG, ToG-2, RoG, PoG) on two datasets (Immune and Lung), achieving the highest exact-match accuracy (27.45% and 59.64%) with only a single LLM call per sample, compared to 2--61 calls for KG-RAG baselines. Our results demonstrate that convergence nodes compress multi-entity signals into compact, high-information evidence that conveys more per item than multi-hop paths, providing an efficient global alternative to local entity-wise reasoning.

ai.tldr: 提出GATHER方法，通过全局图遍历和拓扑收敛点检索，实现零样本单细胞类型注释，仅需一次LLM调用即达到最优准确率。
ai.motivation: 现有基于知识图谱的RAG方法在零样本细胞注释中，面对包含数十至数百个基因的超实体查询时，局部实体探索策略可扩展性差且LLM成本高。
ai.method: 构建细胞中心知识图谱VCKG，采用全局多源图遍历识别拓扑收敛点（多个输入基因共同可达的节点），结合节点与路径重要性评分，无需LLM参与检索过程。
ai.result: 在Immune和Lung数据集上，GATHER的精确匹配准确率分别达27.45%和59.64%，远超现有KG-RAG基线，且每样本仅需一次LLM调用。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种高效、低成本的零样本细胞类型注释方法，适用于缺乏标注数据的单细胞分析场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将收敛点作为压缩多实体信号的证据单元，替代传统多跳路径，提升信息密度。
idea_spark.risk: 收敛点可能丢失部分局部细节信息，在需要精细区分亚型时可能不足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用图拓扑结构中的汇聚特性，将多实体协同信号转化为单一高信息节点，启发其他需要聚合多源信息的检索任务。

zh.method: 构建细胞中心知识图谱VCKG，采用全局多源图遍历识别拓扑收敛点（多个输入基因共同可达的节点），结合节点与路径重要性评分，无需LLM参与检索过程。
zh.result: 在Immune和Lung数据集上，GATHER的精确匹配准确率分别达27.45%和59.64%，远超现有KG-RAG基线，且每样本仅需一次LLM调用。
zh.help_to_user: 提供一种高效、低成本的零样本细胞类型注释方法，适用于缺乏标注数据的单细胞分析场景。

idea_spark.risk: 收敛点可能丢失部分局部细节信息，在需要精细区分亚型时可能不足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用图拓扑结构中的汇聚特性，将多实体协同信号转化为单一高信息节点，启发其他需要聚合多源信息的检索任务。

en.tldr: Proposes GATHER, a convergence-centric retriever for zero-shot cell-type annotation, achieving state-of-the-art accuracy with only one LLM call per sample.
en.motivation: Existing KG-RAG methods struggle with hyper-entity queries containing tens to hundreds of genes, as local entity-wise exploration is unscalable and costly.
en.method: Builds a cell-centric knowledge graph VCKG, performs global multi-source graph traversal to identify topological convergence nodes, and selects informative evidence without LLM involvement.
en.result: GATHER achieves exact-match accuracy of 27.45% and 59.64% on Immune and Lung datasets, outperforming strong baselines with minimal LLM calls.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient and cost-effective zero-shot cell-type annotation method for single-cell analysis without labeled data.

idea_spark.idea: Use convergence nodes as compressed evidence units that capture multi-entity synergy, replacing traditional multi-hop paths.
idea_spark.risk: Convergence nodes may lose fine-grained local details, potentially insufficient for distinguishing subtle subtypes.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging topological convergence in graphs to aggregate multi-source signals into single high-information nodes inspires other retrieval tasks requiring multi-source aggregation.

papers.title: Is this Build Failure Related to my Patch? An Empirical Study of Unrelated Build Failures in Continuous Integration
papers.summary: Continuous Integration (CI) systems often run many builds concurrently. In this setting, a legitimate build failure may not be caused by the code push that triggered it. Such unrelated build failures can waste developer effort because developers must determine whether the failure is actionable for their current change. We study 77,354 CI build failures from seven open source Apache projects to understand and predict unrelated build failures. We find that developers spend a median of 4 hours identifying whether a failure is related or unrelated to their push. We also perform a document analysis of 371 confirmed unrelated build failures sampled from 10,316 potentially unrelated failures. The analysis shows that unrelated test failures account for 20% of the cases in which developers classify build failures as unrelated. To predict unrelated build failures, we extract 33 features from issue reports, issue comments, and commits associated with the triggering push. We build semi-supervised Positive and Unlabeled (PU) learning models for seven Apache projects. The models achieve precision from 0.70 to 0.88, recall from 0.30 to 1.00, F1-score from 0.44 to 0.91, and AUC from 0.63 to 0.97. Feature importance analysis shows that CI latency, repeated error messages, and the number of preceding comments are useful indicators of unrelated build failures. These results show that PU learning can help developers identify build failures that are unlikely to be caused by their current push.

ai.tldr: 对Apache开源项目77,354次CI构建失败进行实证研究，发现约20%的失败与开发者推送无关，开发者平均花费4小时判断失败是否相关。
ai.motivation: CI系统中并发构建常导致与当前推送无关的构建失败，浪费开发者时间，需要自动识别此类失败。
ai.method: 从371个确认无关的失败中提取33个特征（CI延迟、重复错误信息、评论数等），使用半监督正无标签（PU）学习建模。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助开发者快速识别与当前推送无关的构建失败，减少排查时间。

idea_spark.idea: 结合CI流水线上下文（如提交消息、测试历史）构建更丰富的特征集，提升无关失败预测的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.risk: 特征依赖项目特定模式，跨项目泛化性可能受限；PU学习对未标记数据质量敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用CI延迟和重复错误信息作为关键信号，启发设计轻量级实时预警工具。

zh.motivation: CI系统中并发构建常导致与当前推送无关的构建失败，浪费开发者时间，需要自动识别此类失败。
zh.method: 从371个确认无关的失败中提取33个特征（CI延迟、重复错误信息、评论数等），使用半监督正无标签（PU）学习建模。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助开发者快速识别与当前推送无关的构建失败，减少排查时间。

idea_spark.idea: 结合CI流水线上下文（如提交消息、测试历史）构建更丰富的特征集，提升无关失败预测的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.risk: 特征依赖项目特定模式，跨项目泛化性可能受限；PU学习对未标记数据质量敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用CI延迟和重复错误信息作为关键信号，启发设计轻量级实时预警工具。

en.tldr: An empirical study of 77,354 CI build failures from seven Apache projects reveals that about 20% of failures are unrelated to the developer's push, costing a median of 4 hours to diagnose.
en.motivation: Concurrent CI builds often produce failures unrelated to the triggering code push, wasting developer effort in determining actionability.
en.method: Extracted 33 features from issue reports, comments, and commits; built semi-supervised Positive and Unlabeled (PU) learning models for seven Apache projects.
en.result: PU models achieved precision 0.70-0.88, recall 0.30-1.00, F1-score 0.44-0.91, and AUC 0.63-0.97 across projects.
en.help_to_user: Helps developers quickly identify build failures unlikely caused by their current push, reducing diagnostic time.

idea_spark.idea: Enrich feature set with CI pipeline context (e.g., commit messages, test history) to improve robustness of unrelated failure prediction.
idea_spark.risk: Features may be project-specific, limiting cross-project generalization; PU learning is sensitive to unlabeled data quality.
idea_spark.inspiration: CI latency and repeated error messages as key signals inspire lightweight real-time alerting tools.

papers.title: Space-Time Diversity in Observability and Estimation on Product Lie Groups
papers.summary: Robust state estimation in coupled dynamical systems depends critically not only on sensor quality but on the structural alignment between observation channels and the system's intrinsic dynamics. This paper develops a rigorous framework for analyzing spatial and temporal diversity in dynamical state estimation on product Lie groups, drawing structural parallels to diversity gains in space-time coding. Three main results are established: (i) coupling-based necessary and sufficient conditions for cross-factor observability, showing that a sensor local to one group factor renders another factor observable if and only if the dynamics propagate error directions across the corresponding Lie algebra components; (ii) a spatial diversity saturation theorem identifying precisely when additional observation channels fail to expand the propagated observation subspace and thus provide no structural benefit; and (iii) a time-space diversity decomposition that exactly separates instantaneous spatial information from accumulated temporal information in the estimation error covariance. The framework is applied to planar SE(2) and spatial SE(3) navigation, yielding exact observability guarantees for redundant and non redundant sensor architectures in modern robotics and autonomous vehicles. These results extend classical observability theory beyond Euclidean state spaces, exposing structural constraints invisible to standard rank-based analysis that fundamentally govern robust inference in coupled dynamical systems.

ai.tldr: 本文在乘积李群上建立了时空多样性分析框架，揭示了耦合动力系统中观测通道与系统内在动力学的结构对齐对鲁棒状态估计的关键作用。
ai.motivation: 经典可观测性理论在欧几里得状态空间外存在结构盲区，无法解释耦合系统中传感器冗余为何有时无效。
ai.method: 借鉴空时编码的多样性增益概念，在乘积李群上推导交叉因子可观测性的耦合条件、空间多样性饱和定理以及时-空多样性分解。
ai.result: 给出了平面SE(2)和空间SE(3)导航的精确可观测性保证，识别了标准秩分析无法揭示的结构约束。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解在耦合机器人系统中如何设计传感器布局以最大化估计性能，避免冗余传感器带来的无效开销。

idea_spark.idea: 将空时编码的多样性增益概念引入状态估计，为传感器布局提供理论指导。
idea_spark.risk: 理论框架依赖李群结构，对非李群耦合系统可能不适用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从通信领域的空时编码获得灵感，将多样性增益类比到观测通道的时空配置。

en.tldr: This paper develops a rigorous framework for space-time diversity in state estimation on product Lie groups, revealing structural constraints invisible to standard rank-based observability analysis.
en.motivation: Classical observability theory fails to capture structural constraints in coupled dynamical systems, where redundant sensors may provide no benefit.
en.method: Borrowing diversity gain concepts from space-time coding, the paper derives coupling-based observability conditions, a spatial diversity saturation theorem, and a time-space diversity decomposition on product Lie groups.
en.result: Exact observability guarantees are provided for planar SE(2) and spatial SE(3) navigation, exposing structural constraints beyond standard rank analysis.
en.help_to_user: Helps users design sensor configurations in coupled robotic systems to maximize estimation performance and avoid wasteful redundancy.

idea_spark.idea: Introduce diversity gain from space-time coding into state estimation to guide sensor placement theoretically.
idea_spark.risk: The framework relies on Lie group structure and may not apply to non-Lie-group coupled systems.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by space-time coding in communications, analogizing diversity gain to spatiotemporal configuration of observation channels.

papers.title: Delay-Robust Deep Reinforcement Learning for Ranging-Free Channel Access under Mobility in Underwater Acoustic Networks
papers.summary: Long propagation delays in underwater acoustic networks (UWANs) cause spatio-temporal uncertainty, constraining channel utilization in medium access control (MAC) protocols. Node mobility within autonomous underwater vehicle scenarios exacerbates these challenges by introducing dynamic propagation delays and varying spatial topologies. We present MobiU-MAC, a deep reinforcement learning (DRL)-based MAC protocol for mobile node access in UWANs that maximizes throughput via autonomous learning. MobiU-MAC incorporates CHILL-STER, a novel DRL algorithm optimized for UWANs that is both ranging-free and delay-robust. CHILL-STER employs a credit horizon-limited $λ$-return (CHILL-Return) mechanism to achieve stable learning under asynchronous delayed rewards, while the companion spatio-temporal experience replay (STER) mechanism addresses topological changes arising from node mobility. This work also demonstrates theoretically that DRL attains optimal policy learning equivalent to a standard Markov decision process under long propagation delays without requiring ranging. Performance evaluations indicate that MobiU-MAC outperforms existing DRL-based MAC protocols for UWANs by leveraging the maximum system delay boundary without ranging overhead, supporting the effectiveness of the proposed theory and algorithm in complex underwater dynamic environments.

papers.title: Neuromorphic visual attention for Sign-language recognition on SpiNNaker
papers.summary: Sign-language recognition has achieved substantial gains in classification accuracy in recent years; however, the latency and power requirements of most existing methods limit their suitability for real-time deployment. Neuromorphic sensing and processing offer an alternative paradigm based on sparse, event-driven computation that supports low-latency and energy-efficient perception. In this work, we introduce an end-to-end neuromorphic architecture for American Sign Language (ASL) fingerspelling recognition that integrates a spiking visual attention mechanism for online region-of-interest extraction with a compact spiking neural network deployed on the SpiNNaker neuromorphic platform. We benchmark the proposed system against two datasets: a synthetically generated event-based version of the Sign Language MNIST dataset and a natively recorded ASL-DVS dataset, whilst providing a comprehensive overview of Sign-language recognition and related work. This work yields competitive performance in simulation (92.27%) and comparable performance on neuromorphic hardware deployment (83.1%), while achieving the most energy-efficient architecture (0.565 mW) and low latency (3 ms) across all benchmarked approaches. Despite its compact design, the system demonstrates the suitability of task-dependent visual attention applications for edge deployment.

ai.tldr: 提出了一种端到端的神经形态架构，结合脉冲视觉注意机制和紧凑型脉冲神经网络，在SpiNNaker平台上实现低延迟、低功耗的美国手语指拼识别。
ai.motivation: 现有手语识别方法延迟高、功耗大，不适合实时部署；神经形态感知与处理提供稀疏、事件驱动的低延迟、高能效替代方案。
ai.method: 集成脉冲视觉注意机制进行在线感兴趣区域提取，配合紧凑型脉冲神经网络，部署于SpiNNaker神经形态硬件。
ai.result: 仿真准确率92.27%，硬件部署准确率83.1%，功耗仅0.565 mW，延迟3 ms，在所有对比方法中能效最优。
ai.help_to_user: 展示了神经形态视觉注意在边缘端手语识别中的可行性与高效性，为低功耗实时手势交互提供参考。

idea_spark.idea: 将脉冲视觉注意与更复杂的脉冲神经网络（如脉冲卷积LSTM）结合，提升动态手势序列识别能力。
idea_spark.risk: 硬件部署准确率低于仿真，可能源于神经形态硬件的精度限制或噪声影响，需进一步优化网络或硬件校准。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受生物视觉注意机制启发，未来可探索多模态脉冲融合（如视觉+肌电）以增强鲁棒性。
